Genesis21:29 Abimeleeki Abrahaama, «Ha neeni dumma shaakka wotseedda laappun mac'c'a dorssaa maratuwaa ayaw shaakkaadii?» yaagiide oochcheedda." 
Genesis21:30 Abrahaame, «Taani ha haatsaa ollaa bookkeeddawoo markka gidana mala, ha laappun mac'c'a dorssaa maratuwaa ta kushiyaappe akka» yaageedda." 
Genesis21:31 Hewaan he laau asatuu c'aak'k'eteedda diraw, he sa'ay Berssaabehe geetetteedda." 
Genesis21:32 Berssaabehen c'aak'uwaa c'aak'k'eteeddawaappe guyye, Abimeleekenne Aa wotaadaratuu kaappuwaa Pikooli denddiide, Pilss's'eema biittaa simmeeddino." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahaame Berssaabehen Tamaariskke geetettiyaa mitsaa tokkeedda. Hewaan Godaa, Med'ina S'oossaa, suntsaa s'eeseedda." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahaame Pilss's'eema gadiyaan daro wodiyaa de'eedda. 
Genesis22:1 Hewaappe simmiide, S'oossay Abrahaama paac'c'eedda; I Aa, «Abrahaamee» yaagiide s'eeseedda. I, «Abee» yaagiide koyeedda." 
Genesis22:2 S'oossay, «Neeni siik'iyaa ne mes's'i itti na'aa Yisaak'a akkaade, Mooriyaa giyaa gadiyaa ba; yan taani new odiyaa itti deriyaa bollan Aa s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsaade taw yarshsha» yaageedda." 
Genesis22:3 Wonttetsa gallassi Abrahaame guuran denddiide, bare hariyaa c'aaneedda; bare k'oomatuwaappe laa""uwaanne bare na'aa Yisaak'a barenana akkiide, s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa mitsaa p'alk'k'i akkiide, S'oossay aw odeedda sa'aa baanaw denddeedda." 
Genesis22:4 Biide heezzentsa gallassi Abrahaame d'ok'k'u giide, he sa'aa haakuwaan be'eedda." 
Genesis22:5 Abrahaame bare k'oomatuwaa, «Ha hariyaana hawaan de'ishshite; taaninne ta na'ay yaa biide S'oossaw goyinniide, hinttenttukko simmana» yaageedda." 
Genesis22:6 Abrahaame yarshshuwaa mitsaa dentsiide, bare na'aa Yisaak'a tooseedda; tamaanne mashshaa I barew oyk'k'eedda. Unttunttu laa""u ittippe biishshin," 
Genesis22:7 Yisaak'i bare aawuwaa Abrahaama, «Ta aawoo» yaageedda. Abrahaame, «Abee, ta na'aw» yaageedda. I, «Tamaynne mitsay hawesh; shin s'uuggiide yarshshiyaa dorssaa maray hak'anee?» yaageedda." 
Genesis22:8 Abrahaame, «Ta na'aw, s'uuggiide yarshshiyaa dorssaa maraa S'oossay giigisana» yaageedda. Unttunttu laa""u ittippe beeddino." 
Genesis22:9 Unttunttu S'oossay aw odeedda sa'aa gakkeedda wode, Abrahaame yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa sa'aa yan gimbbiide, mitsaa maari yeggeedda; bare na'aa Yisaak'a k'achchiide, he mitsaa bollan gisiseedda." 
Genesis22:10 Abrahaame bare na'aa shukkanaw bare kushiyaa yeddiide mashshaa akkeedda. 
Genesis22:11 Shin Med'inaa Godaa kiitanchchay saluwaappe Aa, «Abrahaamee, Abrahaamee» yaagiide s'eeseedda. I, «Abee» giide koyeedda." 
Genesis22:12 Aa, «Na'aa bollan ne kushiyaa wotsoppa; Aa ayinne ootsoppa; neeni ne mes's'i itti na'aakka taana diggabeenna diraw, neeni S'oossaw yayyiyaawaa gidiyaawaa taani ha""i eray» yaageedda." 
Genesis22:13 Abrahaame d'ok'k'u gi s'eelliide, hewaan dorssaa ittuu kac'ii buuran geli k'as'etti utteeddawaa be'eedda. Abrahaame biide he dorssaa akkiide, bare na'aa diraw s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide yarshshi basheedda." 
Genesis22:14 Hewaa diraw Abrahaame, «Med'ina Goday immana» yaagiide he sa'aa suntseedda; hachche gakkanaasikka, «Med'inaa Godaa deriyaan imettana» geetettee." 
Genesis22:15 Med'inaa Godaa kiitanchchay saluwaappe laaentsiide Abrahaama s'eesiide yaageedda; 
Genesis22:16 «Med'ina Goday, ‹Hawaadan yaagaade new taani ta huup'iyaan c'aak'k'ay; neeni hawaa ootseedda dirawunne ne mes's'i itti na'aakka taana diggabeenna diraw," 
Genesis22:17 taani neena tumu anjjana; ne zeretsaakka taani saluwaa s'oolinttiyaa keenanne abbaa doonaa shafiyaa keena ootsaade c'orissana. Ne zeretsatuu barenttu morkkatuwaa katamatuwaa laattana. 
Genesis22:18 Neeni taw azazetteedda diraw, ha sa'aa kawutetsatuu ubbay ne zeretsaa baggana anjjettana› yaagee» yaageedda." 
Genesis22:19 Hewaappe guyye, Abrahaame bare k'oomatuwaakko simmiide, unttunttu ubbay ittippe Berssaabehe denddiide beeddino. Abrahaame Berssaabehen de'eedda." 
Genesis22:20 Hewaappe simmiide Abrahaamew, «Milkka ne ishaa Naakooraw naanaa yelaaddu;" 
Genesis22:21 unttunttune bayiray Uus'a; Uus'a ishatuu Buuza," 
Genesis22:22 Araama aawuwaa K'amu'eela, Keesade, Haazo, Pilddaasha, Yidilaafanne Baatu'eela." 
Genesis22:23 Hawantta ha hosppun naanaakka Milkka Abrahaame ishaa Naakooraw yelaaddu; Baatu'eeli Ribik'o yeleedda. 
Genesis22:24 Raa'uma giyaa Aa k'oomata k'ay S'ebaaha, Gahaama, Tahaashanne Maa'ika yelaaddu» yaagiide odeeddino." 
Genesis23:1 Saara s'eetanne laatamanne laappun laytsaa de'aaddu. 
Genesis23:2 Hewaappe guyye iza Kanaane gadiyaan de'iyaa (Kebroone giyaa) K'iriyaati-Arbba'a kataman hayk'k'aaddu. Abrahaame Saariw yeekkanawunne kayyottanaw beedda. 
Genesis23:3 Yeekki simmiide, Abrahaame bare machchatti anhaa mataappe denddi biide, Hiitetuwaa hawaadan yaageedda;" 
Genesis23:4 «Taani hinttenttu giddon betenne imatsaa; ta machchatti anhaa mooganaw taw hinttenttu gadiyaappe duufuwaa zaleerikkitee!» yaageedda. 
Genesis23:5 Hiitetuu aw, «Godaw, nuuni odiyaawaa sisa; neeni nu giddon wolk'k'aama kaappuwaa; neeni ne machchatti anhaa nu duufuwaappe new lo""eeddawaan mooga; neeni ne machchatti anhaa mooganaw bare duufuwaa ooninne neena diggenna» yaagi zaareeddino." 
Genesis23:6  
Genesis23:7 Yaagina Abrahaame denddi ek'k'iide, Hiitetuwaa sintsan goynneedda." 
Genesis23:8 I unttunttoo, «Hinttenttu taana, ‹Ne machchatti anhaa mooga› gooppe sisite; S'ohaara na'aa Efiroonaw Aa gadiyaa gas'an de'iyaa Maakip'eela giyaa gonggoluwaa taw duufuwaa kessanaw zal""ana mala kumentsaa gatiyaan nuuna zal""iseerikkite» yaageedda." 
Genesis23:9  
Genesis23:10 Hiitiyaa Efiroone he wode katamaa penggiyaan shiik'eedda bare asaa giddon utteedda; Hiitetuu ubbay sisishshin, Abrahaamew yaageedda;" 
Genesis23:11 «Hewaadan gidenna; ta godaw, ta odiyaawaa sisa; taani gadiyaakka Aa giddon de'iyaa gonggoluwaakka new immay; taani new Aa ta asaa sintsan immay; neeni ne machchatti anhaa mooga» yaageedda." 
Genesis23:12 Abrahaame he gade asaa sintsan zaaretsi goynneedda," 
Genesis23:13 asay sisishshin Efiroona, «Ta odiyaawaa sisaarikkii! Taani he gadiyaa gatiyaa c'iggana; neeni taappe akkaarikkii! Hewaan taani ta machchatti anhaa moogana» yaageedda." 
Genesis23:14 Efiroone Abrahaamew zaariide, «Ta godaw, taani odiyaawaa sisa; gadii oyddu s'eetu s'agaraa biraa kessiyaawaa; shin hewe ne giddoninne ta giddon ayinne gidenna; ne machchatti anhaa mooga» yaageedda." 
Genesis23:15  
Genesis23:16 Abrahaame Hiitetuu sisishshin, Efiroone geedda gatiyaa mayyeedda; he wode shaluwaan oyddu s'eetu s'agaraa biraa Efiroonaw immeedda." 
Genesis23:17 Mamire katamaa matan Maakip'eelan de'iyaa Efiroona gadii, hewan de'iyaa gonggoluunne he gadiyaan de'iyaa mitsaa ubbay," 
Genesis23:18 katamaa penggiyaan shiik'eedda Hiitetuwaa ubbaa sintsan higgiyaan Abrahaame gade gideedda. 
Genesis23:19 Hewaappe guyye, Abrahaame bare machchatto Saaro Kanaane gadiyaan (Kebroone giyaa) Mamire katamaa matan de'iyaa Maakip'eela giyaa gade gonggoluwaan moogeedda." 
Genesis23:20 Hewaa diraw he gadiinne hewaan de'iyaa gonggoluu Hiitetuwaa sintsan higgiyaan Abrahaamew duufuwaa gideedda. 
Genesis24:1 Abrahaame loytsi laytsaa sugiide c'imeedda; Med'ina Goday Aa ubbabankka anjjeedda. 
Genesis24:2 Abrahaame bare k'oomaa, bare soo asaa ubbaw kaappotiyaa, bare asaa ubbaw godattiyaawaa hawaadan yaageedda; «Ne kushiyaan ta gulbbataa oyk'k'a;" 
Genesis24:3 taani unttunttu giddon de'iyaa Kanaanetuwaa mac'c'a naanatuwaappe ta na'aw machchatto oochchenna mala, Med'inaa Godaan, saluwaa S'oossaaninne sa'aa S'oossan taani neena c'aak'k'etsay;" 
Genesis24:4 shin neeni ta yeletteedda biittaa, ta dabbotuwaakko baade, ta na'aa Yisaak'aw machchatto oochcha» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:5 Aa k'oomay, «Mac'c'aanna taananna yaanaw dosennabaa gidooppe, ne na'aa neeni yeedda gadiyaa guyye afoo?» yaagiide oochcheedda." 
Genesis24:6 Abrahaame, «Ta na'aa yaa afenaadan neena era!" 
Genesis24:7 Med'ina Goday, saluwaa S'oossay, taana ta aawuwaa sooppenne ta yeletteedda biittaappe keseeddawe taw, ‹Ne zariyaw taani ha biittaa immana› yaagiide c'aak'k'eeddawe, neeni ta na'aw yaappe machchatto demmana mala, I bare kiitanchchaa neeppe sintsaw kiittana." 
Genesis24:8 Mishirata neenana guyye yaanaw dosennabaa gidooppe, ha taani neena c'aak'k'etseedda c'aak'uu new gometenna; shin ta na'aa yaa guyye ubbakka afoppa» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:9 K'oomay bare godaa Abrahaame gulbbataa oyk'k'eedda; ha yewoo c'aak'k'eedda. 
Genesis24:10 Hewaappe guyye, k'oomay bare godaa gaalotuwaappe tammuwaa akkiidde, bare godaa miishshaappekka muruta murutaa akkiidde beedda; Masp'p'es'oomiyaa giyaa gadiyaan Naakoora katamaa gakkeedda." 
Genesis24:11 Omarssi, mac'c'a Asay haatsaa tikkanaw yiyaa wodiyaan, katamaappe gas'an haatsaa ollaa matan bare gaalotuwaa gulbbatisseedda." 
Genesis24:12 Yaatiide I hawaadan yaagiide woosseedda; «Med'inaa Godaw, ta godaa Abrahaame S'oossaw, hachche taani k'oppaade yeeddabaa taw injjeya; k'ay ta godaa Abrahaamew lo""obaa ootsa." 
Genesis24:13 Be'a! Taani ha haatsaa pulttiyaa matan ek'k'ay; ha katamaa asaa mac'c'a naanay haatsaa tikkanaw haa yaana. 
Genesis24:14 Taani, ‹Ane otuwaa hokisaadde taana haatsaa ushsha› giyaa wode, izakka, ‹Hey usha; k'ay ne gaaluwaa taani ushshana› yaagiyaanna, henna ne k'oomaa Yisaak'aw neeni dooreeddaano gidu; neeni ta godaw lo""obaa ootseeddawaa taani hewaan erana» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:15 Biro I woosaa wurissenaan de'ishshin, Ribik'a haatsaa otuwaa tookkaade puttu gaaddu. Izo Baatu'eeli yeleedda; Baatu'eeli Milkka na'aa; Milkka Abrahaame ishaa Naakoora machchatto." 
Genesis24:16 Ribik'a loytsa puulanchchanne attuma Asay bochchibeenna wodoratto. Pulttuwaa duge wod'd'aade, bare otuwaa kuntsaade kessaaddu." 
Genesis24:17 He k'oomay iikko wos's'i biide izo, «Ne otuwaappe taana guutsa haatsaa ushshaarikkii!» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:18 Iza, «Eeno ta godaw, ushikkii» yaagaaddu. Elleellaadde otuwaa bare hashiyaappe wotsaade, gede zaara oyk'k'aadde Aa ushshaaddu." 
Genesis24:19 Aa ushsheeddawaappe guyye, «Ne gaalatuwaakka alana gakkanaw taani unttunttoo haatsaa duuk'k'ana» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis24:20 Atteedda haatsaa elleella wonggiriyaan tigaade, hara haatsaa duuk'k'anaw ollaa wos's'aaddu; gaalatuu ubbay alana gakkanaw, haatsaa ollaappe duuk'k'a duuk'k'aade ahaade wonggiriyaan tigaade ushshaaddu." 
Genesis24:21 I k'oppiide yeedda k'ofaa Med'inaa Goday injjeyiidde de'intto eranaw bitanii c'ou giide izo s'eellee. 
Genesis24:22 Gaalotuu haatsaa ushi simmiina, bitanii ichcheshu giraamenne bakka gideedda work'k'aa migiduwaanne, s'eetanne tammu giraame gideedda laa""u work'k'aa sagaayetuwaa keseedda;" 
Genesis24:23 izo, «Neeni O naatti? Ane taw oda; ne aawuwaa son nuw ak'iyaa sa'ay de'anee?» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:24 Iza, «Taani Baatu'eela naatto; Baatu'eeli Milkka Naakooraw yeleedda na'aa." 
Genesis24:25 Nuwaan gidiyaa dalaynne bassuu de'ee; k'ay hinttenttu ak'anawukka sa'ay de'ee» yaagaaddu. 
Genesis24:26 Bitanii gulbbati Med'inaa Godaw goynniidde," 
Genesis24:27 hawaadan yaageedda; «Ta godaw keekiyaawaanne ammanettiyaawaa aggibeenna Med'ina Goday, ta godaa Abrahaama S'oossay galatetto! Taani yiishshin, Med'inaa Goday taana ta godaa dabbatuwaa soy kaaletseedda» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:28 Naatta wos's'a baade, bare aati son de'iyaa asaw haneeddabaa odaaddu." 
Genesis24:29 Ribik'iw Laabaana giyaa ishay de'ee; Laabaani kare kesiide, haatsaa pulttuwaa matan de'iyaa bitaniyaakko wos's'eedda." 
Genesis24:30 Migiduwaanne bare michchati kushiyaan de'iyaa sagaayetuwaa be'eeddasaana Ribik'a bitanii barena geeddawaa odina sisosaanna, kesiide bitaniyaakko bi be'eedda; bitaniyaa gaalotuwaanna pulttuwaa matan ek'k'eeddawaa demmeedda." 
Genesis24:31 Aa, «Med'inaa Goday neena anjjeedawo, haaya! Neeni hawaan karen ayaw ek'k'ay? Taani new golliyaanne gaalotookka sa'aa giigissaad» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:32 Bitanii soo geleedda; Laabaani gaalotuwaa c'aanaa billeedda; dalaanne bassuwaa gaalotoo yegeedda. Gediyaa meec'c'anaw aasinne aanana de'iyaa asatoo haatsaa aheedda; 
Genesis24:33 k'umaykka Aa sintsa aad'd'eedda. Shin I, «Taani taana aheedabaa hinttenttoo odennan de'aadde k'umaa miikke» yaageedda. Laabaani, «Yaatooppe oda» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:34 Hewaa diraw I, «Taani Abrahaame k'oomaa." 
Genesis24:35 Med'inaa Goday ta godaa loytsi anjjina, I duretteedda; dorssaa, miizzaa, biraa, work'k'aa, attuma k'oomatuwaa, mac'c'a k'oomatuwaa, gaalotuwaanne haretuwaa aw immeedda." 
Genesis24:36 Ta godaa machata Saara bare c'iimmatetsaa laytsan aw attuma na'aa yelaaddu; I barew de'iyaawaa ubbaa aw immeedda. 
Genesis24:37 Ta goday taana hawaadan c'aak'k'iseedda; ‹Taani de'iyaa Kanaane biittaa mac'c'a naanatuwaappe ta na'aw machchatto oochchoppa; 
Genesis24:38 shin ta aawuwaa asaakko, ta zaratuwaakko baade, ta na'aw machchatto oochcha› yaageedda." 
Genesis24:39 Taani ta godaa, ‹Naatta taananna yaanaw dosennan aggooppe shin?› yaagaad." 
Genesis24:40 I, ‹Med'inaa Goday, taani Aa sintsan hametteeddawe neenana bare kiitanchchaa kiittana; neeni ta na'aw ta aawuwaa asaappe, ta zaratuwaappe machchatto demmana mala, ne biyaasaakka injjeyana." 
Genesis24:41 Neeni ta zaratuwaakko biina, unttunttu new izo immennan is's'ooppe, he wode new c'aak'uu gometenna› yaageedda." 
Genesis24:42 «Taani hachche ha pulttuwaakko yeedda wode yaagaad; ‹Med'inaa Godaw, ta godaa Abrahaame S'oossaw, ne shene gidooppe, taani biyaa yewuwaa injjeya." 
Genesis24:43 Be'a; taani ha pulttuwaa matan ek'k'ay; gellayatta ittina haatsaa tikkanaw yooppe, taani izo, «Taana ne otuwaappe guutsa haatsaa ushshaarikkii!» yaagana." 
Genesis24:44 Iza taana, «Eeno usha; k'ay ne gaalotookka taani haatsaa duuk'k'ana» yaagiyaanna, Med'inaa Goday ta godaa na'aw dooreeddaano gidu› yaagaad." 
Genesis24:45 «Taani ta wozanaan woossiyaawaa wurissenaan de'ishshin, Ribik'a bare otuwaa tookka akkaade, puttu gaaddu; pulttuwaa duge wod'd'aade haatsaa duuk'k'aadu; taani izo, ‹Taana haatsaa ushshaarikkii› yaagaad." 
Genesis24:46 «Iza elleella bare hashiyaappe otuwaa wotsaade, ‹Hekko usha; k'ay taani ne gaalotuwaa ushshana› yaagaaddu. Taani ushaad; k'ay ta gaalotuwaa iza ushshaaddu." 
Genesis24:47 «Taani izo, ‹Neeni O naatti?› yaagaad. «Iza, ‹Taani Baatu'eela naatto; Baatu'eeli, Milkka Naakooraw yeleedda na'aa› yaagaaddu. «Taani iziw migiduwaa aatsaad; izi kushiyaankka sagaayetuwaa wotsaad." 
Genesis24:48 Hewaappe guyye taani gulbbataade, Med'inaa Godaw goynnaad; taani Med'inaa Godaa, ta godaa Abrahaame S'oossaa, ta godaa ishaa na'aa naatto Aa na'aw akkanaw taana likke ogiyaa kaaletseeddawaa galatay." 
Genesis24:49 Haikka hinttenttu ta godaw keekanabaanne ammanettanawaa gidooppe, taw odite; gidana d'ayinttonne odite; hewaappe sintsan taani hananawaa erana» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:50 Laabaaninne Baatu'eeli zaariide yaageeddino; «Ha yewuu Med'inaa Godaappe yeedda; nuuni new yaa haa gaanaw danddayokko. 
Genesis24:51 Ribik'o hanno be'a; akkaade ba; Med'inaa Goday geeddawaadan ne godaa na'aw machchatto gidu» yaageeddino. 
Genesis24:52 Abrahaama k'oomay unttunttu giyaawaa siseedda wode, sa'aan gulbbatiide Med'inaa Godaw goynneedda." 
Genesis24:53 K'oomay biraa alleek'k'uwaanne work'k'aa alleek'k'uwaa, mayuwaakka kessiide, Ribik'iw immeedda; k'ay al""o miishshatuwaa izi ishawunne izi aatiw immeedda." 
Genesis24:54 Hewaappe guyye, inne aanana de'iyaawanttu meeddinonne usheeddino; yaatiide yan ak'eedino; unttunttu guuran denddiide, «Taana ta godaakko yeddite» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:55 Izi ishaynne izi aata, «Naatta itti tammu gallassaa keeshshaa nuunana takku; hewaappe guyye iza baana» yaageeddino." 
Genesis24:56 Shin I, «Med'inaa Goday taani yeeddawaa injjey diggina, hinttenttu taana gam""etsoppite; taani ta godaakko baana mala taana moyzzite» yaageedda." 
Genesis24:57 Unttunttu, «Naatto s'eesiide ane izo oochchoytte» yaageeddino." 
Genesis24:58 Ribik'o s'eesiide, «Ha bitaniyaanna baanii?» yaagiide oochcheeddino. Iza, «Ee; taani baana» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis24:59 Unttunttu barenttu michchato Ribik'o, izo dichchiyaanina, Abrahaama k'oomaananne Aa asatuwaana moyzzeeddino." 
Genesis24:60 Unttunttu Ribik'o, «Nu michchati Ribik'ee, sha""aappe sha""aa gakkanaw c'oratta. Ne zaratuu barenttu morkkatuwaa katamatuwaa laattino» yaagiide anjjeeddino." 
Genesis24:61 Hewaappe guyye, Ribik'anne izi danggaas'iretuu denddiide, gaalotuwaa toggiide, bitaniyaanna beeddino. Yaatina k'oomay Ribik'o akkiidde beedda." 
Genesis24:62 He wode Yisaak'i, «Taana Be'iyaa De'uwaa S'oossaa Pulttuwaa» giyaa pulttuwaa mata biide, Neegeeba woran de'ee." 
Genesis24:63 Itti gallassi omarssi Yisaak'i bare wozanaan k'oppiide dembbaa kesiide yuuyyee; I d'ok'k'u giide s'eelliyaa wode, gaalatuu yiyaawantta be'eedda." 
Genesis24:64 Ribik'akka d'ok'k'u gaade s'eelliyaa wode, Yisaak'a be'aaddu; gaaluwaappe wod'd'aaddu." 
Genesis24:65 K'oomaa, «Ha nuunana gaketanaw dembbaana yiyaa bitanii oonee?» yaagaaddu. K'oomay, «I ta godaattee» yaageedda. Iza bare shaashiyaa akkaade gullottaaddu." 
Genesis24:66 K'ay k'oomay bare ootseeddawaa ubbaa Yisaak'aw odeedda. 
Genesis24:67 Yisaak'i Ribik'o bare aati Saari dunkkaaniyaa afeedda. Izo akeedda; izakka aw machchatto gidaaddu. Yaatina I izo siik'eeddanne bare aati hayk'k'uwaan kayyottiyaawaappe minetteedda. 
Genesis25:1 K'ay Abrahaame K'as'uro geetettiyaa hara machchatto akkeedda. 
Genesis25:2 Iza Ziimiraana, Yok'ishaana, Madaana, Midiyaama, Yishibaak'anne Shuha aw yelaaddu." 
Genesis25:3 Yok'ishaani Saabanne Dadaana yeleedda. Dadaani Ashooreta, Les'uushetanne Le'aamata yeleedda." 
Genesis25:4 Midiyaama naanay Eefa, Eefeera, Hanooka, Abiidaa'anne Elddaa'a. Hawanttu ubbaykka K'as'uri naanaa." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahaame barewaa ubbaa Yisaak'a laatisseedda. 
Genesis25:6 Shin I biro pas'a de'iidde, bare hara machatuwaappe yeleedda naanaatoo barew de'iyaawaappe woyteedda. Bare na'aa Yisaak'appe unttuntta shaakki, away doliyaa bagga biittaw yeddeedda." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahaame mule itti s'eetanne laappun tammanne ichcheshu laytsaa de'eedda. 
Genesis25:8 Abrahaame daro wodiyaa de'iide, lo""o c'imiide hayk'k'eedda; bare mayzzatuwaanna gaketteedda." 
Genesis25:9 Aa naanay Yisaak'inne Isimaa'eeli Aa Maakip'eela giyaa gonggolo duufuwaan moogeeddino; he gonggoluu Mamire matan, Hiitiyaa S'ohaara na'aa Efiroona gadiyaan de'ee." 
Genesis25:10 Hewenne Abrahaame Hiitetuwaappe shammeedda gadiyaa. Abrahaame bare machata Saara moogetteedda sa'aan moogetteedda. 
Genesis25:11 Abrahaame hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyye, S'oossay Aa na'aa Yisaak'a anjjeedda. He wode Yisaak'i, «Taana Be'iyaa De'uwaa S'oossaa Pulttuwaa» giyaa pulttuwaa matan de'ee." 
Genesis25:12 Saari ayilata, Gibs'eppe yeedda Aggaara, Abrahaamew yeleedda na'aa Isimaa'eela yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa." 
Genesis25:13 Isimaa'eela naanay barenttu suntsaaninne barenttu yeletaa maaran hawantta; hewanttunne: Nabaayoota, K'eedaara, Adibi'eela, Mibssaama," 
Genesis25:14 Mishimaa'a, Duuma, Maasa," 
Genesis25:15 Hadaada, Teema, Yis'ura, Naafiishanne K'eedima." 
Genesis25:16 Isimaa'eela naanay hawantta; unttunttu suntsay unttunttu mootsaaninne de'iyaa sa'aan hawaa. Unttunttu barenttu yaran tammanne laau kaappatuwaa. 
Genesis25:17 Isimaa'eeli mule s'eetanne hattamanne laappun laytsaa de'iide, hayk'k'eedda; bare mayzzatuwaanna gaketteedda." 
Genesis25:18 Isimaa'eela zaratuu Gibs'eppe away doliyaa baggan de'iyaa Hawiilappenne Shurappe gidduwaan, Asoora afiyaa ogiyaa matan de'eeddino. Unttunttu barenttu ishatuwaa ubbaanna morkkiyaan de'eeddino." 
Genesis25:19 Abrahaama na'aa Yisaak'a yeletay hawaappe kaaliide s'aafetteeddawaa. Abrahaame Yisaak'a yeleedda. 
Genesis25:20 Yisaak'aw laytsay oytamuwaa gideedda wode, Ribik'o akkeedda; iza Masp'p'es'oomiyaan de'iyaa Sooriyaa Baatu'eela naattiwune Sooriyaa Laabaana michchato." 
Genesis25:21 Yisaak'i bare machata mantsato gideedda diraw, iziw Med'inaa Godaa woosseedda; Med'inaa Goday Aa woosaa siseedda. Yaatina Aa machata Ribik'a shahaaraaddu." 
Genesis25:22 Shin izi ulo giddon de'iyaa naanay mantte gidi uttiide, ittuu ittuwaanna sugetteeddino; yaatina iza, «Hawe taw ayaw hanii?» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Med'inaa Godaa oochchanaw baaddu." 
Genesis25:23 Med'inaa Goday iziw, «Ne uluwaan laa""u kawutetsay de'ee; K'ay ne gidduwaan de'iyaa laa""u gade asatuu ittuu ittuwaappe shaakettana; Itti gade asatuu hinkkotuwaappe minnana; K'ay bayiray teefaw azazettana» yaageedda." 
Genesis25:24 Iza yeliyaa wodii gakkina, izi uluwaan mantte attuma naanay de'iino." 
Genesis25:25 Koyro yeletteeddawe arssa; Aa bollaa ubbaa isikii mayyeedda; hewaa diraw unttunttu Aa Eesaw giide suntseeddino. 
Genesis25:26 Hewaappe guyye, Aa ishay yeletteedda; I bare kushiyaan Eesaw ginddiyaa oyk'k'i utteedda; hewaa diraw Aa Yaak'ooba giide suntseeddino. Ribik'a unttuntta yeleedda wode, Yisaak'aw usuppun tammu laytsaa gideedda." 
Genesis25:27 Naanay dic'c'eeddino; Eesay shankkaa hiillaa eriyaa bazuwaa asaa gideedda; shin Yaak'oobi dunkkaaniyaan de'iyaa woppa asaa gideedda. 
Genesis25:28 Yisaak'i Eesaa siik'eedda; ayaw gooppe, I shankkateeddabaappe maanaw doseedda; shin Ribik'a Yaak'ooba siik'aaddu." 
Genesis25:29 Itti gede Yaak'oobi wos'iyaa katsishin, Eesay koshay wod'eeddawe, woraappe yeedda." 
Genesis25:30 Eesay Yaak'ooba, «Taana ha zo'o wos'iyaappe miza; taana koshay wod'eedda» yaageedda. (Hewaa diraw k'ay Aa suntsay Eedooma geetetteedda)." 
Genesis25:31 Yaak'oobi Aa, «Koyro taw ne bayiratetsaa zal""a» yaageedda." 
Genesis25:32 Eesay, «Be'a! Taani hayk'k'ana hanay; ha bayiratetsay taw ayaa go""i de'ii?» yaageedda." 
Genesis25:33 Yaak'oobi zaariide, «Ane taw koyro neeni c'aak'k'a» yaageedda. I c'aak'k'eedda; bare bayiratetsaa Yaak'oobaw zal""eedda." 
Genesis25:34 Yaak'oobi Eesaw sooluwaanne missiriyaa wos'iyaa immeedda; I meeddanne usheedda; hewaappe guyye denddiide beedda. Eesay bare bayiratetsaa hawaadan kad'eedda. 
Genesis26:1 He gadiyaan kase Abrahaame wodiyaan de'iyaa koshaa bolla hara koshay denddeedda; yaatina Yisaak'i Piliss's'eema kaatiyaa Abimeleekekko Garaara beedda. 
Genesis26:2 Med'ina Goday Yisaak'aw k'onc'c'iide hawaadan yaageedda; «Gibis'e gadiyaa duge booppa; taani new odeedda gadiyaan de'a. 
Genesis26:3 Ha gadiyaan amareedawaa takkashsha; taani neenana gidana; neena anjjana; ayaw gooppe, ha biittaa ubbaa taani newunne ne zeretsaw immana; taani ne aawuwaa Abrahaamew c'aak'k'eedda c'aak'uwaa minisana." 
Genesis26:4 Ne zeretsaa saluwaa s'oolinttiyaadan darissana; ha biittaa ubbaa taani unttunttoo immana; sa'aa kawutetsaa ubbay ne zeretsaa baggana anjjettana. 
Genesis26:5 Ayaw gooppe, Abrahaame ta k'aalaa siseedda; ta pirddatuwaanne ta azazuwaa, ta awaayotuwaanne ta higgiyaa naageedda» yaageedda." 
Genesis26:6 Hewaa diraw Yisaak'i Garaaran utteedda. 
Genesis26:7 He biittaa Asay Ribik'ibaa dentsiide Yisaak'a, «Hanna new ayee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. I, «Hanna taw michchato» yaageedda. Ayaw gooppe, I Ribik'a daro puulanchcha gidiyaa diraw, «Taani, ‹Iza ta machchatto gooppe›, ha gade Asay izi gaasuwaan taana wod'anenttonne» yaagi k'oppiide yayyeedda." 
Genesis26:8 Yisaak'i hewaan daro wodiyaa de'owaappe guyye, Pilss's'eema Kaatii Abimeleeki maskkootiyaanna duge s'eeliide, Yisaak'i bare machchatti Ribik'ina gaketishin be'eedda." 
Genesis26:9 Hewaa diraw Abimeleeki Yisaak'a s'eesiide, «Hekko iza tumu ne machchato! Neeni ayaw, ‹Iza ta michchato› gaaddii?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Yisaak'i, « ‹Iza ta machchatto gooppe›, izi gaasuwaan Asay taana wod'ana gaade gaad» yaageedda." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleeki, «Hawe neeni nu bollan ootseeddabay ayee? Ta asaappe itti Asay ne machchattina gisi diggeeddashin; neeni nu bollan gomiyaa ahaadashin» yaageedda." 
Genesis26:11 Hewaa diraw Abimeleeki bare asaa ubbaa, «Ha bitaniyaa woy Aa machchatto bochchiyaa ooninne tumu hayk'k'ana» yaagiide azazeedda." 
Genesis26:12 Yisaak'i he gadiyaan katsaa zeriide, he laytsan s'eetu kushiyaa c'akkeedda; ayaw gooppe, Med'inaa Goday Aa anjjeedda." 
Genesis26:13 I duretteedda; duretaa bolla duretay aw dari dari beedda. 
Genesis26:14 Yisaak'aw dorssaa wudii, miizzaa wudiinne k'oomatuu loytsi dareedda diraw, Pilss's'eema asatuu Aa k'anaateeddino." 
Genesis26:15 Hewaa diraw, Aa aawuwaa Abrahaame wodiyaan, Aa aawuwaa k'oomatuu bookkeedda haatsaa ollaa ubbaa Pilss's'eema asatuwaa biittaa zaariide bareedino." 
Genesis26:16 He wode Abimeleeki Yisaak'a, «Nuuppe shaakettaade ba; neeni nuuppe aad'd'a minnaadda» yaageedda." 
Genesis26:17 Yisaak'i hewaappe denddiide, Garaara Wombbaa biide yan utteedda." 
Genesis26:18 Yisaak'i bare aawuwaa Abrahaame wodiyaan booketteedda haatsaa ollatuwaa, Abrahaame hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyye, Pilss's'eema asatuu bareedawantta zaari bookki kessiide, Aa aawuu suntseedda suntsan unttuntta s'eeseedda." 
Genesis26:19 Yisaak'a k'oomatuu wombban bookkiide, pulttiyaa haatsaa ollaa yan demmeeddino." 
Genesis26:20 Shin Garaara hentsanchchatuu Yisaak'a hentsanchchatuwaana, «Haatsay nuwaa» yaagiide walak'etteeddino. Unttunttu aanana palumetteedda diraw, Yisaak'i he haatsaa ollaa, «Palumiyaa» giide suntseedda." 
Genesis26:21 Hewaappe guyye, unttunttu hara haatsaa ollaakka bookkeeddino; shin unttunttu he haatsaa ollaa geeduwaan walak'etteeddino; hewaa diraw I he haatsaa ollaa «Morkketiitta» giide suntseedda." 
Genesis26:22 Hewaappe guutsaa zardda''iide, hara haatsaa ollaa bookisseedda; Aa gaasuwaan ooninne walak'ettibeenna; «S'oossay ha""i nuw aasseeda; nuuni ha gadiyaan c'oraana» giide Aa, «Aako sa'aa» giide suntseedda." 
Genesis26:23 Hewaappe denddiide, pude Berssaabehe beedda." 
Genesis26:24 He beedda gallassi k'amma Med'ina Goday Aw k'onc'c'iide Aa, «Taani ne aawuwaa Abrahaame S'oossaa; taani neenana de'iyaa diraw, neeni yayyoppa; taani neena anjjana; ta k'oomaa Abrahaame diraw ne zeretsaa taani c'orissana» yaageedda." 
Genesis26:25 Yisaak'i hewaan yarshshiyaa sa'aa kees's'iide, Med'inaa Godaa suntsaa s'eeseedda. Yan I bare dunkkaaniyaa d'ogeedda; k'ay yan Aa k'oomatuu haatsaa ollaa bookkeeddino." 
Genesis26:26 Hewaappe guyye, Abimeleeki barena zoriyaa Ahuuzatanne bare wotaadaratuwaa kaappuwaa Pikoola akkiidde, Garaarappe Yisaak'akko yeedda." 
Genesis26:27 Yisaak'i unttuntta, «Hinttenttu kase taana is's'iide, hinttenttu biittaappe kessi yeddeeddita; ha""i k'ay taakko ayaa akkana yedditee?» yaageedda." 
Genesis26:28 Unttunttu Aa, «Med'inaa Goday neenana de'iyaawaa nuuni k'onc'c'iyaan be'eeddo. Hewaa diraw c'aak'k'o c'aak'uu nu giddoninne ne giddon de'ana koshshee yaagetto. Nuuni neena bochchibeykko; shin nuuni new keekatetsaa s'alalaa ootsiide, neena sarotetsaan moyzzi yeddeeddo. Hewaaddankka neeni nu bolla iitabaa ootsenna mala, ane neenana c'aak'uwaa c'aak'k'etoytte. Ha""i neeni Med'inaa Goday anjjeedawaa» yaageeddino." 
Genesis26:29  
Genesis26:30 He wode Yisaak'i unttunttoo baalaa giigissina, meeddinonne usheeddino." 
Genesis26:31 Wonttetsa gallassi wontta guuran denddiide, unttunttu ittuu ittuwaanna c'aak'k'eteeddino. Yisaak'i unttuntta moyzzina, unttunttu aappe saro shaakettiide beeddino." 
Genesis26:32 He gallassi Yisaak'a k'oomatuu yiide, barenttu bookkeedda haatsaa ollaabaa aw odeeddino; «Nuuni haatsaa demmeeddo» yaageeddino." 
Genesis26:33 I he haatsaa ollaa Saabehi giide suntseedda; hewaa diraw he katamaa suntsay hachche gakkanaw Berssaabehi geetettee. 
Genesis26:34 Eesaa laytsay oytamuwaa gidiyaa wode, Hiitiyaa Bi'eedo naatto Yooditonne Hiitiyaa Eloona naatto Baasemaato akkeedda." 
Genesis26:35 Unttunttu Yisaak'anne Ribik'o kayyoyiidde de'eeddino. 
Genesis27:1 Yisaak'i c'imina, Aa ayfii s'eelaa is's'eedda wode, bare bayiratiyaa na'aa Eesaa s'eesiide Aa, «Ta na'aw» yaageedda. I, «Abee» giide koyeedda." 
Genesis27:2 I, «Be'a, ha""i taani c'imaad; taani hayk'ana gallassaa erikke." 
Genesis27:3 Yaatiyaa diraw, ha""i ne shankkatiyaa wonddaafiyaanne zubbiyaa akkaade, bazuwaa ba; do'aa taw shankkataade, ashuwaa akkaade ya." 
Genesis27:4 Malo k'umaa, taani dosiyaawaa katsaade aatsa; hewenne taani hayk'k'anaappe kase neena anjjanaassa» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:5 Ribik'a Yisaak'i bare na'aa Eesaw odiyaa wode sisaaddu. Eesay do'aa shankkatiide ahanaw bazuwaa beeddawaappe guyye," 
Genesis27:6 Ribik'a bare na'aa Yaak'ooba, «Ne aawuu ne ishaa Eesaw," 
Genesis27:7 ‹Do'aa shankkata ahaade, taw mal""o k'umaa taani maanaw katsaa; hewenne taani hayk'k'anaappe kasetaade, Med'inaa Godaa sintsaan neena anjjanaassa› yaagiyaawaa taani sisaad." 
Genesis27:8 Ta na'aw, ha""i taani neena azaziyaawaa loytsaade sisa." 
Genesis27:9 Wudiyaa garssa baade, laa""u bolttiboltta deeshshaa maratuwaa taw akkaade ya; taani ne aabboo mal""o k'umaa I dosiyaawaadan katsana." 
Genesis27:10 Ne aawuu miide hayk'k'ennan kasetiide neena anjjana mala, aw aatsaasa» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis27:11 Shin Yaak'oobi bare aatto Ribik'o, «Ta ishaa Eesaa bollan isikii de'ee; shin ta bollay liik'o." 
Genesis27:12 Ta aawuu taana oyk'k'i be'ooppe shin? Taani Aa c'immiyaawaa aw malatina, taani anjjuwaa diraw shek'aa ta bolla ahanenttone» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:13 Aa daaya Aa, «Ta na'aw, he shek'ay taana gakko. Taani new odiyaawaa ootsa; baade deeshsha maratuwaa taw akkaade ya» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis27:14 Bi ahiide bare daayiw immeedda; Aa daaya malo k'umaa Aa aawuu dosiyaawaadan katsaaddu. 
Genesis27:15 Hewaappe guyye, Ribik'a son bare matan de'iyaa bare bayira na'aa Eesaa mayuwaa lo""uwaa ahaade, bare teefa na'aa Yaak'ooba mayzzaaddu." 
Genesis27:16 K'ay he deeshshatuwaa galbbaa Aa kushiyaanne Aa liik'o k'ood'iyaa mayzzaaddu. 
Genesis27:17 Bare katseedda malo k'umaanne ukitsaa bare na'aa Yaak'ooba kushiyaan wotsaaddu. 
Genesis27:18 Yaatina I bare aawuwaakko biide geliide, «Ta aawoo» yaageedda. I, «Abee! Ta na'aw, neeni oonee?» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:19 Yaak'oobi bare aawuwaa, «Taani ne bayira na'aa Eesaa; neeni taana azazeeddawaadan taani ootsaad; dendda; dendda uttaade, taani shankkaappe aheedawaa ma; yaataade taana anjja» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:20 Yisaak'i bare na'aa, «Ta na'aw, waata elleella demmad?» yaagiide oochcheedda. I, «Med'inaa Goday ne S'oossay taana maaddeedda» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:21 Yisaak'i Yaak'ooba, «Ta na'aw, neeni tumu ta na'aa Eesenttonne taani oyk'k'a be'anaw ane taakko shiik'a» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:22 Yaak'oobi bare aawuwaa Yisaak'akko shiik'ina oyk'k'i be'iide, «Ha k'aalay Yaak'ooba k'aalaa; shin kushii Eesaa kushiyaa» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:23 Aa kushii Aa ishaa Eesaa kushiyaadan isikiyaana de'iyaa diraw, eribeenna; I erennan Aa anjjeedda." 
Genesis27:24 Aa, «Tumu neeni ta na'aa Eeseyee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. I, «Ee, taanattee» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:25 I, «Ta na'aw, taani neeni shankkateeddawaa maanaw haa aatsa; maade taani neena anjjana» yaageedda. Yaak'oobi aatsina, I meedda; k'ay I aw woyniyaa eessaa ahina usheedda." 
Genesis27:26 Hewaappe guyye Aa aawuwaa Yisaak'i, «Ta na'aw, haaya; shiik'aade taana yera» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:27 Yaak'oobi shiik'iide Aa yereedda; Yisaak'i Aa mayuwaa singgi sisiide, hawaadan yaagiide anjjeedda; «Ta na'aa peenuu Med'inaa Goday anjjeedda goshshaadan sawee." 
Genesis27:28 S'oossay saluwaa c'okkuwaanne sa'aa shic'aa, katsaanne ooratsa woyniyaa eessaa darssiide new immo." 
Genesis27:29 Kawutetsatuu new moodettino; asatuu new gulbbatino. Neeni ne ishatoo goda gida; ne aati zaratuu new gulbbatino. Neena shek'k'iyaawe shek'etteeddawaa gido; neena anjjiyaawe anjjetteeddawaa gido» yaageedda. 
Genesis27:30 Yisaak'i Yaak'ooba anjji wursseeddawaappe guyye, Yaak'oobi bare aawuwaa Yisaak'a sintsaappe kesowaan Eesay shankkaappe puttu geedda." 
Genesis27:31 Ikka k'ay malo k'umaa katsiide, bare aawoo aatseedda. Aa, «Ta aawoo, dendda; dendda uttaade, taani shankkateeddawaappe ma; yaataade taana anjja» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:32 Aa aawuu Yisaak'i Aa, «Neeni oonee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. I, «Taani ne na'aa, ne bayira na'aa Eesaa» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:33 Yisaak'i dagammiide kokkoriidde; «Yaatina do'aa shankkateeddawaa akkiidde taw aatseedawe oonee? Taani hai neeni yaana sintsan maade, Aa anjja diggaad; tumukka I anjjetteeddawaa gidanawaa» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:34 Eesay bare aawuwaa k'aalaa siseedda wode, bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide, daro yibbaata yeekuwaa yeekkiide bare aawuwaa, «Taana anjja; ta aawoo, taanakka anjja!» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:35 Shin I, «Ne ishay yiide c'immiidde, ne anjjuwaa aki diggeedda» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:36 Eesay, «Aa eriide Yaak'ooba suntseedda; I taana c'immoode, hawe laa""entsuwaa; I ta bayiratetsaa akkeedda; k'ay ha""i ta anjjuwaa akkeedda» yaageedda. K'ay I, «Neeni taw anjjuwaappe ayaanne ashshabeykkii?» yaagiide oochcheedda." 
Genesis27:37 Yisaak'i Eesaa, «Taani Aa new goda ootsaad; Aa ishatuwaa ubbaakka Aa k'oomatuwaa ootsaad; k'ay taani katsaaninne ooratsa woyniyaa eessan Aa minisaad. Yaatina, ta na'aw, new taani ayaa ootsoo?» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:38 Eesay bare aawuwaa, «Ta aawoo, new itti anjjo s'alalay de'ii? Ta aawoo, taanakka k'ay anjja» yaageedda. Hewaappe guyye, Eesay bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide yeekkeedda." 
Genesis27:39 Aa aawuwaa Yisaak'i zaariide, «Ne de'iyaa ha sa'aa duretetsaappe haakkaade de'ana; Saluwaa c'okkuukka new wod'd'enna;" 
Genesis27:40 Neeni ne mashshaan ak'ana; Neeni ne ishaw moodetana. Shin neeni aanana ek'ettiyaa wode, Aa morge mitsa ne morggiyaappe olana» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:41 Yaak'ooba Aa aawuu anjjeedda diraw, Eesay bare uluwaan Aa morkkeedda; I bare wozanaan, «Ta aawuu hayana mateedda; taani aw kayyotta simmaade, ta ishaa Yaak'ooba wod'ana» yaageedda." 
Genesis27:42 Shin Ribik'a ha bare bayira na'aa Eesaa k'aalaa siseedda diraw, bare teefa na'aa Yaak'ooba s'eesissa ahaade hawaadan yaagaaddu; «Ne ishay Eesay neena wod'iide haluwaa kesanaw halchcheedda." 
Genesis27:43 Hayyanaa ta na'aw, taani new odowaa ootsa. Dendda! Kaaraanen de'iyaa ta ishaa Laabaanakko bak'ata!" 
Genesis27:44 Yaataade ne ishaa hank'k'uu dochchana gakkanaw, amareeda wodiyaa aanana de'ashsha." 
Genesis27:45 Ne ishay new hank'k'ettiyaawaa aggiyaa wodenne, neeni Aa bolla ootseeddawaa I dogiyaa wode, taani kiittaade neena yaappe ahissana. Taani itti gallassi hinttenttu laa""uwaappe mela kessana koyikke» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis27:46 Hewaappe guyye Ribik'a Yisaak'a, «Eesay akkeedda Hiitetuwaa mac'c'a naanaa gaasuwaan taani ta de'uwaa shenetaad; k'ay Yaak'oobikka hawanttu mala Hiitetuwaa mac'c'a naanatuwaappe machchatto akkooppe, taani simmi hayk'k'anaw koyaad» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis28:1 Hewaa diraw, Yisaak'i Yaak'ooba s'eesiide hawaadan anjjeedanne azazeedda; «Kanaane gadiyaa mac'c'a naanatuwaappe new machchatto akkoppa." 
Genesis28:2 Dendda! Ne daay aawuwaa Baatu'eelakko, Masp'p'es'oomiyaa gadiyaa baade yaappe ne daay ishaa Laabaana mac'c'a naanatuwaappe ittinno new machchatto ootsaade akka." 
Genesis28:3 Ubbaa Danddayiyaa S'oossay neena anjjo; I ne yeletaa aasso; neeni itti dere asaa keena gakkanaw neena c'orisso. 
Genesis28:4 Neeni hai betetetsan utteedda ha biittaa newaa ootsana mala newunne ne zeretsaw S'oossay Abrahaame anjjuwaa immo» yaageedda. 
Genesis28:5 Yisaak'i Yaak'ooba yeddeedda; Yaak'oobi Masp'p'es'oomiyaa gadiyaa Laabaanakko beedda. Laabaani Yaak'oobanne Eesaa yeleedda aati Ribik'a ishaanne Sooriyaa Baatu'eela na'aa. 
Genesis28:6 Yisaak'i Yaak'ooba anjjeedawaanne, yaappe machchatto akkanaw Masp'p'es'oomiyaa gadiyaa Aa yedeeddawaa, k'ay I Yaak'ooba anjjeedda wode, «Kanaane mac'c'a asaa akkoppa» yaagiide azazeeddawaanne," 
Genesis28:7 Yaak'oobi bare aawuwaanne bare aatonne azazettiide, Masp'p'es'oomiyaa gadiyaa beeddawaa Eesay ereedda." 
Genesis28:8 Eesay hewaan Kanaane biittaa mac'c'awunna bare aawuwaa Yisaak'a ay keeshshaa iitintto akeekeedda. 
Genesis28:9 Hewaa diraw Eesay Abrahaame na'aa Isimaa'eelekko biide, Aa naatto Maahilaato bare machatuwaa bolla gujjiide akkeedda. Iza Nabaayoota michchato." 
Genesis28:10 Yaak'oobi Berssaabeheppe Kaaraane baanaw denddeedda. 
Genesis28:11 I itti sa'aa gakkina away wullina, yan k'ammaa ak'eeda. He sa'aan de'iyaa shuchchatuwaappe ittuwaa akkiidde, bare huup'iyaan borkkotiide he sa'aan gem""isheedda." 
Genesis28:12 I akumuwaa akumeteedda; he akumuwaan gayyiyaa ittuu biittan ek'k'ina, aw s'eeray saluwaa gakkiyaawaan, S'oossaa kiitanchchatuu gi""ishiinanne wod'd'ishin be'eedda;" 
Genesis28:13 gayyiyaw bolla s'eeran Med'inaa Goday ek'k'iide Aa, «Taani Med'inaa Godaa, ne aawuwaa Abrahaama S'oossaa, Yisaak'a S'oossaa. Ha neeni giseedda biittaa newunne ne zeretsaw immana;" 
Genesis28:14 Ne zeretsay sa'aa shafiyaadan darana; neeni away wulliyaa baggananne, away doliyaa baggana, huup'issananne hirkki baggana de'iyaa sa'aa gakkanaw aakkana; sa'aa bollan de'iyaa Asay ubbay ne baggananne ne zeretsaa baggana anjjettana" 
Genesis28:15 Taani neenana de'ay; neeni biyaasa'aa ubbaan taani neena naagana; k'ay taani neena ha gadiyaa guyye zaaraade ahana; taani new ootsana geeddawaa ootsana gakkanaw neena yeggikke» yaageedda. 
Genesis28:16 Yaak'oobi gemishuwaappe beegotteedda wode, «Med'inaa Goday tumu ha sa'aan de'ee; taani erabeykkeppe attin» yaageedda." 
Genesis28:17 I yayyiide, «Ha sa'ay wooti yashshii! Ha sa'ay S'oossaa golliyaappe attin, ayinne hara sa'aa gidenna; hawe saluwaa penggiyaa» yaageedda." 
Genesis28:18 Wonttetsa gallassi wontta guuran Yaak'oobi denddiide, bare borkkoteedda shuchchaa akkiidde, tuussaadan essiide, S'oossaw dummayanaw Aa bolla zayitiyaa tigeedda." 
Genesis28:19 Yaak'oobi he sa'aa Beeteele giide s'eeseedda. Shin he katamay hewaappe kase Looza geetettee. 
Genesis28:20 Yaak'oobi hawaadan yaagiide shiik'k'eedda; «Ta aawuwaa soo taani saro simmana mala S'oossay taananna gidooppe, taani biyaa ha buussan taana naagooppenne taw miyaa k'umaanne mayiyaa mayuwaa immooppe, Med'inaa Goday ta S'oossaa gidana;" 
Genesis28:21  
Genesis28:22 taani tuussaadan esseedda ha shuchchay S'oossaa golliyaa gidana. Neeni taw immiyaawaa ubbaappe tammuwaappe ittuwaa taani new immana» yaageedda. 
Genesis29:1 Hewaappe guyye, Yaak'oobi denddi biide, away doliyaa bagga asatuwaa gadiyaa gakkeedda." 
Genesis29:2 Itti haatsaa ollay dembban de'iyaawaa be'eedda; heezzu dorssaa wudii k'ay he ollaa matan giseeddino. Ayaw gooppe, wudii ubbay haatsaa ushiyaawe he ollaappe. He haatsaa ollaa doonaan de'iyaa shuchchay wolk'k'aama." 
Genesis29:3 Dorssaa wudii ubbay hewaan dagatteedda wode, he wudiyaa heemmiyaawanttu haatsaa ollaa doonaappe he shuchchaa gonddorssiide dorssaa ushshiino. He shuchchaa ollaa doonaan zaariide wotsino." 
Genesis29:4 Yaak'oobi unttuntta, «Ta ishatoo, hinttenttu hak'appe yeddite?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Unttunttu, «Nuuni Kaaraaneppe yeeddo» yaageeddino." 
Genesis29:5 I, «Naakoora na'aa na'aa Laabaana hinttenttu eriiteyye?» yaageedda. Unttunttu, «Ee, Aa ereetto» yaageeddino." 
Genesis29:6 Yaak'oobi unttuntta, «I lo""o de'ii?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Unttunttu, «Ee, lo""a; Aa naatta Raaheela dorssaa akkaade yewunno hanno be'a» yaageeddino." 
Genesis29:7 Yaak'oobi unttuntta, «Be'ite; away ha""i wullibeena; wudiyaa mehii soo shiik'iyaa wodii biro gakkibeenna; dorssaa ha""i ushshi afiide, heemmite» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:8 Shin unttunttu, «Wudii ubbay shiik'ana gakkanaw, shuchchaa haatsaa ollaa doonaappe gonddorssana gakkanaw, nuuni ushshanaw danddayokko. Hewaappe guyye, nuuni dorssaa ushshana» yaageeddino." 
Genesis29:9 I biro haasayishin, Laabaana naatta Raaheela bare aawuwaa dorssatuwaa laagga akkaade gakkaaddu; ayaw gooppe, iza dorssaa hentsanchchaa." 
Genesis29:10 Yaak'oobi bare aati ishaa Laabaana naatto Raaheelo be'eedda wodenne, bare aati ishaa Laabaana dorssaa be'eedda wode, biide ollaa doonaappe shuchchaa gonddorsseedda; bare aati ishaa dorssatuwaa haatsaa ushsheedda." 
Genesis29:11 Yaak'oobi Raaheelo yeriide, nashechchaw bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'isiide yeekkeedda." 
Genesis29:12 Yaak'oobi iziw aawuwaa dabbonne Ribik'i na'aa gidiyaawaa Raaheeliw odeedda. Hewaa diraw iza wos's'a baade bare aawoo odaaddu. 
Genesis29:13 Laabaani bare michchati na'aa Yaak'ooba woriyaa siseedda saannakka, aanana gaketanaw wos's'eedda. Aa idimmi yeriide, bare soo afeedda. Yan Yaak'oobi haneeddawaa ubbaa Laabaanaw odeedda." 
Genesis29:14 Laabaani Aa, «Neeni tumu ta ashonne ta suutsaa» yaageedda. Yaak'oobi aanana itti aginaa kumentsaa utteedda." 
Genesis29:15 Hewaappe guyye Laabaani Aa, «Neeni taw dabbo gideedda diraw, taw c'oo mela ootsaniyee? Ane new ayaa c'igganaw bessintto taw oda» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:16 Laabaanaw laau mac'c'a naanatuu de'iino; bayirati suntsay Liyo, teefattiwe Raaheelo." 
Genesis29:17 Liya ayfiyaana c'uuc'a; shin Raaheela geesanchanne malaa loa. 
Genesis29:18 Yaak'oobi Raaheelo siik'iide Aa, «Taani ne teefa naatti Raaheeli diraw new laappun laytsaa ootsana» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:19 Laabaani, «Izo hara asaw immanaappe new immiyaawe lo""a; neeni taananna hawaan de'a» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:20 Hewaa diraw Yaak'oobi Raaheelo akkanaw laappun laytsaa ootseedda; shin I izo siik'iyaa diraw, aw amareeda gallassaa malateedda." 
Genesis29:21 Hewaappe guyye Yaak'oobi Laabaana, «Ta machchato taw imma; ta wodii poletteedda; taani izo akkanaw koyaad» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:22 Hewaa diraw Laabaani hewaan de'iyaa asaa ubbaa s'eesiide, bullachchaa keseedda." 
Genesis29:23 Shin sa'ay k'ammina, I bare naatto Liyo afiide Yaak'oobaw immeedda. Yaak'oobi izo akkeedda." 
Genesis29:24 K'ay Laabaani bare k'oomatoo Zilppo bare naatti Liyiw danggaas'ire gidanaadan immeedda. 
Genesis29:25 Sa'ay wonttina s'eelliyaa wode, hekko Liyo! Yaatina Yaak'oobi Laabaana, «Hawe neeni ta bolla ootseeddawe ayee? Taani new ootseeddawe Raaheeli dirassa gidenneeyye? Taana ayaw c'immaad?» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:26 Laabaani Aa, «Nu biittan bayirata de'ishshin, teefatto asinaw immiyaawe woga gidenna." 
Genesis29:27 He mishiraa saaminttaa wurssa; k'ay teefatiyaanokka nuuni new immana; hewaappe guyye, hara laappun laytsaa taw ootsaasa» yaageedda." 
Genesis29:28 Yaak'oobi hewaadan haniide he saaminttaa wursseedda; hewaappe guyye, Laabaani bare naatto Raaheelo aw immeedda." 
Genesis29:29 K'ay Laabaani bare k'oomato Baalo bare naatti Raaheeliw danggaas'ire gidanaadan immeedda. 
Genesis29:30 Yaak'oobi Raaheelo akkeedda. Raaheelo Liyippe aatsiide siik'eedda. Hara laappun laytsaa Laabaanaw ootseedda. 
Genesis29:31 Med'inaa Goday Liya siik'ettabeennawaa be'iide, iziw yeliyaa uluwaa dooyeedda; shin Raaheela mantsato." 
Genesis29:32 Liya shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelaaddu. Aa suntsakka Roobeela suntsaaddu; ayaw gooppe iza, «Med'inaa Goday ta metuwaa be'eedda; ha""i tumu taana ta asinay siik'ana» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis29:33 Iza haraakka shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelaaddu. Iza, «Med'inaa Goday taani siik'ettabeenawaa siseedda diraw, taw hawaakka gujjeedda» yaagaadde, Aa Simoona suntsaaddu." 
Genesis29:34 Aa haraakka shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelaaddu. Iza, «Taani aw heezzu attuma naanaa yeleedda diraw, ta asinay ha""i taananna waas'ettana» yaagaadde, Aa Leewii suntsaaddu." 
Genesis29:35 Aa haraakka shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelaaddu. Iza, «Hachchiwaan taani Med'inaa Godaa galatana» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Yihudaa suntsaaddu. Hewaappe guyye yeluwaa essaaddu." 
Genesis30:1 Raaheela Yaak'oobaw naanaa yelabeennawaa be'eedda wode, bare michchato k'anaataaddu; hewaa diraw Yaak'ooba, «Taw naanaa imma; hewe d'ayooppe, taani hayk'k'ana» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis30:2 Yaak'oobi Raaheelo hank'k'etsiide, «Taana new yeluwaa diggeedda S'oossaa gaaddiyye?» yaageedda." 
Genesis30:3 Iza, «Ta danggaas'irato Baalo hinno be'a; iza ta diraw yelana mala neeni izo akka; yaatooppe izi baggana taanikka na'aa daayo gidana» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis30:4 Bare danggaas'iratto Baalo machchatto ootsiide akkana mala, aw immaaddu; Yaak'oobi izo akkeedda." 
Genesis30:5 Baala shahaaraade attuma na'aa Yaak'oobaw yelaaddu. 
Genesis30:6 Yaatina Raaheela, «S'oossay taw daannateedda; ta woosaakka sisiide, taw attuma na'aa immeedda» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Daana suntsaaddu." 
Genesis30:7 Raaheeli danggaas'irata Baala haraa shahaaraade, Yaak'oobaw laa""entsuwaa attuma na'aa yelaaddu." 
Genesis30:8 Raaheela, «Taani ta michchatina wolk'k'aama baas'iyaa baas'etaade s'oonaad» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Nifttaaleema suntsaaddu." 
Genesis30:9 Liya barew yeluu ek'k'eeddawaa be'aade, bare danggaas'irato Zilppo afaade Yaak'oobi izo akkana mala immaaddu." 
Genesis30:10 Liya danggaas'irata Zilppa attuma na'aa Yaak'oobaw yelaaddu. 
Genesis30:11 Liya, «Laa hawe ayaa lo""o kaac'ee!» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Gaada suntsaaddu." 
Genesis30:12 Liya danggaas'irata Zilppa Yaak'oobaw laaentsuwaa attuma na'aa yelaaddu. 
Genesis30:13 Liya, «Taani ay keeshshaa nashettayttaasha! Mac'c'a Asay taana nashettiyaanno gaana» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Aaseera suntsaaddu." 
Genesis30:14 Zarggaa c'akkiyaa aginaan Roobeeli gade biide, inkkoyiyaa giyaa timaatimiyaa malatiyaa teeraa demmiide, bare aati Liyiw aheedda. Raaheela Liyo, «Ne na'aa inkkoyiyaappe taw imma» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis30:15 Shin Liya, «Ta asina neeni wotsa akkeeddawe gidennaan is's'ina, k'ay ta na'aa inkkoyiyaa akkay?» yaagaaddu. Raaheela, «Yaatooppe, ne na'aa inkkoyiyaa diraw Yaak'oobi hachche k'ammaa neenanna ak'o» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis30:16 He gallassaa omarssi Yaak'oobi woraappe yeedda wode, Liya Aa mokkanaw kesaade Aa, «Neeni taananna ak'ana koshshee; ayaw gooppe, taani ta na'aa inkkoyiyaan neena keraw akka diggaad» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw I he gallassaa k'amma izina ak'eeda." 
Genesis30:17 S'oossay Liya woosaa siseedda; iza shahaaraade, ichcheshantsa attuma na'aa Yaak'oobaw yelaaddu." 
Genesis30:18 Liya, «Taani ta danggaas'irato ta asinaw immeedda diraw, S'oossay hewaa keraa taw c'iggeedda» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Yisaakoora gaade suntsaaddu." 
Genesis30:19 Liya haraakka shahaaraade, usuppuntsa attuma na'aa Yaak'oobaw yelaaddu." 
Genesis30:20 Liya, «S'oossay taw al""o imotaa immeedda; taani ta asinaw usuppun naanaa yeleedda diraw, ha""i I taana bonchchanawaa» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Zaabiloona suntsaaddu." 
Genesis30:21 Hewaappe guyye itti mac'c'a naatto yelaaddu; izo Diino suntsaaddu. 
Genesis30:22 S'oossay Raaheelo hassayeedda; izi woosaa sisiide izi yeliyaa uluwaa dooyeedda. 
Genesis30:23 Iza shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelaaddu; «S'oossay ta yeellaa k'aareedda. 
Genesis30:24 Med'ina Goday taw hara attuma na'aakka gujjeerenneeshsha» yaagaaddu. Hewaa diraw Aa Yooseefo suntsaaddu. 
Genesis30:25 Raaheela Yooseefa yeleeddawaappe guyye, Yaak'oobi Laabaana, «Taani ta aawuwaa gadiyaa simmana mala, taana moyzza." 
Genesis30:26 Taani unttunttu diraw new ootseedda ta machatuwaanne ta naanaa hamma; taani baana; ayaw gooppe, taani new ay keeshshaa oosuwaa ootseedentto neeni eraasa» yaageedda." 
Genesis30:27 Shin Laabaani Aa, «Taani new ittibaa oday; Med'inaa Goday ne gaasuwaan taana anjjeedawaa taani be'aaddi." 
Genesis30:28 Ne dirgguwaa taw oda; taani new c'iggana» yaageedda. 
Genesis30:29 Yaak'oobi, «Taani new waata ootseedentto, ne mehiikka waan yeletteeddentto neeni eraasa." 
Genesis30:30 Taani yaanaappe kase new de'iyaa guutsay hai loytsi dareedda; Med'inaa Goday neena taani aad'd'eedda sa'aan ubbaan anjjeedda. Shin hai, taani ta soo asaw ootsanawe awudee?» yaageedda." 
Genesis30:31 Laabaani, «Taani new ayaa immoo?» yaagiide Aa oochcheedda. Yaak'oobi, «Taw ayinne immoppa; shin neeni taw ittibaa ootsooppe, taani ne wudiyaa k'aykka heemmananne naagana." 
Genesis30:32 Taani hachche ne wudiyaa ubbaa gidduwaana aad'd'ana; hewaan ne dorssaappe punc'c'ariyaa woy gazzaa ubbaa, karetsa dorssaa mara ubbaanne deeshshaappe gazzaanne punc'c'ariyaa ubbaa taani shaakkana; unttunttu ta dirgguwaa gidana." 
Genesis30:33 Hewaa diraw ta s'illotetsay neeni taw c'iggeedda dirgguwaa paydanaw sintsappe yiyaa wode, taw markkattana; ta deeshshaappe gazza woy punc'c'are gidennawe woy karetsa gidenna ay dorssaa maraynne ta matan beettintto, wuu""etteeddawaadan payddettana» yaageedda." 
Genesis30:34 Laabi, «Mayyaad; neeni geeddawaadan gido» yaageedda." 
Genesis30:35 Shin he gallassan Laabi danc'c'aa woy gazza gideedda attuma deeshshaa ubbaa, punc'c'are woy gazza gideedda mac'c'a deeshshaa ubbaa, bootsa gideedda ubbaanne karetsa dorssaa mara ubbaa kessiide, bare attuma naanaa hentseedda." 
Genesis30:36 Yaatiide he wudiyaanna heezzu gallassaa ogiyaa Yaak'oobappe haakkiide beedda. Shin Yaak'oobi atteeda Laabaana wudiyaa heemmeedda. 
Genesis30:37 Yaak'oobi deeshsha loomiyaappe, gumariyaappenne s'ank'k'arssaappe k'ayye gatimaa kessiide, pok'uwaa pok'k'i pok'k'iide, giddo bootsa bagga k'aariide gazzayeedda." 
Genesis30:38 Wudii haatsaa ushanaw yiyaa sa'aa ubbaan, wonggiriyaan, wudiyaa sintsan pok'k'eedda gatimatuwaa wotseedda. Kahowanttu haatsaa ushanaw yiide," 
Genesis30:39 he gatimatuwaa sintsan birasseeddino; unttunttu danc'c'aa, punc'c'arenne gazza maratuwaa yeleeddino." 
Genesis30:40 Yaak'oobi maratuwaa wudiyaappe shaakki dumma wotseedda; atteeda wudiyaa danc'c'anne karetsa gideedda Laabaana mehiyaa sintsa zaareedda. Yaatiide barew wudiyaa dummayeedda; Laabaana mehetuwaanna unttuntta gatsibeenna. 
Genesis30:41 Pas's'anne mino mac'c'awanttu kahiyaa wode awudenne, unttunttu he gatimatuwaa matan birassana mala, Yaak'oobi he gatimatuwaa haatsaa wonggiriyaan, miizatuwaa sintsaan wotsee." 
Genesis30:42 Shin mehetuu laafa gidooppe, unttunttu sintsaan gatimatuwaa wotsenna. Hewaa diraw laafiyaa mehetuu Laabawaa gidina, dariyaawanttu Yaak'oobawaa gideeddino." 
Genesis30:43 Hawaadan haniide, Yaak'oobi loytsi duretiide, daro wudiyaa, mac'c'a k'oomatuwaanne attuma k'oomatuwaa, daro gaalotuwaanne haretuwaa mooddeedda." 
Genesis31:1 Yaak'oobi Laabaana naanay barena, «Yaak'oobi nu aawuwaa ubbaa aki diggeedda; ha duretaa ubbaa nu aawuwaappe demmeedda» giyaawaa siseedda." 
Genesis31:2 Yaak'oobi Laabaana somi barew kasewaa mala gidennawaa be'eedda. 
Genesis31:3 He wode Med'inaa Goday Yaak'ooba, «Neeni ne aawotuwaa gadiyaa, ne dabbotuwaakko guyye simma; taani neenana gidana» yaageedda." 
Genesis31:4 Yaak'oobi Raaheelonne Liyo bare wudii de'iyaa sa'aa dembbaa yaana mala kiittiide s'eesisseedda. 
Genesis31:5 I unttuntta, «Hinttenttu aawuwaa som""i taw kasewaa mala gidennawaa taani be'ay; shin ta aawuwaa S'oossay taananna de'ee." 
Genesis31:6 Taani ta wolk'k'aa ubbaan hinttenttu aawuu ootseeddawaa hinttenttu eriita; 
Genesis31:7 shin hinttenttu aawuu taana c'immiidde, ta dirgguwaa tammu gede laammeedda. Gidooppenne S'oossay taana I k'ohenaadan diggeedda." 
Genesis31:8 I, ‹Punc'c'aretuu ne dirgguwaa gidana› giina, wudii ubbay punc'c'ariyaa yeleedda; k'ay I, ‹shachchatuu ne dirgguwaa gidana› giina, wudii ubbay shachchaa yeleedda." 
Genesis31:9 S'oossay hawaadan hinttenttu aawuwaa mehiyaa wotsi akkiidde taw immeedda. 
Genesis31:10 «Mehetuu kahiyaa aginaan, taani itti akumuwaa akumetaad; he akumuwaan taani s'eelliyaa wode, wudiyaa birassiyaa deeshsha koletuu danc'c'aa, punc'c'arenne gazza." 
Genesis31:11 S'oossaa kiitanchchay akumuwaan taana, ‹Yaak'ooba› yaageedda; taani, abee yaagaadde koyaad." 
Genesis31:12 Taana I, d'ok'k'u gaade wudiyaa s'aaliyaa deeshshaa koliyaa ubbaa shachchaa, punc'c'ariyaanne gazzaa be'a; ayaw gooppe, Laabi ne bolla ootsiyaawaa ubbaa taani be'aaddi." 
Genesis31:13 Neeni esseedda shuchchaa okkaadde, taw shiik'etteedda Beeteele S'oossay taana ha""i dendda; ha biittaappe kesa; guyye ne yeletaa gadiyaa simma yaageedda» yaageedda." 
Genesis31:14 Hewaappe guyye, Raaheelanne Liya hawaadan yaagiide zaareeddino; «Nu aawuwaappe nuuna gakkanabay ayee?" 
Genesis31:15 I nuuna allagaadan s'eellee gidennee? I nuuna zali akkeedda; zaliidde akkeeddawaakka mi d'aysseedda. 
Genesis31:16 S'oossay nu aawuwaappe wotsi akkeedda mas'uu ubbay tumukka nuwaanne nu naanaawaa. Hewaa diraw s'oossay new odeeddawaa ubbaa ootsa» yaageeddino. 
Genesis31:17 Yaak'oobi Kanaane gadiyaan de'iyaa bare aawuwaa Yisaak'akko baanaw denddeedda; I bare naanaanne bare machatuwaa gaaluwaa togisseedda; wudiyaa ubbaa bareppe sintsanna laaggiide, Masp'p'es'oomiyaan de'iidde I shiishsheedda mas'uwaa ubbaa akkiidde beedda." 
Genesis31:18  
Genesis31:19 Laabi bare dorssatuwaa isikiyaa k'ans's'anaw bidigeeddoshin, Raaheela bare aawuwaa soo misiletuwaa wuu'aaddu." 
Genesis31:20 K'ay Yaak'oobi Sooriyaa Laabaanaw bare bak'atiyaawaa odenaan c'immeedda. 
Genesis31:21 I barew de'iyaawaa ubbaa akkiidde bak'ateedda; Efiraas'iisa Shaafaa pinniide, Gala'aade giyaa gezziyaakko simmiide beedda." 
Genesis31:22 Heezzentsa gallassan, Laabi Yaak'oobi bak'ati bi kichcheeddawaa siseedda." 
Genesis31:23 Bare dabbotuwaa barenana akkiidde, laappun gallassaa ogiyaa Yaak'ooba geeduwaa kaalliidde, Gala'aade gezziyaan Aa gakkeedda." 
Genesis31:24 He wode S'oossay k'amma Sooriyaa Laabaanakko akumuwaan yiide Aa, «Neeni Yaak'ooba bolla iita gidina, lo""a gidina, ayinne haasayennaadan neena era!» yaageedda." 
Genesis31:25 Laabi gakkiyaa wode, Yaak'oobi Gala'aade gezziyaan dunkkaaniide utteedda; k'ay Laabinne Aa dabbotuu yan dunkkaaneeddino." 
Genesis31:26 Hewaappe guyye Laabi Yaak'ooba, «Neeni hawaadan ayaw ootsaaddii? Neeni taana c'immaade, ta mac'c'a naanaa olan omoodetteeddawaadan laaggaade kessaadda." 
Genesis31:27 Neeni ayaw k'osuwaan taappe kessa akkaade, taana c'immaadii? Taani neena nashechchaaninne yetsaan, karabuwaaninne diitsaan moyzzana mala taw ayaw odabeykkii?" 
Genesis31:28 Neeni haray atto, ta naanaa naanaanne ta mac'c'a naanaa taani yera akkena mala diggaadda. Neeni eeyyabaa ootsaadda." 
Genesis31:29 Taani neena genanaw taw wolk'k'ay de'ee; shin ne aawuwaa S'oossay zino k'amma taana, ‹Yaak'ooba bolla iita gidina, lo""a gidina, ayinne haasayennaadan neena era!› yaagiide taw odeedda." 
Genesis31:30 Hai gidooppenne, neeni ne aawuwaa soo baanaw loytsa laamoteedda diraw kesaadda. Shin ta soo misiletuwaa neeni ayaw wuu'aadii?» yaageedda." 
Genesis31:31 Yaak'oobi Laabaana, «Neeni ne naanaa taappe wolk'k'an wotsa akkaninttonne gaade k'oppeedda dirawunne yayyeedda diraw, hawaadan ootsaad." 
Genesis31:32 Shin ne soo misiletuwaa oyk'k'eedda asaa oonanne neeni demmooppe, he uray siifetto! Newaa gideeddawe ta matan beettintto, nu dabbatuwaa sintsan koya; newaa gidooppe akka» yaageedda; ayaw gooppe, Yaak'oobi Raaheela he soo misiletuwaa wuu'eeddawaa eribeenna." 
Genesis31:33 Hewaa diraw Laabi Yaak'ooba dunkkaaniyaa giddo, Liya dunkkaaniyaa giddon laa""u k'oomatuwaa dunkkaaniyaa giddo geleedda; shin ayinne demmibeenna. Liya dunkkaaniyaappe kesiide, Raaheeli dunkkaaniyaa geleedda." 
Genesis31:34 Raaheela soo misiletuwaa akkaade, gaaluwaa kooraa garssan k'osaade, Aa bolla uttaaddu. Laabi dunkkaaniyaan de'iyaawaa ubbaa bulluuk'k'i koyeedda; shin ayinne demmibeenna." 
Genesis31:35 Raaheela bare aawuwaa, «Ta godaw, taana hank'k'etsoppa; taani new ek'k'ana danddaykke; taw piilay yi utteedda» yaagaaddu. I koyeedda; shin soo misiletuwaa demmibeenna." 
Genesis31:36 Yaak'oobi Laabaana hank'k'ettiide wok'k'aseedda; Yaak'oobi Laabaana, «Taani ayaa bayzaadittaa? Hawaa neeni taana kaallanaw, taani ootseedda nagaray ayee?" 
Genesis31:37 Hai neeni ta miishshaa ubbaa bulluk'k'aadde koyaadda; ne soo miishshaappe ayaa demmaad? Unttunttu nu laauwaa gidduwaan pirddana mala, ta dabbatuwaa sintsaaninne ne dabbatuwaa sintsaan hawaan wotsa." 
Genesis31:38 «Taani neenana laatamu laytsaa kumentsaa de'aad; ne dorssaykka ne deeshshaykka boshetibeenna; woy ne wudiyaappe s'abootiyaa mabeykke. 
Genesis31:39 Do'ay mentseeddawaanne new ahabeyikke; shin hewaa taanan paydaad. Gallassi wuu'etteeddawaa woy k'amma wuu'etteeddawaa taana c'igissaadda. 
Genesis31:40 Gallassaa suuluu, k'amma meeguu taana k'oheedda; gem""ishuu taappe d'ayeedda." 
Genesis31:41 Taani hawaadan ne soon laatamu laytsaa de'aad; tammanne oyddu laytsaa ne laau mac'c'a naanaa dirawunne usuppun laytsaa ne wudiyaa diraw new ootsaadde de'aad; shin neeni ta dirgguwaa tammu gede laammaadda. 
Genesis31:42 Ta aawuwaa S'oossay, Abrahaame S'oossay, Yisaak'i yayyeeddawe taananna gidibeennawaa gidintto, sid'e baynnan neeni taana mela kushe kessa yeddaadda; shin S'oossay ta tuggaanne ta kushiyaa oosuwaa be'iide, zino k'amma neena seereedda» yaageedda." 
Genesis31:43 Laabi Yaak'ooba, «Machatuu ta mac'c'a naanaa; naanaykka ta naanaa; wudiikka ta wudiyaa; neeni be'iyaa ubbay tawaa. Hachche ha mac'c'a naanaa tawanttu bollanne unttunttu yeleedda naanaa bolla ayaa ootsanaw danddayayitaa?" 
Genesis31:44 Hai haaya; neeninne taani c'aak'uwaa c'aak'k'etoytte; hewe neeppenne taappe gidduwaan markka gido» yaageedda. 
Genesis31:45 Hewaa diraw Yaak'oobi itti shuchchaa akkiidde tuussaadan esseedda. 
Genesis31:46 I bare dabbotuwaa, «Shuchchaa shiishshite» yaageedda; unttunttu shuchchaa shiishshiide keeleeddinno; he keelaa lank'k'iyaan meeddino." 
Genesis31:47 Laabi he keelaa, Yigaari-Sahaaduta giide suntseedda; k'ay Yaak'oobi Aa C'imeedda giide suntseedda." 
Genesis31:48 Laabi, «Ha keelay neeppenne taappe gidduwaan hachche markka» yaageedda. Hewaa diraw Aa suntsay C'imeedda geetetteedda." 
Genesis31:49 K'ay I he shuchchaa tuussaa Mis'ip'p'a giide suntseedda; ayaw gooppe, Laabi, «Nuuni ittuu ittuwaappe haakkiide de'iyaa wode, Med'inaa Goday ne gidduwaaninne ta gidduwaan gidiide naago." 
Genesis31:50 Neeni ta mac'c'a naanaa naak'k'ooppe, woy neeni ta mac'c'a naanaa bolla hara machatuwaa akkooppe, nuunana ha""i ooninne baynnawaa gidooppenne ne gidduwaaninne ta gidduwaan S'oossay markka gidiyaawaa hassaya» yaageedda." 
Genesis31:51 Laabi k'aykka Yaak'ooba, «Keeleteedda shuchchay hawesh; k'ay taani ne gidduwaaninne ta gidduwaan esseedda shuchchaa tuussay hawesh." 
Genesis31:52 Taani ha keelaappe neena genanaw neekko aad'd'enaaddan, neenikka taana genanaw ha keelaappenne ha shuchchaa tuussaappe aad'd'enaaddan, ha keelaynne ha shuchchaa tuussay markka." 
Genesis31:53 Abrahaame S'oossay, Naakoora S'oossay, unttunttu aawuwaa S'oossay, nu gidduwaan I pirddo» yaageedda. Yaak'oobi bare aawuu Yisaak'i Yayyeeddawaa suntsaan c'aak'k'eedda." 
Genesis31:54 Yaak'oobi deriyaa bollan yarshshuwaa yarshsheedda; bare dabbotuwaakka k'umaa maanaw s'eeseedda. Unttunttu miide deriyaa bollan ak'eedino. 
Genesis31:55 Wonttetsa gallassi guuran Laabi denddiide, bare naanaa naanaanne bare mac'c'a naanaa yereedda; k'ay unttuntta anjjeedda. Bare soo simmeedda." 
Genesis32:1 Yaak'oobi denddiide bare ogiyaa biishshin, S'oossaa kiitanchchatuu aanana gaketeeddino." 
Genesis32:2 Yaak'oobi unttuntta be'eedda wode, «Hawe S'oossay ak'iyaa sa'aa» yaagiide, he sa'aa Maahinayma giide suntseedda." 
Genesis32:3 Yaak'oobi Se'iira giyaa sa'aan, Eedooma biittan de'iyaa bare ishaa Eesaakko kiitaa bareppe sintsaw kiitteedda." 
Genesis32:4 I unttuntta hawaadan yaagiide azazeedda; «Hinttenttu ta godaa Eesaw gaanawe hawaa; ‹Ne k'oomay Yaak'oobi, «Taani Laabaana matan de'aadde hanno gakkanaw gam""aad." 
Genesis32:5 Taw miizzaynne harii, dorssaynne deeshshay, attuma k'oomatuunne mac'c'a k'oomatuu de'iino; ha""i taani ha kiitaa ta godaa sintsaan nashettana mala kiittaad» yaageedda› yaagite» yaageedda." 
Genesis32:6 Kiitetteeddawanttu Yaak'oobakko simmiide Aa, «Nuuni ne ishaa Eesaakko beeddo; ha""i I k'ay neenana gaketanaw yee; aanana oyddu s'eetu Asay de'ee» yaageeddino." 
Genesis32:7 Yaak'oobi yayyiide batibateedda; barenana de'iyaa asaa laau c'itan shaakkeedda; k'ay bare dorssaa, deeshshaa, miizzaanne gaaluwaa laa""u c'itan shaakkeedda." 
Genesis32:8 I, «Eesay yiide itti c'itaa oliyaawaa gidooppe, atteeda c'uguu kessi akkooppenne» yaagiide k'oppeedda." 
Genesis32:9 He wode Yaak'oobi hawaadan yaagiide woosseedda; «Abeet Med'inaa Godaw, ta aawuwaa Abrahaame S'oossaw, ta aawuwaa Yisaak'a S'oossaw, taana, ‹Ne gadiyaa, ne dabbotuwaakko simma; taani new lo""obaa ootsana› geeddawoo," 
Genesis32:10 neeni ne k'oomaw ootseedda keekkatetsawunne tumatetsaw ubbaw taani bessenawaa. Taani ha Yorddaanoosa Shaafaa pinneedda wode, taw itti s'am""aa s'alalay de'ee; shin ha""i taani laa""u c'ugo gidaaddi." 
Genesis32:11 Taani neena woossay; ta ishaa Eesaa kushiyaappe taana ashsha; ayaw gooppe, I yiide, taananne mac'c'awantta unttunttu naanatuwaakka d'ayssanawenttonne gaade yayaad." 
Genesis32:12 Shin neeni taana, ‹Taani new tumu lo""obaa ootsana; taani ne zeretsaanne paydanaw danddayettenna abbaa shafiyaa keeshshaa ootsana› geeddawaa k'oppa» yaageedda." 
Genesis32:13 He gallassaa k'amma I yan ak'eeda; barew de'iyaawaa ubbaappe bare ishaa Eesaw immiyaawaa k'oriide keseedda; 
Genesis32:14 I kesseeddawanttu laau s'eetu mac'c'a deeshshatuwaanne laatamu deeshsha koletuwaa, laa""u s'eetu mac'c'a dorssatuwaanne laatamu dorssaa koletuwaa, hattamu d'antsiyaa gaalotuwaa unttunttu maratuwaanna, oytamu mac'c'a miizzatuwaa, tammu korumaa booratuwaa, laatamu mac'c'a haretuwaanne tammu attuma haretuwaa." 
Genesis32:15  
Genesis32:16 Hawantta wudiyaan wudiyaan shaakki, bare k'oomatuwaa kushiyaan wotsiide, bare k'oomatuwaa, «Taappe sintsaw biide, wudiyaa wudiyaappe haakuwaan haakuwaan laaggite» yaageedda." 
Genesis32:17 Sintsan kaaletsiyaawaa, «Ta ishay Eesay neenana gaketiide neena, ‹Neeni oossee? Neeni hak'a bay? Ne sintsan de'iyaa mehiyaa ubbay oossee?› yaagiide oochchiyaawaa gidooppe," 
Genesis32:18 neeni aw, ‹Hawanttu ne k'oomaa Yaak'oobawaa; unttunttu ta godaa Eesaw immanaw yeddeeddawantta; k'ay ikka nuuppe guyyenna yide'ee› yaaga» yaagiide azazeedda." 
Genesis32:19 K'ay I laa'entsa heezzantsuwaan wudiyaa kaalliyaa haratuwaa ubbatuwaa hawaadan azazeedda; «Hinttenttu Eesaanna gaketiyaa wode, hanniidankka giita;" 
Genesis32:20 ‹Ne k'oomaa Yaak'oobi nuuppe guyyenna yide'ee› geenan aggoppite» yaageedda. Ayaw gooppe I, «Taani taappe sintsaw immanaw kiitteeddawaan Aa doshissana; ooni erii, hewaappe guyye taani aanana gaketiyaa wode, I taana mokki akkanenttonne» yaagiide k'oppeedda." 
Genesis32:21 Hewaa diraw bare immiyaawaa bareppe sintsaw yeddeedda. Shin I bare huup'iyaw he gallassi k'amma yan ak'eeda. 
Genesis32:22 He gallassi k'amma Yaak'oobi denddiide, bare laa""u machatuwaa, bare laa""u k'oomatuwaanne bare naanaa tammanne ittatuwaa akkiidde, Yaabook'a giyaa pinuwaa gakkeedda; I unttuntta shaafaa pintseedda; barew de'iyaawaa ubbaakka pintsiide yeddeedda;" 
Genesis32:23  
Genesis32:24 shin Yaak'oobi barekka atteedda. He wode itti Asay sa'ay wonttana gakkanaw aanana baas'eteedda. 
Genesis32:25 He Asay Aa s'oonanaw danddayibeenawaa be'eedda wode, Yaak'oobaw muk'k'eechchaa mek'etsaa bochcheedda; Aa muk'k'eechchaa mek'etsay kes wod'd'eedda." 
Genesis32:26 Yaatina bitanii Aa, «Sa'ay wontteedda diraw, taana yedda» yaageedda. Shin Yaak'oobi Aa, «Neeni taana anjjenan taani neena yeddikke» yaageedda." 
Genesis32:27 Bitanii Aa, «Ne suntsay oonee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. I, «Yaak'ooba» yaagiide zaareedda." 
Genesis32:28 Bitanii Aa, «Hawaappe sintsaw ne suntsay Israa'eeliyaa geetettooppe attina, Yaak'ooba geetettoppo; ayaw gooppe, neeni S'oossaananne asaana baas'etaade s'oonaadda» yaageedda." 
Genesis32:29 Yaak'oobi Aa, «Ne suntsay oonee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Shin bitanii, «Neeni ta suntsaa ayaw oochchay?» yaageedda giide Aa anjjeedda." 
Genesis32:30 Hewaa diraw Yaak'oobi he sa'aa P'iinieela giide suntseedda; ayaw gooppe I, «Taani S'oossaa bazzuwaan s'eellaad; gidooppenne taani pas'a ataad» yaageedda." 
Genesis32:31 I P'iinieelappe denddiyaa wode, Aa bolla s'alk'k'ii doleedda. I bare muk'k'eechchaa mek'etsaa diraw dooggee." 
Genesis32:32 Yaak'ooba muk'k'eechchaa ashuwaa matan bosheteedda diraw, Israa'eeliyaa Asay mehiyaa muk'k'eechchaa ashuwaa hachche gakkanaw meenna." 
Genesis33:1 Yaak'oobi d'ok'k'u gi s'eelliide, Eesay bare oyddu s'eetu asaana yiyaawaa be'eedda. Hewaa diraw naanaa Liyiw, Raaheeliwunne laa""u k'oomatuwaakko shaakkeedda." 
Genesis33:2 K'oomatuwaanne unttunttu naanaa sintsan, Liyonne I naanaa unttunttu geeduwaan, Raaheelonne Yooseefa wurssetsan wotseedda." 
Genesis33:3 Shin I bare huup'iyaw sintsaw aad'd'iide, bare ishaakko matiidde, sa'aa gakki gakkiide laappun kaala goynneedda." 
Genesis33:4 Shin Eesay aanana gaketanaw wos's'iide, Aa k'ood'iyaa k'oommi yereedda. Unttunttu yeekkeeddino." 
Genesis33:5 Yaatina Eesay d'ok'k'u gi s'eelliide, machatuwaanne naanaa be'eedda; I, «Ha neenana de'iyaawanttu oonee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Yaak'oobi, «Unttunttu S'oossay ne k'oomaw keekatetsaan immeedda naanaa» yaageedda." 
Genesis33:6 K'oomatuu barenttu naanatuwaanna shiik'iide goynneeddinno. 
Genesis33:7 Hewaappe guyye, Liyanne izi naanay yiide goynneeddinno; wurssetsaan Yooseefonne Raaheela yiide goynneeddinno." 
Genesis33:8 Eesay, «Ha sintsan taananna gaketeedda wudii ubbay k'ay ayee?» yaagiide oochcheedda. I, «Ta godaw, hewe taani ne sintsaan nashettanaassa» yaageedda." 
Genesis33:9 Shin Eesay, «Ta ishaw, taw darobay de'ee; newe neessa gido» yaageedda." 
Genesis33:10 Yaak'oobi, «Tuytti, ha""i taani ne sintsaan nashshetteedawaa gidooppe, ha taani immiyaawaa taappe akka. Neeni taana mokka akkeedda diraw, taani ne deemuwaa be'iyaawe S'oossaa deemuwaa be'iyaawaa mala." 
Genesis33:11 Taani new aheedda ha imuwaa akka; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay keekiidde immina, taw besseedda» yaageedda. Yaak'oobi shoobiyaa toleedda diraw, Eesay hewaa akkeedda." 
Genesis33:12 Hewaappe guyye Eesay, «Ane dendda; nu ogiyaa boytte; taani neenana ittippe baana» yaageedda." 
Genesis33:13 Shin Yaak'oobi Aa, «Ta godaw, naanay shuga gidiyaawaa eraasa; k'ay taani barenttu galo maratuwaa d'antsiyaa dorssatuwaanne miizzaa naagana koshshee; Asay unttunttu itti gallassaa dirbbissi laaggooppe, mehiyaa ubbay hayk'k'ana." 
Genesis33:14 Hewaa diraw, ta godaw, ne k'oomaappe sintsataade ba; taani Se'iiran ta godaa gakkanaw, ta sintsaan de'iyaa mehiyaa hemetaa keenaanne naanaa hemetaa keenaa loddan kaallana» yaageedda." 
Genesis33:15 Eesay Aa, «Yaatooppe taani ta asaappe amareedawaa new ashshay» yaageedda. Shin Yaak'oobi Aa, «Hewe ayissee? Taani ta godaa sintsaan nashshettiyaawe taw gidana» yaageedda." 
Genesis33:16 Hewaa diraw Eesay he gallassi ogiyaan geliide, Se'iira simmeedda." 
Genesis33:17 Shin Yaak'oobi Sukkoota beedda; yan barew golliyaa kees's'eedda; bare mehetookka daasiyaa daaseedda. Hewaa diraw he sa'aa Sukkoota giide suntseedda. 
Genesis33:18 Yaak'oobi Masp'p'es'oomiyaappe simmeedda wode, Kanaane biittan de'iyaa Sekeeme giyaa katamaa sarotetsaan gakkeedda; I he katamaw bazzuwaan utteedda." 
Genesis33:19 Bare dunkkaaniyaa d'ogeedda gadiyaa Shekeema aawuwaa Hamoora naanatuwaappe s'eetu s'agaraa biran shammeedda. 
Genesis33:20 Yan yarshshiyaa sa'aa kees's'iide Aa, «S'oossaa, Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa» giide suntseedda." 
Genesis34:1 Liya Yaak'oobaw yeleedda naatta Waana, he wode he gadiyaa mac'c'awantta be'anaw kesaaddu." 
Genesis34:2 He gadiyaa mooddiyaa Hiwiyaa Hamoora na'aa Shekeeme izo be'iide, izo hori afiide bayzzeedda." 
Genesis34:3 Aa wozanay Yaak'ooba naatto Diino amotteedda; I izo siik'eedda; iziw loiyaawaa haasayeedda. 
Genesis34:4 Shekeeme bare aawuwaa Hamoora, «Taw ha naatto machchetetsaw oochchaarikki» yaageedda." 
Genesis34:5 Yaak'oobi bare naatta Diinaa bayeeddawaa sisiyaa wode, Aa attuma naanay woran mehiyaanna de'ino; hewaa diraw unttunttu gakkanaw c'o""u geedda." 
Genesis34:6 Hewaappe guyye, Shekeema aawuwaa Hamoori Yaak'oobanna haasayanaw yeedda." 
Genesis34:7 Yaak'ooba attuma naanay hewaa siseedda saanna woraappe yeeddino; unttunttu kayyotteeddinonne hank'k'eteeddino; ayaw gooppe, Shekeeme Yaak'ooba naatto hori afiide bayzziyaawaa, Israa'eeliyaa bolla pokkobaa, ootsanaw bessenabaa ootseedda." 
Genesis34:8 Shin Hamoori unttuntta, «Ta na'ay Shekeeme hinttenttu naattiw darssi dagammeedda; hayyanaa izo aw machchetetsaw immeerikkitee!" 
Genesis34:9 Nuunana akettitenne gelettite; hinttenttu mac'c'a naanaa nuw immite; nu mac'c'a naanaanne hinttenttoo akkite. 
Genesis34:10 Hinttenttu nu giddon uttanaw danddayiita; biittay loytsi aaka; aan de'ite; zalite; aan mas'uwaa demmite» yaageedda. 
Genesis34:11 He wode Shekeeme Diini aawuwaanne I ishatuwaa, «Taani hinttenttu sintsaan nashettooppe, hinttenttu oochchiyaawaa ayaa gidooppenne immana." 
Genesis34:12 Hinttenttu mishira naattiw immiyaawaanne c'ilooshshaa hinttenttu koyowaa keeshshaa darissiide taana oochchite; taani hinttenttu taana oochcheeddawaa ayaanne immana; shin taani akkanaaddan naatto taw immeerikkitee!» yaageedda. 
Genesis34:13 Barenttu michchato Diino Shekeeme tunisseedda diraw, Yaak'ooba attuma naanay Shekeemawunne Aa aawuwaa Hamooraw wordduwaa odeeddino;" 
Genesis34:14 unttuntta hawaadan yaageeddino; «Nuuni hewaa mallaa ootsana danddayokko; nuuni nu michchato k'as's'arettibeenna asaw immokko; hewe nuuna kawushshiyaawaa. 
Genesis34:15 Nuuni hinttenttu ittibaa ootsooppe hinttenttoo, ‹Eeno› gaana; hewe ayee gooppe, hinttenttu gadiyaa attuma Asay ubbay k'as's'arettiide nuunaadan hanooppe," 
Genesis34:16 nuuni nu mac'c'a naanaa hinttenttoo immanaw ‹Eeno› gaana; hinttenttu mac'c'a naanaakka nuw akkana. Nuuni hinttenttu giddon uttiide, hinttenana itti asaa gidana." 
Genesis34:17 Shin hinttenttu k'as's'arettanaw eeno geenawaa gidooppe, nuuni nu michchato akkiidde baana» yaageeddino." 
Genesis34:18 Unttunttu geeddawe Hamoorawunne Aa na'aa Shekeemaw loa malateedda. 
Genesis34:19 He wodallay, bare aawuwaa gollen de'iyaa ubbaappe aad'd'i bonchchetteeddawe, Yaak'ooba naattin nashetteedda diraw, unttunttu geeddawaa ootsanaw gam""ibeena." 
Genesis34:20 He wode Hamoorinne Aa na'ay Shekeeme barenttu katamaa gutaraa biide, barenttu katamaa asaw hawaadan yaagiide odeeddino;" 
Genesis34:21 «Ha asatuu nuunana siga; unttunttu nu biittan de'iinonne zaliino; biittay loytsi aaka. Unttunttu mac'c'a naanaakka nuuni akkana; unttunttukka nu mac'c'a naanaa akkana. 
Genesis34:22 Shin nuunana unttunttu itti asaadan de'anaw nuuni ittibaa mayettanaw koshshee; hewenne, unttunttu k'as's'aretteeddawaadan nu attuma Asay ubbay k'as's'arettanawaa." 
Genesis34:23 Nuuni hewaadan ootsooppe, unttunttu miizzay, unttunttu mas'uunne unttunttu hara mehii ubbay nuwaa gidennee? Hewaa diraw ane nuuni unttunttu giyaawaa eeno goytte; unttunttukka nu giddon de'ana» yaageeddino." 
Genesis34:24 Katamaa gutaraa shiik'eedda asatuu ubbay Hamoorawunne Aa na'aa Shekeemaw, «Eeno» geeddino. Yaatina he katamaa attuma asatuu ubbay k'as's'aretteeddino." 
Genesis34:25 Heezzentso gallassi, unttunttu ubbay barenttu k'as's'araa madutsan saketi de'ishshin, Yaak'ooba attuma naanatuwaappe laa""uu, Simooninne Leewii, Diini ishatuu, barenttu mashshaa akkiidde, ooninne erennan katamaa geliide, attuma asatuwaa ubbaa wod'eeddino." 
Genesis34:26 Hamooranne Aa na'aa Shekeema mashshaan wod'iide, barenttu michchato Diino Shekeema golliyaappe akkiidde afeedino." 
Genesis34:27 Yaak'ooba attuma naanay he anhatuwaa bolla geliide, barenttu michchato Diino tunisseedda katamaa bonk'k'eeddino." 
Genesis34:28 Unttunttu dorssaa wudiyaa, miizzaa wudiyaa, hariyaa, katamaa giddon de'iyaawaanne gas'an de'iyaawaa ubbaa akkeeddino." 
Genesis34:29 Unttunttu mas'uwaa ubbaa, unttunttu naanaa ubbaanne machatuwaa ubbaa omoodeeddino; gollen de'eeddawaa ubbaa bonk'k'eeddino." 
Genesis34:30 Yaak'oobi Simoonanne Leewiyaa, «Hinttenttu ta bolla metuwaa ahi kichcheedditta; ha gadiyaan de'iyaa Kanaanatuunne Parzzetuu taana is's'anawantta; nuuni payduwaan guutsa; unttunttu ittippe gidiide ta bolla denddooppe, taaninne ta soo Asay d'ayana» yaageedda." 
Genesis34:31 Shin unttunttu, «Yaatina I nu michchato sharmus'aadan ootsana bessii?» yaageeddino." 
Genesis35:1 S'oossay hewaappe guyye Yaak'ooba, «Denddaade pude Beeteele baade yan de'a. Neeni ne ishaa Eesaappe bak'atiyaa wode new k'onc'c'eedda S'oossaw yan yarshshiyaa sa'aa kees's'a» yaageedda." 
Genesis35:2 Yaak'oobi bare soo asaanne barenana de'iyaawantta ubbaa, «hinttenttu gidduwaan de'iyaa allaga S'oossatuwaa misiletuwaa diggite; hinttenttu bollaa geeshshite; hinttenttu mayuwaanne laammite." 
Genesis35:3 Ane denddiide, pude Beeteele boytte; ta metuwaa gallassi taana siseedda, taani beedda sa'aan ubbaan taananna gideedda S'oossaw, taani yan yarshshiyaa sa'aa kees's'ana» yaageedda." 
Genesis35:4 Hewaa diraw unttunttu barenttoo de'iyaa allaga s'oossatuwaa misiletuwaa ubbaanne barenttu haytsaan de'iyaa gudichchaa ubbaa Yaak'oobaw immeeddino; Yaak'oobi hewantta Sekeeman de'iyaa wolaa garssan moogeedda. 
Genesis35:5 Hewaappe guyye, Yaak'oobinne Aa attuma naanay denddiide biishshin, itti uraynne unttuntta oyk'k'anaw kaallibeenna; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu biishshin, unttunttu yuushshuwaan de'iyaa katamaa asaa ubbaa bolla S'oossaa dagamay wod'd'eedda." 
Genesis35:6 Yaak'oobinne aanana de'iyaa Asay ubbay Kanaane gadiyaan de'iyaa (Beeteele giyaa) Looza gakkeeddino. 
Genesis35:7 Yan I yarshshiyaa sa'aa kees's'eedda; I he sa'aa El-Beeteele giide suntseedda; ayaw gooppe, I bare ishaappe bak'atiide biyaa wode, S'oossay aw k'onc'c'eedda sa'ay hewaa." 
Genesis35:8 Ribik'o dichchiyaa Deboora yan hayk'k'aaddu; Beeteeleppe hirkkinna de'iyaa wolaa garssan iza moogettaaddu; hewaa diraw he mitsaa suntsay Yeekuwaa Wolaa geetetteedda. 
Genesis35:9 Yaak'oobi Masp'p'es'oomiyaappe simmeeddawaappe guyye, S'oossay aw zaaretsi k'onc'c'iide, Aa anjjeedda;" 
Genesis35:10 S'oossay Aa, «Ne suntsay Yaak'ooba; shin hawaappe sintsanaw neeni ubbakka Yaak'ooba geetettakka; ne suntsay israa'eeliyaa gidana» yaagiide I Aa israa'eeliyaa suntseedda." 
Genesis35:11 K'ay S'oossay Yaak'ooba, «Taani Ubbaa Danddayiyaa S'oossaa; neeni yeletta; c'oratta; kawutetsatuunne kawutetsaa Asay neeppe kessana; kaatetuukka ne gulbbataappe kessana." 
Genesis35:12 Taani Abrahaamewunne Yisaak'aw immeedda biittaa, k'ay new immay; neeppe guyyenna taani ha biittaa ne zeretsaw immana» yaageedda." 
Genesis35:13 Hewaappe guyye, S'oossay aanana haasayeedda sa'aappe pude kesseedda." 
Genesis35:14 Yaak'oobi S'oossay barenana haasayeedda sa'aan shuchchaa essiide, Aa bolla ushshaa yarshshuwaa tigeedda; zayitiyaakka bolla tigeedda." 
Genesis35:15 Yaak'oobi S'oossay barenana haasayeedda sa'aa «Beeteele» giide suntseedda. 
Genesis35:16 Unttunttu hewaappe guyye, Beeteeleppe denddeeddino. Unttunttu Efiraataa gakkanaw laafaa ashshiyaa wode, Raaheelo yeluu oyk'k'eedda; yeluwaan iza loytsa waayettaaddu." 
Genesis35:17 Yeluu izo waayisseedda wode izo yelissiyaana, «Yayyoppa; hawekka attuma na'aa» yaagaaddu." 
Genesis35:18 Shin iza hayk'k'aadde, shemppu kesishshin, bare na'aa Been""oona suntsaaddu; shin Aa aawuu Aa Biiniyaama suntseedda." 
Genesis35:19 Hewaappe guyye, Raaheela hayk'k'a bashaaddu; Beeteleeme giyaa Efiraataa afiyaa ogiyaa doonaan moogettaaddu." 
Genesis35:20 Yaak'oobi izi duufuwaan hawulttiyaa shuchchaa esseedda; he hawulttii hachche gakkanaw Raaheeli duufuwaa erissee. 
Genesis35:21 Israa'eelii hewaappe denddiide, Edera gimbbiyaappe hefintsaan bare dunkkaaniyaa tokkeedda." 
Genesis35:22 Israa'eelii he gadiyaan de'ishshin, Roobeeli biide, bare aawoo yeleedda k'oomatti Baalina giseedda. Israa'eelii ha yewuwaa siseedda. Yaak'ooba attuma naanay tammanne laa""a." 
Genesis35:23 Liya naanay Yaak'ooba bayira na'aa Roobeela, Simoona, Leewa, Yihudaa, Yisaakooranne Zaabiloona." 
Genesis35:24 Raaheeli attuma naanay Yooseefanne Biiniyaama. 
Genesis35:25 Raaheeli danggaas'iratti Baali attuma naanay Daananne Nifttaaleema. 
Genesis35:26 Liya danggaas'iratti Zilppi attuma naanay Gaadanne Aaseera. Hawanttu Masp'p'es'oomiyaan Yaak'oobaw yeletteedda Aa attuma naanaa. 
Genesis35:27 Yaak'oobi (Kebroona giyaa) K'iriyaati-Arbba'a matan Maamiren de'iyaa, bare aawuwaa Yisaak'a soo yeedda; he sa'ay kase Abrahaamenne Yisaak'i de'eedda sa'aa." 
Genesis35:28 Yisaak'i s'eetanne hosppun tammu laytsaa de'eedda; 
Genesis35:29 I daro wodiyaa de'iide, lo""o c'imi hayk'k'iidde bare mayzzan gaketeedda. Aa naanay Eesaynne Yaak'oobi Aa moogeeddino." 
Genesis36:1 Eedooma giyaa Eesaa yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. 
Genesis36:2 Eesay Kanaane biittaa mac'c'a naanatuwaappe barew machchetuwaa akkeedda; unttunttune Hiitiyaa Eloona naatto Aado, Hiiwiyaa S'ibaa'oona na'ay Aani yeleedda Oholiibaamonne." 
Genesis36:3 Isimaa'eela naatto, Nabaayoota michchato Baasemaato." 
Genesis36:4 Aada Eesaw Elifaaza yelaaddu; Baasemaatakka Ra'u'eela yelaaddu; 
Genesis36:5 Oholiibaama Ya'uusha, Yaa'ilaamanne K'oraaha yelaaddu; Kanaane gadiyaan Eesaw yeletteedda attuma naanay hawantta." 
Genesis36:6 Eesay bare machchetuwaa, bare attuma naanaanne mac'c'a naanaa, bare soo asaa ubbaa, bare miizzatuwaanne bare mehiyaa ubbaa Kanaane gadiyaan I mooddeeddawaa ubbaa akkiidde, bare ishaa Yaak'oobappe haakkiyaa gadiyaa beedda." 
Genesis36:7 Unttunttu mas'uu dareedda diraw, unttunttu ittippe de'anaw danddayibeykkino; unttunttu mehii dareedda diraw, unttunttu de'iyaa biittay unttunttu mehiyaw gidanaw danddayibeenna." 
Genesis36:8 Yaatina Eedooma giyaa Eesay Se'iira giyaa gezziyaan utteedda. 
Genesis36:9 Se'iira gezziyaan de'eedda Eedoomatuwaa aawuwaa Eesaa yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. 
Genesis36:10 Hawe Eesaa attuma naanaa suntsaa; hewanttunne Eesaa machchatti Aadi na'aa Elifaazanne Eesaa machchatti Baasemaati na'aa Ra'u'eela. 
Genesis36:11 Elifaaza naanay Temaana, Omaara, S'afa, Ga'itaamanne K'anaaza." 
Genesis36:12 K'ay Timinaa'a Eesaa na'aa Elifaazaw k'oomatuwaa; iza Elifaazaw Amaaleek'a yelaaddu. Hawanttu Eesaa machchatti Aadi na'aa naanaa. 
Genesis36:13 Ra'u'eela attuma naanay Nahaata, Zaraaha, Shammanne Miizaa; hawanttu Eesaa machchatti Baasemaati na'aa naanaa." 
Genesis36:14 S'ibaa'oona na'ay Aani yeleedda Oholiibaama attuma naanay hawantta; iza Eesaw Ya'uusha, Yaa'ilaamanne K'oraaha yelaaddu." 
Genesis36:15 Eesaa yeletaa kaappatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Eesaw bayira na'aa Elifaaza attuma naanay, kaappuwaa gideeddawanttu Temaana, Omaara, S'afa, K'anaaza," 
Genesis36:16 K'oraaha, Ga'itaamanne Amaaleek'a; Eedooma biittan Elifaazi yeleedda kaappatuu hawantta; hawanttu ubbay Aadi na'aa naanaa." 
Genesis36:17 Eesaa na'aa Ra'u'eela attuma naanay, kaappuwaa gideeddawanttu Nahaata, Zaraaha, Shammanne Miizaa; Eedooma biittan Ra'u'eeli yeleedda kaappatuu hawantta; unttunttu Eesaa machchatti Baasemaati na'aa naanaa." 
Genesis36:18 Eesaa machchatti Oholiibaami attuma naanay, kaappuwaa gideeddawanttu Ya'uusha, Yaa'ilaamanne K'oraaha; unttunttu Aana naatti, Eesaa machchatti Oholiibaamippe yeletteedda kaappatuwaa." 
Genesis36:19 Eedooma giyaa Eesaa attuma naanay hawantta; unttunttu kaappatuukka hawantta. 
Genesis36:20 Eedooma gadiyaan de'iyaa Hooriyaa Se'iira attuma naanay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta; hewanttukka Los'aana, Shobaala, S'ibaa'oona, Aana," 
Genesis36:21 Dishoona, Es'eeranne Dishaana; hewanttu, Eedooma gadiyaan de'iyaa Se'iira attuma naanay, Hooretuwaa kaappatuwaa." 
Genesis36:22 Los'aana attuma naanay Hooranne Heemaama; Los'aana michchata Timinaa'o. 
Genesis36:23 Shobaala attuma naanay Aaliwaana, Maanahaata, Eebaala, Shefanne Oonaama." 
Genesis36:24 S'ibaa'oona attuma naanay Aayanne Aana; hawe Aani woran bare aawuwaa S'ibaa'oona haretuwaa heemiidde haatsaa boluwaa demmeeddawaa. 
Genesis36:25 Aana na'ay Dishoona; naatta k'ay Oholiibaamo. 
Genesis36:26 Dishoona attuma naanay Hemddaana, Eshibaana, Yitiraananne Karaana." 
Genesis36:27 Es'eera attuma naanay Bilihaana, Za'iwaananne Ak'ana." 
Genesis36:28 Dishaana attuma naanay Uus'anne Araana. 
Genesis36:29 Hooretuwaa kaappatuu hawantta; Los'aana, Shobaala, S'ibaa'oona, Aana," 
Genesis36:30 Dishoona, Es'eeranne Dishaana. Hawanttu Se'iira biittan barenttu yaran yaran shaaketteedda Hooretuwaa kaappatuwaa." 
Genesis36:31 Israa'eelan kaatii kawutanaappe kase Eedooma biittan kaateteedda kaatetu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. 
Genesis36:32 Ba'oora na'ay Belaa'i Eedooman kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Dinaaba geetettee. 
Genesis36:33 Belaa'i hayk'k'ina, Boos'irappe yeedda Zaraaha na'ay Yobaabi kaateteedda." 
Genesis36:34 Yobaabi hayk'k'ina, Temaana biittaappe yeedda Hushaami kaateteedda." 
Genesis36:35 Hushaami hayk'k'ina, Badaada na'ay Hadaadi, Midiyaama asaa moo'aabe gadiyaan s'ooneeddawe kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Awiita geetetteedda." 
Genesis36:36 Hadaadi hayk'k'ina, Maasireek'appe yeedda Saamili kaateteedda." 
Genesis36:37 Saamili hayk'k'ina, shaafaa matan de'iyaa Rahobootappe yeedda Shaa'uuli kaateteedda." 
Genesis36:38 Shaa'uuli hayk'k'ina, Akiboora na'ay Ba'aalihanaani kaateteedda." 
Genesis36:39 Akiboora na'aa Ba'aalihanaani hayk'k'ina, Hadaari kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Paa'u geetettee; Aa machata Mezaahaaba naatta Maas'ireeda yeleedda Mahes'aabi'eelo geetettaw." 
Genesis36:40 Eesaa yeletaa kaappatuu barenttu yaran yaran, barenttu sa'aan ellekka barenttu suntsan suntsan hawantta; Timinaa'a, Aliwa, Yeteeta," 
Genesis36:41 Oholiibaama, Eela, Piinoona," 
Genesis36:42 K'anaaza, Temaana, Mibs's'aara," 
Genesis36:43 Maagidi'eelanne Iraama. Hawanttu barenttu mooddiyaa biittan, barenttu de'iyaa sa'aan de'iyaa sa'aan Eedooma kaappatuwaa. Hawe Eesay, Eedoomatuwaa aawuwaa." 
Genesis37:1 Yaak'oobi bare aawuu de'eedda Kanaane biittan utteedda. 
Genesis37:2 Yaak'ooba naanay haneeddabay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. Yooseefo tammanne laappun laytsaa na'aa gideedda wode, bare aawoo hara machchetuwaappe, Baalippenne Zilppippe yeletteedda bare ishatuwaanna wudiyaa heeme. He wode I bare aawoo unttunttu ootseedda iitabaa odeedda." 
Genesis37:3 Israa'eelii Yooseefa c'imiide yeleedda diraw, bare hara attuma naanaa ubbaappe aatsiide siik'ee. I aw alleek'k'eedda mayuwaa giigisseedda."
