Leviticus25:27 bare zaleedda wodiyaappe doommiide de'iyaa laytsaa paydiidde, atteeda laytsaa miishshaa shammeeddawoo zaaro; yaatiide I bare gadiyaw simmo." 
Leviticus25:28 Shin aw he gadiyaa wozanaw gidiyaa shaluu d'ayooppe, Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw gadii shammeedda bitaniyaa kushiyaan gam""o; Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa wode, Aa gadii aw simmo; ikka bare gadiyaw simmo." 
Leviticus25:29 « ‹Gimbbetti utteedda katamaa giddon itti Asay de'iyaa golliyaa hara uraw zalooppe, I zal""osaappe biide itti laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa wodiyaan zaariide wozanaw aw maatay de'ee." 
Leviticus25:30 Itti laytsaa kumentsaa giddon wozana d'ayooppe, he gimbbetteedda katamaa giddon de'iyaa gollii shammeeddawoo na'aa na'aw med'inaw aawaa gidee. Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa wodekka simmenna." 
Leviticus25:31 Shin gimbbettibeenna heeratuwaan de'iyaa golletuu shoyk'aa mala. Unttunttu wozettiino; Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa wodekka zaleeddawoo simmiino. 
Leviticus25:32 « ‹Gidooppenne Leewatuwaa katamatuwaan de'iyaa barenttu golliyaa Leewatuu barenttu koyeedda wodiyaan wozi akkanaw danddayiino. 
Leviticus25:33 Leewatuwaappe itti Asay unttunttu katamaa giddon de'iyaa golliyaa zaliide wozana d'ayooppe, he unttunttu katamaa giddon de'iyaa gollii Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaa wode simmee. Ayaw gooppe, Leewatuwaa katamaa giddon de'iyaa golletuu Israa'eeliyaa asaa giddon Leewatoo ak'o." 
Leviticus25:34 Shin unttunttu katamaa yuushshuwaan unttunttu ubbaw ittippe de'iyaa biittay unttunttoo med'inaw ak'o gidiyaa diraw zalettenna. 
Leviticus25:35 « ‹K'ay ne ishay hiyyeesiide barena danddayana d'ayooppe, imatsaadaaninne betiyaadan I neenana de'ana mala, neeni Aa maadda." 
Leviticus25:36 Ne ishaa neenana wotsanaw aappe dichchaa akkoppa; woy wod'iyaa mooppa. Shin neeni ne S'oossaw yayya. 
Leviticus25:37 Ne biraa aw dichchaw taloppa; ne k'umaakka aw wod'iyaan zaloppa. 
Leviticus25:38 Hinttew Kanaane biittaa immanawunne hintte S'oossaa gidanaw, hinttena Gibs'e gadiyaappe kesseeddawe, taani Med'inaa Goday, hintte S'oossaa." 
Leviticus25:39 « ‹New dabbo gidiyaa Israa'eeliyaa Asay mank'k'iide, barena new ayiletetsaw zal""ooppe, neeni Aa ayiliyaadan oosissoppa." 
Leviticus25:40 I keraa ootsiyaa asaadaaninne betiyaadan neenana de'o; Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw I new ootso. 
Leviticus25:41 He wode I bare naanatuwaannakka ittippe ne golleppe kesiide bare golliyaa asaakko bo; bare aawuwaa gadiyaakkokka simmo. 
Leviticus25:42 Israa'eelatuu taani Gibs'e gadiyaappe Kesseedda ta ayiletuwaa gidiyaa diraw, unttunttu ayiletetsaw zal""ettoppino." 
Leviticus25:43 Neeni unttunttoo mek'etsaa iitaade mooddoppa; shin neeni ne S'oossaw yayya. 
Leviticus25:44 « ‹New attumanne mac'c'a ayiletuu de'ana mala koyooppe, ne yuushshuwaan de'iyaa kawutetsatuwaappe shamma." 
Leviticus25:45 K'ay hintte gadiyaan de'iyaa betetuwaappenne hintte gadiyaan de'ishshin yeletteedda unttunttu soo asaappe shammanaw danddayiita; unttunttu hinttenttoo ak'o gidino. 
Leviticus25:46 Hintteppe guyyiyaan hintte naanay unttuntta med'inaw laattana mala, hintte naanaw immite. Hintte unttunttuppe ubbaa wodekka ayiliyaa shammanaw danddayiita; shin hintte ishaa gidiyaa Israa'eeliyaa asaa mek'etsaa iisiide mooddoppite." 
Leviticus25:47 « ‹Ne matan de'iyaa imatsaa woy bete Asay duretina, k'ay Aa matan de'iyaa ne ishay mank'k'iide, he ne matan de'iyaa imatsaw woy betiyaw woy imatsaa bitaniyaa zariyaappe ittoo barena zal""ooppe," 
Leviticus25:48 I zaletti simmina Aa wozanaw danddayettee; Aa ishatuwaappe ittuu Aa wozo. 
Leviticus25:49 Woy Aa aawuwaa ishay, woy Aa aawuwaa ishaa na'ay Aa wozo; woy Aa yaraappe aw mata dabbo gidiyaa Asay Aa wozo; woy k'ay I bare huup'iyaw durettooppe I barena wozo." 
Leviticus25:50 I barena shammeedda bitaniyaanna ittippe gidiide, I barena zal""eedda laytsaappe doommiide Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw de'iyaa laytsaa paydo; Aa biliyaa gatii he laytsaa payduwaa keeshshaa gido. I barena shammeeddawaanna gam""eedda wodiyaa gatii itti Asay keraa ootsiide demmiyaa miishshaa keeshsha gido." 
Leviticus25:51 Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw biro daro laytsay atteedawaa gidooppe, bare zal""etteedda gatiyaappe he laytsaa payduwaan barena woziyaa gatiyaa c'iggo." 
Leviticus25:52 K'ay Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw atteeda laytsay guutsaa gidooppe, barena shammeeddawaanna ittippe paydiidde, he laytsaa payduwaan barena woziyaa gatiyaa c'iggo." 
Leviticus25:53 I laytsan laytsan keraa ootsiyaa asaadan barena shammeeddawaanna de'oppe attina, hintte s'eelliidde Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidiyaa bitaniyaa mek'etsaa iisiide mooddoppite." 
Leviticus25:54 « ‹Shin I hewaa mala ogiyaan wozettana d'ayooppe, Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkiyaa wode inne Aa naanay k'oomatetsaappe kesino." 
Leviticus25:55 Ayaw gooppe, Israa'eeliyaa Asay ta k'oomatuwaatee; taani Gibs'e gadiyaappe Kesseedda ta k'oomatuwaa. Taani, Med'inaa Goday, hintte S'oossaa› yaaga» yaageedda." 
Leviticus26:1 Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Hintte unttunttoo goynnanaw eek'atuwaa med'd'oppite; k'ay hawulttiyaa, masetteedda misiliyaa woy masetteedda shuchchaa essoppite. Taani, Med'inaa Goday, hintte S'oossaa." 
Leviticus26:2 Ta Sambbatatuwaa naagite; ta Dunkkaaniyaa bonchchite; Taani Med'inaa Godaa. 
Leviticus26:3 «Hintte ta higgiyaan booppe, ta azazotuwaakka naagooppenne ootsooppe," 
Leviticus26:4 taani hinttenttoo iraa wodiyaan bukissana; biittaykka katsaa darissiide mokkana; dembbaa mitsatuukka ayfiyaa ayifana. 
Leviticus26:5 Hintte katsaa bukkiyaa wodiyaappe biide woyniyaa ayfiyaa mas'iyaa wodii gakkanaw katsaa k'os's'ana; k'ay woyniyaa ayfiyaa mas'uukka biide katsaa zeriyaa wodii gakkanaw wurenna. Hintte kallana gakkanaw k'umaa maana; k'ay hintte hintte biittankka saruwaan de'ana. 
Leviticus26:6 «Taani biittaw sarotetsaa immana; ooninne yashissennan hintte gisana. Iita do'atuwaa taani gadiyaappe d'ayissana; hintte gadiyaan laaentso olay denddenna. 
Leviticus26:7 Hintte morkkatuwaa hintte yederssana; hintte sintsan unttunttu mashshaan hayk'k'ana. 
Leviticus26:8 Hintteppe ichcheshu s'eetuwaa yederssana; k'ay s'eetuu tammu shaaa yederssana. Hintte morkketuu hintte sintsan mashshaan hayk'k'ana. 
Leviticus26:9 «Taani ta deemuwaa hinttekko zaarana; hinttena ayfissana; hinttena darissana. K'ay taani ta c'aak'uwaa hinttenana minisana. 
Leviticus26:10 Hintte shaachcha katsaa maana; k'ay ha laytsaa katsaa wotsanaw, shaachcha katsaa diggiide sa'aa kessana." 
Leviticus26:11 Taani ta de'iyaa sa'aa hintte giddon ootsana; taani hinttena shaattikke. 
Leviticus26:12 Taani hintte gidduwaan hamettana; k'ay hintte S'oossaa gidana; hinttekka ta asaa gidanita. 
Leviticus26:13 Hintte Gibs'etoo ayiliyaa gidennaadan, Gibs'e gadiyaappe hinttena kesseeddawe Taani Med'inaa Goday hintte S'oossaa. Taani hintte ayiletetsaa morgge mitsaa mentsaad; k'ay hinttekka d'ok'k'u giide hemettanaadan ootsaad." 
Leviticus26:14 «Shin hintte taani giyaawaa sisennan is's'ooppenne, ha azazotuwaa ubbaakka ootsennan is's'ooppe," 
Leviticus26:15 ta wogaa hintte kad'ooppe, k'ay ta azazotuwaa ubbaa ootsennan is's'iide ta c'aak'uwaa mentsanaw hintte ta higgiyaa shaattooppe," 
Leviticus26:16 he wode taani hintte bolla hawaa ootsana: Hintte akeekenan de'ishshin yashshaa, gilk'k'atetsaa, hintte ayfiyaa jollisiyaanne hinttena loytsi harggissiyaa mishuwaa hintte bolla ahana. Hintte zeretsaa zerana; shin I hada; ayaw gooppe, hewaa hintte morkketuu maana." 
Leviticus26:17 Taani ta somuwaa hintte bolla tukkana; hintte morkkatuwaa sintsan hintte kunddana; hinttena is's'iiyaawanttu hinttena mooddana; k'ay ooninne yederssenan hintte bak'atana. 
Leviticus26:18 «Hawaa ubbaa ootsinakka hintte taana sisennan is's'ooppe, taani hintte nagaraa diraw hintte muraa laappun dakkuwaa gujjana." 
Leviticus26:19 Hintte wolk'k'aa otoruwaa taani mentsana; saluwaa birataa mala ootsana; hintte biittaakka nahaasiyaa giyaa birataa mala ootsana. 
Leviticus26:20 Hintte wolk'k'ay hadasan wurana; ayaw gooppe, hintte biittay katsaa mokkenna; gadiyaan de'iyaa mitsatuukka ayfiyaa ayfikkino." 
Leviticus26:21 «Hintte taw is's'eeddo gooppenne taani giyaawaakka sisennan is's'ooppe, hintte nagaraa keeshshaa laappun dakkuwaa boshaa taani hintte bollan ahana." 
Leviticus26:22 Taani hintte bolla bazzuwaa do'atuwaa yeddana; unttunttu hintte naanatuwaa bonk'k'ana; hintte mehetuwaa d'ayssana; hintte payduwaakka guutsana; hewaa gaasuwaan hintte hamettiyaa ogii bazzuwaa gidanawaa. 
Leviticus26:23 «Ha ubbaa murankka hintte taakko simmennaan is's'aaddi giide booppe," 
Leviticus26:24 he wode taanikka hinttenttoo is's'aaddi gaana; k'ay hintte nagaraa diraw taani ta huup'iyaw hinttena laappun dakkuwaa murana. 
Leviticus26:25 Ta c'aak'uwaa mentseedda haluwaa kesiyaa mashshaa taani hintte bolla ahana; hintte hintte katamatuwaan shiik'ooppekka, taani hintte bollan iita harggiyaa yeddana. K'ay hinttekka hintte morkkatuwaa kushiyaan aad'd'iide imettana." 
Leviticus26:26 Hintte katsaa taani d'ayssiyaa wode, tammu mac'c'a asatuu itti bashiyaan ukitsaa uukkana; hewaakka miizaanan likkiide shaakkana; hintte hewaa maana, shin kallikkita." 
Leviticus26:27 «Ha ubbankka hintte taani giyaawaa sisennan is's'aaddi giide booppe," 
Leviticus26:28 he wode taanikka hintte bolla hank'k'uwaan denddana; hintte nagaraa diraw taani ta huup'iyaw hinttena laappun dakkuwaa muran. 
Leviticus26:29 Hintte hintte attuma naanatuwaanne hintte mac'c'a naanatuwaa ashuwaa maana. 
Leviticus26:30 Hintte goynniyaa d'ok'k'a sa'aa taani kolana; hintte is'aanaa yarshshiyaa sa'aakka d'ayssana. Taani hintte anhaa hintte eek'atuwaa anhaa bollan olana; taani hinttena mule shaataanna. 
Leviticus26:31 Taani hintte katamatuwaa mela ootsana; hintte goynniyaa sa'atuwaakka kolereetsana; hintte sawiyaa yarshshuwaakka singgikke. 
Leviticus26:32 «Taani hintte biittaa d'ayssana; yaatooppe he hintte gadiyaan yiide uttiyaa morkketuukka hewaan malalettana. 
Leviticus26:33 Taani hinttena kawutetsatuwaa giddon laalana; hintte bollankka ta mashshaa shoddana. Hintte biittay bayana; hintte katamatuukka mela gidana. 
Leviticus26:34 He hintte hintte morkkatuwaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wode, bayiide c'oo de'iyaa hintte biittay bare Sambbatatuwaa bonchchiidde nashettana. He wode hintte biittay shemppananne bare Sambbatatuwaa bonchchiidde nashettana." 
Leviticus26:35 Hintte he gadiyaan de'eedda wodiyaan ubbaan hintte Sambbatatuwaan demmibeenna shemppuwaa hai bayiide c'oo de'iyaa wodiyaan demmana. 
Leviticus26:36 «Hintte hintte morkkatuwaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wode, hintteppe shaakettiide guyye attiide de'iyaawanttu wozanaan taani yashshaa yeddana; c'arkkuu k'aatsiyaa bonc'c'iyaa kooshshay unttuntta shabbirana; unttunttu mashshaappe bak'atiyaawaadan bak'atana; k'ay unttunttu ooninne yederssenan kunddana." 
Leviticus26:37 Hinttena yederssiyaawe bayinnan de'ishshin, hintte olaappe bak'atiyaawaadan ittuu ittuwaanna d'ubettana; k'ay hintte hintte morkkatuwaa sintsan ek'k'anawukka hinttenttoo ayaa wolk'k'inne de'enna." 
Leviticus26:38 Hintte kawutetsatuwaa giddon bayana; hintte morkkatuwaa biittaykka hinttena mittana. 
Leviticus26:39 Hintteppe shaakettiide hintte morkkatuwaa gadiyaan atteedawaanttu barenttu nagaraa gaasuwaaninne barenttu aawotuwaa nagaraa gaasuwaan gilk'k'ana. 
Leviticus26:40 «Shin unttunttu taani unttunttoo is's'eedda gaanaadaaninne unttunttu morkkatuwaa biittaw unttuntta yeddanaadan ootseedda barenttu nagaraa, barenttu mayza aawotuwaa nagaraa, unttunttu taana c'immeedda c'imuwaanne unttunttu taw is's'aaddi geeddawaa paas'ooppe," 
Leviticus26:41 hewan k'ay unttunttu azazettena wozanaykka zik'k'i gooppenne unttunttu barenttu nagaraa muraa akkooppe," 
Leviticus26:42 he wode taani Yaak'oobana c'aak'k'eteedda ta c'aak'uwaa hassayana; k'ay Yisaak'ananne Abrahaamena c'aak'k'eteedda ta c'aak'uwaa hassayana; biittaakka hassayana. 
Leviticus26:43 Unttunttu d'ay diggina, unttunttu biittay mela attana; he unttunttu d'ayina bayiyaawaa gidiide c'oo de'iyaa wodiyaan biittay bare Sambbatatuwaa bonchchiidde nashettana. Unttunttu ta azazuwaa kad'eedda dirawunne unttunttu shemppuukka ta wogaa shaatteedda diraw, unttunttu barenttu nagaraa muraa akkana." 
Leviticus26:44 «Gidooppenne unttunttu barenttu morkkatuwaa gadiyaan de'iyaa wode, unttunttu ubbaanna d'ayana gakkanawunne unttunttunna de'iyaa ta c'aak'k'uwaakka mentsana gakkanaw, taani unttuntta olikke; k'ay shaattikke. Taani, Med'inaa Goday, unttunttu S'oossaa." 
Leviticus26:45 Taani unttunttu S'oossaa gidanaw, kawutetsatuu s'eellishin, Gibs'e gadiyaappe Kesseedda unttunttu mayza aawotuwaana taani c'aak'k'eteedda c'aak'uwaa unttunttu diraw hassayana. Taani Med'inaa Godaa." 
Leviticus26:46 «Med'inaa Goday Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Muse bagganna bareppenne Israa'eeliyaa asaappe gidduwaan wotseedda wogatuu, azazotuunne higgetuu hawantta» yaageedda." 
Leviticus27:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Leviticus27:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Itti Asay Med'inaa Godaw immanaw shiik'ooppe, neeni k'oppiyaawaadan he asaa diraw miishshaa c'iggo." 
Leviticus27:3 Hewenne laatamu laytsaappe biide usuppun tammu laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa attumawoo usuppun s'eetu giraamiyaa dees'iyaa s'agaraa biraa c'iggo. 
Leviticus27:4 Mac'c'a asaa gidooppe k'ay hattamu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo. 
Leviticus27:5 K'ay ichcheshu laytsaappe biide laatamu laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa attumawoo laatamu s'agaraa biraanne mac'c'aaniw tammu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo. 
Leviticus27:6 K'aykka itti aginaappe biide ichcheshu laytsaa gakkanaw de'iyaa attumawoo ichcheshu s'agaraa biraanne mac'c'aaniw heezzu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo. 
Leviticus27:7 Hewaadankka k'ay usuppun tammu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawoo tammanne ichcheshu s'agaraa biraanne mac'c'aaniw tammu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo. 
Leviticus27:8 K'ay shiik'k'eedda bitanii neeni k'oppeeddawaa c'igganaw danddayenna daro mank'k'o gidooppe, I bare shiik'uwaa gatsanaw immeedda asaa ahiide k'eesiyaa sintsan essooppe shiik'k'eedda bitanii c'igganaw danddayiyaawaa keenaa k'oppiide k'eesii gammato." 
Leviticus27:9 « ‹I shiik'etteeddawe Asay Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiyaa sa'aa mala mehiyaa yarshshanaw gidooppe, hewaa mala Asay Med'inaa Godaw immiyaa mehii ubbay geeshsha." 
Leviticus27:10 I he mehiyaa diraw hara mehiyaa immoppo; woy Aa hara mehiyaanna laammoppo. Louwaa iitaanna woy k'ay iitaakka louwaanna laammoppo; shin I laammooppe, koyiro mehiinne laamiyaa immeedda mehii laa""uukka geeshsha." 
Leviticus27:11 I shiik'etteedda mehii Med'inaa Godaw yarshshuwaa ootsiide shiishshanaw geeshsha gidenna mehiyaa gidooppe, he bitanii he mehiyaa k'eesiyaa sintsa aho." 
Leviticus27:12 Loo gidina iita gidina, k'eesii he mehiyaa gammato; yaatooppe k'eesii gammateeddawe Aa gatiyaa gido." 
Leviticus27:13 Shin he mehiyaa goday Aa zaariide wozanaw koyooppe, he mehiyaa gatiyaa bolla s'eetuwaappe laatamu kushiyaa gujjo." 
Leviticus27:14 « ‹Itti Asay bare golliyaa geeshsha gidanaadan Med'inaa Godaw dummayooppe, lo""o gidina iita gidina, k'eesii he golliyaa gammato. Yaatooppe k'eesii gammateeddawaadan Aa gatii hewaadankka gido." 
Leviticus27:15 K'ay bare golliyaa S'oossaw geeshsha ootsi dummayeedda Asay zaaretsiide wozanaw koyooppe, he golliyaa gatiyaa bollan s'eetuwaappe laatamu kushiyaa gujjo; yaatooppe gollii aassa gidee." 
Leviticus27:16 « ‹Itti Asay bare laata gadiyaappe shaakkiide geeshsha ootsi Med'inaa Godaw dummayooppe, he gadiyaa gatii aan zeriyaa zeretsaan k'ofetto. Hewenne laatamu kiilo giraame banggaa zeriyaa keeshshaa shoyk'aa gidooppe, tammu s'agaraa biraa c'iggo." 
Leviticus27:17 I bare gadiyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalaappe doommiide geeshsha ootsi S'oossaw dummayooppe, he gadiyaw kumentsaa gatiyaa c'iggo." 
Leviticus27:18 Shin I bare gadiyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay aad'd'i simmina geeshsha ootsi S'oossaw dummayooppe, kaalliide de'iyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw de'iyaa wodiyaa k'eesii paydo; yaatooppe Aa kumentsaa gatiyaappe wod'd'ee." 
Leviticus27:19 He gadiyaa geeshsha ootsi S'oossaw dummayeedda Asay zaaretsi wozanaw koyooppe, I gammatetteedda miishshaa bolla s'eetuwaappe laatamu kushiyaa gujjo; yaatooppe gadii simmiide aawaa gidee." 
Leviticus27:20 Shin I gadiyaa zaaretsiide, wozanaappe kasetiide hara asaw zal""ooppe, he gadiyaa wozanaw danddayenna." 
Leviticus27:21 Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkina gadii yedettiyaa wode, he gadii laa""entso guyye akkanawaadan Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha gidee. He gishuu k'eesiyaassa." 
Leviticus27:22 « ‹Itti Asay hara asaappe shammeedda gadiyaa geeshsha ootsi Med'inaa Godaw dummayanaw koyooppe," 
Leviticus27:23 kaalliyaa Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkanaw de'iyaa gatiyaa k'eesii gammato; bitanii he gallassikka he gimmitiyaa c'iggo; he miishshay Med'inaa Godaw dummateedda miishshaa gidanawaa. 
Leviticus27:24 Ishatamantso Laytsaa Baalay gakkiyaa wode, he gadii koyiro laatan akkiide zal""eedda bitaniyaw simmee." 
Leviticus27:25 « ‹Aa gatii S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan erettiyaa miizaanan gammatettee. 
Leviticus27:26 « ‹Shin ooninne bayira yeletteedda mehiyaa Med'inaa Godaw dummayiide shiishshanaw danddayenna; ayaw gooppe, I kasekka Med'inaa Godaassa. Miizzaa mara gidina woy dorssaa mara gidinakka I Med'inaa Godaawaa." 
Leviticus27:27 He mehii geeshsha gidana d'ayooppe, ne gammateedda gatiyaa bolla s'eetuwaappe laatamu kushiyaa gujjiide Aa goday zaaretsiide wozo. I wozana d'ayooppe, ne gammateedda gatiyaan hara asaw zal""eteedda." 
Leviticus27:28 « ‹Itti Asay barewaappe Med'inaa Godaw immeeddawe ayaa gidooppekka, asaa gidina mehiyaa gidina, woy Aa laatan gakkeedda gade gidinakka, zal""etenanne wozettenna. Dummayeeddawe ubbabay Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha ubbaappe ittuwaa gideedda geeshsha yarshshuwaa." 
Leviticus27:29 Asaa giddoppe shaakettiide d'ayanaadan imetteedda Asay wozettoppo; he Asay hayk'k'o. 
Leviticus27:30 « ‹Biittaa asiraatay ubbay gadiyaappe mokkeedda katsaa gidina woy mitsaa ayfiyaa gidinakka Med'inaa Godaassa. Hewe Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha. 
Leviticus27:31 Itti Asay bare asiraataa wozanaw koyooppe, Aa gatiyaa bollan s'eetuwaappe laatamu kushiyaa gujjo." 
Leviticus27:32 Miizzaa asiraataa gidina, dorssaa asiraataa gidina, woy deeshshaa asiraataa gidinakka, hentsanchchaa gatimaappe garssana aad'd'iyaa hak'awenne tammuntsi Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha." 
Leviticus27:33 Tammuntsa mehiyaa iita gidina loo gidinakka dooroppo; woy Aa haraana laammoppo. Laammooppenne koyirowenne laamiyaa immeeddawenne laauukka S'oossaw geeshsha gidiinoppe attina, zaariide wozanaw danddayenna› yaaga» yaageedda." 
Leviticus27:34 Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana Israa'eeliyaa asaa azazeedda azazotuu hawantta. 
Numbers1:1 Siinaa Mela Biittaa, Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon, Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gibs'e gadiyaappe keseedda laa""entso laytsan, laa""entso aginaan, he aginaw koyiro gallassan, Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;" 
Numbers1:2 «Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa unttunttu yaran yaraaninne golliyaan golliyaan paydaade, attuma asaa unttunttu suntsan suntsan s'aafa." 
Numbers1:3 Neeninne Aarooni yelettoodeppe laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa Israa'eelatuwaa, olaa baanaw danddayiyaawantta ubbatuwaa, unttunttu c'itan c'itan paydite." 
Numbers1:4 Zariyaappe zariyaappe itti itti Asay bare golliyaa asaw kaappuwaa gidiide, hinttena maaddo." 
Numbers1:5 Hinttena maaddana asatuu suntsay hawaappe kaalliide de'iyaawaa: Zariyaa Golliyaa Asaa Kaappuwaa Roobeela Shade'uura na'aa Eliis'uura," 
Numbers1:6 Simoona S'uriishadaaya na'aa Shalumi'eela," 
Numbers1:7 Yihudaa Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona," 
Numbers1:8 Yisaakoora S'u'aara na'aa Nataani'eela," 
Numbers1:9 Zaabiloona Heloona na'aa Eli'aaba," 
Numbers1:10 Yooseefo naanaappe Efireema Amihuuda na'aa Elishamaa'a, Minaase Padaas'uura na'aa Gamaali'eela," 
Numbers1:11 Biiniyaama Giidi'oona na'aa Abidaana," 
Numbers1:12 Daanappe Amishadaaya na'aa Ahi'eezera," 
Numbers1:13 Aaseera Okiraana na'aa Paagi'eela," 
Numbers1:14 Gaada Da'u'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa," 
Numbers1:15 Nifttaaleema Enaana na'aa Ahiraa'a; 
Numbers1:16 Ha asatuu barenttu aawotuwaa golliyaa asatuwaappe kaaletsanaw dooretteeddawantta; unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa yaratoo kaappatuwaa» yaageedda. 
Numbers1:17 Musenne Aarooni suntsay s'eesetteedda ha asatuwaa afeedino. 
Numbers1:18 Laaentsa aginaan koyiro gallassi kumentsaa maabaraa s'eesiide, ittippe shiishsheeddino. Asay bare yaran yaraaninne bare golliyaan golliyaan odiide, yelettoodeppe laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attuma asatuwaa ubbaa suntsay ubbaanna s'aafetteedda." 
Numbers1:19 Med'inaa Goday Aa azazeeddawaadan, Muse unttuntta Siinaa mela biittaan paydeedda." 
Numbers1:20 Olaw baanaw danddayiyaa attuma asatuu ubbay, laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaawanttu paydetiide, huup'iyaan huup'iyaan s'aafetteeddino. Unttunttu barenttu yaran yaraaninne barenttu golliyaan golliyaan shaakettiide, hawaappe kaalliide de'iyaa payduwaan mazggobetteeddino. Numbers1:44 Muse, Aarooninne tammanne laa""u Israa'eeliyaa zaratuu kaappatuu paydeedda Asay hawaa." 
Numbers1:45 Olaw baanaw danddayiyaa attuma asatuu ubbay laatamu laytsanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaawanttu barenttu aawuwaa golliyaan golliyaan paydeteeddino. 
Numbers1:46 Hewanttu ubbaanna 603,550." 
Numbers1:47 Shin Leewiyaa zaratuu ha paydeteedda asaana paydettibeykkino. 
Numbers1:48 Ayaw gooppe, Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;" 
Numbers1:49 «Leewiyaa zaratuwaa paydoppa; unttuntta atteeda Israa'eelatuwaa payduwaan yeggoppa. 
Numbers1:50 Leewatuwaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa bollaninne Aa giddon de'iyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaa bollan kaappuwaa ootsaade suntsaa. Unttunttu he Dunkkaaniyaanne Aa giddon de'iyaa miishshata tookkino; unttunttu Aa giddon ootsinonne Aa yuushshuwaan dunkkaanino. 
Numbers1:51 S'oossaa Dunkkaanii shodettiyaa wode Leewatuu shoddino; S'oossaa Dunkkaanii ek'k'iyaa wodekka Leewatuu essino. Unttunttuppe haray ooninne aakko shiik'ooppe, hayk'k'o." 
Numbers1:52 Israa'eeliyaa asatuu ubbay barenttu armman armmaaninne barenttu c'itan c'itan shaakettiide, barenttu dunkkaaniyaa dunkkaanino." 
Numbers1:53 Shin S'oossaa hank'k'uu Israa'eeliyaa maabaraa bolla wod'd'enna mala, Leewatuu S'oossaa Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa yuushshuwaan barenttu dunkkaaniyaa dunkkaanino; Leewatuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan aawotino» yaageedda." 
Numbers1:54 Israa'eelatuu hawaa ubbaa Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan ootseeddino. 
Numbers2:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers2:2 «Israa'eeliyaa Asay barenttu bagga bagga erissiyaa armmaanne barenttu yaraa yaraa erissiyaa banddiraa kaalliide, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe guutsaa haakkiide, Aa yuushshuwaan dunkkaanino." 
Numbers2:3 «Away doliyaa baggana Yihudaa baggay barenttu armmaa kaalliide dunkkaanino. Unttunttu zaratuwaa suntsay, zaratuwaa kaappatuwaa suntsaynne olanchchatuwaa paydu hawaappe kaallee: Yihudaa Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona 74,600;" 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5 Yisaakoora S'u'aara na'aa Nataani'eela 54,400;" 
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7 Zaabiloona Heloona na'aa Eli'aaba 57,400;" 
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9 Yihudaa baggaappe paydeteedda olanchchatuu ubbaanna 186,400. Hara sa'aa biyaa wode unttunttu koyiro kesiyaawantta." 
Numbers2:10 «K'ay dugehaa baggana Roobeela baggay barenttu armmaa kaalliide dunkkaanino. Unttunttu zaratuu suntsay, zaratuwaa kaappatuwaa suntsaynne olanchchatuwaa paydu hawaappe kaallee: Roobeela Shade'uura na'aa Eliis'uura 46,500;" 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12 Simoona S'uriishadaaya na'aa Shalumi'eela 59,300;" 
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14 Gaada Re'u'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa 45,650." 
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16 Roobeela baggaappe paydeteedda olanchchatuu ubbaanna 151,450. Hara sa'aa biyaa wode unttunttu laa""entso kesiyaawantta." 
Numbers2:17 «Hewaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniinne Leewiyaa zaratuu koyiro kesiidde laa""u baggaappenne guyyeppe kesiyaa laa""u baggaappe gidduwaan kesino; yaatiide barenttu dunkkaaneedda maaran maaraaninne barenttu banddiraa banddiraa kaalliide kesino." 
Numbers2:18 «K'ay away wulliyaa baggana Efireema baggay barenttu armmaa kaalliide dunkkaanino. Unttunttu zaratuwaa suntsay, zaratuwaa kaappatuwaa suntsaynne olanchchatuwaa paydu hawaappe kaallee: Efireema Amihuuda na'aa Elishamaa'a 40,500;" 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20 Minaasa Padaas'uura na'aa Gamaali'eela 32,200;" 
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22 Biiniyaama Giidi'oona na'aa Abidaana 35,400;" 
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24 Efireema baggaappe paydeteedda olanchchatuu ubbaanna 108,100. Hara sa'aa biyaa wode, unttunttu heezzentso kesiyaawantta." 
Numbers2:25 «K'aykka huup'issa baggana Daana baggay barenttu armmaa kaalliide dunkkaanino. Unttunttu zaratuwaa suntsay, zaratuwaa kaappatuwaa suntsaynne olanchchatuwaa paydu hawaappe kaallee: Daana Amishadaaya na'aa Ahi'eezera 62,700;" 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27 Aaseera Okiraana na'aa Paagi'eela 41,500;" 
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29 Nifttaaleema Enaana na'aa Ahiraa'a 53,400;" 
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31 Daana baggaappe paydeteedda olanchchatuu ubbaanna 157,600. Hara sa'aa biyaa wode unttunttu wurssetsan bare banddiran kesiyaawantta» yaageedda." 
Numbers2:32 Bare yaran yaran shaakettiide paydeteedda Israa'eeliyaa olanchchatuu ubbaanna 603,550." 
Numbers2:33 Shin Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan, Leewatuu hara Israa'eelatuwaana paydettibeykkino." 
Numbers2:34 Israa'eelatuu Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaa ubbabaa ootseeddino. Simmi unttunttu barenttu banddiraa kaalliide, hewaadan dunkkaaneeddino; k'ay barenttu yaraa yaraanne barenttu soo asaa asaa kaalliide, hewaadan keseeddino." 
Numbers3:1 Med'inaa Goday Siinaa Deriyaa bollan Musena haasayeedda wode de'iyaa Aaroonanne Muse golliyaa Asay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. 
Numbers3:2 Aaroona attuma naanatuwaa suntsay bayiray Nadaaba, Abiiha, El""aazaranne Itaamaara." 
Numbers3:3 He Aaroona attuma naanay ubbay k'eese gidiide ootsanaw okettiide suntsetteeddino. 
Numbers3:4 Shin unttunttu giddoppe Naadaabinne Abihu Siinaa mela biittaan S'oossay azazibeena tamaa yarshshiide, Med'inaa Godaa sintsan hayk'k'eeddino; unttunttoo na'i baawa. Hewaa diraw, unttunttu aawuu Aarooni pas'a de'eedda laytsaa ubbaan El""aazaranne Itaamaara s'alalay k'eese gidiide ootseeddino." 
Numbers3:5 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers3:6 «Leewatuwaa haa akka yaade k'eesiyaa Aaroona maaddana mala, unttuntta Aa sintsa shiishsha." 
Numbers3:7 Unttunttu Aaroonawunne Israa'eeliyaa maabaraw ubbaw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsan dumma dumma oosuwaa ootsino. 
Numbers3:8 Unttunttu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan de'iyaa miishshaa ubbaa aawotetsaa akkino; Israa'eeliyaa asaa diraw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan ooso ubbaa unttunttu ootsino. 
Numbers3:9 Neeni Leewatuwaa Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa maaddanaadan suntsaa; unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa giddoppe ubbaanna Aaroonaw imetteeddino. 
Numbers3:10 Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatuwaa k'eese ootsaade suntsaa. Unttunttuppe hara Asay ooninne S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaakko shiik'ooppe, hayk'k'o» yaageedda." 
Numbers3:11 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers3:12 «Taani Israa'eelatuwaa mac'c'a Asay bayira yeliyaa attuma naanatuwaa ubbaa diraw Israa'eelatuwaa giddoppe Leewatuwaa akkaad. Leewatuu tawaa; 
Numbers3:13 ayaw gooppe, bayira yeletteedda ubbay tawaa. Taani Gibs'e gadiyaan bayira yeletteeddawaa ubbaa wod'eedda gallassan, Israa'eelatuwaan bayira yeletteeddawaa ubbaa, asaa gidina, mehiyaa gidina, taw dummayaad; unttunttu tawaa gidana. Taani Med'inaa Godaa» yaageedda." 
Numbers3:14 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Musa Siinaa mela biittaan," 
Numbers3:15 «Neeni Leewatuwaa unttunttu soo asan asaaninne unttunttu yaran yaran payda; yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawantta ubbaa payda» yaageedda. 
Numbers3:16 Med'inaa Goday azazeeddawaadan, Muse unttuntta paydeedda." 
Numbers3:17 Leewiyaa attuma naanay Gershshoona, K'ahaatanne Maraara." 
Numbers3:18 Gershshoona attuma naanay Liibinanne Shima. 
Numbers3:19 K'ahaata attuma naanay Amiraama, Yis'ihaara, Kebroonanne Uuzi'eela." 
Numbers3:20 Maraara attuma naanay k'ay Maahilanne Musha. Leewatuwaa mayzza aawotuu hawantta. 
Numbers3:21 Liibina yaratuunne Shima yaratuu Gershshoona zaratuwaa. 
Numbers3:22 Unttunttuppe paydina, yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu ubbaanna 7,500." 
Numbers3:23 Gershshoona yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe guyye away wulliyaa baggana dunkkaaniino. 
Numbers3:24 Gershshoona yaratuwaa soo asaa kaappuu Laa'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa. 
Numbers3:25 Gershshoona yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa, Dunkkaaniyaa kammiyaawantta geliyaasaa gaaridduwaa," 
Numbers3:26 dabaabaa gaariddotuwaa, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaanne yarshshiyaa sa'aa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa dabaabaa geliyaasan gaaridduwaa, wodorotuwaanne unttunttu go""aanna gaketiyaabatuwaa ubbabaa aawotetsaa akkiino." 
Numbers3:27 Amiraama yaratuu, Yis'ihaara yaratuu, Kebroona yaratuunne Uuzi'eela yaratuu K'ahaata zaratuwaa." 
Numbers3:28 Yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu ubbaanna 8,600. K'ahaata yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa aawotetsaa akkiino." 
Numbers3:29 K'ahaata yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe gedissa baggana dunkkaaniino. 
Numbers3:30 K'ahaata yaratuwaa soo asaa kaappuu Uuzi'eela na'aa Els's'aafaana. 
Numbers3:31 Unttunttu Taabootaa, s'arap'p'eezaa, s'omppiyaa wotsiyaa ballaa, yarshshiyaa sa'aa, ootsiyaa wode go'ettiyaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa miishshatuwaa, gaaridduwaanne unttunttu go""aanna gaketiyaabatuwaa ubbabaa aawotetsaa akkiino." 
Numbers3:32 Leewatuwaa kaappatuwaa kaappuu k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Elaazara; Geeshsha Sa'aa aawotiyaawanttu bolla I suntsetteedda. 
Numbers3:33 Maahila yaratuunne Musha yaratuu Maraara zaratuwaa. 
Numbers3:34 Unttunttuppe paydina, yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu ubbaanna 6,200." 
Numbers3:35 Maraara yaratuwaa soo asaa kaappuu Abihayila na'aa S'urii'eela. Maraara yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe huup'issa baggana dunkkaaniino. 
Numbers3:36 Maraara yaratuu Dunkkaaniyaa s'agaagetuwaa, kulbbotuwaa, tuussatuwaa, gedetuwaa, he oosoo koshshiyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaanne unttunttu go""aanna gaketiyaabatuwaa ubbaa aawotetsaa akkiino." 
Numbers3:37 Hewaa bollakka gujjiide, yuushshuwaan de'iyaa dabaabaa tuussatuwaanne unttunttu gedetuwaa, shikaaliyaanne wodorotuwaa aawotetsaa akkiino." 
Numbers3:38 K'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaappe sintsa away doliyaa baggana Muse, Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay dunkkaaniino. Unttunttu Israa'eelatuwaa diraw S'oossaa Dunkkaane giddon ootsiyaa oosuwaa aawotetsaa akkiino. Hara Asay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaakko shiik'ooppe, hayk'k'o." 
Numbers3:39 Med'inaa Goday azazina, Musenne Aarooni paydeedda attuma Leewatuu, yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu ubbaanna 22,000." 
Numbers3:40 Med'inaa Goday Musa, «Israa'eelatuwaa bayira attuma naanatuwaa, yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaawantta ubbaa paydaade unttunttu suntsaa s'aafa." 
Numbers3:41 Israa'eelatuwaan bayira yeletteedda ubbaa kotaw Leewatuwaa taw akka; k'ay Israa'eelatuwaa mehiyaan bayira yeletteedda ubbaa kotaw Leewatuwaa mehiyaa taw akka. Taani Med'inaa Godaa» yaageedda. 
Numbers3:42 Muse Med'inaa Goday Aa azazeeddawaadan, Israa'eelatuwaan bayira yeletteedda ubbaa paydeedda." 
Numbers3:43 Yelettoodeppe itti aginanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa bayira yeletteedda attumawanttu, suntsaykka s'aafetteeddawanttu ubbaanna 22,273." 
Numbers3:44 Med'inaa Goday Musa k'aykka hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers3:45 «Leewatuwaa Israa'eeliyaa attumawanttu ubbaa kotaw akka; Leewatuwaa mehetuwaa Israa'eelatuwaa mehiyaa kotaw akka; Leewatuu tawaa gidanawantta. Taani Med'inaa Godaa. 
Numbers3:46 Leewatuwaa payduwaappe dariyaa 273 bayira gidiide yeletteedda Israa'eeliyaa attuma naanatuwaa wozanaw," 
Numbers3:47 ittoo ittoo ichcheshu s'agaraa biraa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan erettiyaa miizaaniyaa likkiyaan akka; Itti S'agaraa Biray Laatamu Geera keeshshaa. 
Numbers3:48 Palaheedda Israa'eelatuwaa woziyaa he miishshaa Aaroonawunne Aa attuma naanaw imma» yaageedda. 
Numbers3:49 Muse, Leewatuwaan wozetteeddawanttuppe palaheeddawantta woziyaa miishshaa shiishsheedda." 
Numbers3:50 Bayira yeletteedda Israa'eelatuwaappe 1,365 s'agaraa biraa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan erettiyaa miizaaniyaa likkiyaan I shiishsheedda;" 
Numbers3:51 Med'inaa Goday azazeedda azazuwaadan, Muse woziyaa miishshaa Aaroonawunne Aa attuma naanaw immeedda." 
Numbers4:1 Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers4:2 «Leewiyaa zaratuwaan K'ahaata yaratuwaa unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkaade payda; 
Numbers4:3 yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asaa ubbaa, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsanaw yiyaawantta payda." 
Numbers4:4 K'ahaata yaratuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsana oosuu hawaa: unttunttu ubbaappe aad'd'eeda geeshsha miishshatuwaan aawotiino. 
Numbers4:5 «Asay dunkkaaneedda saappe baanaw haniyaa wode, Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddo geliide, Taabootaa sintsa gaaridduwaa kak'uwaappe wotsino; he C'aak'uwaa Taabootaa aan kammino." 
Numbers4:6 He kammeeddawaa bollakka wod'iyaa irbbaaniyaa kammino; hewaa bollakka k'ay gujjiide, saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa kammino; tookkiyaa kasotuwaa unttunttu sagaayetuwaan aatsino." 
Numbers4:7 «S'oossaa sintsa shiishshiyaa ukitsaa wotsiyaa s'arap'p'eezaa bollan saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'ino; Aa bolla saanetuwaa, c'ilppatuwaa, s'uu'atuwaanne ushshaa yarshshoo go'ettiyaa ototuwaa wotsino; k'ay ukitsay ubbaa wodekka Aa bollappe d'ayoppo." 
Numbers4:8 Hewaa bollan zo'o c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'iide, irbbaniyaa k'ay Aa bolla kammino; tookkiyaa kasotuwaa sagaayetuwaan aatsino." 
Numbers4:9 «Unttunttu saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa akkiide, s'omppiyaa wotsiyaa ballatuwaa s'omppetuwaanna, toyissiyaa k'ap'etuwaana, unttuntta wotsiyaabatuwaananne zayitiyaa tigiyaa s'aarotuwaanakka ubbaa kammino." 
Numbers4:10 Yaatiide aakka miishshatuwaa ubbaakka irbbaniyan kammiide, tookkiyaa shanchchamaa bollan wotsino." 
Numbers4:11 «Is'aanaa c'uwissiyaa work'k'aa saas'iniyaa bollan saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'eeddawaa k'ay irbbaniyan kammino; tookkiyaa kasotuwaa unttunttu sagaayetuwaan aatsino. 
Numbers4:12 Hewaadankka, k'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon go'ettiyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaa akkiide, saluwaa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaan s'aas'ino; irbbaniyan kammiide, tookkiyaa shanchchamaa bollan wotsino." 
Numbers4:13 «Yaatiide nahaasiyaappe ootseedda yarshshiyaa sa'aa bolla de'iyaa bidintsaa diggiide Aa bolla ochchaa teeraa malatiyaa c'ark'k'iyaa hiis's'ino. 
Numbers4:14 Aa bolla yarshshiyaasan go'ettiyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaa, tamaa c'ooc'etuwaa, ashuwaa k'ap'iyaa k'ap'etuwaa, akaafatuwaanne kaashiyaa kuyis'aarotuwaa wotsino. Irbbaniyan kammino; tookkiyaa kasotuwaa unttunttu sagaayetuwaan aatsino." 
Numbers4:15 «Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay, geeshshabatuwaanne geeshsha miishshatuwaa ubbaa kammiide makkooppenne dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe denddiyaa wodii gakkooppe, hewaa ubbaa tookkanaw K'ahaata yaratuu yiino. Shin geeshsha miishshatuwaa unttunttu bochchooppe hayk'k'ino. S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon de'iyaa he miishshaa K'ahaata yaratuu tookkino." 
Numbers4:16 «K'eesiyaa Aaroona na'ay Elaazari s'omppiyaa zayitiyaw, sawiyaa is'aanaw, hachchi hachchi yarshshiyaa katsaa yarshshuwaanne okkiyaa zayitiyaw, k'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa muliyaanne Aa giddon de'iyaa dumma geeshsha miishshatuwaa ubbaa bolla aawoto» yaageedda." 
Numbers4:17 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musanne Aaroona hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers4:18 «K'ahaata yaratuu Leewiyaa zaratuwaappe hayk'k'iide d'ayenna mala s'eellite. 
Numbers4:19 Ubbaappe aad'd'eedda geeshsha miishshaa mata shiik'iyaa wode, unttunttu hayk'k'ennan pas'a attiide de'ana mala, unttunttoo hawaadan ootsite: Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddo geliide K'ahaata yaratuu ubbay huup'iyaan huup'iyaan ootsana oosuwaanne tookkana tookuwaa shaakki shaakkiide gishino." 
Numbers4:20 K'ahaata yaratuu hayk'k'ennaadan, ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa geeshshatuwaa k'eesatuu s'aas'ishin be'anaw gidduwaa geloppino» yaageedda." 
Numbers4:21 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers4:22 «Gershshoona yaratuwaakka unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkaade payda; 
Numbers4:23 yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asaa ubbaa, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsanaw yiyaawantta payda." 
Numbers4:24 «Gershshoona yaratuu ootsiyaa oosuunne tookkiyaa tookku hawaa: 
Numbers4:25 unttunttu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa gaariddotuwaa, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa, Aa kammiyaabatuwaanne bollana kammiyaa irbbaniyaa, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa geliyaasan sottiyaa gaaridduwaa tookkino;" 
Numbers4:26 k'ay S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaanne yarshshiyaa sa'aa yuuyyi aad'd'eeda dabaabaa gaariddotuwaa, dabaabaa geliyaasaa gaaridduwaa, wodorotuwaanne unttunttoo go""iya miishshatuwaa ubbaa tookkino. Gershshoona yaratuu ha miishshatuwaan ootsanaw bessiyaa oosuwaa ubbaa ootsino." 
Numbers4:27 Tookkiyaawaa gidina, hara oosuwaa gidinakka unttunttu ootsiyaa oosuwaa ubbay Aarooninne Aa attuma naanay unttuntta azazina oosettino. Neeni unttunttu tookkanaw bessiyaabatuwaa ubbaa unttunttu aawotetsaa aawotetsaadan unttunttoo gisha." 
Numbers4:28 S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon Gershshoona yaratuu ootsana oosuu ubbay hawaa. Unttunttu ootsana oosuwaa ubbay k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Itaamaara aawotetsaa garssaana gidanawaa. 
Numbers4:29 «Maraara yaratuwaa unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkaade payda; 
Numbers4:30 yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asaa ubbaa, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsanaw yiyaawantta payda." 
Numbers4:31 «Unttunttu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsana oosotuu hawantta: unttuntta Dunkkaaniyaa s'agaagetuwaa, kulbbotuwaa, tuussatuwaanne gedetuwaa," 
Numbers4:32 k'aykka dabaabaa yuushshuwaan ek'k'iyaa tuussatuwaa, he tuussatuu gedetuwaa, toliyaa s'agaagetuwaa, wodorotuwaa, hewanttoo koshshiyaa miishshatuwaa ubbaanne he miishshatuwaanna gaketiyaabatuwaa ubbaa tookkino. Itti itti uraw I tookkanawaa shaakkaade gisha." 
Numbers4:33 S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon Maraara yaratuu ootsana oosuu ubbaanna hawaa. Unttunttu ootsana ooso ubbay k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Itaamaara aawotetsaa garssaana gidanawaa» yaageedda. 
Numbers4:34 Muse Aarooninne maabaraa kaappatuu K'ahaata yaratuwaa attuma asaa unttunttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkiide paydeeddino. 
Numbers4:35 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsanaw yiyaawanttu," 
Numbers4:36 unttunttu soo asan asan paydina ubbaanna 2,750." 
Numbers4:37 K'ahaata yaratuwaan S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootseedda asaa paydu hawaa. Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan, Musenne Aarooni unttuntta paydeeddino." 
Numbers4:38 Gershshoona yaratuukka barenttu dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne barenttu soo asan asan shaakettiide paydeteeddino. 
Numbers4:39 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsanaw yiyaawanttu," 
Numbers4:40 unttunttu soo asan asan paydina ubbay 2,630." 
Numbers4:41 Gershshoona yaratuwaan S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootseedda asaa paydina hawaa. Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan, Musenne Aarooni unttuntta paydeeddino." 
Numbers4:42 Maraara yaratuukka k'ay dabbuwaan dabbuwaaninne barenttu soo asan asan shaakettiide paydeteeddino. 
Numbers4:43 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon ootsanaw yiyaawanttu," 
Numbers4:44 unttunttu soo asan asan paydina ubbay 3,200." 
Numbers4:45 Maraara yaratuwaa paydu hawaa. Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan, Musenne Aarooni unttuntta paydeeddino." 
Numbers4:46 Hewaa ootsiide Muse, Aarooninne Israa'eeliyaa kaappatuu Leewatuwaa ubbaa, unttunttu yaran yaraaninne unttunttu soo asan asan shaakkiide paydeeddino." 
Numbers4:47 Yelettoodeppe laytsay hattamuwaappe biide ishatamuwaa gakkeedda attuma asatuu ubbatuu, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon oosuwaa ootsanawunne aw go""iya miishshatuwaa ubbaa tookkanaw yeeddawanttu" 
Numbers4:48 ubbay 8,580." 
Numbers4:49 Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan, unttunttu huup'iyaan huup'iyaan ootsana oosuu woy tookkana tookuukka unttunttoo odetteedda. Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan, unttunttu ubbaykka paydeteeddino." 
Numbers5:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda: 
Numbers5:2 «Neeni Israa'eelatuwaa, ‹Hintte giddon wolk'k'aama galbbaa harggii oyk'k'eedda uraa, woy bollaappe ayayneekka goggiyaa uraa, woy anhaa oyk'k'iide tuneedda uraa oonakka hintte dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe kessi diggite› yaagaade azaza." 
Numbers5:3 Hewe mac'c'awaa attumawaa gidinakka kessino. Taani unttunttu gidduwaan de'iyaa unttunttu dunkkaaneeddasaa hewanttu tunissenna mala, unttunttu dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe kessa yedda» yaageedda." 
Numbers5:4 Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan, Israa'eelatuu unttunttu ubbaa dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe kessiide yeddeeddino." 
Numbers5:5 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda;" 
Numbers5:6 «Neeni Israa'eelatuwaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Itti attuma Asay woy itti mac'c'a Asay ay ogiyaaninne hara asaa naak'k'ooppenne hewan Med'inaa Godaw ammanettennan is's'ooppe, he uray bayzzanchcha." 
Numbers5:7 Hewaa diraw, I bare ootseedda nagaraa paas'o; bare bayzzeeddawaa kumentsaa zaariide c'iggo; hewaa bollakka ichcheshentso kushiyaa gujjiide, bare naak'k'eedda uraw ac'c'o." 
Numbers5:8 Shin he naak'etteedda uray hayk'k'eeddawaa gidooppenne, ac'c'aa akkanaw aw mata dabbuu d'ayooppe, he ac'c'ay Med'inaa Godaassa. He ac'c'iyaa ac'c'ay naak'k'eedda uray maarettanaw yarshshoo immiyaa dorssaa orggiyaana ittippe k'eesiyaw imetto." 
Numbers5:9 K'ay Israa'eelatuu k'eesiyaw immiyaa geeshsha imuwaa ubbay he k'eesiyaassa. 
Numbers5:10 Itti itti Asay immiyaa imotay he immeedda uraabaa; shin k'eesiyaw I immiyaa imotay he k'eesiyaassa› yaaga» yaageedda. 
Numbers5:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa," 
Numbers5:12 «Neeni Israa'eelatoo hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Itti uraa machchata kare hamettaade, aw ammanettennan is's'aade," 
Numbers5:13 hara attuma asaana gisooppe, k'ay hewaa iza bare asinaappe k'osooppe, markkay baynnawaa gidooppenne, iza sharmus'aade oyk'k'ettennan attooppe," 
Numbers5:14 Iza tuneedda diraw, I golliyaw izo sid'iyaawaa gidanaw danddayee; woy iza tunennan de'ishshin, I bare machchato sid'iyaawaa gidanaw danddayee." 
Numbers5:15 Yaatooppe, he bitanii bare machchato k'eesiyaakko afo; k'ay izi diraw yarshshanaw itti kiilo giraame banggaa d'iiliyaa afo. Shin d'iiliyaa bolla zayitiyaa tigoppo, woy is'aanaa Aa bolla wotsoppo; ayaw gooppe, he d'iilii I bare machchato sid'eedda diraw yarshshiyaa katsaa yarshsho; k'ay hewe bayzzuwaa k'onc'c'issiyaa yarshshuwaa." 
Numbers5:16 « ‹Hewaappe guyyiyaan, k'eesii he mishirato shiishiide, Med'inaa Godaa sintsan esso." 
Numbers5:17 Anjjetteeda haatsaa kuyis'aaruwaan akko. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa wuyggiyaan de'iyaa baanaa akkiide, he haatsaan gujjo." 
Numbers5:18 He mishiratto Med'inaa Godaa sintsan esso; hewaappe guyyiyaan, he mishiratti huup'iyaa billo; sid'eedda diraw yarshshiyaa izi bayzzuwaa k'onc'c'issiyaa katsaa yarshshuwaa izi kushiyan wotso; k'ay he k'eesii bare kushiyan shek'k'aa ahiyaa c'amo haatsaa kuyis'aaruwaanna oyk'k'o." 
Numbers5:19 Mishirato hawaadan yaagiide c'aak'k'etso; «Neeni hara attuma asaana gisabeennawaa gidooppenne, ne asinaa aggaade kare hamettaade tunabeennawaa gidooppe, shek'k'aa ahiyaa ha c'amo haatsay new gometoppo." 
Numbers5:20 Shin neeni ne asinaa aggaade kare hamettaade tuneeddawaa gidooppenne, hara attuma asaana giseeddawaa gidooppe," 
Numbers5:21 Med'inaa Goday ne yeluwaa golliyaa gunddissiyaawaaninne ne uluwaakka gaafisiyaawan, ne asan neena shek'iso." 
Numbers5:22 Ha shek'k'aa ahiyaa haatsay ne ulo giddo geliide ne uluwaa gaafiso; ne yeluwaa keetsaakka gunddisso» yaagiide c'aak'k'etso. « ‹Mishiratakka, «Amen""i; amen""i» yaagu." 
Numbers5:23 « ‹Hewaappe guyyiyaan, k'eesii ha shek'atuwaa s'aas'etteedda mas'aafan s'aafo; shek'atuwaa c'amo haatsaa giddo meec'c'o." 
Numbers5:24 Yaatiide shek'k'aa ahiyaa he c'amo haatsaa mishirato ushsho; shek'k'aa ahiyaa haatsay mishiratti uluwaan geliide, izo c'amo sakuwaa sakkana." 
Numbers5:25 K'eesii mishiratti kushiyaappe sid'eedda diraw yarshshiyaa katsaa yarshshuwaa akkiide, he yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan k'aatsiide, yarshshiyaa sa'aa aho." 
Numbers5:26 K'eesii katsaa yarshshuwaappe kop'p'iyaawaa akkiide bayzzanchcha gidekkentto k'onc'c'issiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide, yarshshiyaasan s'uuggo. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, mishirato he haatsaa ushsho." 
Numbers5:27 Haatsaa izo ushsheeddawaappe guyyiyaan, hawaadan hanana: iza bare asinaw ammanettana d'ayaade tuneeddawaa gidooppe, shek'k'aa ahiyaa haatsay I uluwaan geliide, izo c'amo sakuwaa sakkana; izi uluukka gaafana; izi yeluwaa golliikka gunddana. Iza bare asan shek'k'etteedaano gidana." 
Numbers5:28 Shin iza tunabeenna s'illo mac'c'a asaa gidooppe, Aa saro ataade naanatuwaa yelana." 
Numbers5:29 « ‹Itti Asay bare machchato sid'iyaa wode ootsana wogay hawaa. Iza kare hamettaade tunooppe, woy itti Asay bare machchato sid'ooppe, Med'inaa Godaa sintsan izo essiide k'eesii ha wogaa ubbaa izi bolla polo." 
Numbers5:30  
Numbers5:31 Asinay bayzzuwaa ubbaappe saro attana; shin mac'c'awunno bare nagaraa gaasuwaan yiyaawaa tookkana› yaaga» yaageedda. 
Numbers6:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda," 
Numbers6:2 «Neeni Israa'eeliyaa asaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Attuma Asay woy mac'c'a Asay Naaziraawe gidiide, barena Med'inaa Godaw dummayanaw geppooppe," 
Numbers6:3 woyniyaa eessaanne hara matsoyiyaa ushshaa ushoppo; woyniyaa ayifiyaappe agettiya c'aalabaanne matsoyiyaabaa ushoppo; woyniyaa teeraa gumeeddawaa ushoppo. Woy woyniyaa teeraa shuguwaa gidina, mela gidinakka mooppo;" 
Numbers6:4 I barena dummayeedda wodiyaan ubbaan, woyniyaa turaappe beettiyaawaa ubbaa, woyniyaa zeretsaa gidina, woy woyniyaa pok'uwaa gidinakka mooppo." 
Numbers6:5 « ‹I barena Med'inaa Godaw dummayanaw geppeedda wodiyaan ubbaan, Aa huup'ii meedettoppo woy k'ans's'ettoppo. I bare huup'iyaa binnaanaakka adussiide dichcho. I barena Med'inaa Godaw dummayeedda wodii polettana gakkanaw, geeshsha gidanaw koshshee." 
Numbers6:6 « ‹I barena Med'inaa Godaw dummayeedda wodiyaan ubbaan anhaakko shiik'oppo. 
Numbers6:7 Haray attina Aa aawuu, woy Aa daaya, woy Aa ishay, woy Aa michchata hayk'k'ooppekka, I barena tunissoppo. Ayaw gooppe, I barena S'oossaw dummayeeddawaa erissiyaawe bare huup'iyaana." 
Numbers6:8 I barena S'oossaw dummayeedda wodiyaan ubbaan I Med'inaa Godaw geeshsha. 
Numbers6:9 « ‹Asay Aa matan akeekenan hayk'k'ina, S'oossaw dummayeedda Aa huup'ii tunooppe, laappun gallassaa gam""iide, bare geeyiyaa he laappuntsa gallassi bare huup'iyaa meedetto." 
Numbers6:10 Hosppuntsa gallassan laau harap'p'etuwaa woy laau mara harap'p'etuwaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge K'eesiyaw aho. 
Numbers6:11 K'eesii harap'p'etuwaappe ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshoo, ittuwaa k'ay s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo yarshsho. Ayaw gooppe, anhay Aa mata shiik'eedda bayzzuwaa diraw, aw atto giissanaassa. He gallassi I bare huup'iyaa wogaadan geeshsho;" 
Numbers6:12 I barena kase geppeedda wodiyaa keenaa barena S'oossaw dummayanaw koshshee. Yaatiide yelettoodeppe itti laytsaa gidiyaa attuma dorssaa naak'oo immiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide yarshsho. Shin hewaappe kase I barena S'oossaw dummayeedda gallassatuu paydetikkino; ayaw gooppe, I barena dummayeedda he wodetuwaa giddon barena tunissi diggeedda." 
Numbers6:13 « ‹Bare gefaa wodiyaa wursseedda wode barena S'oossaw dummayeedda Naaziraawiyaa wogay hawaa: S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa pengge I shiik'o; 
Numbers6:14 Med'inaa Godaw tilla bollana de'iyaa itti laytsaa attuma dorssaa s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo, tilla bollana de'iyaa itti laytsaa dorssato nagaraa yarshshoonne tilla bollana de'iyaa dorssaa orggiyaa ittippetetsaa yarshshoo he sa'aa aho." 
Numbers6:15 K'ay katsaa yarshshuwaanne ushshaa yarshshuwaa unttunttunna ittippe yarshshanaw aho; he katsaa yarshshuu irshshuu gelibeennawaa gido; k'ay zayitiyaan munak'k'eedda liik'o d'iiliyaa komppotuwaanne zayitiyaa oketteedda leeo ukitsatuwaa masoofiyan aho. 
Numbers6:16 « ‹K'eesii hewaa ubbaa shiishiide, nagaraa yarshshuwaanne s'uuggiyaa yarshsho ootsiide, Med'inaa Godaw Aa diraw yarshsho." 
Numbers6:17 K'eesii dorssaa orggiyaa, irshshuu gelibeenna komppotuwaanne ukitsatuwaa ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide, Med'inaa Godaw yarshsho. K'ay hewaana ittippe katsaa yarshshuwaanne ushshaa yarshshuwaa yarshsho." 
Numbers6:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Naaziraawii S'oossaw dummayeedda bare huup'iyaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan meedetto; meedetteedda binnaanaa afiide, ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaappe garssa baggana de'iyaa taman yeggo." 
Numbers6:19 « ‹Barena S'oossaw dummayeedda Naaziraawii bare huup'iyaa meedetteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, k'eesii doyisetteedda dorssaa orggiyaa missaa, irshshuu gelibeenna itti komppuwaanne itti lee""o ukitsaa akkiide, ha Naaziraawiyaa kushiyan wotso." 
Numbers6:20 K'eesii unttuntta k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide, Med'inaa Godaa sintsan k'aatso. Yaatooppe hewanttu wus'akkeedda anggoosuwaananne yarshsheedda gediyaana geeshshanne k'eesiyaassa. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Med'inaa Godaw barena dummayeedda Naaziraawii woyniyaa eessaa ushana gooppe usho." 
Numbers6:21 « ‹Simmi S'oossaw barena dummayanaw geppeedda Naaziraawiyaw wotso wogay hawaa: barena Med'inaa Godaw yarshshanaw koshshiyaa yarshshotuwaappe aad'd'iyaawaa immanaw geppeeddawaa gidooppe, I bare geppeedda gefaa keenaa gatsanaw koshshee› yaaga» yaageedda." 
Numbers6:22 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers6:23 «Aaroonawunne Aa attuma naanaatoo hawaa oda; ‹Israa'eeliyaa asaa hintte hawaadan yaagiide anjjite: 
Numbers6:24 «Med'inaa Goday hinttena anjjonne hinttena naago; 
Numbers6:25 Med'inaa Goday hinttenttoo bare somuwaa poo'issonne hinttenttoo k'aretto; 
Numbers6:26 Med'inaa Goday hinttena bare keeka ayifiyaan s'eellonne hinttenttoo sarotetsaa immo» yaagiide anjjite› yaaga. 
Numbers6:27 «Hawaadan unttunttu Israa'eeliyaa asaa bolla ta suntsaa wotsana, taani unttuntta anjjana» yaageedda." 
Numbers7:1 Muse S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa toliide makkeedda wode, he Dunkkaaniyaanne Aa miishshaa ubbaa okkiide geeshsheedda; k'ay yarshshiyaa saanne Aa miishshaa ubbaakka okkiide geeshsheedda." 
Numbers7:2 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Israa'eeliyaa asaa kaaletseeddawanttu, hewanttunne zaratuwaa paydeedda soo asaa kaappotuu imotaa aheeddino." 
Numbers7:3 Med'inaa Godaw imotaa shiishsheeddino; hewanttukka kameteedda usuppun gaaretuwaa, tammanne laa""u booratuwaa, kaappuwaan kaappuwaan itti itti booraanne laa""u laa""u kaappotuu itti itti gaariyaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa aheeddino." 
Numbers7:4 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers7:5 «S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa oosoo goana mala, neeni hewantta unttunttuppe akkaade, Leewatoo unttunttu oosoo oosoo koshshiyaawaadan shaakkaade imma» yaageedda." 
Numbers7:6 Muse gaaretuwaanne booratuwaa akkiide, Leewatoo immeedda." 
Numbers7:7 Gershshoona yaratoo unttunttu oosoo koshshiyaawaadan shaakkiide, laa""u gaaretuwaanne oyddu booratuwaa immeedda." 
Numbers7:8 K'ay Maraara yaratoo unttunttu oosoo koshshiyaawaadan shaakkiide, oyddu gaaretuwaanne hosppun booratuwaa immeedda. Unttunttu ubbaykka k'eesiyaa Aaroona na'aa Itaamaara aawotetsaa garssaana." 
Numbers7:9 Shin Muse K'ahaata yaratoo hewaappe ayaanne immibeenna; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu aawotetsaan de'iyaa geeshsha miishshatuu barenttu hashiyaan tookkanaw koshshiyaawantta gidiyaa diraassa." 
Numbers7:10 Yarshshiyaa saa Muse okkiide geeshsheedda gallassan, kaappotuu yarshshiyaa sa'aa anjjissanaw barenttu imuwaa akkiide, he yarshshuwaa sa'aa sintsa aheeddino." 
Numbers7:11 Med'inaa Goday Musa kase, «Itti itti gallassi itti kaappuu yarshshiyaa sa'aa anjjanaw bare imuwaa S'oossaw immo» yaagi wotseedda." 
Numbers7:12 Koyro gallassi bare imuwaa aheedawe Yihudaa zariyaappe Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona. 
Numbers7:13 Na'asooni aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:14 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda, is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;" 
Numbers7:15 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo, itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:16 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:17 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Aminaadaaba na'ay Na'asooni aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:18 Laaentsa gallassi Yisaakoora zaratuu kaappuu, S'u'aara na'ay Nataani'eeli bare imuwaa aheedda." 
Numbers7:19 Nataani'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:20 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda, is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;" 
Numbers7:21 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:22 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:23 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. S'u'aara na'ay Nataani'eeli aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:24 Heezzentsa gallassi Zaabiloona zaratuu kaappuu, Heloona na'ay Eli'aabi bare imuwaa aheedda." 
Numbers7:25 Eli'aabi aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eteeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:26 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda, is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;" 
Numbers7:27 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:28 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa," 
Numbers7:29 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Heloona na'ay Eli'aabi aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:30 Oyddentso gallassi Roobeela zaratuu kaappuu Shade'uura na'ay Eliis'uuri bare imuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:31 Eliis'uuri aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:32 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda, is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;" 
Numbers7:33 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:34 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:35 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Shade'uura na'ay Eliis'uuri aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:36 Ichcheshantsa gallassi Simoona zaratuu kaappuu, S'uriishadaaya na'ay Shalumi'eeli bare imuwaa aheedda." 
Numbers7:37 Shalumi'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:38 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa; 
Numbers7:39 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne, itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:40 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:41 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. S'uriishadaaya na'ay Shalumi'eeli aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:42 Usuppuntsa gallassi Gaada zaratuu kaappuu, Re'u'eela na'ay Eliyasaafi bare imuwaa aheedda." 
Numbers7:43 Eliyasaafi aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:44 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa; 
Numbers7:45 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:46 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:47 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Re'u'eela na'ay Eliyasaafi aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:48 Laappuntsa gallassi Efireema zaratuwaa kaappuu Amihuuda na'ay Elishamaa'i bare imuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:49 Elishamaa'i aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:50 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa; 
Numbers7:51 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne, itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:52 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:53 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Amihuuda na'aa Elishamaa'a imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:54 Hosppuntsa gallassi Minaase zaratuu kaappuu Padaas'uura na'ay Gamaali'eeli bare imuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:55 Gamaali'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw lik'k'o d'iilii zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta" 
Numbers7:56 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda is'aanay kumeedda shaataa; 
Numbers7:57 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne, itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:58 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa," 
Numbers7:59 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Padaas'uura na'ay Gamaali'eeli aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:60 Udduppuntsa gallassi Biiniyaama zaratuu kaappuu Giidi'oona na'ay Abidaani bare imuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:61 Abidaani aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii, zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:62 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda, is'aanay kumeedda shaataa;" 
Numbers7:63 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa itti dorssaa orggiyaanne, itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:64 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:65 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne, itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Giidi'oona na'ay Abidaani aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:66 Tammantsa gallassi Daana zaratuu kaappuu Amishadaaya na'ay Ahi'eezeri bare imuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:67 Ahi'eezeri aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii, zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:68 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda, is'aanay kumeedda shaataa." 
Numbers7:69 S'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne, itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:70 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:71 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Amishadaaya na'ay Ahi'eezeri aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:72 Tammanne ittentsa gallassi Aaseera zaratuu kaappuu Okiraana na'ay Paagi'eeli bare yarshshuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:73 Paagi'eeli aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshoo yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii, zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta;" 
Numbers7:74 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda shaataa, is'aanay kumeeddawaa;" 
Numbers7:75 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:76 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa; 
Numbers7:77 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Okiraana na'ay Paagi'eeli aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:78 Tammanne laaentso gallassi Nifttaaleema zaratuu kaappuu Enaana na'ay Ahiraa'i bare imuwaa aheedda. 
Numbers7:79 Ahiraa'i aheedda imuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti keriyaanne hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'iyaa biraappe med'd'eedda itti kuyis'aaruwaa, laa""uukka katsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshanaw liik'o d'iilii, zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawe kumeeddawantta," 
Numbers7:80 k'ay itti s'eetanne tammu giraame dees'iyaa work'k'aappe med'd'eedda itti shaataa, is'aanay kumeeddawaa;" 
Numbers7:81 s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo itti korumaa, itti dorssaa orggiyaanne itti laytsay kumeedda attuma dorssaa;" 
Numbers7:82 nagaraa yarshshoo itti deeshshaa orggiyaa," 
Numbers7:83 ittippetetsaa yarshshoo laau korumatuwaa, ichcheshu dorssaa orggetuwaa, ichcheshu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda ichcheshu attuma dorssatuwaa. Enaana na'ay Ahiraa'i aheedda imuu hawaa." 
Numbers7:84 Yarshshiyaa sa'ay oketteedda wode, Israa'eelatuwaa kaappatuu yarshshiyaa sa'aa anjjanaw aheedda imotay ubbaanna hawantta: Biraappe med'd'eedda tammanne laa""u keretuwaa, biraappe med'd'eedda tammanne laa""u kuyis'aarotuwaanne work'k'aappe med'd'eedda tammanne laa""u shaatetuwaa;" 
Numbers7:85 biraappe med'd'eedda itti itti kerii itti kiilo giraamenne bagga dees'ee; biraappe med'd'eedda itti itti kuyis'aaruu hosppun s'eetu giraame dees'ee; biraappe med'etteedda keriyaanne kuyis'aaruu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina, ubbaanna laatamanne hosppun kiilo giraame keenaa dees'iino." 
Numbers7:86 Tammanne laau work'k'aa shaatatuu eretteedda miizaanan wotsina ittuu ittuu itti s'eetanne tammu giraame, ubbaanna itti kilonne heezzu s'eetu giraame dees'iino. Unttunttun is'aanay kumi utteedda." 
Numbers7:87 Katsaa yarshshuwaanna ittippe s'uuggiyaa yarshshoo aheedda mehii ubbaanna tammanne laau korumatuwaa, tammanne laa""u dorssaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda tammanne laa""u attuma dorssatuwaa. Unttunttu nagaraa yarshshoo aheedda deeshshaa orggetuu ubbaanna tammanne laa""a." 
Numbers7:88 Unttunttu ittippetetsaa yarshshoo aheedda mehii ubbaanna laatamanne oyddu korumatuwaa, usuppun tammu dorssaa orggetuwaa, usuppun tammu gakkeedda deeshshaa orggetuwaanne itti laytsay kumeedda usuppun tammu attuma dorssatuwaa. Yarshshiyaa sa'ay oketteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, anjjoo aheedda imotay hawantta." 
Numbers7:89 Muse Med'inaa Godaana haasayanaw S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa geliyaa wode, Markkatetsaa Taabootaa bollan de'iyaa atto giyaa sa'aa k'um""uwaa bollan, laa""u kiruubetuwaappe gidduwaana Med'inaa Goday haasayiyaa kooshshaa siseedda; Ikka aanana haasayeedda." 
Numbers8:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa," 
Numbers8:2 «Neeni Aaroonaw hawaadan yaagaade oda; ‹Neeni laappun s'omppetuwaa wotsiyaa wode s'omppetuu s'omppiyaa wotsiyaa ballatuwaappe sintsa baggana de'iyaa heeratuwaa poo'iino› yaaga» yaageedda. 
Numbers8:3 I geeddawaadan Aarooni ootseedda. Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan, Aarooni s'omppetuwaa wotsiyaa ballatuwaappe sintsa baggana de'iyaa heeratuwaa poo'issanaadan ootsiide, ballatuwaan wotseedda." 
Numbers8:4 S'omppiyaa wotsiyaawe garssa gediyaappe bolla c'iishshaana alleek'k'etteedda ballatuwaa s'eeraa gakkanaw k'os'etteedda work'k'aappe med'etteedda. S'omppiyaa wotsiyaa ballay Med'inaa Goday Musa besseedda leemisuwaadan oosetteedda. 
Numbers8:5 K'ay Med'inaa Goday Musa," 
Numbers8:6 «Hara Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaappe Leewatuwaa akkaade, unttuntta wogaadan geeshsha." 
Numbers8:7 Neeni unttuntta geeshshanaw hawaadan ootsa: geeshshiyaa haatsaa akkaade unttuntta pushakka; unttunttu barenttu bollaa ubbaa meedettino; barenttu mayuwaakka meec'c'ino; yaatiide unttunttu wogaadan geeshsha gidana. 
Numbers8:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, unttunttu korumaa ittuwaanne liik'o d'iiliyaa zayitiyaan munak'k'eeddawaa katsaa yarshshoo akkino; neeni k'ay laa""entso korumaa nagaraa yarshshoo akka." 
Numbers8:9 Yaataade Leewatuwaa S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsa ayaa; Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaraa ubbaa shiishsha. 
Numbers8:10 Neeni Leewatuwaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsa ahina, Israa'eeliyaa Asay unttunttu bolla barenttu kushiyaa wotsino." 
Numbers8:11 Leewatuu Med'inaa Godaa oosuwaa ootsanaw giigana mala, Aarooni Israa'eeliyaa asaappe Leewatuwaa k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide, Med'inaa Godaa sintsa shiishsho." 
Numbers8:12 «Leewatuu barenttu kushiyaa korumatuu huup'iyaan wotsino; ittuwaa nagaraa yarshshuwaa ootsaade, ittuwaa k'ay Leewatuu atto geetettana mala, s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsaade Med'inaa Godaw yarshsha." 
Numbers8:13 Leewatuwaa Aaroonanne Aa attuma naanatu aawotetsaa garssan wotsa; yaataade unttuntta k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsaade, Med'inaa Godaa sintsa shiishsha." 
Numbers8:14 Hewaadan ootsaade Leewatuwaa hara Israa'eeliyaa asaappe dummaya; dummayooppe Leewatuu tawaa gidana. 
Numbers8:15 «Neeni Leewatuwaa geeshsheeddawaappenne k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsaade shiishsheeddawaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaan barenttu oosuwaa ootsanaw yiino." 
Numbers8:16 Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaappe unttunttu taw ubbaanna imetteeddino; Israa'eeliyaa mac'c'a asaappe yeletteedda bayira attumawanttu ubbaa diraw taani Leewatuwaa taw akkaad. 
Numbers8:17 Israa'eeliyaa asaa gidduwaan bayira yeletteeddawe asaa gidina, mehiyaa gidinakka ubbay tawaa. Taani Gibs'e gadiyaan bayira ubbaa wod'eedda gallassan, unttuntta taw dummayaad." 
Numbers8:18 Israa'eeliyaa bayira attumawanttu ubbaa diraw taani Leewatuwaa akkaad. 
Numbers8:19 Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa gidduwaappe taani Leewatuwaa Aaroonawunne Aaroona attuma naanaw imuwaa ootsaade immaad. Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa shiik'iyaa wode, boshay unttuntta bochchenna mala, Leewatuu Israa'eeliyaa asaa gishsha Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaan barenttu oosuwaa ootsinonne unttunttu diraw atto geetettino» yaageedda." 
Numbers8:20 Med'inaa Goday Musa Leewatuwaa dummayanaw azazeeddawaadan Muse, Aarooninne Israa'eeliyaa asaa maabaray ubbay ootseeddino." 
Numbers8:21 Leewatuu barena geeshsheeddino; barenttu mayuwaakka meec'c'eeddino. Aarooni unttunttu k'aatsiyaa yarshshuwaa ootsiide, Med'inaa Godaa sintsa shiishsheedda; unttuntta geeshshanaw unttuntta atto giisseedda." 
Numbers8:22 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Leewatuu Aaroonanne Aaroona attuma naanatu aawotetsaa garssan, Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa giddon barenttu oosuwaa ootsanaw yeeddino. Med'inaa Goday Musa Leewatuwaa dummayanaw azazeeddawaadan unttunttu ootseeddino." 
Numbers8:23 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers8:24 «Hawe Leewatuwaa s'eelliyaa wogaa: laytsay laatamanne ichcheshanne hewaappe bollana de'iyaa attumawanttu oosuwaa ootsanaw Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa yiino. 
Numbers8:25 Shin unttunttu laytsay ishatamuwaa gidiyaa wode unttunttu barenttu oosuwaappe s'urataa kesino; simmiide laaentso ootsoppino. 
Numbers8:26 Unttunttu Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaan ootsiyaa barenttu ishatuwaa ootsi maaddana gooppe maaddinoppe attina, unttunttu barekka ay oosonne ootsoppino. Simmi neeni Leewatuwaa oosuwaa hawaadan oosissaasa» yaageedda." 
Numbers9:1 Israa'eeliyaa Asay Gibs'eppe keseedda laaentso laytsan koyiro agenaan Siinaa Mela biittaan Med'inaa Goday Musew hawaadan yaagiide haasayeedda; 
Numbers9:2 «Israa'eeliyaa Asay Paasigaa Baalaa keereedda gallassan bonchcho. 
Numbers9:3 Ha aginaan tammanne oyddentso gallassan, Aa keereedda wode, away wullana haniyaa wode, Aa wogaa ubbaadaaninne Aa azazo ubbaadan bonchcho» yaageedda." 
Numbers9:4 Muse Israa'eeliyaa Asay Paasigaa Baalaa bonchchana mala, unttunttoo odeedda." 
Numbers9:5 Koyro aginaw tammanne oyddentso gallassi, away wullana haniyaa wode Siinaa Mela biittaan unttunttu Paasigaa Baalaa bonchcheeddino. Israa'eeliyaa Asay Med'inaa Goday Musa azazeeddawaadan ubbabaa ootseedda." 
Numbers9:6 Shin unttunttuppe amareedawanttu hayk'k'eedda asaa anhaa bochchiide tuneedda diraw, he gallassi Paasigaa Baalaa bonchchanaw danddayibeykkino. Hewaa diraw, unttunttu Musekkonne Aaroonakko he gallassi yiide," 
Numbers9:7 Musa, «Nuuni hayk'k'eedda asaa anhaa bochcheedda diraw tuneeddo; shin keereedda wodiyaan hara Israa'eeliyaa asaanna Med'inaa Godaw yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaawaa nuuni ayaw digetteettoo?» yaageeddino." 
Numbers9:8 Muse unttuntta, «Med'inaa Goday hinttewaa taw azaziyaawaa taani sisana gakkanaw hintte takkishshite» yaageedda." 
Numbers9:9 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Med'inaa Goday Musa," 
Numbers9:10 «Neeni Israa'eeliyaa asaa hawaadan yaaga; ‹Hintteppe woy hintte zaratuwaappe ooninne anhaa bochchiide tunooppe, woy manddareeddawaa gidooppe, I Med'inaa Godaw Paasigaa Baalaa bonchcho;" 
Numbers9:11 laaentso aginaan tammanne oyddentso gallassi away wullana haniyaa wode Paasigaa Baalaa bonchcho. Paasigaa dorssaa irshshuu gelibeenna ukitsaananne c'amo bonc'c'iyaanna mo. 
Numbers9:12 Sa'ay wonttanaw he dorssaappe ayaanne ashshoppo; k'ay Aa mek'etsaappekka ittuwaanne mentsoppo. Paasigaa Baalaw Aa woga ubbaa ootso. 
Numbers9:13 Shin manddaribeenna geeshsha Asay Paasigaa bonchchennaan is's'ooppe, hewaappe sintsaw I ta asaa giddoppe bohetto. Ayaw gooppe, Med'inaa Godaa yarshshuwaa keereedda wodiyaan I shiishshibeenna. He Asay bare nagaray aheedda metuwaa akkanaw besse." 
Numbers9:14 « ‹Hintte gidduwaan de'iyaa bete Asay Paasigaa Baalaa Med'inaa Godaw bonchchana koyooppe, Paasigaa wogaadan bonchcho. Betiyawukka gade asawukka itti mala wogay de'o› yaaga» yaageedda." 
Numbers9:15 Dunkkaanii toletteedda gallassi shaarii Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa mayyeedda; omarssaappe doommiide, wonttana gakkanaw Dunkkaaniyaappe bollana de'iyaa shaarii tamaa malatee." 
Numbers9:16 Hewaadan ubbaa wode gallassi gallassi shaarii mayyee; k'amma k'amma he shaarii tamaadan poo'ee. 
Numbers9:17 He shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollaappe denddiyaa wode awudenne Israa'eelatuu barenttu dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe denddiino; k'ay he shaarii wod'd'iyaa ay sa'aaninne Israa'eelatuu dunkkaaniino. 
Numbers9:18 Israa'eelatuu Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan denddino; hewaadankka, Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan dunkkaaniino. Shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan gam""iyaa wode ubbaan barenttu dunkkaaneeddasan gam""ino." 
Numbers9:19 Shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan daro gallassaa gamooppe, Israa'eelatuu Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaa naagiinoppe attina, hak'anne biikkino." 
Numbers9:20 Itti itti gede shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan amareeda gallassaa gamee. Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan unttunttu dunkkaaniino; k'ay hewaadankka, S'oossaa azazuwaan unttunttu denddino." 
Numbers9:21 Itti itti gede shaarii omarssaappe wonttana gakkanaw s'alalaa gamee; wonttina shaarii denddiyaa wode unttunttukka denddino. Gallassaa gidina, k'amma gidina, shaarii denddiyaa wode unttunttukka denddino." 
Numbers9:22 Shaarii Dunkkaaniyaa bollan laau gallassaa gamina, woy itti aginaa, woy itti laytsaa gam""ina, Israa'eelatuu barenttu dunkkaaneeddasan gam""iinoppe attina biikkino. Shin shaarii denddiyaa wode unttunttukka denddino." 
Numbers9:23 Unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan dunkkaaniinonne k'ay Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaan denddino; Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan, unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa azazuwaa naageeddino." 
Numbers10:1 Med'inaa Goday Musa hawaadan yaageedda; 
Numbers10:2 «Laau s'urumbbatuwaa biraappe k'os's'aade ootsa; yaataade asaa shiik'oo s'eeganawunne k'ay dunkkaaneedda saappe denddanaw dentsetsanaadan punna. 
Numbers10:3 Ha laau s'urumbbatuu punettiyaa wode, Asay ubbay Gaketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa penggii neekko shiik'o." 
Numbers10:4 Shin itti s'urumbba s'alalay punettooppe, Israa'eeliyaa zaratuwaa kaappatuu ne sintsa shiik'ino." 
Numbers10:5 Neeni s'urumbbaa d'ok'k'u ootsaade punniyaa wode, away doliyaa baggana dunkkaaneedda zaratuu denddino." 
Numbers10:6 S'urumbbaa laaentso d'ok'k'u ootsaade punniyaa wode, gedissa baggana dunkkaaneedda zaratuu denddino. S'urumbbay d'ok'k'u gi punettiyaawe denddanaw mallaa gido." 
Numbers10:7 Yaa'aw asaa shiishshanaw s'urumbbaa punna; shin kooshshaa d'ok'k'u ootsaade punnoppa. 
Numbers10:8 Aaroona naanay k'eesatuu s'urumbba punnino. Hawe newunne yiyaa yeletaa ubbaw med'ina woga gido. 
Numbers10:9 «Hintte gadiyaan metuwaa dentsiyaa hintte morkkiyaanna hintte olettanaw kesiyaa wode, he s'urumbbatuwaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide punnite. Hewaan Med'inaa Goday hintte S'oossay hinttena he wode hassayiide, hintte morkkiyaappe hinttena ashshana." 
Numbers10:10 Hewaadankka, k'ay hintte nashettiyaa gallassi, baalaa bonchchanaw hintte keereedda gallassinne agenay s'eeriya baalan, hintte s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa wodenne hintte ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa wode he s'urumbbatuwaa punnite; hewe S'oossaa sintsan hinttena hassayissiyaawaa gidana. Taani Med'inaa Godaa, hintte S'oossaa» yaageedda." 
Numbers10:11 Laaentsa laytsan laaentso aginaan laatamantsa gallassi, shaarii Markkatetsaa Dunkkaaniyaa bollappe denddeedda." 
Numbers10:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Israa'eeliyaa Asay Siinaa Mela biittaappe denddeedda; shaarii Paaraana giyaa mela biittaa gakkiide wod'd'eedda." 
Numbers10:13 Unttunttu ha koyiro buussaw Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana azazeeddawaadan denddeeddino. 
Numbers10:14 Yihudaa zaratuwaanna dunkkaaneedda baggay barenttu armmaa oyk'k'iide koyro denddeeddino. Yihudaa zaratuu kaappuu Aminaadaaba na'aa Na'asoona; 
Numbers10:15 Yisaakoora zaratuu kaappuu S'u'aara na'aa Nataani'eela; 
Numbers10:16 Zaabiloona zaratuu kaappuu Heloona na'aa Eli'aaba. 
Numbers10:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Dunkkaaniyaa shoddina, Gershshoona yaratuunne Maraara yaratuu tookkiide denddeeddino." 
Numbers10:18 Kaalliide Roobeela zaratuwaanna dunkkaaneedda baggay barenttu armmaa oyk'k'iide denddeedda. Roobeela zaratuu kaappuu Shade'uura na'aa Eliis'uura; 
Numbers10:19 Simoona zaratuu kaappuu S'uriishadaaya na'aa Shalumi'eela; 
Numbers10:20 Gaada zaratuu kaappuu Re'u'eela na'aa Eliyasaafa. 
Numbers10:21 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, K'ahaata yaratuu geeshsha miishshatuwaa tookkiide denddeeddino. Unttunttu gakkanaappe kasetiide, Dunkkaanii toletti utteedda." 
Numbers10:22 Kaalliide Efireema zaratuwaanna dunkkaaneedda baggay bare armmaa oyk'k'iide denddeedda. Efireema zaratuu kaappuu Amihuuda na'aa Elishamaa'a; 
Numbers10:23 Minaase zaratuu kaappuu Padaas'uura na'aa Gamaali'eela; 
Numbers10:24 Biiniyaama zaratuu kaappuu Giidi'oona na'aa Abidaana. 
Numbers10:25 Wurssetsan, ha c'uguwaa ubbaw guyye baggan naagiyaa Daana zaratuwaanna dunkkaaneedda baggay bare armmaa oyk'k'iide denddeedda. Daana zaratuu kaappuu Amishadaaya na'aa Ahi'eezera;" 
Numbers10:26 Aaseera zaratuu kaappuu Okiraana na'aa Paagi'eela; 
Numbers10:27 Nifttaaleema zaratuu kaappuu Enaana na'aa Ahiraa'a. 
Numbers10:28 Israa'eeliyaa Asay bare baggan baggan denddiide biyaa maaray hawaadaana. 
Numbers10:29 Muse Midiyaama asaa gidiyaa bare bolluwaa Re'u'eela na'aa Hobaaba, «Nuuni Med'inaa Goday, ‹Taani hinttenttoo immana› geedda sa'aa beeto; Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaw lo""obaa ootsana geedda diraw, neeni nuunana dendda. Nuuni new lo""obaa ootsana» yaageedda." 
Numbers10:30 Hobaabi, «Tuytti, taani biikke; taani ta biittaa ta asaakko baana» yaageedda." 
Numbers10:31 Muse Aa, «Hayyanaa, nuuna yeggaade boopparikkii! mela biittaan nuuni dunkkaananaw bessiyaasa neeni eraasa; neeni nu biyaa ogiyaa nuuna kaaletsanawukka danddayaasa." 
Numbers10:32 Neeni nuunana booppe, Med'inaa Goday nuw immiyaa anjjuwaa ubbaa nuuni neenana shaakkana» yaageedda." 
Numbers10:33 Yaatina unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa deriyaappe denddiide, heezzu gallassaa keeshshaa ogiyaa beeddino. Med'inaa Godaa C'aak'uwaa Taabootay unttunttu shemppiyaa sa'aa demmanaw he heezzu gallassan unttunttuppe sintsaw beedda." 
Numbers10:34 Unttunttu dunkkaaneedda sa'aappe denddiyaa wode ubbaan, Med'inaa Godaa shaarii gallassi gallassi unttunttuppe bollana de'ee." 
Numbers10:35 Taabootay denddiyaa wode ubbaan Muse, «Abeet Med'inaa Godaw, dendda! Ne morkketuu laalettino; Neena is's'iyaawanttukka ne sintsaappe bak'atino» yaagee." 
Numbers10:36 Taabootay shemppiyaa wode ubbaan Muse, «Abeet Med'inaa Godaw, ha daro sha""an paydetiyaa Israa'eeliyaa asaakko neeni simma» yaagee." 
Numbers11:1 Asay bare metoo Med'inaa Godaa bolla zuuzummeedda; unttunttu zuuzummiina S'oossay sisiide, hank'k'uwaa ees's'i keseedda. Yaatina Med'inaa Godaa tamay unttunttu gidduwaan ees's'iide, unttunttu dunkkaaneedda sa'aw itti itti gas'aa bagga meedda." 
Numbers11:2 Yaatina Asay Musew waassina, Muse Med'inaa Godaa woosseedda. Tamay to'eedda." 
Numbers11:3 Med'inaa Godaa tamay unttunttu gidduwaan ees's'eedda diraw, he sa'ay Tabi'eera geetetti s'eesetteedda." 
Numbers11:4 Israa'eelatuwaana de'iyaa dumma dumma gade Asay hara k'umaa loytsi amotteedda. Israa'eeliyaa asaykka k'ay hawaadan yaagiide yeekuwaa doommeedda; «Laa nuuni ashuwaa hak'appe demmanee? 
Numbers11:5 Nuuni Gibs'e gadiyaan miishshaa c'iggenan c'oo miyaa moliyaa hassayeetto; k'ay k'ayiyaa miyaa paranjjiyaa leekiyaa, zolddo leekiyaa malatiyaa mal""iyaa haatsay kumeedda meelooniyaa, adussa paranjjiyaa sunk'k'uruttiyaanne tuumuwaa hassayeetto." 
Numbers11:6 Shin hai nu k'ood'ii gorddetteedda; nu ayifiikka ha mannaappe attina, harabaa ayinne be'enna» yaageeddino." 
Numbers11:7 Mannay deebbuwaa ayfiyaa malatee; Aa malay boos's'iyaa mitsaa c'ooshshaa malatee. 
Numbers11:8 Asay yuuyyi yuuyyi Aa k'oree; wos'aan gaac'c'ee, woy udulan c'addee; unttunttu Aa otuwaan penttissiide, bashiyan komppiino. I zayitiyaan munak'k'iide uukkeedda ukitsaadan mal""ee." 
Numbers11:9 K'amma dunkkaaneeddasan s'aasay wod'd'iyaa wode, mannay aanana wod'd'ee." 
Numbers11:10 Asay bare dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaan penggiyaan yeekkishin, Muse siseedda. Med'inaa Godaa hank'k'uu ees's'i keseedda diraw, Muse un""etteedda." 
Numbers11:11 Hewaa diraw, Muse Med'inaa Godaa hawaadan yaagiide oochcheedda; «Neeni ta bolla ne k'oomaa bolla ayaw ha metuwaa ahaadii? Neeni taanan ayaw nashetabeykkii? Neeni ha asaa ubbaa tookuwaa ta bolla ayaw wotsaaddii?" 
Numbers11:12 Ha asaa ubbaa taani shahaaraadditaayye? Woy unttuntta taani yelaadditaa? ‹Neeni unttunttu mayzza aawaatoo, «Taani hinttenttoo immana» gaade c'aak'k'eedda biittaa gatsanaw, naanatuwaa dichchiyaana d'antsiyaa na'aa bare kiwuwaan idimmiyaawaadan, neeni unttuntta ne kiwuwaan idimma› yaagaade taw ayaw oday?" 
Numbers11:13 Ha asaw ubbaw taani ashuwaa hak'appe demmanee? Unttunttu taana, ‹Miyaa ashuwaa nuw imma› yaagiide yeekkiino." 
Numbers11:14 Taani ha asaa ubbaa taarekka tookkana danddaykke; tookku taw loytsi dees'ee. 
Numbers11:15 Simmi neeni taana hawaadan metootanaadan ootsanawaappe taw k'arettaade taana hai wod'a basha; yaatooppe, taani metuwaappe shemppana» yaageedda."
