1Chronicles1:19 Eboori laau naanaa yeleedda; ittuu yeletteedda wode sa'ay shaaketteedda diraw, Aa suntsay Peeleega geetetteedda; Aa ishaa suntsay Yok'is'aana." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yok'is'aani Almmodaada, Sheleefa, Has'armmaaweta, Yeraaha," 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoraama, Uzaala, Diik'ila," 
1Chronicles1:22 Eebaala, Abimaa'eela, Saaba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofiira, Hawiilanne Yobaaba yeleedda. Hawanttu ubbatuu Yok'is'aana zeretsaa." 
1Chronicles1:24 Seemappe biide, Abrahaama gakkanaw de'iyaa yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa: Seema, Arifaakisaada, Shelaaha," 
1Chronicles1:25 Eboora, Peeleega, Raa'a," 
1Chronicles1:26 Saruuga, Naakoora, Taaranne" 
1Chronicles1:27 Abrahaama geetettiide s'eesettiyaa Abraama. 
1Chronicles1:28 Abrahaama attuma naanay Yisaak'anne Isimaa'eela. 
1Chronicles1:29 Unttunttu yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteedda. Isimaa'eela bayiray Nabaayoota; hewaappe simmina K'eedaare, Adibi'eeli, Mibssaami," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishimaa'i, Duumi, Maasi, Hadaadi, Teemi," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yis'uri, Naafiishinne K'eedimi yeletteeddino. Hawanttu Isimaa'eela naanaa." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahaama k'oomatuu K'as'uri attuma naanay Ziimiraana, Yok'ishaana, Madaana, Midiyaama, Yishibaak'anne Shuha. Yok'ishaana attuma naanay Saabanne Dadaana." 
1Chronicles1:33 Midiyaama attuma naanay Eefa, Efeera, Hanooka, Abiidaa'anne Elddaa'a. Hawanttu ubbatuu K'as'uri zeretsaa." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahaame Yisaak'a yeleedda. Yisaak'a attuma naanay Eesaanne Israa'eeliyaa. 
1Chronicles1:35 Eesaa attuma naanay Elifaaza, Ra'u'eela, Yi'uusha, Yaa'ilaamanne K'oraaha." 
1Chronicles1:36 Elifaaza attuma naanay Temaana, Omaara, S'afa, Ga'itaama, K'anaaza, Timinaa'anne Amaaleek'a." 
1Chronicles1:37 Ra'u'eela attuma naanay Nahaata, Zaraaha, Shammanne Miizaa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Eedooman koyro de'eedda Se'iira attuma naanay Los'aana, Shobaala, S'ibaa'oona, Aana, Dishoona, Es'eeranne Dishaana." 
1Chronicles1:39 Los'aana attuma naanay Hooranne Homaama; Los'aana michchata Timinaa'o. 
1Chronicles1:40 Shobaala attuma naanay Aaliwaana, Manahaata, Eebaala, Shefanne Oonaama. S'ibaa'oona attuma naanay Aayanne Aana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Aana na'ay Dishoona. Dishoona attuma naanay Hemddaana, Eshibaana, Yitiraananne Karaana." 
1Chronicles1:42 Es'eera attuma naanay Bilihaana, Za'iwaananne Ak'ana. Dishaana attuma naanay Uus'anne Araana." 
1Chronicles1:43 Israa'eelan ayaa kaatii kawutanappe kase Eedooma biittan kaateteedda kaatetuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Ba'oora na'ay Belaa'i kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Dinaaba. 
1Chronicles1:44 Belaa'i hayk'k'ina, Boos'irappe yeedda Zaraaha na'ay Yobaabi Aa kotan kaateteedda." 
1Chronicles1:45 Yobaabi hayk'k'ina, Temaana gadiyaappe yeedda Hushaami Aa kotan kaateteedda." 
1Chronicles1:46 Hushaami hayk'k'ina, Moo'aabe gadiyaan Midiyaamatuwaa s'ooneedda Badaada na'aa Hadaadi Aa kotan kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Awiita." 
1Chronicles1:47 Hadaadi hayk'k'ina, Maasireek'appe yeedda Saamili Aa kotan kaateteedda." 
1Chronicles1:48 Saamili hayk'k'ina, shaafaa matan de'iyaa Rahobootappe yeedda Shaa'uli Aa kotan kaateteedda." 
1Chronicles1:49 Shaa'uli hayk'k'ina, Akiboora na'ay Ba'aalihanaani Aa kotan kaateteedda." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ba'aalihanaani hayk'k'ina, Hadaadi Aa kotan kaateteedda; Aa katamaa suntsay Paa'a. Aa machata Mezaahaaba naatti Maas'ireedi naatto Mahes'aabi'eelo." 
1Chronicles1:51 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Hadaadi hayk'k'eedda. Eedooma zaratuwaa kaappatuu hawantta: Timinaa'a, Aliwa, Yeteeta," 
1Chronicles1:52 Oholiibaama, Eelah, Piinoona," 
1Chronicles1:53 K'anaaza, Temaana, Mibs's'aara," 
1Chronicles1:54 Maagidi'eelanne Iraama. Hawanttu Eedooma kaappatuwaa. 
1Chronicles2:1 Israa'eeliyaa attuma naanay hawantta: Roobeela, Simoona, Leewiyaa, Yihudaa, Yisaakoora, Zaabiloona," 
1Chronicles2:2 Daana, Yooseefa, Biiniyaama, Nifttaaleema, Gaadanne Aaseera." 
1Chronicles2:3 Kanaane Baatishu'ippe Yihuday yeleedda heezzu attuma naanay Eera, Oonaananne Sheela. Yihudaa na'ay bayiray, Eeri Med'inaa Godaa sintsan iitabaa ootseedda diraw, Med'inaa Goday Aa wod'eedda." 
1Chronicles2:4 Yihudaa na'aa machchata Ti'imaara Yihudaw Paareesanne Zaraaha yelaaddu. Yihudaw ubbaanna ichcheshu attuma naanay de'iino. 
1Chronicles2:5 Paareesa attuma naanay Hes'iroonanne Hamuula. 
1Chronicles2:6 Zaraaha attuma naanay Zimira, Etaana, Hemaana, Kalkkoolanne Darddaa'a; unttunttu ubbaanna ichchesha." 
1Chronicles2:7 Zaraaha zeretsaappe gideedda Karmma na'ay Akaani S'iiniyaa geetetti utteedda miishshaa omooduwaa akkiide, Israa'eeliyaa asaa waayisseeddawaa." 
1Chronicles2:8 Etaana na'ay Azaariyaa. 
1Chronicles2:9 Hes'iroone yeleedda naanay Yiraahima'eela, Raamanne Kaaleeba." 
1Chronicles2:10 Raame Aminaadaaba yeleedda. Aminaadaabe Yihudaa zaratuwaa kaappuwaa Na'asoona yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:11 Na'asoone Salmoona yeleedda; Salmooni Boo'eeza yeleedda; 
1Chronicles2:12 Boo'eeze Yoobeeda yeleedda; Yoobeedi Isseya yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:13 Isseyi bare bayira na'aa Eli'aaba, laa'entso na'aa Aminaadaaba, heezzentso na'aa Shaama," 
1Chronicles2:14 oyddentso na'aa Nataani'eela, ichcheshantso na'aa Raddaaya," 
1Chronicles2:15 usuppuntso na'aa Oos'eemanne laappuntsa na'ay Daawita yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:16 Isseya mac'c'a naanay S'aruuyonne Abigaalo. S'aruuyi naanay heezzatuu Abishaaya, Yoo'aabanne Asaaheela." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigaala Amaasa yelaaddu; Amaasa aawuu Isimaa'eeliyaa Yetera. 
1Chronicles2:18 Hes'iroona na'ay Kaaleebi bare machati Azuubina, Yirii'ooto geetettiyaa naatto yeleedda. Yirii'oota Yesheera, Shobaabanne Arddoona yelaaddu." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuuba hayk'k'ina, Kaaleebi Efiraato akkeedda; Efiraataa Huura yelaaddu." 
1Chronicles2:20 Huuri Uura yeleedda; Uuri Bas'aali'eela yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:21 Hes'iroone usuppun tammu laytsaappe guyyiyaan, Gala'aade aawuwaa Maakira naatto akkiide, Saguba yeleedda." 
1Chronicles2:22 Sagubi Yaa'iira yeleedda. Yaa'iiri beni Gala'aade gadiyaan laatamanne heezzu katamatuwaa mooddeedda. 
1Chronicles2:23 Shin Gashuuranne Sooriyaa kaatetuu Habooti-Yaa'iira katamatuwaa K'anaataanne aa heeratuwaa usuppun tammu katamatuwaa olettiide oyk'k'eeddino; yaan de'eedda Asay ubbay Gala'aade aawuwaa Maakira zariyaa. 
1Chronicles2:24 Hes'iroone Kaaleeba Efiraataa giyaa saan hayk'k'eeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Hes'iroona machata Abiiya Tak'o""a aawuwaa Ashihuura yelaaddu." 
1Chronicles2:25 Hes'iroona na'aa bayiraa Yiraahima'eela na'ay bayray Raama; teefatuu Buuna, Oreena, Oos'eemanne Akiiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yiraahima'eelaw Ataaro geetettiyaa hara machchata de'aw; Ataara Oonaama daayo. 
1Chronicles2:27 Yiraahima'eela na'aa bayraa Raama naanay Ma'aas'a, Yaamiinanne Ek'eera." 
1Chronicles2:28 Oonaama naanay Shammaayanne Yaade. Shammaaya naanay Nadaabanne Abishuura. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishuura machata Abihayila Ahibaananne Moliida yelaaddu. 
1Chronicles2:30 Nadaaba attuma naanay Seledanne Afaayima; Seledi na'aa yelennaan hayk'k'eedda. 
1Chronicles2:31 Afaayima na'ay Yishi'a; Yishi'a na'ay Sheeshaana; Sheeshaana na'ay Ahilaaya. 
1Chronicles2:32 Shammaaya ishaa Yaade naanay Yeteranne Yoonataana; Yeteri na'aa yelennaan hayk'k'eedda. 
1Chronicles2:33 Yoonataana naanay Peleetanne Zaaza. Hawanttu Yiraahima'eela zeretsaa. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheeshaanaw mac'c'awaappe attina, attuma naanay baawa. Sheeshaanaw Yaariha'a geetettiyaa k'oomay Gibs'e gadiyaappe yeeddawe de'ee." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheeshaani bare k'oomaa Yaariha'aw bare mac'c'a naanatuwaappe ittinno immina naatta Attaaya yelaaddu. 
1Chronicles2:36 Attaayi Naataana yeleedda; Naataani Zabaada yeleedda; 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabaad Efilaala yeleedda; Efilaali Yoobeeda yeleedda; 
1Chronicles2:38 Yoobeedi Yeeha yeleedda; Yeehu Azaariyaa yeleedda; 
1Chronicles2:39 Azaarii Helees'a yeleedda; Helees'i Elaasa yeleedda; 
1Chronicles2:40 Elaasi Sisimaaya yeleedda; Sisimaayi Shaaluuma yeleedda; 
1Chronicles2:41 Shaaluumi Yik'aamiyaa yeleedda; Yik'aame Elishamaa'a yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:42 Yiraahima'eela ishaa Kaaleeba na'ay bayiray Meesha. Meesha na'ay Ziifa; Ziifa na'ay Mareesha; Mareesha na'ay Kebroona. 
1Chronicles2:43 Kebroone naanay K'oraaha, Taappuha, Rek'eemanne Shemaa'a." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shemaa'i York'k'a'aama aawuwaa Rahaama yeleedda. Rek'eemi Shammaaya yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:45 Shammaaya na'ay Maa'oona. Maa'ooni Beetis'uura yeleedda. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kaaleeba k'oomatta Eefa Haaraana, Moos'anne Gazeeza yelaaddu; Haaraani Gazeeza yeleedda." 
1Chronicles2:47 Yaahidaaya naanay Regeema, Yo'aataama, Geshaana, Pelees'a, Eefanne Sha'aafa." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kaaleeba k'oomatta Maa'ika Shebeeranne Tirihaana yelaaddu. 
1Chronicles2:49 K'aykka Maa'ika Sha'aafanne Shawa yelaaddu. Sha'aafi Madimaana yeleedda. Shawi Maakibeenanne Gibaa'a yeleedda. Kaaleeba naatta Aakkiso. 
1Chronicles2:50 Kaaleeba naanay haratuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino. Kaaleebi bare bayra na'aa Huura bare machchatti Efiraatin yeleedda. Huura naanay K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima aawuwaa Shobaala," 
1Chronicles2:51 Beeteleheeme aawuwaa Salmoonanne Beeti-Gadeera aawuwaa Hareefa. 
1Chronicles2:52 K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima aawuwaa Shobaala yaratuu Haro'eetatanne Manuhoota yaratuwaappe baggatuwaa. 
1Chronicles2:53 K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima yaratuu Yatirata, Puutata, Shumaatatanne Mishiraa'ata. S'or""atinne Eshttaa'oolati hawanttuppe yeletteeddino." 
1Chronicles2:54 Beeteleheeme aawuwaa Salmoona yaratuu Nas'oofata, As'irooti-Beetayoo'aabata, Manuhoota yaratuwaappe attiyaa baggatuwaanne S'or""ata." 
1Chronicles2:55 Yaabees'a kataman de'iyaa s'aafiyaawanttu yaratuu k'ay Tirata, Shim""aatatanne Sukkata. Hawanttu Rekaabatu aawuwaa Haamatuwaappe yeletteedda K'eenata." 
1Chronicles3:1 Kebroone kataman Daawite yeleedda naanay; Iziraa'eeliyaa Ahino'aama yeleedda Aa bayray Aminoona. K'armmeloosiyaa Abigaala yeleedda Aa laa'entso na'ay Daaneela. 
1Chronicles3:2 Gashuura gadiyaa Kaatiyaa Talmmaaya naatta Maa'ika yeleedda Aa heezzentso na'ay Abeselooma. Haggiita yeleedda Aa oyddentso na'ay Adooniyaana. 
1Chronicles3:3 Abiis'aala yeleedda Aa ichcheshantso na'ay Shafaas'iyaa. Aa machata Egila yeleedda Aa usuppuntsa na'ay Yitira'aama. 
1Chronicles3:4 Daawite he usuppun naanaa Kebroonan yeleedda. Daawite Kebroonan laappun laytsanne usuppun aginaa kaateteedda. K'ay Yerusaalamen hattamanne heezzu laytsaa kaateteedda. 
1Chronicles3:5 Daawite Yerusaalamen yeleedda naanay oyddatuu Ami'eela naatta Berssaaba yeleedda Shima, Shobaaba, Naataananne Solomona." 
1Chronicles3:6 K'ay hara udduppun attuma naanay Yibihaara, Elishamaa'a, Elifelees'a," 
1Chronicles3:7 Nogaaha, Nefeega, Yaafi'a," 
1Chronicles3:8 Elishamaa'a, Eliyadaa'anne Elifelees'a." 
1Chronicles3:9 Ha attuma naanaa ubbaa bollakka Daawitaw hara machatuwaappe yeletteedda attuma naanay de'iino; k'ay Taamaara ha attuma naanaa michchato. 
1Chronicles3:10 Kaatiyaa Solomone na'ay Robi'aama; Robi'aama na'ay Abiiya; Abiiya na'ay Asaa; Asaa na'ay Yoosaafees'a; 
1Chronicles3:11 Yoosaafees'a na'ay Yoraama; Yoraama na'ay Akaaziyaasa; Akaaziyaasa na'ay Yo'aasha; 
1Chronicles3:12 Yo'aasha na'ay Amesiyaasa; Amesiyaasa na'ay Ooziyaana; Ooziyaana na'ay Yo'aataama; 
1Chronicles3:13 Yo'aataama na'ay Akaaza; Akaaza na'ay Hizk'k'iyaasa; Hizk'k'iyaasa na'ay Minaasa; 
1Chronicles3:14 Minaase na'ay Amoona; Amoona na'ay Yoosiyaasa. 
1Chronicles3:15 Yoosiyaasa na'ay bayray Yohanaana; laaentsuu Yo'aak'eema; heezzentsuu Sedek'iyaasa; oyddentsuu Shaaluuma. 
1Chronicles3:16 Yo'aak'eema naanay Yo'aakiinanne Sedek'iyaasa. 
1Chronicles3:17 Omoodettiide Baabloone beedda Yo'aakiina attuma naanay Salaatiyaala," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkkiraama, Padaaya, Shenaas'aara, Yik'aamiyaa, Hoshamaa'anne Nadaabiyaa." 
1Chronicles3:19 Padaaya attuma naanay Zarubaabeelanne Shima. Zarubaabeela attuma naanay Mashulaamanne Hanaaniyaa; unttunttu michchatta Shalomiito. 
1Chronicles3:20 Hawanttu bollan hara ichcheshu attuma naanay Zarubaabeelaw de'iino; unttunttukka Haashshuuba, Oheela, Berekiyaa, Hasaadiyaanne Yushaabi-Heseeda." 
1Chronicles3:21 Hanaaniyaa attuma naanay Palaas'iyaanne Yishaa'iyaa. Yishaa'iyaa na'ay Rafaaya; Rafaaya na'ay Arnnaana; Arnnaana na'ay Obaadiyaa; Obaadiyaa na'ay Shakaaniyaa; 
1Chronicles3:22 Shakaaniyaw usuppun naanay de'ee; Shamaa'iyaa giyaa Aa na'aynne na'aa naanatuu, Has's'uusha, Yigi'aala, Bariyaaha, Na'aariyaanne Shafaas'a." 
1Chronicles3:23 Na'aariyaa naanay heezzatuu Eliyoo'enaaya, Hizk'k'anne Azirik'aama." 
1Chronicles3:24 Eliyoo'enaaya naanay laappunatuu Hodaawiyaa, Eliyaashiba, Palaaya, Ak'k'uuba, Yohanaana, Dalaayanne Anaana." 
1Chronicles4:1 Yihudaa zaratuu Paareesa, Hes'iroona, Karmma, Huuranne Shobaala." 
1Chronicles4:2 Shobaala na'ay Ra'aayi Yahaata yeleedda; Yahaati Ahumaayanne Lahaada yeleedda. Hawanttu S'oratu yaratuwaa. 
1Chronicles4:3 Huuri bare daay Efiraatiw bayra na'aa; Huuri Beeteleheeme yeleedda. Es'aama attuma naanay Iziraa'eela, Yuushimanne Yidibaasha; unttunttu michchatta Has'ilelppoono. Panu'eeli Gadoora yeleedda. Es'eeri Huusha yeleedda. Hawanttu Huura yaratuwaa." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Tak'oa aawuwaa Ashihuuraw Heelonne Naa'iro geetettiyaa laau mac'c'a asatuu de'iino. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naa'ira Ahuzaama, Hefeera, Teminanne Ahashittaara Ashihuuraw yelaaddu; hawanttu Naa'iri naanaa." 
1Chronicles4:7 Heela S'eereta, S'oohaaranne Etinaana Ashihuuraw yelaaddu." 
1Chronicles4:8 K'oos'i Anuuba, s'obeebanne Haruuma na'aa Ahariheela yaratuwaa yeleedda." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yaabees'i bare ishatuwaa ubbaappe aad'd'i bonchchetee. Aa daaya, «Taani Aa iita yeluwaan yeleedda diraw, Aa suntsay Yaabees'a» gaade suntsaaddu." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yaabees'i Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa s'eesiide, «Abeet S'oossaw, hay taana neeni anjja; ta gadiyaakka aassa. Taananna ittippe gidaa; taana sakkennaadan taana k'ohiyaabaappe neeni naaga» yaagiide woosseedda. S'oossay Aa woosaa siseedda." 
1Chronicles4:11 Shuha ishay Kaluubi Mahiira yeleedda; Mahiiri Eshttoona yeleedda. 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshttooni Beetiraafa, Paaseehanne Tahinna yeleedda. Tahinni Iri-Nahaasha katamaa asaa yeleedda. Hawanttu Reeka gadiyaan de'eeddino." 
1Chronicles4:13 K'anaaza naanay Otini'eelanne Saraaya; Otini'eela naanay Hataatanne Ma'onootaaya. 
1Chronicles4:14 Ma'onootaayi Oofira yeleedda. Saraayi Yoo'aaba yeleedda. Yoo'aabe Je-Harashiima yeleedda; Kushiyaa Hiillanchatuwaa gidiyaa asatuwaa yeleedda. 
1Chronicles4:15 Yifune na'aa Kaaleeba naanay Ira, Elahinne Na'aama. Elah na'ay K'anaaza." 
1Chronicles4:16 Yihaali'eela naanay Ziifa, Ziifaaha, Tiirayanne Asaari'eela." 
1Chronicles4:17 Eezira naanay Yetera, Mereda, Efeeranne Yaaloona. Meredi Gibs'e kaatiyaa naatto Biito akkina iza Miiriyaamo, Shammaayanne Yishiba aw yelaaddu. Yishibi Eshttamoo'a yeleedda." 
1Chronicles4:18 Yihudaa gadiyaappe akkeedda machata Gadoora aawuwaa Yereedda, Sookko aawuwaa Hebeeranne Zaanoha aawuwaa Yak'iiti'eela Meredaw yelaaddu." 
1Chronicles4:19 Nahaama michchati, Hodiyaa machati naanay Gaariman de'eedda K'a'iila aawuwaanne Maa'ikan de'eedda Eshttamoo'a aawuwaa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Shimoona naanay Aminoona, Riinna, Benihanaananne Tiiloona. Yishi'a naanay Zoheetanne Benzzoheeta." 
1Chronicles4:21 Yihudaa na'aa Sheela zaratuu Leeka aawuwaa Eera, Mareesha aawuwaa Laa'idanne Beeti-Ashibee'a kataman de'iyaa suufiyaa geetettiyaa mayuwaa daddiyaawanttu yaratuwaa." 
1Chronicles4:22 Haratuu k'ay Yok'iima, Yo'aasha, Yaashubiliheema, Moo'aabe gadiyaa mooddeedda Saraafanne Kozeeba kataman de'eedda asatuwaa. Ha yeletaa mazggobay beni wodeppekka de'iyaawaa." 
1Chronicles4:23 Hawanttu Nas'a'iimaaninne Gadeeran de'eedda urk'k'aa med'd'iyaa asatuwaa. Unttunttu kaatiyaa kiitaa ootsanaw aanana ittippe de'eeddino. 
1Chronicles4:24 Simoona naanay Nemu'eela, Yaamiina, Yaariiba, Zaraahanne Shaa'ula." 
1Chronicles4:25 Shaa'ula na'ay Shaaluuma; Shaaluuma na'ay Mibssaama; Mibssaama na'ay Mishimaa'a; 
1Chronicles4:26 Mishimaa'a na'ay Hammu'eela; Hammu'eela na'ay Zakkuura; Zakkuura na'ay Shima. 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimaw tammanne usuppun attuma naanaynne usuppun mac'c'a naanay de'iino; shin Aa ishatoo c'ora naanay baawa. Yihudaa zaratuwaadan Simoona zaratuu c'orattibeykkino. 
1Chronicles4:28 Simoona zaratuu Berssaabeha katamaaninne Molaada, Has'aari-Shu'aala," 
1Chronicles4:29 Baala, Es'eema, Tolaadda," 
1Chronicles4:30 Baatu'eela, Horima, S'ik'ilaaga," 
1Chronicles4:31 Beeti-Markkaboota, Hos'aari-Susiima, Beetibiiranne Shaa'irayma katamatuwaan de'eeddino. Daawite kaatetana gakkanaw hawanttu unttunttu katamatuwaa gidiide de'eeddino." 
1Chronicles4:32 K'ay unttunttu mootsatuu Es'aama, Ayina, Rimoona, Tokeenanne Ashaana. Unttunttu ubbaanna ichcheshu katamatuwaa." 
1Chronicles4:33 Ba'aalaata gakkanaw, ha katamatuwaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa mootsatuu ubbay unttunttun gujettiino. Hawantta unttunttu de'eedda sa'aa unttunttu barenttu yeletaa maaran mazggobiyaan s'aafiide oyk'k'eeddino." 
1Chronicles4:34 Simoona yaratuu kaappatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttu Mashobaaba, Yaamileeka, Amesiyaasa na'aa Yoosha," 
1Chronicles4:35 Yuu'eelanne Yoshiibiyaa na'aa Yeeha. Yeehu aawuwaa aawuu Asa'eela na'aa Saraaya. 
1Chronicles4:36 Hara kaappatuu k'ay Eliyoo'enaaya, Yaa'ikooba, Yashohaaya, Asaaya, Adii'eela, Yashimi'eela, Banaayanne" 
1Chronicles4:37 Ziiza. Ziizi Shifa na'aa; Shifi Alloona na'aa; Allooni Yadaaya na'aa; Yadaayi Shiimira na'aa; Shiimiri Shamaa'iyaa na'aa. 
1Chronicles4:38 Simoona yaratuu kaappatuu hawantta. Unttunttu aawotuwaa zeretsay loytsi c'oratteedda. 
1Chronicles4:39 Unttunttu barenttu mehiyaw heemmiyaa sa'aa koyanaw Gadoora geliyaa sa'aa matan de'iyaa wombbaw away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa sa'aa gakkanaw beeddino. 
1Chronicles4:40 Itti loytsi araddeeda loo heemmiyaa sa'aa demmeeddino; he biittay woppaynne sarotetsay kumeedda aako biittaa. Beni wode he gadiyaan de'eeddawantu Kaama zeretsatuwaa. 
1Chronicles4:41 Hawaappe k'ommo baggana suntsay s'aafetteedda Simoona zaratuu Yihudaa Kaatiyaa Hizk'k'iyaasa wode Gadoora gadiyaa biide, yaan de'iyaa Kaama zeretsatuwaanne Ma'uuna asatuwaa olettiide d'aysseeddino. He gadiyaan unttunttu mehiyaw heemmiyaa sa'ay de'iyaa diraw, Simoona zaratuu hachche gatsanaw yaan utteeddino." 
1Chronicles4:42 Simoona zaratuwaappe ichcheshu s'eetu asatuu Se'iira Deriyaakko beeddino. Unttunttu kaappatuu Palaas'iyaa, Na'aariyaa, Rafaayanne Uuzi'eela; unttunttu Yishi'a naanaa." 
1Chronicles4:43 Amaaleek'a asatuwaappe kase bak'ati atteeddawantta Simoona asatuu d'aysseeddino. Unttunttu hachche gakkanaw he biittan de'iino. 
1Chronicles5:1 Israa'eeliyaa na'aa bayiraa Roobeela yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. Roobeeli bayira na'aa; shin bare aawuwaa gisuwaa I tunisseedda diraw, bayiratetsaw bessiyaabay Israa'eeliyaa na'aa Yooseefo naanaw imetteedda. Hewaa diraw, I yeletaan bayira gideeddawe s'aafettibeenna." 
1Chronicles5:2 Yihuday bare ishatuwaappe minneedda; Aa bayiratetsay Yooseefoo imetteeddawaa gidooppenne, Israa'eeliyaa asaa mooddiyaawe Yihudaappe kesseedda." 
1Chronicles5:3 Israa'eeliyaa na'aa bayiraa Roobeela attuma naanay Hanooka, Paala, Hes'iroonanne Karmma." 
1Chronicles5:4 Yuu'eela na'ay Shamaa'iyaa; Shamaa'iyaa na'ay Googa; Googa na'ay Shima; 
1Chronicles5:5 Shima na'ay Mikiyaasa; Mikiyaasa na'ay Ra'aaya; Ra'aaya na'ay Ba'aala. 
1Chronicles5:6 Ba'aala na'ay Asoore Kaatiyaa Tigilaati-Paleseeri omoodiide afeedda Ba'eera; Ba'eeri Roobeela zaratuwaa kaappuwaa. 
1Chronicles5:7 Ba'eera dabbotuu, barenttu yeletaa mazggobiyaan s'aafetteedda Roobeela yaratuu kaappatuu Yi'i'eela, Zakkaraasanne" 
1Chronicles5:8 Belaa'a. Belaa'i Azaaza na'aa; Azaazii Shemaa'a na'aa; Shemaa'i Yuu'eela zariyaa. Yuu'eela zaratuu Aaro'eera kataman, Nabo biittaaninne Ba'aali-Ma'oona gadiyaan de'eeddino." 
1Chronicles5:9 Roobeela zaratuwaa mehii Gala'aaden c'oratteedda diraw, unttunttu yaappe away doliyaa bagga biide, Efiraas'iisa Shaafaa gakkanaw mic'eteedda mela biittaan utteeddino." 
1Chronicles5:10 Saa'oola laytsan Aggaaratuwaa yaratuwaanna Roobeela yaratuu olettina, Roobeela yaratuu s'ooneeddino. Gala'aadeppe away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa Aggaaratuwaa yaratuu gadiyaan utteeddino." 
1Chronicles5:11 Gaade zaratuu Roobeela zaratuwaappe huup'issa baggan, Salaaka gakkanaw de'iyaa Baasaane gadiyaan utteeddino." 
1Chronicles5:12 Yuu'eeli koyro yaratoo kaappuwaa; Shafaami laa'entso yaratoo kaappuwaa. Yaa'inaaynne Shafaas'i Baasaanen utteedda yaratoo kaappatuwaa. 
1Chronicles5:13 Unttunttu dabbotuu, laappun yaratuwaa kaappatuu, Mikaa'eela, Mashulaama, Saaba, Yoraaya, Yaa'ikaana, Zii'anne Ebeera." 
1Chronicles5:14 Hawanttu Abihayila naanay Buuza zeretsaa. Buuzi Yaahida yeleedda; Yaahidi Yeshishaaya yeleedda; Yeshishaayi Mikaa'eela yeleedda; Mikaa'eeli Gala'aade yeleedda; Gala'aade Yaarooha yeleedda; Yaaroohi Huura yeleedda; Huuri Abihayila yeleedda. 
1Chronicles5:15 Unttunttu aawotuwaa soo kaappuu Guna na'aa na'aa Abddi'eela na'aa Aaha. 
1Chronicles5:16 Unttunttu Gala'aadeninne Baasaanen he biittatuwaa katamatuwaaninne Saaroona gadiyaan mehii heemettiyaa gishuwaan utteeddino. 
1Chronicles5:17 Hawanttu ubbaa yeletay Yihudaa Kaatiyaa Yo'aataama wodenne Israa'eeliyaa Kaatiyaa Iyorbbaama wode yeletaa mazggobiyaan s'aafetteedda. 
1Chronicles5:18 Roobeela zaratuwaappe, Gaade zaratuwaappenne Minaase zaratuwaappe baggatuwaappe olanchchatuu, wolk'k'aamatuu, gonddalliyaanne mashshaa oyk'k'iyaawanttu, wonddaafiyaan dukan looheeddawanttunne olaa salppiyaa eriyaawanttu oytamanne oyddu sha""anne laappun s'eetanne usuppun tamma." 
1Chronicles5:19 Unttunttu Aggaaratuwaa yaratuwaanna, Yis'uratuwaana, Naafiishatuwaanne Nodaabatuwaanna oletteeddino." 
1Chronicles5:20 Unttunttu he asatuwaana olettiide, S'oossaakko waasseedda diraw, maaduwaa demmeeddino. Unttunttu S'oossan ammanetteeda diraw, I unttunttoo woosetteedda. Hewaa diraw, Aggaaratuwaa yaratuwaanne unttunttunna de'iyaa haratuu unttunttu kushiyan geleeddino." 
1Chronicles5:21 Barenttu morkkatuwaappe ishatamu shaa gaalotuwaa, laa""u s'eetanne ishatamu sha""a dorssatuwaa, laa""u sha""a haretuwaanne s'eetu sha""a asatuwaa omoodiide afeedino." 
1Chronicles5:22 Olay S'oossaawaa gideedda diraw, daratu hayk'k'eeddino. S'ooneeddawanttu omooduwaa wodii gakkanaasikka he asatuwaa kotan utteeddino." 
1Chronicles5:23 Minaase zaratuwaappe bakka yaratuu Baasaaneppe doommiide, Ba'aali-Hermmoone, Saniiranne Hermmoone Deriyaa gakkanaw de'iyaa he biittatuwaan utteeddino; unttunttu he gishuwaan c'oratteeddino." 
1Chronicles5:24 Unttunttu aawotuwaa soy kaappatuu Efeera, Yishi'a, Eli'eela, Aziri'eela, Ermaasa, Hodaawiyaanne Yaahidi'eela. Hawanttu unttunttu aawuwaa gollen eretteedda, s'alanne wolk'k'aama asatuwaa." 
1Chronicles5:25 Shin ha zaratuu barenttu aawotuwaa S'oossaa naak'k'eddino; S'oossay unttunttu sintsaappe d'aysseedda he gadiyaa asatuwaa s'oossatuwaanna shaarmus'eeddino. 
1Chronicles5:26 Hewaa diraw, Israa'eeliyaa S'oossay Tigilaati-Paleseera woy Puula geetettiyaa Asoore kaatiyaa ayaanaa dentsetseedda. Yaatiide Roobeela zeretsaa, Gaade zaratuwaanne Minaase zaratuwaappe baggatuwaa omoodiide, Halaaha, Habooranne Haara biittatuwaanne Gozaana Shaafaa afeedda. Unttunttu hachche gakkanaw yaan de'iino." 
1Chronicles6:1 Leewiyaa naanay Gershshoona, K'ahaatanne Maraara." 
1Chronicles6:2 K'ahaata naanay Amiraama, Yis'ihaara, Kebroonanne Uuzi'eela." 
1Chronicles6:3 Amiraama naanay Aaroona, Musanne Miiriyaamo. Aaroona naanay Nadaaba, Abiiha, El""aazaranne Itaamaara." 
1Chronicles6:4 Elaazare Piinihaasa yeleedda; Piinihaasi Abishuu'a yeleedda; Abishuu'i Buuk'a yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:5 Buuk'i Uuza yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:6 Uuzi Zaraahiyaa yeleedda; Zaraahe Maraayoota yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:7 Maraayooti Amaariyaa yeleedda; Amaari Ahis'uuba yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:8 Ahis'uubi S'aadook'a yeleedda; S'aadook'e Ahima'aas'a yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:9 Ahima'aas'i Azaariyaasa yeleedda; Azaariyaasi Yohanaana yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:10 Yohanaani Azaariyaasa yeleedda. Solomone Yerusaalamen kees'isseedda Geeshsha Golliyaa ootseedda k'eesii Azaariyaasa. 
1Chronicles6:11 Azaariyaasi Amaariyaa yeleedda; Amaari Ahis'uuba yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:12 Ahis'uubi S'aadook'a yeleedda; S'aadook'e Shaaluuma yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:13 Shaaluumi Hilk'k'iyaa yeleedda; Hilk'k'ii Azaariyaasa yeleedda; 
1Chronicles6:14 Azaariyaasi Saraaya yeleedda; Saraayi Yos'edeek'a yeleedda. 
1Chronicles6:15 Med'inaa Goday Yihudaanne Yerusaalame Naabukadanas'ooran omoodisseedda wode Yos'edeek'ikka omoodettiide beedda. 
1Chronicles6:16 Leewiyaa naanay Gershshoona, K'ahaatanne Maraara." 
1Chronicles6:17 Gershshoona naanatuwaa suntsay Liibinanne Shima. 
1Chronicles6:18 K'ahaata naanay Amiraama, Yis'ihaara, Kebroonanne Uuzi'eela." 
1Chronicles6:19 Maraara naanay Maahilanne Musha. Barenttu aawuwaa gollen gollen s'aafetteedda Leewatuu yaratuu hawantta. 
1Chronicles6:20 Gershshoona na'ay Liibina; Liibina na'ay Yahaata; Yahaata na'ay Ziimma. 
1Chronicles6:21 Ziimma na'ay Yo'aaha; Yo'aaha na'ay Idda; Iddo na'ay Zaraaha; Zaraaha na'ay Ya'atiraaya. 
1Chronicles6:22 K'ahaata na'ay Aminaadaaba; Aminaadaaba na'ay K'oraaha; K'oraaha na'ay Asiira; 
1Chronicles6:23 Asiira na'ay Elk'k'aana; Elk'k'aana na'ay Ebiyaasaafa; Ebiyaasaafa na'ay Asiira; 
1Chronicles6:24 Asiira na'ay Tahaata; Tahaata na'ay Uri'eela; Uri'eela na'ay Uuziyaana; Uuziyaana na'ay Shaa'ula. 
1Chronicles6:25 Elk'k'aana naanay Amaasaayanne Ahimoota. 
1Chronicles6:26 Ahimoota na'ay Elk'k'aana; Elk'k'aana na'ay S'ofaaya; S'ofaaya na'ay Nahaata; 
1Chronicles6:27 Nahaata na'ay Eli'aaba; Eli'aaba na'ay Yirohaama; Yirohaama na'ay Elk'k'aana. 
1Chronicles6:28 Sammeela na'ay bayiray Yuu'eela; teefay Abiiya. 
1Chronicles6:29 Maraara na'ay Maahila; Maahila na'ay Liibina; Liibina na'ay Shima; Shima na'ay Uuza; 
1Chronicles6:30 Uuza na'ay Shima; Shima na'ay Haggiiya; Haggiiya na'ay Asaaya. 
1Chronicles6:31 Daawite Taabootaa Yerusaalame aheeddawaappe guyyiyaan, mazimuriyaa yes's'anaadan Med'inaa Godaw gollen suntseeddawantu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino." 
1Chronicles6:32 Solomone Yerusaalamen Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa kees's'ana gakkanaw, S'oossaa Taabootay de'iyaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsan unttunttu mazimuriyaa yes's'iidde, kaalaan kaalaan ootsino." 
1Chronicles6:33 Barenttu naanatuwaanna ittippe yes's'eeddawanttu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. K'ahaata yaratuwaappe yes's'iyaawe Hemaana. Hemaani Yuu'eela na'aa; Yuu'eeli Sammeela na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:34 Sammeeli Elk'k'aana na'aa; Elk'k'aani Yirohaama na'aa; Yirohaami Eli'eela na'aa; Eli'eeli Tooha na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:35 Toohi S'ufa na'aa; S'ufi Elk'k'aana na'aa; Elk'k'aani Mahaata na'aa; Mahaati Amaasaaya na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:36 Amaasaayi Elk'k'aana na'aa; Elk'k'aani Yuu'eela na'aa; Yuu'eeli Azaariyaasa na'aa; Azaariyaasi S'afaaniyaa na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:37 S'afaanii Tahaata na'aa; Tahaati Asiira na'aa; Asiiri Ebiyaasaafa na'aa; Ebiyaasaafi K'oraaha na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:38 K'oraahi Yis'ihaara na'aa; Yis'ihaari K'ahaata na'aa; K'ahaati Leewiyaa na'aa; Leewii Israa'eeliyaa na'aa. 
1Chronicles6:39 Aa dabbuu Asaafe Aa ushechcha baggana ek'k'ee. Asaafe Berekiyaa na'aa; Berekii Shima na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:40 Shimi Mikaa'eela na'aa; Mikaa'eeli Ba'iseeya na'aa; Ba'iseeyi Malkkiyaa na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:41 Malkkii Etaana na'aa; Etaani Zaraaha na'aa; Zaraahi Adaaya na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:42 Adaayi Etaana na'aa; Etaani Ziimma na'aa; Ziimmi Shima na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:43 Shimi Yahaata na'aa; Yahaati Gershshoona na'aa; Gershshooni Leewiyaa na'aa. 
1Chronicles6:44 Unttunttuppe haddirssa bagganna unttunttu dabbotuu, Maraara yaratuu ek'k'iino. Etaani K'iisha na'aa; K'iishi Abdda na'aa; Abddi Malluuka na'aa;" 
1Chronicles6:45 Malluuki Hashaabiyaa na'aa; Hashaabii Amesiyaasa na'aa; Amesiyaasi Hilk'k'iyaa na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:46 Hilk'k'ii Amoos'a na'aa; Amoos'i Baana na'aa; Baani Shemeera na'aa; 
1Chronicles6:47 Shemeeri Maahila na'aa; Maahili Musha na'aa; Mushi Maraara na'aa; Maraari Leewiyaa na'aa. 
1Chronicles6:48 Unttunttu dabbotuu Leewatuu S'oossaa Dunkkaaniyaw ootsanaw suntsetteeddino. 
1Chronicles6:49 Shin Aaroonenne Aaroona zeretsatuu is'aanaa c'uwayiino; yarshshiyaa sa'aan s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaakka yarshshiino. S'oossaa k'oomay Muse azazeeddawaadan, Ubbaappe Aad'd'iyaa Geeshsha Sa'aan goynniyaa goynno ubbawunne S'oossay Israa'eeliyaa nagaraa atto geetettiyaa yarshshoo aawotetsay unttunttoo de'ee." 
1Chronicles6:50 Aaroona yeletay hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa. Aaroona na'ay Elaazara; Elaazara na'ay Piinihaasa; Piinihaasa na'ay Abishuu'a; 
1Chronicles6:51 Abishuu'a na'ay Buuk'a; Buuk'a na'ay Uuza; Uuza na'ay Zaraahiyaa. 
1Chronicles6:52 Zaraahiyaa na'ay Maraayoota; Maraayoota na'ay Amaariyaa; Amaariyaa na'ay Ahis'uuba; 
1Chronicles6:53 Ahis'uuba na'ay S'aadook'a; S'aadook'a na'ay Ahima'aas'a. 
1Chronicles6:54 Aaroona zaratuu barenttu zawaa giddon de'anaw unttunttu utetsaadan unttunttoo imetteedda sa'atuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. K'ahaata yaratuu koyro saamaa akkeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:55 He saaman Yihudaan de'iyaa Kebroone katamaanne Kebroone yuushshuwaan de'iyaa hentsaa gadetuwaa unttunttoo immeeddino; 
1Chronicles6:56 shin katamaa goshshaanne katamaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa mootsatuwaa Yifune na'aa Kaaleebaw immeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:57 Aaroona naanaw Asay bak'ati biide attiyaa katamaa, Kebroonenne Hara katamatuwaa Yatira, Liibinanne Eshttamoo'a Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:58 Hiilenanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Dabiiranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:59 Ashaananne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Beeti-Shemeshanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa immeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:60 K'ay Biiniyaama zaratuwaappe Gebaa'anne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Alemetanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Anatootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa immeeddino. Aaroona naanaw imetteedda katamatuu ubbaanna tammanne heezza." 
1Chronicles6:61 Minaase yaratuu baggatuu gadiyaappe tammu katamatuwaa atteeda K'ahaata yaratoo saaman immeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:62 Yisaakoora zaratuwaa gadiyaappe, Aaseera zaratuwaa gadiyaappe, Nifttaaleema zaratuwaa biittaappenne Baasaanen de'iyaa Minaase yaratuu gadiyaappe tammanne heezzu katamatuwaa Gershshoona yaratoo saaman immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:63 Roobeela zaratuwaa gadiyaappe, Gaade zaratuwaa biittaappenne Zaabiloona zaratuwaa gadiyaappe tammanne laa""u katamatuwaa Maraara yaratoo saaman immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:64 Hewaadan ootsiide, Israa'eeliyaa Asay Leewatoo ha katamatuwaanne katamatuwaa heeraan de'iyaa hentsaa gadetuwaa immeedda." 
1Chronicles6:65 K'ay Yihudaa zaratuwaa gadiyaappe, Simoona zaratuwaa biittaappenne Biiniyaama zaratuwaa gadiyaappe, hawaappe k'ommo baggana barenttu suntsan s'aafetteedda katamatuwaa unttunttoo saaman immeedda." 
1Chronicles6:66 K'ahaata yaratuwaappe amareedawanttu barenttu katamatuwaa Efireema zaratuwaa katamatuwaappe akkeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:67 Unttunttoo Asay bak'ati biide attiyaa katamatuwaa, Efireema gezziyaan de'iyaa Sekeemanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Gezeeranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:68 Yok'ima'aamanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Beeti-Horoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:69 Ayaaloonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Gaate-Rimmoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa immeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:70 Minaase zaratuwaa baggatuwaappe Aneeranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Bilaamanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide, K'ahaata yaratuwaappe atteeddawanttoo immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:71 Minaase zaratuwaa baggatuwaappe Baasaanen de'iyaa Golaananne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Asttaarootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide, Gershshoona yaratoo immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:72 K'ay Yisaakoora zaratuwaappe K'aadeesanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Dabiraatanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:73 Raamootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Aaneemanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide, unttunttoo immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:74 K'aykka Aaseera zaratuwaappe Maashaalanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Abddoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:75 Huk'ook'anne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Rahoobanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide, unttunttoo immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:76 Hewaadankka Nifttaaleema zaratuwaappe Galiilan de'iyaa K'edeeshanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Hammoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne K'iriyaatayimanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide, unttunttoo immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:77 Atteeda Maraara yaratoo Zaabiloona zaratuwaappe Rimmoonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Taabooranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide immeeddino. 
1Chronicles6:78 K'ay Roobeela zaratuwaappe Yaarikko baggan, Yorddaanoosappe hefintsan away doliyaa baggana, mela biittaan de'iyaa Bee'eranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Yaahi'anne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:79 K'idemootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Mefa'aatanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide, unttunttoo immeeddino." 
1Chronicles6:80 K'aykka Gaade zaratuwaappe Gala'aaden de'iyaa Raamootanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa, Maahinaymanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa," 
1Chronicles6:81 Haseboonanne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaanne Yaa'izeeranne Aa hentsaa gadetuwaa akkiide unttunttoo immeeddino. 
1Chronicles7:1 Yisaakooraw oyddu naanay de'iino; unttunttukka Tolaa'a, Puuwa, Yaashuubanne Shimiroona." 
1Chronicles7:2 Tolaa'a naanay Uuza, Rafaaya, Yirii'eela, Yaahimaaya, Yibisaamanne Sammeela; unttunttu Tolaa'a yaratuu kaappatuwaa. Unttunttu wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa. Daawita wode unttuntta paydu laatamanne laa""u sha""anne usuppun s'eeta." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uuza na'ay Yiziraahiyaa. Yiziraahiyaa naanay Mikaa'eela, Obaadiyaa, Yuu'eelanne Yishiyaa; ha ichcheshatuukka soy asaa kaappatuwaa." 
1Chronicles7:4 Barenttu aawotuwaa soy asaa yeletaadan olaw giigeedda olanchchatuu hattamanne usuppun shaa; ayaw gooppe, unttunttoo c'ora machchetuunne c'ora naanay de'iino." 
1Chronicles7:5 Yisaakoora zaratuwaappe olanchchatuu barenttu yeletaa mazggobiyaan paydettiide, ubbaanna hosppun tammanne laappun sha""a gideeddino." 
1Chronicles7:6 Biiniyaamaw heezzu naanay de'iino; unttunttukka Belaa'a, Bekeeranne Yidi'eela." 
1Chronicles7:7 Belaa'a naanay Es'iboona, Uuza, Uuzi'eela, Yaarimootanne Ira; ha ichcheshatuukka soy asaa kaappatuwaa. Unttunttu wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa. Barenttu yeletaadan paydeteedda olanchchatuu laatamanne laa""u sha""anne hattamanne oydda gideeddino." 
1Chronicles7:8 Bekeera naanay Zamiira, Yo'aasha, El""eezera, Eliyoo'enaaya, Omira, Yaarimoota, Abiiya, Anatootanne Alemeeta; hawanttu ubbatuu Bekeera naanaa." 
1Chronicles7:9 Barenttu yeletaa mazggobiyaadan paydeteedda wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuu laatamu shaanne laau s'eeta gideeddino. 
1Chronicles7:10 Yidi'eela na'ay Bilihaana. Bilihaana naanay Yi'uusha, Biiniyaama, Ehuuda, Kanaa'ina, Zetaana, Tarsseesanne Ahishahaara;" 
1Chronicles7:11 hawanttu ubbatuu Yidi'eela naanaa. Unttunttu soy asaa kaappatuwaanne wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa. Barenttu yeletaadan paydeteedda olanchchatuu tammanne laappun shaanne laau s'eeta. 
1Chronicles7:12 K'ay Shufiiminne Hufiimi Ira naanaa. Hushiimi Daana na'aa. 
1Chronicles7:13 Nifttaaleema naanay Yaahis'i'eela, Guuna, Yes'eeranne Shaaluuma; hawanttu Baali naanaa naanaa." 
1Chronicles7:14 Minaase zaratuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Minaase Sooriyaa gadiyaappe akkeedda k'ubaatata yeleedda attuma naanay Asiri'eelanne Gala'aade aawuwaa Maakiina. 
1Chronicles7:15 Maakiiri Hufiimaassinne Shufiimassi itti itti machchiyaa oochchiide immeedda. Maakiina michchati suntsay Maa'iko. Maakiina na'ay teefay S'alofihaada. S'alofihaad mac'c'a naanatuwaa s'alalaa yeleedda. 
1Chronicles7:16 Maakiina machata Maa'ika aw naanaa yelaaddu. Bayira na'aa Peresha suntsaaddu; Peresha ishaa suntsay Shereesha. Peresha naanay Ulaamanne Rak'eema. 
1Chronicles7:17 Ulaama na'ay Badaana. Hawanttu Minaase na'aa na'aa, Maakiina na'aa Gala'aade zeretsaa." 
1Chronicles7:18 Gala'aade michchata Hamolekeeta Ishooda, Abi'eezeranne Maahila yelaaddu." 
1Chronicles7:19 Shamidaa'a naanay Ahiyaana, Shekeema, Liik'ihanne Ani'aama." 
1Chronicles7:20 Efireema na'ay Shutelaaha; Shutelaaha na'ay Bereeda; Bereeda na'ay Tahaata; Tahaata na'ay Elaada; Elaada na'ay Tahaata; 
1Chronicles7:21 Tahaata na'ay Zabaada; Zabaada na'ay Shutelaaha. Efireemaw Ezeeranne Elaada geetettiyaa hara laau naanay de'iino. Unttunttu Gaate katamaa asatuwaa mehiyaa wuuishin, Asay unttuntta oyk'k'iide wod'eedda." 
1Chronicles7:22 Hewaa diraw, unttunttu aawuu Efireeme daro wodiyaa kayyotteedda; kayyottina Aa ishatuu Aa mintsetsanaw yeeddino." 
1Chronicles7:23 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, I bare machchattina gaketteedda; Iza shahaaraade attuma na'aa yelaaddu. Efireema soo gakkeedda iita metuwaa diraw, I bare na'aa Barii'a suntseedda." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efireemaw She'iiro giyaa naatta de'aw; Hirkki Beeti-Horoona, K'ommuwaa Beeti-Horoonanne Uzenishe'iira geetettiyaa katamatuwaa he naatta kees's'aaddu." 
1Chronicles7:25 Efireema attuma na'ay Refaaha; Refaaha na'ay Resheefa; Resheefa na'ay Telaaha; Telaaha na'ay Tahaana; 
1Chronicles7:26 Tahaana na'ay La'idaana; La'idaana na'ay Amihuuda; Amihuuda na'ay Elishamaa'a; 
1Chronicles7:27 Elishamaa'a na'ay Nawa; Neewe na'ay Iyyaasa. 
1Chronicles7:28 Efireema zaratuwaa biittay unttunttu de'iyaasay Beeteelenne Beeteele mootsatuwaa, away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa Na'iraana, away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa Gezeeranne Gezeera mootsatuwaa, Shekeemanne Shekeema mootsatuwaanne Aayanne Aaya mootsatuwaa." 
1Chronicles7:29 K'ay Minaase zaratuwaa biittaa zawaan de'iyaa Beetishaananne Beetishaana mootsatuwaa, Taa'inaakkanne Taa'inaaka mootsatuwaa, Magidonne Magido mootsatuwaanne Dooranne Doora mootsatuwaa. Israa'eeliyaa na'aa Yooseefo zaratuu ha katamatuwaan de'eeddino." 
1Chronicles7:30 Aaseera attuma naanay Yimina, Yishiwaaha, Yishiwaanne Barii'a; unttunttu michchata Seraaho." 
1Chronicles7:31 Barii'a attuma naanay Hebeeranne Birzzaawita aawuwaa Malkki'eela. 
1Chronicles7:32 Hebeeri Yaafilees'a, Shomeeranne Hotaama yeleedda; unttunttu michchati suntsay Shuu'o." 
1Chronicles7:33 Yaafilees'a attuma naanay Paasaaka, Bimihaalanne Ashiwaata; hawanttu Yaafilees'a naanaa." 
1Chronicles7:34 Yaafilees'a ishaa Shomeera attuma naanay Aaha, Rohiga, Yahuubanne Araama." 
1Chronicles7:35 Aa ishaa Hotaama attuma naanay S'ofaaha, Yiminaa'a, Sheleeshanne Amaala." 
1Chronicles7:36 S'ofaaha attuma naanay Suha, Harnneefera, Shu'aala, Beera, Yimira," 
1Chronicles7:37 Bees'era, Hooda, Shamma, Shilshsha, Yitiraananne Ba'eera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Yetera attuma naanay Yifuna, Pisppanne Aara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Ulla attuma naanay Araaha, Hani'eelanne Riis'iyaa." 
1Chronicles7:40 Hawanttu ubbatuu Aaseera zeretsaa. Unttunttu barenttu aawotuwaa soy asaa kaappatuwaanne dooretteedda wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa. Barenttu yeletaadan paydeteedda olanchchatuu laatamanne usuppun shaaa gideeddino. 
1Chronicles8:1 Biiniyaama na'ay bayiray Belaa'a; teefay Ashibeela; heezzentsuu Ahiraaha; 
1Chronicles8:2 oyddentsuu Noha; ichcheshentsu Raafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Belaa'a attuma naanay Adaara, Geera, Abihuuda," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishuu'a, Naa'imaana, Ahooha," 
1Chronicles8:5 Geera, Shafufaamanne Huraama." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ehuuda attuma naanay Naa'imaana, Akiiyanne Geera. Unttunttu Gebaa'an de'eedda barenttu aawotuwaa soy asaa kaappatuwaa. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, unttunttu Manahaata gadiyaa omoodetti beeddino. Unttunttu kaappuu Geeri Uuzanne Ahihuuda aawuwaa." 
1Chronicles8:7  
1Chronicles8:8 Shaharaami bare machatuwaa Hushiimonne Baa'iro yeddeeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Moo'aabe gadiyaan attuma naanaa yeleedda." 
1Chronicles8:9 Shaharaami bare machati Hodeeshin Yobaaba, S'iibiyaa, Meesha, Malkkaama," 
1Chronicles8:10 Ya'uus'a, Saakiyaanne Mirmma yeleedda. Aa naanay ubbay soy asaa kaappatuwaa gideeddino." 
1Chronicles8:11 I bare machati Hushiimin, Ahis'uubanne Elppa'aala yeleedda." 
1Chronicles8:12 Elppa'aala attuma naanay Ebeera, Misha'aamanne Shemeda. Shemedi Oonanne Looda katamatuwaanne unttunttu heeraan de'iyaa mootsatuwaa kees's'eedda." 
1Chronicles8:13 K'ay Shaharaami Barii'anne Shemaa'a yeleedda. Unttunttu Ayaaloona kataman de'iyaa barenttu soy asaa kaappatuwaa. Unttunttu Gaate kataman de'iyaa asaa yedersseeddino. 
1Chronicles8:14 K'aykka Shaharaami Ahiyaa, Shaashak'a, Yiremoota yeleedda." 
1Chronicles8:15 Zabaade, Araadi, Edeeri," 
1Chronicles8:16 Mikaa'eeli, Yishppinne Yoohi Barii'a attuma naanaa." 
1Chronicles8:17 Zabaade, Mashulaami, Hizk'k'i, Hebeeri," 
1Chronicles8:18 Yishimaraayi, Yuzilii'inne Yobaabi Elppa'aala attuma naanaa." 
1Chronicles8:19 Yaak'iimi, Ziikiri, Zabddi," 
1Chronicles8:20 Eli'enaayi, S'ilttaayi, Eli'eeli," 
1Chronicles8:21 Adaayi, Baraayinne Shiimiraati Shim""a attuma naanaa." 
1Chronicles8:22 Yishp'p'aani, Ebeeri, Eli'eeli," 
1Chronicles8:23 Abddooni, Ziikiri, Hanaani," 
1Chronicles8:24 Hanaaniyaa, Elaami, Anttootii," 
1Chronicles8:25 Yifidaaynne Panu'eeli Shaashak'a attuma naanaa. 
1Chronicles8:26 Shaamisharaayi, Shahaari, Ataalii," 
1Chronicles8:27 Yaa'ireeshii, Eelaasinne Ziikiri Yirohaama attuma naanaa." 
1Chronicles8:28 Hawanttu barenttu yeletaan Yerusaalamen utteedda barenttu soy asaa kaappatuwaa. 
1Chronicles8:29 Gabaa'oona aawuu Yi'i'eeli Gabaa'oona kataman de'eedda. Aa machchatti suntsay Maa'iko. 
1Chronicles8:30 Aa na'ay bayiray Abddoona; Aa attuma naanay haratuu S'uura, K'iisa, Ba'aala, Nadaaba," 
1Chronicles8:31 Gadoora, Ahiyaa, Zekeranne" 
1Chronicles8:32 Mik'iloota. Mik'ilooti Shima yeleedda. Hawanttu k'ay Yerusaalamen de'iyaa barenttu dabbattuu matan de'eeddino. 
1Chronicles8:33 Neeri K'iisa yeleedda; K'iisi Saa'oola yeleedda. Saa'ooli Yoonataana, Malkkishuu'a, Abinaadaabanne Eshiba'aala yeleedda." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yoonataana na'ay Mariiba'aala; Mariiba'aali Mikiyaasa yeleedda. 
1Chronicles8:35 Mikiyaasa attuma naanay Pittoona, Meleka, Taree'anne Akaaza." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akaazi Yaho'aada yeleedda. Yaho'aad Alemeeta, Azimaaweetuwaanne Zimira yeleedda. Zimiri Moos'a yeleedda;" 
1Chronicles8:37 Moos'i Biini'a yeleedda; Biini'i Raafa yeleedda; Raafi Elaasa yeleedda; Elaasi As'eela yeleedda. 
1Chronicles8:38 As'eelaw usuppun attuma naanay de'iino. Unttunttu suntsay Azirik'aama, Bookera, Isimaa'eela, Sha'aariyaa, Obaadiyaanne Hanaana; hawanttu ubbay As'eela naanaa." 
1Chronicles8:39 As'eela ishaa Esheek'aw heezzu naanay de'iino. Aa na'ay bayiray Ulaama; teefay Yi'uusha; heezzentsuu Elifelees'a. 
1Chronicles8:40 Ulaama naanay wolk'k'aamanne s'ala asatuwaa; unttunttu wonddaafiyaa asatuwaa. Ulaamaw s'eetanne ishatamuwaa gidiyaa naanaynne naanaa naanay de'iino. Hawanttu ubbatuu Biiniyaama zeretsaa. 
1Chronicles9:1 Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay bare yeletaan yeletaan s'aafetteedda; ha taarikii Israa'eeliyaa Kaatetuu mas'aafan de'ee. Yihudaa Asay ammanettibeenna diraw, Baabloone gadiyaa omoodetti beeddino." 
1Chronicles9:2 Koyro simmeedda Israa'eeliyaa asay, k'eesatuu, Leewatuunne Geeshsha Golliyaan ootsiyaawanttu barenttu sa'atuwaaninne barenttu katamatuwaan utteeddino." 
1Chronicles9:3 Yihudaa zaratuwaappe, Biiniyaama zaratuwaappe, Efireema zaratuwaappenne Minaase zaratuwaappe amareedawanttu Yerusaalamen de'eeddino." 
1Chronicles9:4 Yihudaa na'aa Paareesa yaratuwaappe Utaayi Yerusaalamen utteeddawanttu kaappuwaa. Utaayi Amihuuda na'aa; Amihuudi Omira na'aa; Omiri Imira na'aa; Imiri Baana na'aa. 
1Chronicles9:5 Yihudaa na'aa Sheela yaratuwaappe Asaayinne Aa naanay Yerusaalamen utteeddawanttu kaappatuwaa. 
1Chronicles9:6 Yihudaa na'aa Zaraaha yaratuwaappe Yi'u'eeli Yerusaalamen utteeddawanttu kaappuwaa. Yihudaa zaratuu paydina ubbaanna usuppun s'eetanne udduppun tamma. 
1Chronicles9:7 Biiniyaama yaratuu kaappatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino. Kaappuu Saalu Mashulaama na'aa; Mashulaami Hodaawiyaa na'aa; Hodaawii Hassanuu'a na'aa. Kaappuu Yibinaayi Yirohaama na'aa. Kaappuu Eeli Uuza na'aa; Uuzi Miikira na'aa. Kaappuu Mashulaami Shafaayaa na'aa; Shafaas'i Ra'u'eela na'aa; Ra'u'eeli Yibiniyaa na'aa. Biiniyaama zaratuu paydina ubbaanna udduppun s'eetanne ishatamanne usuppuna. 
1Chronicles9:8  
1Chronicles9:9  
1Chronicles9:10 Yerusaalamen de'eedda k'eesatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttu Yadaaya, Yihoyaariba, Yaakiinanne" 
1Chronicles9:11 S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan kaappotiyaa Azaariyaasa. Azaariyaasi Hilk'k'iyaa na'aa; Hilk'k'ii Mashulaama na'aa; Mashulaami S'aadook'a na'aa; S'aadook'e Maraayoota na'aa; Maraayooti Ahis'uuba na'aa. 
1Chronicles9:12 Haratuu k'ay Yirohaama na'aa Adaayanne Adii'eela na'aa Ma'isaaya. Yirohaami Paashihuura na'aa; Paashihuuri Malkkiyaa na'aa. Adii'eeli Yaahizeera na'aa; Yaahizeeri Mashulaama na'aa; Mashulaami Mashilemiita na'aa; Mashilemiiti Imeera na'aa. 
1Chronicles9:13 Barenttu soy asaw kaappotiyaa k'eesatuu itti shaanne laappun s'eetanne usuppun tamma. Hawanttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaan ootsanaw danddayiyaa asatuwaa. 
1Chronicles9:14 Yerusaalamen de'eedda Leewatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Haashshuuba na'ay Shamaa'e Maraara yara. Hashshuubi Azirik'aama na'aa; Azirik'aami Hashaabiyaa na'aa. 
1Chronicles9:15 Haratuu k'ay Bak'ibak'aara, Hereesha, Galaalanne Mataaniyaa. Mataanee Miika na'aa; Miiki Ziikira na'aa; Ziikiri Asaafa na'aa." 
1Chronicles9:16 Haratuu k'ay Nas'oofa asatuwaa mootsatuwaan utteedda Obaadiyaanne Berekiyaa. Obaadi Shamaa'iyaa na'aa; Shamaa'e Galaala na'aa; Galaali Yidutuuna na'aa. Berekii Asa na'aa; Asay Elk'k'aana na'aa. 
1Chronicles9:17 Geeshsha Golliyaa penggiyaa naagiyaawanttu Shaaluuma, Ak'k'uuba, S'almmoona, Ahimaananne unttunttu dabbotuwaa. Shaaluumi unttunttu kaappuwaa." 
1Chronicles9:18 Ha yaratuu kase away doliyaa baggana de'iyaa, Kaatiyaa Penggiyaa giyaa penggiyaa naageeddino. Hewaappe kase unttunttu Leewatuu dunkkaaniyaa wode naageeddino." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shaaluumi Ebiyaasaafa na'aa K'ore na'aa; I K'oraaha yara asaa. K'oraaha yaratuu kase Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa naageeddawaadan, Shaaluuminne K'oraaha yara gidiyaa Aa dabbotuu Geeshsha Golliyaa geliyaa penggiyaa naagiino." 
1Chronicles9:20 Elaazara na'ay Piinihaasi beni wode K'oraaha yaratuu kaappuwaa; Med'inaa Goday aanana de'eedda. 
1Chronicles9:21 Mashelemiyaa na'ay Zakkaraasi Gakketiyaa Dunkkaaniyaa geliyaa penggiyaa naageedda. 
1Chronicles9:22 Penggiyaa naaganaw dooretteeddawanttu ubbaanna laau s'eetanne tammanne laauwaa; hawanttu barenttu mootsan mootsan paydettiide s'aafetteeddino. Unttunttu yaratoo ha aawotetsaa immeeddawanttu Kaatiyaa Daawitanne timbbitiyaa odiyaa Sammeela. 
1Chronicles9:23 Hewaa diraw, unttunttune unttunttu naanay Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa geliyaa penggiyaa naagiino." 
1Chronicles9:24 Oyddu zoozetuun wulahaaninne, dolahaan, huup'issaninne gedissanna itti itti penggii de'ee; he penggetuwaa naagiyaawanttukka de'iino." 
1Chronicles9:25 He mootsan de'iyaa unttunttu dabbotuu laappuntsa laappuntsa gallassan laametti naagiide, unttuntta maaddino." 
1Chronicles9:26 Penggiyaa naagiyaa oyddu kaappatuu Leewatuwaa; unttunttu S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaw, Aa giddo kifiletoonne kifiletuu gidduwaan de'iyaa miishshatoo aawotiino." 
1Chronicles9:27 S'oossaa Geeshsha Golliyaa naagiyaawanttunne k'ay guura guura kariyaa dooyiyaawanttu unttuntta gidiyaa diraw, yaan ak'iino." 
1Chronicles9:28 Leewatuwaappe amareedawanttu goynniyaa wode go'ettiyaa miishshatoo aawotiino; he miishshatuwaa kare kessiyaa wodenne soo gelissiyaa wode unttunttu paydiino. 
1Chronicles9:29 K'ay unttuttuppe ittuu ittuu Geeshsha Golliyaa gidduwaan go'ettiyaa hara miishshatoo, liik'o d'iiliyaw, woyniyaa eessaw, zayitiyaw, is'aanaawunne sawotoo aawotiino." 
1Chronicles9:30 Shin k'eesatuwaa naanatuwaappe ittuu ittuu sawuwaa likkii likkiide walakkiino. 
1Chronicles9:31 K'oraaha yaratuwaappe Shaaluuma bayira na'ay Matiite yarshshuwaa ukitsaa uukkiyaawoo aawotee. 
1Chronicles9:32 K'ahaata yara gidiyaa unttunttu dabbatuwaappe amareedawanttu k'ay Sambbatan Sambbatan s'arp'p'eezan wotsiyaa ukitsaa giigissiyaa aawotetsaa oyk'k'eeddino. 
1Chronicles9:33 Leewatuu zaratuwaappe amareeda kaappatuu Geeshsha Golliyaan yes's'iyaawantta. K'ammakka gallassikka unttunttu ootsiyaa diraw, hara oosuwaa ootsennan, eeshshaa Golliyaa dirssaa giddon de'iyaa golletuwaan de'iino." 
1Chronicles9:34 Leewiyaa zaratuwaa soy asaa kaappatuu ubbay hawaappe k'ommonna s'aafetteeddawantta; unttunttu Yerusaalamen de'eeddino. 
1Chronicles9:35 Gabaa'oona aawuu Yi'i'eeli Gabaa'oona kataman de'eedda. Aa machchatti suntsay Maa'iko. 
1Chronicles9:36 Aa na'ay bayiray Abddoona; Aa naanay haratuu S'uura, K'iisa, Ba'aala, Neera, Nadaaba," 
1Chronicles9:37 Gadoora, Ahiyaa, Zakkaraasa Mik'iloota." 
1Chronicles9:38 Mik'ilooti Shima yeleedda. Hawanttu k'ay Yerusaalamen de'iyaa barenttu dabbattuu matan de'eeddino. 
1Chronicles9:39 Neeri K'iisa yeleedda; K'iisi Saa'oola yeleedda. Saa'ooli Yoonataana, Malkkishuu'a, Abinaadaabanne Eshiba'aala yeleedda." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yoonataana na'ay Mariiba'aala; Mariiba'aali Mikiyaasa yeleedda. 
1Chronicles9:41 Mikiyaasa naanay Pittoona, Meleka, Taree'anne Akaaza." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akaazi Yaa'iira yeleedda. Yaa'iiri Alemeeta, Azimaaweetuwaanne Zimira yeleedda. Zimiri Moos'a yeleedda;" 
1Chronicles9:43 Moos'i Biini'a yeleedda; Biini'i Rafaaya yeleedda; Rafaayi Elaasa yeleedda; Elaasi As'eela yeleedda. 
1Chronicles9:44 As'eelaw usuppun attuma naanay de'iino. Unttunttu suntsay Azirik'aama, Bookera, Isimaa'eela, Sha'aariyaa, Obaadiyaanne Hanaana; hawanttu ubbay As'eela naanaa." 
1Chronicles10:1 Piliss's'eema asatuu Israa'eeliyaa asatuwaana oletteeddino. Israa'eeliyaa asatuu Piliss's'eema asatuwaa sintsaappe bak'atteedino. Daro Israa'eelatuu Gilbboo'a Deriyan hayk'k'eeddino. 
1Chronicles10:2 Piliss's'eema asatuu Saa'oolanne Aa attuma naanaa yederssi gakkiide, Saa'oola naanaa Yoonataana, Abinaadaabanne Malkkishuu'a wod'eeddino." 
1Chronicles10:3 Olay Saa'oola yuuyyi aad'd'iide unetteedda; wonddaafiyaa asatuu Saa'oola demmeedda wode, zubbiyaan Aa c'addiide maduns's'iseeddino." 
1Chronicles10:4 Saa'ooli bare ola miishshaa tookkiyaawaa, «Ha k'as's'arettibeenna Piliss's'eematuu yiide, ta bolla kaa'ennaadan, ne mashshaan c'addaade, taana neeni wod'a» yaageedda. Shin Aa ola miishshaa tookkiyaawe loytsi yayyeedda diraw is's'eedda; Saa'ooli bare mashshaa sa'aan essiide, Aa bolla kunddeedda." 
1Chronicles10:5 Aa ola shaluwaa tookkiyaawe Saa'ooli hayk'k'eeddawaa be'iide, ikka bare mashshaa sa'aan essiide, Aa bolla kunddiide, hayk'k'i aggeeda." 
1Chronicles10:6 Hawaadan haniide, Saa'ooli, Aa naanay heezzuunne Aa soy Asay ubbay he gallassi ittippe hayk'k'eeddino." 
1Chronicles10:7 Wombban de'iyaa Israa'eeliyaa asatuu ubbay barenttu olanchchatuu bak'ateeddawaanne Saa'oolinne Aa naanay hayk'k'eeddawaa siseedda wode, unttunttukka barenttu katamatuwaa aggiide bak'atteedino. Bak'atina Piliss's'eema asatuu yiide, he katamatuwaan de'eeddino." 
1Chronicles10:8 Wonttetsa gallassi Piliss's'eematuu anhatuwaa bollaappe olaa miishshatuwaa k'aari akkanaw yiide, Saa'oolinne Aa naanay Gilbboo'a Deriyan hayk'k'iidde, giseeddawantta demmeeddino." 
1Chronicles10:9 Unttunttu Saa'oola k'ood'iyaa muuc'eeddinonne Aa ola shaluwaa k'aari akkeeddino. Yaatiide barenttu Eek'atuwaa golleninne barenttu asaa gidduwaan s'oonuwaa awaayana mala, Piliss's'eema biittaw ubbaw asaa kiitaa yedeeddino." 
1Chronicles10:10 Unttunttu Saa'oola olaa miishshaa barenttu s'oossatuwaa golletuwaappe ittuwaan wotseeddino; Aa guuggiyaakka barenttu s'oossaa Daagoona Eek'aa Gollen kak'k'eeddino. 
1Chronicles10:11 Piliss's'eema asatuu Saa'oola ootseeddawaa ubbaa Gala'aaden de'iyaa Yaabeesha katamaa asatuu siseedda wode," 
1Chronicles10:12 unttunttu mino asatuu ubbay biide, Saa'oola anhaanne Aa naanaa ahaa akkiide, Yaabeesha katamaa aheeddino. Yaabeeshan de'iyaa wolaa garssan unttunttu mek'etsaa moogeeddino; yaatiide laappun gallassaa s'oomeeddino." 
1Chronicles10:13 Saa'ooli Med'inaa Godaw ammanettibeenna diraw hayk'k'eedda. Med'inaa Godaa k'aalaa I naagibeenna; Med'inaa Godaana zorettiyaawaa aggiide, moyttilliyaa s'eesiyaa asaana zoretteedda. Hewaa diraw, Med'inaa Goday Aa wod'iide, Aa kawutetsaa Isseya na'aa Daawitaw aatsiide immeedda." 
1Chronicles10:14  
1Chronicles11:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay ittippe Kebroonan de'iyaa Daawitakko shiik'iide, «Nuuni ne suutsanne ne ashuwaa." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kase Saa'ooli kaatiyaa gidiide de'iyaa wodekka, Israa'eeliyaa asaa olaw kaaletseeddawe neena. Med'inaa Goday ne S'oossay neena, ‹Ta asaa Israa'eeliyaa neeni heemmana; unttunttu bollakka neeni kaatetana› yaageedda» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles11:3 Hewaa diraw, Israa'eeliyaa c'imatuu ubbay Kaatiyaa Daawitakko Kebroone katamaa yeeddino; I unttunttunna Kebroonan Med'inaa Godaa sintsan k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa c'aak'k'eteedda. Med'inaa Goday Sammeela baggana haasayeedda k'aalaadan, Daawite Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaatetanaaddan unttunttu Aa okkeeddino." 
1Chronicles11:4 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay Yerusaalame katamaa beeddino. He wode Yaabuusa asatuu he sa'aan de'iyaa diraw, he katamay Yaabuusa geetettee." 
1Chronicles11:5 Yaabuusa asatuu Daawita, «Neeni ha katamaa gelanaw ubbakka danddayakka» yaageeddino. Gidooppenne, Daawite S'iyoonen de'iyaa unttunttu geesatuwaa oyk'k'eedda; S'iyoone Daawita Katamaa geetetteedda." 
1Chronicles11:6 Daawite bare olanchchatuwaa, «Yaabuusa asatuu kaseti oliyaa ooninne ola gadaawaa gidanawaa» yaageedda. S'aruuyi na'ay Yoo'aabe kaseti biide oleedda; yaatiide gadaawaa gideedda." 
1Chronicles11:7 Daawite he geessuwaan de'eedda; hewaa diraw, he katamay Daawita Katamaa geetetteedda." 
1Chronicles11:8 Daawite Miilloppe doommiide, he katamaa zaaretsiide kees's'eedda; atteeda katamaa k'ay Yoo'aabe zaaretsiide kees's'eedda." 
1Chronicles11:9 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday aanana de'iyaa diraw, Daawite min minniide beedda." 
1Chronicles11:10 Daawita asatuu minotuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddino. Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaabaa haasayeeddawaadan, Daawite kaatetana mala, ha asatuu Israa'eeliyaa asaana gidiide, loytsi maaddeeddino. K'ay Aa kawutetsaakka miniseeddino." 
1Chronicles11:11 Daawita asatuu minotuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttuppe heezzatuu loytsi eretteeddawantta. Heezzatuwaappe koyruu Hakimoonappe yeedda Yaashobi'aama; Yaashobi'aami itti gede olan heezzu s'eetu asaa bare tooraan wod'eedda. 
1Chronicles11:12 Heezzu mino asatuwaa giddon Aa kaalliide de'iyaawe Ahoohiyaa Dooddo na'aa Elaazara. 
1Chronicles11:13 Piliss's'eema asatuu olettanaw Pasddaamima giyaa sa'aa shiik'eedda wode, El""aazare Daawitana ittippe de'ee. Israa'eeliyaa olanchchatuu Piliss's'eema asatuwaa sintsaappe bak'atiyaa wode, El""aazare banggaa shooyk'an de'ee. Inne Daawitenne shoyk'aa gidduwaan ek'k'iide, Piliss's'eema asatuwaana oletteeddino. Med'inaa Goday wolk'k'aama s'oonuwaa immiide, unttunttu ashsheeda." 
1Chronicles11:14  
1Chronicles11:15 Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu Rafayma Wombban dunkkaaneedda wode, hattamu kaappatuwaappe heezzatuu Daawite de'iyaa Adulaama gonggoluwaan de'iyaa zaallaakko yeeddino." 
1Chronicles11:16 He wode Daawite geessuwaa giddon de'ee; Piliss's'eema olanchchatuu c'uguu Beeteleheemen de'ee. 
1Chronicles11:17 Daawite haatsaa ushanaw amottiide, «Beeteleeme katamaa penggiyaa miyiyaan de'iyaa pulttuwaa haatsaappe taana ooni ushshanddeeshsha!» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles11:18 Heezzu mino asatuu Piliss's'eema asatuu dunkkaaneedda sa'aa pini biide, Beeteleeme katamaa penggiyaan de'iyaa pulttuwaappe haatsaa duuk'k'iide, Daawitaw aheeddino. Shin Daawite ushennaan is's'eedda; I he haatsaa Med'inaa Godaa sintsan tigeedda." 
1Chronicles11:19 «Hawaa ushanawe taappe haakko! Barenttu shemppuwaa olettiide beedda ha asatuwaa suutsaa taani ushoo? Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu shemppuwaa aatsi immiide, haatsaa aheeddino» yaageedda. Hewaa diraw, Daawite he haatsaa ushibeenna. He heezzu mino asatuu hewaa ootseeddino." 
1Chronicles11:20 Yoo'aaba ishay Abishaayi heezatoo kaappuuwaa. I bare tooraan heezzu s'eetu asatuwaa olettiide wod'eedda. Yaatiide ikka hara heezzatuwaadan eretteedda. 
1Chronicles11:21 I laaentso heezatuwaappe aad'd'i bonchchetteedda asaa; I unttunttoo kaappo gideedda. Shin I he koyro heezzatuwaana k'ara gidena. 
1Chronicles11:22 K'abs's'i'eelappe yeedda Yoodaahe na'ay Banaayi mino asaa; mino oosatuwaa ootseedda. I laau eretteedda Moo'aabe gadiyaa asatuu wod'eedda. K'ay shachchay dareedda itti gallassi ollaa giddo geliide, gaammuwaa wod'eedda." 
1Chronicles11:23 Banaayi geesay ichcheshu wad'aa gakkiyaa Gibs'e gade bitaniyaa adussa wod'eedda. Gibs'e bitaniyaa kushiyan shemayinniyaa wonddarashiyaa keeshshaa tooray de'ee; shin Banaayi gatimaa oyk'k'iide, bitaniyaakko beedda. He bitaniyaa kushiyaappe tooraa wotsi akkiide, Aa tooraan Aa wod'eedda." 
1Chronicles11:24 Yoodaahe na'ay Banaayi hawantta ootseedda. Aa suntsaykka he heezzatuwaadan eretteedda. 
1Chronicles11:25 I hattamatuwaa giddon daro bonchchetteedda; shin I heezzatuwaana gujjetena. Daawite Aa barena naagiyaa olanchchatoo kaappuuwaa keseedda. 
1Chronicles11:26 Mino asatuu Yoo'aaba ishaa Asaaheela, Beeteleheemeppe yeedda Dooddo na'aa Elihanaana," 
1Chronicles11:27 Haroodappe yeedda Shammoota, Piloonappe yeedda Helees'a," 
1Chronicles11:28 Tak'oappe yeedda Ik'k'eesha na'aa Ira, Anatootappe yeedda Abi'eezera," 
1Chronicles11:29 Huushappe yeedda Sibbakaaya, Ahoohiyaa Ilaaya," 
1Chronicles11:30 Nas'oofappe yeedda Maahiraaya, Nas'oofappe yeedda Ba'aana na'aa Heleeda," 
1Chronicles11:31 Biiniyaama gadiyaan de'iyaa Gib'aa katamaappe yeedda Ribaaya na'aa Ittaaya, Pir""aatoonappe yeedda Banaaya," 
1Chronicles11:32 Ga'aasha Zanggaaraa matappe yeedda Huraaya, Aarabappe yeedda Abii'eela," 
1Chronicles11:33 Baahiruumappe yeedda Azimaaweeta, Sha'albboonappe yeedda Eliyaahiba," 
1Chronicles11:34 Giizoonappe yeedda Hasheema, Haaraarappe yeedda Shaage na'aa Yoonataana," 
1Chronicles11:35 Haaraarappe yeedda Sakaara na'aa Ahi'aama, Uura na'aa Elifaala," 
1Chronicles11:36 Makeerappe yeedda Hefeera, Piloonappe yeedda Akiiya," 
1Chronicles11:37 K'armmeloosappe yeedda Hes'ira, Ezbbaaya na'aa Naa'iraaya," 
1Chronicles11:38 Naataana ishaa Yuu'eela, Haagira na'aa Mibihaara," 
1Chronicles11:39 Amoonappe yeedda S'elek'a, S'aruuyi na'aa Yoo'aaba ola miishshaa tookkiyaa Ba'erootappe yeedda Naahiraaya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Yatira yara gidiyaa Ira, Yatira yara gidiyaa Gaareeba," 
1Chronicles11:41 Hiitiyaa Uuriyoona, Ahilaaya na'aa Zabaadanne" 
1Chronicles11:42 Roobeela zariyaa gidiyaa Shiiza na'aa Adiina. I Roobeela zaratuwaa kaappuuwaa; aanana ittippe hattamu asatuu de'iino. 
1Chronicles11:43 Hara mino asatuu k'ay Maa'ika na'aa Hanaana, Mitaanappe yeedda Yoshafaas'a," 
1Chronicles11:44 Ashttaarappe yeedda Ooziyaana, Aaro'eerappe yeedda Hotaama naanaa Shamaa'anne Yi'i'eela," 
1Chronicles11:45 Shiimira na'aa Yidi'eelanne Aa ishaa Tiis'appe yeedda Yooha," 
1Chronicles11:46 Mahaawaappe yeedda Eli'eela, Elnna'aama naanaa Yiriibaayanne Yooshaawiyaa, Moo'aabe gadiyaappe yeedda Yitima," 
1Chronicles11:47 S'ooba katamaappe yeedda Eli'eela, Yoobeedanne Ya'isi'eela." 
1Chronicles12:1 Daawite K'iisa na'aa Saa'oolappe bak'ati biide, S'ik'ilaagan utteedda wode, aakko yeedda asatuu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawantta. Unttunttu kase Daawita olan maaddeedda mino asatuwaa giddon de'iino." 
1Chronicles12:2 Unttunttu wonddaafiyaa asatuwaa; K'ay barenttu ushechcha kushiyaaninne haddirssa kushiyan shuchchaa yambbarshshan olanaw danddayiino. Unttunttu Biiniyaama zariyaa gidiyaa Saa'oola dabbotuwaa. 
1Chronicles12:3 Unttunttu kaappuu Ahi'eezera; Ahi'eezerappe simmina Yo'aasha; unttunttu Gibappe yeedda Shamaa'a naanaa. Haratuu k'ay Azimaaweeta naanaa gidiyaa Yizi'eelanne Pelees'a, Baraaka, Anatootappe yeedda Yeeha," 
1Chronicles12:4 hattamatuwaa giddon wolk'k'aama gidiide, unttuntta kaaletsiyaa Gabaa'oonappe yeedda Yishimaa'iyaa, Ermaasa, Yahaazi'eela, Yohanaana, Gedeerappe yeedda Yozabaada," 
1Chronicles12:5 Eluzaaya, Yaarimoota, Ba'aaliyaa, Shamaariyaa, Hariifappe yeedda Shafaas'iyaa," 
1Chronicles12:6 K'oraaha yaratuwaa gidiyaa Elk'k'aana, Yishiyaa, Azaari'eela, Yo'eezeranne Yaashobi'aama," 
1Chronicles12:7 Gadoorappe yeedda Yirohaama naanaa Yo'eelanne Zabaadiyaa. 
1Chronicles12:8 Daawite mela biittaan de'iyaa bak'ati attiyaa sa'aan utti de'ishshin, Gaade zariyaappe asatuu aakko yeeddino. Unttunttu mino asatuwaanne olaw giigeeddawantta; k'ay gonddalliyaanne tooraa oyk'k'anaw danddayiyaawantta. Unttunttu som""i gaammuwaa deemuwaa malatee; unttunttu deretuwaa huup'iyaan guppiyaa gen""iyaadan elleelliino." 
1Chronicles12:9 Unttunttu kaappuu Es'eera; laaentsuu Obaadiyaa; heezzentsuu Eli'aaba; 
1Chronicles12:10 oyddentsuu Mishimaanna; ichcheshentsu Ermaasa; 
1Chronicles12:11 usuppuntsuu Attaaya; laappuntsuu Eli'eela; 
1Chronicles12:12 hosppuntsuu Yohanaana; udduppuntsuu Elzzabaada; 
1Chronicles12:13 tammantsuu Ermaasa; tammanne ittentsu Maakibanaaya. 
1Chronicles12:14 Hawanttu Gaade zariyaa olanchchatoo kaappatuwaa. Unttunttuppe laafiyaawanttu S'eetoo kaappatuwaa; minniyaawanttu sha''aa kaappatuwaa. 
1Chronicles12:15 Yorddaanoosa Shaafay, gas'aappe gas'aa gakkanaw kumi kis's'eedda koyro aginaan pinneeddawanttu hawantta. Unttunttu wombban away doliyaa baggananne away wulliyaa baggananne utteedda asaa ubbaa yedersseeddino." 
1Chronicles12:16 Biiniyaama zaratuwaappenne Yihudaa zaratuwaappe amareeda asatuu Daawitakko geessuwaa yeeddino. 
1Chronicles12:17 Daawite unttunttunna gaketanaw kesiide, hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenttu taana maaddanaw saruwaan taakko yeeddawaa gidooppe, ta wozanay hinttenana ittippe gidanawaa. Shin hinttenttu taana ta morkketoo aatsi immanaw yeeddawaa gidooppe, hinttentta erite! Taani ootseedda iitabay baynna diraw, nu aawotuwaa S'oossay hewaa be'o; I hinttentta pirddo!» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles12:18 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, hattamatuwaa kaappuwaa Amaasaaya bolla S'oossaa Ayyaanay wod'd'ina, «Daawitaa, nuuni newantta! Isseya na'aw, nuuni neenana ittippe de'eetto! Saruu new gido! Neena maaddiyaawanttussikka sarotetsay gido! Ne S'oossay neena maaddee» yaageedda. Daawite unttuntta akkiide, bare olanchchatoo kaappatuwaa ootseedda." 
1Chronicles12:19 Daawite Piliss's'eematuwaanna ittippe gidiide, Saa'oola olanaw beedda wode, Minaase zariyaappe amareeda asatuu Daawitan gaketeeddino. Shin Piliss's'eema asatuwaa kaappatuu Daawitenne Daawita Asay barenana beennaadan diggeeddino. Piliss's'eema asatuu loytsi zoretteeddawaappe guyyiyaan, unttuntta guyye yeddeeddino; ayaw gooppe, Daawitenne Daawita Asay unttunttu Kaatiyaa Saa'oolaw aatsi immanenttonne giide yayyeeddino." 
1Chronicles12:20 Daawite S'ik'ilaaga katamaa simmishin, Minaase zariyaappe Daawita maaddanaw keseedda shaalak'atuu Adinaaha, Yozabaada, Yidi'eela, Mikaa'eela, Yozabaada, Eelihunne s'ilttaaya." 
1Chronicles12:21 Unttunttu ubbaykka s'alanne wolk'k'aama asaa gidiyaa diraw, Daawite c'uguwaa kaalliyaa wode, unttunttu Aa maaddeeddino." 
1Chronicles12:22 Daawita olanchchatuu S'oossaa olanchchatuwaadan c'oraana gakkanaw, Aa maaddiyaa Asay gallassi gallassi gujettee." 
1Chronicles12:23 Med'inaa Goday haasayeeddawaadan Saa'oola kawutetsaa Daawitaw zaaranaw olaw danc'c'i giigiide, Kebroonan de'iyaa Daawitakko yeedda olanchchatuu paydu hawaappe kaalliide s'aafetteeddawaa." 
1Chronicles12:24 Gonddalliyaanne tooraa oyk'k'iide, olaw danc'c'i giigeedda Yihudaa zaratuu usuppun sha""anne hosppun s'eeta." 
1Chronicles12:25 Simoona zariyaappe olaw giigeedda s'alanne wolk'k'aama olanchchatuu laappun shaanne itti s'eeta. 
1Chronicles12:26 Leewiyaa zariyaappe oyddu shaanne usuppun s'eeta. 
1Chronicles12:27 Aaroona zaratuwaa kaappuu Yoodaaha; Yoodaahena ittippe heezzu shaanne laappun s'eetu asatuu de'iino. 
1Chronicles12:28 K'ay S'aadook'e yalaga s'alanne wolk'k'aama asaa; S'aadook'a aawuwaa golliyaa asaappe laatamanne laau kaappatuu aanana ittippe de'iino. 
1Chronicles12:29 Biiniyaama zariyaa gideedda Saa'oola dabbotuu heezzu shaa asaa. Shin Biiniyaama zariyaappe dariyaa bagga Asay Saa'oola golliyaa asaw he wodii gakkanaw ammanettiyaawantta. 
1Chronicles12:30 Efireema zariyaappe barenttu aawotuwaa golliyaa asan eretteedda s'alanne wolk'k'aama asatuu laatamu shaanne hosppun s'eeta. 
1Chronicles12:31 Daawita kaateyanaw baanaw dooretteedda Minaase zariyaappe baggatuu tammanne hosppun shaa. 
1Chronicles12:32 K'ay Israa'eeliyaa Asay ayaa ootsanaw bessintto, wodiyaabaa shaakki eriyaa akeekanchcha asatuu, Yisaakoora zariyaw kaappatuu laa""u s'eeta; unttunttu dabbotuu ubbay unttunttoo azazettiino." 
1Chronicles12:33 Ola shaluwaa ubbaa oyk'k'iide, barenttu kumentsaa wozanaan Daawita maaddanaw giigeedda olanchchatuwaan Zaabiloona zariyaa asatuu ishatamu sha""a." 
1Chronicles12:34 Nifttaaleema zariyaappe itti shaa kaappatuu de'iino; gonddalliyaanne tooraa oyk'k'iyaa hattamanne laappun shaa asatuu unttunttunna ittippe de'iino. 
1Chronicles12:35 Daana zariyaappe olaw giigeedda asatuu laatamanne hosppun shaanne usuppun s'eeta. 
1Chronicles12:36 Olaw kesanaw Aaseera zariyaappe giigeeddawanttu oytamu shaa. 
1Chronicles12:37 Yorddaanoosa Shaafaappe hefintsa away doliyaa baggan de'iyaa Roobeela zariyaappe, Gaade zariyaappenne Minaase zariyaa baggappe ola shaluwaa ubbaa oyk'k'iide yeedda asatuu itti s'eetanne laatamu sha""a." 
1Chronicles12:38 Ha olaw giigeedda olanchchatuu ubbay Daawita Israa'eeliyaa bolla kaateyanaw barenttu k'ofaa k'achchiide, Kebroone katamaa yeeddino. K'ay Israa'eeliyaappe atteedawanttukka Kaateyanaw Daawita kaateyiide itti wozana gideeddino." 
1Chronicles12:39 Unttunttu dabbotuu unttunttoo koshshiyaawaa giigissi wotseedda diraw, miiddinne ushiidde Daawitana heezzu gallassaa utteeddino." 
1Chronicles12:40 Israa'eeliyaa asaw nashechchaa gidiyaa diraw, huup'issa baggana de'iyaa Yisaakoorappe, Zaabiloonappenne Nifttaaleemappe asatuu daro k'umaa aheeddino. D'iiliyaa, balasiyaa ukitsaa, woyniyaa teeraa, woyniyaa eessaanne zayitiyaa hariyaan, bak'uluwaan, gaaluwaaninne booran c'aaniide aheeddino; k'aykka unttunttu miizzaanne dorssaa shukkiide maanaw akkiide yeeddino." 
1Chronicles13:1 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Daawite Suntsatuwaanna; shaalak'atuwaananne s'eetuwaa kaappatuwaanna zoretteedda." 
1Chronicles13:2 Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa, «Hinttenttoo lo""a malatiyaabaa giddooppene, Med'inaa Godaa nu S'oossaa shene gidooppe, Israa'eeliyaa biittaa gas'an de'iyaa nu dabbotuu, k'eesatuu nne barenttu kataman de'iyaa Leewatuu nuunanna ittippe shiik'anaadan asaa kiittoytte." 
1Chronicles13:3 Saa'ooli kaateteedda wode sheneko giina, dogettiide atteeda nu S'oossaa Taabootaa ane zaariide ahooytte» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles13:4 Daawite odeedda yewuu suure gideedda diraw, Asay ubbay mayyeedda." 
1Chronicles13:5 Hewaa diraw, Daawite S'oossaa Taabootaa K'iriyaati-Yi'aariimappe ahana mala, Gibs'e zawaappe Shihoora shaafaappe doommiide, Hamaata Pinuwaa gakkanaw de'iyaa Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa shiishsheedda." 
1Chronicles13:6 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay kiruubetuwaappe gidduwaan bare kawutetsaa araataa bolla utteedda S'oossaa suntsan s'eesetteedda S'oossaa Taabootaa ahanaw Yihudaa biittan de'iyaa Ba'aala geetettiyaa K'iriyaati-Yi'aariima katamaa beeddino. 
1Chronicles13:7 S'oossaa Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa boray goochchiyaa ooratsa gaariyan wotsiide, Abinaadaaba sooppe aheeddino; Uuzinne Ahiyoy gaariyaa laaggiino." 
1Chronicles13:8 Daawitenne Israa'eeliyaa Asay ubbay diitsaanne maasink'k'uwaa diis's'iidde, kabaruwaa bak'k'iidde, daalaa k'aatsiiddenne s'urumbbaa punniidde, barenttu kumentsaa wolk'k'an S'oossaa sintsan nashettiidde bonchcheeddino." 
1Chronicles13:9 Unttunttu Kiidoona giyaa saan de'iyaa katsaa bukkiyaa udduma gakkiyaa wode, booratuu d'ubettina, Uuzi Taabootaa oyk'k'anaw bare kushiyaa yeddeedda." 
1Chronicles13:10 Aa kushii Taabootaa bochcheedda diraw, Med'inaa Godaa hank'k'uu Uuza bolla ees's'i kesseedda. Hewaa diraw, S'oossay Aa shoc'ina, I he sa'aan S'oossaa sintsan hayk'k'i aggeeda." 
1Chronicles13:11 Med'inaa Goday hank'k'ettiide Uuza wod'eedda diraw, Daawite yiloteedda. Hachche gakkanaw, he sa'ay Peerez Uuzaa geetettiide s'eesetteedda. Uuzi Shoc'etto sa'aa geetettee." 
1Chronicles13:12 He gallassi Daawite S'oossaw yayyeedda diraa, «S'oossaa Taabootaa taakko waata ahanaw danddayayitaa?» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles13:13 Hewaa diraw, Taabootaa barenana Daawita Katamaa afibeenna. Shin Gaatiyaa Obeedi-Eedooma geetettiyaa bitaniyaa soo afeedda." 
1Chronicles13:14 S'oossaa Taabootay Obeedi-Eedooma gollen Aa golliyaa asaana heezzu aginaa gameedda. Med'inaa Goday Aa golliyaa asaanne aw de'iyaa ubbabaa anjjeedda. 
1Chronicles14:1 S'iiroosa Kaatii Kiiraami Daawitaw asatuwaa kiitteedda. Kiitetteedda asatuwaana golliyaa kees's'anaadan zigaa mudetsaanne k'ay shuchchaa massiyaawanttanne anaas'etuwaa aw yeddeedda. 
1Chronicles14:2 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaa bolla Aa kaatiyaa ootsiide esseeddawaanne bare asaa Israa'eeliyaa diraw, Aa kawutetsaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide bonchcheeddawaa Daawite ereedda." 
1Chronicles14:3 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Daawite Yerusaalamen hara mac'c'a asaa gujji akkiide, attumawaa naanaanne mac'c'a naanaa yeleedda." 
1Chronicles14:4 Daawite Yerusaalamen yeleedda attuma naanay Shaamu'a, Shobaaba, Naataana, Solomone," 
1Chronicles14:5 Yibihaara, Elishuu'a, Elppaalees'a," 
1Chronicles14:6 Nogaaha, Nefeega, Yaafi'a," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishamaa'a, Be'eliyaadanne Elifelees'a." 
1Chronicles14:8 Daawite Israa'eeliyaa ubbaa bolla kaatiyaa gidiide oketteeddawaa Piliss's'eema Asay siseedda wode, unttunttu ubbay Daawita koyanaw keseeddino. Daawite unttunttu kesseeddawaa sisiide, unttunttunna olettanaw kesseedda." 
1Chronicles14:9 Piliss's'eema Asay Rafayma Wombbaa yiide bonk'k'eeddino. 
1Chronicles14:10 Daawite S'oossaa, «Taani baade Piliss's'eematuwaa oloo? Neeni unttunttu taw aatsa immanii?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Shin Med'inaa Goday Aa, «Baade ola. Taani unttuntta new aatsa immana» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles14:11 Daawitenne Aa Asay Ba'aali-Paraas'iima giyaa sa'aa biide, yaan unttuntta s'ooneeddino. Daawite, «Haatsaa di'uu d'uussi aad'd'iyaawaadan S'oossay ta morkkatuwaa gidduwaanna taana aatseedda» yaageedda. Hewaa diraw, he sa'aa suntsay Ba'aali-Paraas'iima geetetteedda." 
1Chronicles14:12 Piliss's'eematuu barenttu eek'atuwaa he sa'aan yeggiide beeddino. Yaatina Daawite azaziide, unttunttu eek'atuwaa tamaan s'uugisseedda." 
1Chronicles14:13 Piliss's'eema asatuu laa'entsuwaa ha wombbaa simmi yiide bonk'k'eeddino. 
1Chronicles14:14 Daawite S'oossaa laa'entsuwaa oochcheedda. Shin S'oossay Aa, «Neeni unttunttu geeduwaa booppa. Unttunttu guyyenna yuuyya aad'd'aade boo'iyaa mitsaappe sintsa baggana olanaw giiga." 
1Chronicles14:15 Boo'iyaa mitsaappe huup'iyaan salppiyaa kooshshaa neeni sisiyaa wode, olanaw kesa. Ayaw gooppe, hewe Piliss's'eema olanchchatuwaa shoc'anaw S'oossay neeppe sintsaw aad'd'eedda giyaawaa» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles14:16 S'oossay azazeeddawaadan Daawite ootseedda. Gabaa'oonappe biide Gezeera gakkanaw, Israa'eeliyaa Asay Piliss's'eema olanchchatuwaa wod'eedda." 
1Chronicles14:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Daawita worii biittaa ubbaa gakkeedda. Kawutetsatuu ubbay Daawitaw yayanaadan Med'inaa Goday ootseedda." 
1Chronicles15:1 Daawite bare kataman barew golliyaa kees's'eedda; S'oossaa Taabootawukka sa'aa giigissiide, dunkkaaniyaa esseedda." 
1Chronicles15:2 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Daawite, «S'oossaa Taabootaa tokkanaadaaninne med'i med'inaw Med'inaa Godaw ootsanaw Med'inaa Goday dooreedda Leewatuwaappe attina, ooninne S'oossaa Taabootaa tookkanaw bessena» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles15:3 Daawite Med'inaa Goda Taabootaw giigisseedda sa'aa Taabootaa ahanaadan, Israa'eeliyaa asaa ubbaa Yerusaalamen shiishsheedda." 
1Chronicles15:4 K'ay Daawite Aaroona zaratuwaanne Leewatuwaa s'eesiide shiishsheedda. 
1Chronicles15:5 K'ahaata yaratuwaappe kaappuu Uri'eelinne itti s'eetanne laatamu Aa dabbotuu yeeddino. 
1Chronicles15:6 Maraara yaratuwaappe kaappuu Asaayinne laau s'eetanne laatamu Aa dabbotuu yeeddino. 
1Chronicles15:7 Gershshoona yaratuwaappe kaappuu Yuu'eelinne s'eetanne hattamu Aa dabbotuu yeeddino. 
1Chronicles15:8 Els's'aafaana yaratuwaappe kaappuu Shamaa'enne laau s'eetu Aa dabbotuu yeeddino. 
1Chronicles15:9 Kebroone yaratuwaappe kaappuu Eli'eelinne hosppun tammu Aa dabbotuu yeeddino. 
1Chronicles15:10 Uuzi'eela yaratuwaappe kaappuu Aminaadaabinne s'eetanne tammanne laau Aa dabbotuu yeeddino. 
1Chronicles15:11 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Daawite k'eesetuwaa S'aadook'anne Abiyaataara, k'ay Leewatuwaa Uri'eela, Asaaya, Yuu'eela, Shamaa'iyaa, Eli'eelanne Aminaadaaba s'eesisseedda." 
1Chronicles15:12 Unttuntta, «Hinttenttu Leewatuu zaretoo kaappatuwaa. S'oossaa Israa'eeliyaa Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa taani giigissa wotseedda sa'aa ahanaw hinttenne hinttenttu dabbotuu geeyite." 
1Chronicles15:13 Hinttenttu Leewatuu koyro S'oossaa Taabootaa tookkibeenna dirawunne nuuni Aa wogaadan woot afanentto S'oossaa oochchibeenna diraw, Med'inaa Goday nu S'oossay nuuna mureedda» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles15:14 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, Med'inaa Godaa Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa Taabootaa ahanaw k'eesatuu nne Leewatuu barentta geeshsheeddino." 
1Chronicles15:15 Med'inaa Goday Muse baggana kase azazeeddawaadan, Leewatuu S'oossaa Taabootaa kasuwaanna barenttu hashiyaan tookkeeddino." 
1Chronicles15:16 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, diitsaanne maasink'k'uwaa diis's'iidde, daalaa k'aatsiidde, nashechiyaa yetsaa yes's'ana mala, Leewatuwaa kaaletsiyaawanttu barenttu dabbotuwaa suntsanaadan Daawite azazeedda." 
1Chronicles15:17 Leewatuu Yuu'eela na'aa Hemaana, Aa dabbatuwaappe Berekiyaa na'aa Asaafanne unttunttu dabbatuwaappe Maraara yaraa K'usaaya na'aa Etaana suntseeddino." 
1Chronicles15:18 K'ay laa'entso kaalaan Zakkaraasa, Yaa'izi'eela, Shamiraamoota, Yihi'eela, Uunna, Eli'aaba, Banaaya, Ma'iseeya, Matiitiyaa, Elifaala, Miik'ineeyanne penggiyaa naagiyaawantta Obeedi-Eedoomanne Yi'i'eela suntseeddino." 
1Chronicles15:19 Nahaasiyaa daalaa d'ok'k'u ootsiide k'aatsanaadan Hemaani, Asaafinne Etaani suntsetteeddino." 
1Chronicles15:20 K'ay Zakkaraasi, Yaa'izi'eeli, Shamiraamooti, Yihi'eeli, Uunni, Eli'aabi, Ma'iseeyinne Banaayi diitsaa lee""uwaan diis's'iino." 
1Chronicles15:21 Matiite, Elifaali, Miik'ineeyi, Obeedi-Eedoomi, Yi'i'eelinne Azaazii diitsaa orddiyaan diis's'iino." 
1Chronicles15:22 Leewatuu kaappuu Kanaane mazimuriyaa kaaletsanaw suntsetteedda; I eranchcha gidiyaa diraw, unttuntta tamaarissee." 
1Chronicles15:23 Berekiyaynne Elk'k'aani Taabootaa dunkkaaniyaa penggiyaa naaganaw dooretteeddino. 
1Chronicles15:24 K'ay k'eesatuu Shabaanee, Yoshafaas'i, Nataani'eeli, Amaasaayi, Zakkaraasi, Banaayinne El""eezeri S'oossaa Taabootaa sintsan s'urumbbaa punnanaw dooretteeddino. Obeedi-Eedoominne Yehiyaa Taabootaa penggiyaa naaganaw dooretteeddino." 
1Chronicles15:25 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Daawite, Israa'eeliyaa c'imatuunne sha""a kaappatuu Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa Obeedi-Eedooma sooppe ahanaw nashettiidde beeddino." 
1Chronicles15:26 Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa tookkeedda Leewatuwaa S'oossay maaddeedda diraw, unttunttu laappun korumatuwaanne laappun dorssaa orggetuwaa yarshsheeddino." 
1Chronicles15:27 Daawite, Taabootaa tookkeedda Leewatuu ubbay, mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawanttunne mazimuriyaa yes's'iyaawanttu kaappuu Kanaane suufiyaa geetettiyaa k'ac'inaappe dadetteedda mayuwaa mayyeeddino. Daawitekka k'ay liinuwaappe dadetteedda eefuudiyaa geetettiyaa mayuwaa mayyeedda." 
1Chronicles15:28 Hawaadan ootsiide, Israa'eeliyaa ubbay hombboc'iidde, s'urumbbaanne malakataa punniidde, daalaa k'aatsiiddenne, diitsaanne maasink'k'uwaa diis's'iidde, Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa aheeddino." 
1Chronicles15:29 Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootay Daawita Katamaa geleedda wode, Saa'oola naatta Miikaala maskkootiyaanna s'eellaade, Kaatii Daawite nashettiidde durishiininne kaa'ishin be'aaddu; Daawita bare wozanaan kad'aaddu." 
1Chronicles16:1 Unttunttu S'oossaa Taabootaa ahiidde, Daawite Taabootaa wotsanaw d'ogeedda dunkkaaniyaa gidduwaan wotseeddino. S'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanne ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa Med'inaa Godaw yarshsheeddino." 
1Chronicles16:2 Daawite s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaanne ittippetetsaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiide Poleeddawaappe guyyiyaan, Med'inaa Godaa suntsan asaa anjjeedda." 
1Chronicles16:3 Israa'eeliyaa asaw ubbaw, mac'c'aaniwunne attumawoo, huup'iyaan huup'iyaan itti itti komppo ukitsaa, itti itti mus'o ashuwaakka woyniyaa teeraa melaappe itti itti ukitsaa gisheedda." 
1Chronicles16:4 Med'inaa Godaa Taabootaa sintsan ootsanaadaaninne Med'inaa Godaa Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaa sabbanaadan, galatanaadaaninne bonchchanaadan, amareeda Leewatuwaa Daawite suntseedda." 
1Chronicles16:5 Leewatuu kaappuu Asaafa; Asaafa kaalliide laa'entso kaappuu Zakkaraasa. Zakkaraasa kaalliide de'iyaawanttu Yi'i'eela, Shamiraamoota, Yihi'eela, Matiitiyaa, Eli'aaba, Banaaya, Obeedi-Eedoomanne Ye'eela. Unttunttu maasink'k'uwaanne diitsaa diis's'anaw suntsetteeddino; shin Asaafe daalaa k'aatsanaw suntsetteedda." 
1Chronicles16:6 K'eesiyaa Banaayinne Yahaa'i'eeli S'oossaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa sintsan ubbaa wode s'urumbbaa punnanaw suntsetteeddino. 
1Chronicles16:7 He gallassi Daawite kasetiide, Asaafinne Aa dabbotuu Med'inaa Godaa sabbanaadan unttunttoo immeedda." 
1Chronicles16:8 Med'inaa Godaa galatite; Aa suntsaa s'eesite. I ootseeddawaa kawutetsatuu gidduwaan erissite. 
1Chronicles16:9 Aa sabbite; galataa yetsaa aw yes's'ite. Aa malalissiyaa kiitaa ubbaa odite. 
1Chronicles16:10 Aa geeshsha suntsan c'eek'ettite; Med'inaa Godaa koyiyaawanttu wozanatuu nashettino. 
1Chronicles16:11 Med'inaa Godaanne Aa wolk'k'aa s'omoosite; ubbaade Aa sintsa koyyite. 
1Chronicles16:12 Hinttenttoo, Aa k'oomaa Abrahaama zeretsatoo, Dooretteedda Yaak'ooba naatoo, I ootseedda maalaalissiyaabaa, Aa malaatanne I pirddeedda pirddaa hassayite." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 I Med'inaa Godaa nu S'oossaa; Aa pirddaykka sa'aa ubbaa bollaanna. 
1Chronicles16:15 I bare k'aalaa c'aak'uwaa med'inaw, Bare azazeedda k'aalaa sha""a yeletaa gakkanaw naagee." 
1Chronicles16:16 Hewenne, I Abrahaamena c'aak'k'eteedda c'aak'uwa, Yisaak'aw c'aak'k'eedda c'aak'uwa." 
1Chronicles16:17 Yaak'oobaw wogaa, Israa'eeliyawukka med'ina c'aak'k'uwaa ootsiide mintseeddawaa." 
1Chronicles16:18 I, «New Kanaane biittaa immana; I ne zeretsatoo laata gidanawaa» yaageedda." 
1Chronicles16:19 S'oossaa asatuu payduwaan guutsanne Kanaane biittan bete gidiide de'iyaa wode," 
1Chronicles16:20 itti asaappe hara asaa, itti kaatetetsaappe hara kawutetsaa yuuyyeeddino." 
1Chronicles16:21 S'oossay unttuntta ooninne naak'k'anaw immibeenna; unttunttu diraw kaatetuwaa seeriidde," 
1Chronicles16:22 «Taani okkeeddawaa bochchoppite; Ta timbbitiyaa odiyaawantta k'ohoppite» yaageedda. 
1Chronicles16:23 Sa'aan de'iyaa asaw, ubbaykka Med'inaa Godaw yes's'ite; I ashshiyaa mishiraachchuwaa hachche hachche odite." 
1Chronicles16:24 Kawutetsatuu gidduwaan Aa bonchchuwaa, asaa ubbaa giddon Aa malalissiyaa oosuwaabaa awaayite." 
1Chronicles16:25 Med'inaa Goday wolk'k'aama; Aad'd'o galatay aw bessee. S'oossatuwaa ubbaappe aad'd'iide, I yayettanaw besse." 
1Chronicles16:26 Hara asaa s'oossatuu ubbay eek'atuwaa; shin Med'inaa Goday saluwaa med'd'eedda S'oossaa. 
1Chronicles16:27 Bonchchuunne anggay Aa yuushshuwaan de'ee; minotetsaynne nashechchay I De'iyaa Sa'aan de'ee. 
1Chronicles16:28 Hinttenttoo, asaa zaretoo ubbaw, Med'inaa Godaawaa odite; «Bonchchuunne wolk'k'ay Med'inaa Godaawaa» giide odite." 
1Chronicles16:29 «Bonchchuu Aa suntsaassa» giide Med'inaa Godaawaa odite. Yarshshuwaa akkiide, Aa sintsa yiite. Aa geeshshatetsaa puulan Med'inaa Godaw goynnite." 
1Chronicles16:30 Gadiyaan de'iyaa asaw ubbaw, Aa sintsan kokkorite. Sa'ay min ek'k'eedda; ubbakka k'aas's'enna." 
1Chronicles16:31 Salotuu nashettino; sa'aykka hashshu go! Kawutetsatuu giddon unttunttu, «Med'inaa Goday kaateteedda!» yaagino." 
1Chronicles16:32 Abbayinne Aa giddon kumeeddabatuu guummino. Shoyk'aynne shooyk'aan de'iyaabatuu ubbatuu nashettino. 
1Chronicles16:33 Hewaappe guyyiyaan woran de'iyaa mitsaa ubbay yes's'ana; nashechchan Med'inaa Godaa sintsan yes's'ana. Ayaw gooppe, I sa'aa bollan pirddanaw yee." 
1Chronicles16:34 S'oossay loa gidiyaa dirawunne Med'inaa Godaa galatite. Aggena Aa siik'uu med'inaawaa gidiyaa diraw, galatite." 
1Chronicles16:35 Hewaappe guyyiyaan hinttenttu, «Abeet nuuna ashshiyaa S'oossaw, nuuna ashsha. Nuuni ne geeshsha suntsaa galatanaadaaninne ne bonchchuwaan c'eek'ettanaadan, kawutetsatuu giddoppe shiishshaade ashsha» yaagite." 
1Chronicles16:36 Med'inaa Godaw, Israa'eeliyaa S'oossaw galatay gido. Med'inaappe med'ina gakkanaw galatetto! Hewaappe guyyiyaan Asay ubbay, «Amen""i» giide, Med'inaa Godaa galateedda." 
1Chronicles16:37 Med'inaa Godaa K'aalaa c'aak'uwa Taabootaa sintsan hachche hachche goynaw koshshiyaawaa ubbaa wode unttunttu ootsanaadan, Daawite Asaafanne Aa dabbotuwaa wotseedda." 
1Chronicles16:38 I k'ay Obeedi-Eedoomanne Aa dabbotuwaa usuppun tammanne hosppuntsa unttunttunna ootsanaadan wotseedda; Yidutuuna na'aa Obeedi-Eedoomanne Hoosa penggiyaa naaganaadan wotseedda. 
1Chronicles16:39 K'eesii S'aadook'inne aanana ootsiyaa k'eesatuu Gabaa'oonan de'iyaa d'ok'k'a sa'aan, Med'inaa Godaa Dunkkaaniyaa sintsan ootsanaadan yaan atteeddino." 
1Chronicles16:40 Med'inaa Goday Israa'eeliyaw immeedda higgiyan s'aafetteeddawaadan, unttunttu wonttanne omarssi ubbaa wode s'uuggiyaa yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaa sa'aan Med'inaa Godaw yarshshiino."
