Proverbs31:17 Aa gooba oosanchcha gidiyaawaa s'alala gidennaan, minonne c'inc'c'a asaa." 
Proverbs31:18 Aa bare wod'iyaa demmanaw minnaade zalaw; Aa ootsaadde k'amissiyaa diraw, bare s'omppiyaa elle toyissukku." 
Proverbs31:19 Aa bare sinddiriitan suk'k'aade, bare afilaa daddaw." 
Proverbs31:20 Aa hiyyeesatoonne metootanchchatoo barewaappe c'oo immaw. 
Proverbs31:21 I soo Asay ubbay hoiyaa mayuwaa mayyeedda diraw, shachchay bukkintto, Aa hirggukku." 
Proverbs31:22 Arssaa bollan hiis's'iyaa mayuwaa sikkaw; liinuwaappe dadetteedda ochchaa teeraa malatiyaa mayuwaakka barew mayyaw. 
Proverbs31:23 Gadiyaa c'imatuu shiik'iyaa dubbushan I asinay bonchchetteedda asaa. 
Proverbs31:24 Liinuwaappe mayuwaanne sak'k'iyaa ootsa ootsaade, zal""anchchatoo zal""aw." 
Proverbs31:25 Iza minonne bonchcho asaa; yiyaa laytsatoo iza ubbakka hirggukku. 
Proverbs31:26 Aad'd'eeda eran Aa haasayaw; ammantsiyaa zorii I ins's'arssaappe kesee. 
Proverbs31:27 Aa bare soo asaa de'uwaa injjeyanaw ubbaa gede oosuwaa ootsaadde de'aw; azalla hanuu I bollan beetti erenna. 
Proverbs31:28 Izi naanatuu denddi ek'k'iide, izo nashshiino; Izi asinaykka izo galatiidde," 
Proverbs31:29 «Loobaa ootseedda daro mac'c'a asatuu de'iino; shin neeni unttunttu ubbaappe aad'd'aasa» yaagee. 
Proverbs31:30 Malaa lootetsay allaalle kessenna; puulikka d'ayana; shin Med'inaa Godaw yayyiyaa mishirata, iza galatettanaw bessaw." 
Proverbs31:31 Aa ootseeddabaw ubbaw iw izi kushiyaa zaarite; iza ootseedda oosuu ubbay dabaaban izo galatisso. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Hawe, Daawita na'aa, Yerusaalamen kaateteedda eranchchaa k'aalaa." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 He eranchchay, «Ubbabaykka mela; k'ay ubbabaykka hadaappe aad'd'eeda mela; ubbabaykka ubbaanna mela» yaageedda." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Bare de'iyaa saan ubbaan, Asay daaburiide ootsiyaawaan ubbaan aw wod'ii ayee?" 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Itti yeletay aad'd'iyaa wode, hara yeletay sa'aa oyk'k'ee. Shin ha biittay med'inawukka laamettennan de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Away doleenne wullee; k'ay laaentsuwaakka dolanaw yaa doliyaa sa'aakko elleellee. 
Ecclesiastes1:6 C'arkkuu itti gede gedissa itti gede huup'issa c'arkkee; k'ay yuuyyi yuuyyi aad'd'iide, simerettiide yee." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Goggiyaa haatsay ubbay abban gelee; shin abbay kumi erenna. He haatsay k'aykka simmiide gogganaw, guyye bare pulttiyaa sa'aa bee." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ubbabaykka saletsiyaabaa. I woyissa keenaw saletsinttokka odi wurssanaw danddayettenna. Ayifii s'eelliide, kalli erenna; haytsaykka sisiide, taw gideedda gi erenna." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Kase haneeddawe sintsanawukka simmiide I hanana; k'ay hai haniidde de'iyaabaykka kase haneeddawaa. Hewaa diraw, saluwaa gufantsan ooratsabaa giyaawe ayaynne baawa." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Ooninne, «Be'ite! Hawe ooratsabaa» gooppe, hewe ooratsa gidenna; hewe nuuni yelettanaappe kase baggan haneeddawaa." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kase aad'd'eeda wodetuwaan haneeddabatuwaa zaariide hassayiyaawe baawa; guyyeppe hananabatuwaakka unttunttuppe guyyiyaan ooninne hassayenna. 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Taani eranchchay, Yerusaalamen Israa'eeliyaw kaate gidaade de'aaddi." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Taani biittan sa'aan de'iyaawaa ubbaa k'ora k'oraade eranawunne aad'd'eeda eratetsan pilgga s'eellanaw ta k'ofaa k'achchaad. Yaataade asaa ubbaw S'oossay immeedda de'uu loytsi daaburssiyaabaanne nashechchiyaabaa gidiyaawaa akeekaad. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Saluwaappe garssa baggan haneeddawaa ubbaa taani be'aad; shin ubbabaykka mela; c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaawaa mala. 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Geellay sittanaw danddayenna; k'ay bayinnabaakka paydanaw danddayettenna. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Taani won ta wozanaan hawaadan yaagaade k'oppaad; «Taappe kase Yerusaalame mooddeedda ubbatuwaappe taani wolk'k'aamanne aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidaaddi. C'inc'c'atetsaanne eraa giyaawe I ayentto paac'c'aade eraad» yaagaad. 
Ecclesiastes1:17 K'ay taani aad'd'eeda eratetsaappe, gooshshappenne eeyyatetsaappe gidduwaan de'iyaa dummatetsay ayentto eranaw loytsi daaburaad. Shin wurssetsan hewekka c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala mela gidiyaawaa eraad." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay dariyaa wode kayyoyiiyaabay daree; eray dariyaa wodekka k'ay metuu daree. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Taani ta wozanaan, «Ane taw wolk'k'aama nashshechchaa immiyaawe ayentto, k'ay de'iyaa de'uwaa giddonkka lo""obay ayentto be'ana» yaagaade k'oppaad; shin hewekka mela." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Ubbaa gede miic'c'iyaawe eeyyatetsaa gidiyaawaa, k'ay daro nashechchaykka ayinne go""ennabaa gidiyaawaa akeekaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Hewe hewaa gidi utti de'ishshin, aad'd'eeda eratetsaa demmanaw amottaade, ta wozanaa woyniyaa eessan nashshechchaade, hewaa suganaw eeyyatetsan k'ofaa k'achchaad. K'ay Asay ha sa'aa bolla barew de'iyaa k'antsa wodiyaa aatsiyaa, ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa lo""o ogiikka hawaa gaade k'oppaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 K'ay hara itti wolk'k'aamabaa ootsaad; taw de'iyaa keetsatuwaa kees's'aad; woyniyaa turaakka tokkaad. 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Dumma dumma ataakilttiyaanne ayifiyaa ayifiyaa mitsatuwaa tokkiyaa sa'aanne Asay shemppiyaa sa'aa gannatiyaadan loytsaade giigissaaddi. He sa'aan dumma dumma ayifiyaa ayifiyaa mitsatuwaakka tokkaade, dichchaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 He dic'c'iyaa mitsatuwaa ushshanaw, haatsaa dagayiyaa sa'aa zeeraade giigissaaddi." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Attumanne mac'c'a ayiletuwaa shammaad; k'ay ta son yeletteedda hara ayiletuukka taw de'iino. Taappe kase Yerusaalamen de'eedda oowaappenne dariyaa mehiyaa, deeshshaanne dorssaa wudiyaa haaraad." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Taani mooddiyaa dumma dumma biittatuwaappe bonchchetteedda kaate golliyaa duretaa ayissaade, daro work'k'aanne biraa taw dagayaad. K'ay, taana sabbiide yes's'iyaa attumanne mac'c'a yetsanchchatuwaa k'as'araad; hewaa bollakka, asaw nashshechchaa immiyaa loytsi daro mac'c'a asaakka shiishshaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Hewaa diraw, taani taappe kase Yerusaalamen de'eedda ooppenne aad'd'eeda wolk'k'aama asaa gidaaddi. Ta aad'd'eeda eratetsaykka taananna wurssetsay gakkanaw de'eedda." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ta ayifii s'eelleeddabaanne ta wozanay amotteeddabaa ubbaa demmaad; ta asatetsay koyiyaa nashshechchaa ubbaakka diggabeykke. Taani ootseedda oosuwaa ubbaan nashetay; ta daaburaw wod'iikka hewaa. 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Gido shin, hewaa ubbaa ootsa simmaade taani akeekiyaa wode, loytsi taani aw daabureeddawe ubbaykka mela gidiyaawaa be'aad. Saluwaa gufantsan go""iyaawe ayaynne baawa; ubbaykka c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, taani aad'd'eeda eratetsay, eeyyatetsaynne gooshshay ayentto paac'c'aade eranaw k'ofaa doommaad. Kaatiyaa kotaan kaatetiyaa hara kaatii kase oosetteeddawaappe aad'd'iyaa harabaa ay ootsanee?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Taani hawaadan yaagaad; «Tumukka poo'uu d'umaappe keekiyaawaadan, aad'd'eeda eratetsay eeyyatetsaappe keekee." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 C'inc'c'a asatuu barenttu denddiyaa sa'aanne biide gakkiyaa sa'aa eriino; shin eeyyatuu hewaa ubbaa erikkino» yaagaad. Gidoppe attina, unttunttu laa""uwaa wurssetsaykka ittuwaa." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Taani ta wozanaan, «Eeyyaa gakkiyaa kaac'ay taanakka gakkee; yaatina, taani aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidiyaawe taana ayaa maaddii?» yaagaade k'oppaad. K'ay taani ta wozanaan, «Hawe ubbabaykka mela!» yaagaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Ayaw gooppe, eeyyina aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidina, hayk'k'uwaappe hefintsan simmiide, Aa hassayiyaawe baawa; sintsappe yiyaa laytsatuwaan nuuni ubbaykka dogetti attana. Eeyyay hayk'k'iyaawaadan, aad'd'eeda eranchchaykka hayk'k'ee." 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Metuwaappe attina, go""iyaawe bayinna diraw, ha sa'aa de'uu taana iiteedda. Hewekka mela; c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Saluwaa gufantsan taani loytsi daaburaade demmeedda ta mas'uwaa ubbaa taappe guyyiyaan yiyaa uraw yeggaade biyaa diraw, taani daabureeddawe ubbay taana iiteedda." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Taappe guyyiyaan yiyaa bitanii aad'd'eeda eranchchentto eeyentto ooni erii? Shin I oona gidinakka, taani loytsi daabureeddawaanne ta c'inc'c'atetsan taani demmeeddawaa ubbaa barew akkiide, goda gidanawaa; yaatooppe, hewekka mela." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Hewaa diraw, saluwaa gufantsan hawaa keeshshaa ayaw daaburaaditaashsha gaade ta wozanaan kayyotaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Asi bare de'eedda laytsan barew de'eedda aad'd'eeda eratetsan, eraaninne hiillan daaburiide demmeeddawaa ubbaa ayinne daaburibeennawoo yeggiide bee. Hewekka k'ay, hadanne likke gidennawaa." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Yaatina, saluwaa gufantsan Asay loytsi daaburiide ootseeddawaappe ubbaappe ayaa go""aa demmeeddee?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 I bare de'uwaa laytsan daaburiyaa daaburay ubbay kayyottooppenne kayyoppe harabaa ayinne aw gujjenna; haray atto k'ammakka Aa huup'ii k'ofaappe shemppenna; gido shin, he ubbaykka mela." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Hewaa diraw, asaw go""aa gidiyaawe ayee gooppe, Asay bare daabureeddabaappe miiddinne ushiide nashettiyaawaa. He nashechchaykka k'ay S'oossaa kushiyaappe imetteeddawaa gidiyaawaa taani akeekaad." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Ayaw gooppe, Aa shene gidanawaa d'ayooppe, min ushshinakka asaw nashechchay hak'an beettii?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 S'oossaa nashechchiyaa uraw S'oossay c'inc'c'atetsaa, eratetsaanne nashshechchaa immee; nagaranchchaw mata I daaburiide shiishshanaadan, daaburaa immee; shin I shiishsheeddawaa S'oossay akkiide, barew yayyiyaawoo haraw immee. Hewaa diraw, ha ubbaykka hadanne c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Ubbabaw wodii de'ee; saluwaappe garssa baggana oosettiyaabaw ubbaw, Aa laytsay laytsay de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Hewaa diraw, yelettanaw wodii de'ee; hayk'k'anawukka wodii de'ee. Tokkanaw wodii de'ee; tokkeeddawaa shoddanawukka wodii de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Wod'anaw wodii de'ee; patsanawukka wodii de'ee. Kolanaw wodii de'ee; k'ay kees's'anawukka wodii de'ee. 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Yeekkanaw wodii de'ee; miic'c'anawukka wodii de'ee. Kayyottanaw wodii de'ee; k'ay nashettiide yes's'anawukka wodii de'ee. 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Shuchchaa laalanaw wodii de'ee; shuchchaa shiishshanawukka wodii de'ee. K'oomettanaw wodii de'ee; k'ay shaakkettanawukka wodii de'ee. 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Koyiide demmanaw wodii de'ee; bayzzanawukka wodii de'ee. Shiishshi oyk'k'anaw wodii de'ee; laalanawukka wodii de'ee. 
Ecclesiastes3:7 Peed'anaw wodii de'ee; sikkanawukka wodii de'ee. C'ou gaanaw wodii de'ee; k'ay haasayanawukka wodii de'ee. 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Dosanaw wodii de'ee; is's'anawukka wodii de'ee. Olaw wodii de'ee; saroo wodii de'ee. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Yaatina, oosanchchay bare daabureedda daaburaappe ayaa wod'iyaa demmeeddee?" 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Taani k'ay, asaa naanatuu daaburiide ootsana mala, S'oossay immeedda gedii loytsi dees'o gidiyaawaa be'aad." 
Ecclesiastes3:11 S'oossay ubbabaa Aa wodiyaan wodiyaan loytsiide ootseedda. S'oossay asaa wozanaan med'inatetsaa ootseedda; hewaa gidooppenne, S'oossay ootseeddawaa ubbaa koyiruwaappe wurssetsay gakkanaw, Asay wurssiide eranaw danddayenna." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Hewaa diraw, Asay bare de'eedda laytsan lo""iyaawaa ootsiyaawaappenne, nashetiyaawaappe aad'd'iyaawe ayaynne bayinnawaa taani akeekaad." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 K'ay, asaw aw Aa daaburaw waaga gidiyaawe muussaaninne ushshan barena nashechchiyaawaa; hewekka aw S'oossaappe imetteedda imotaa." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 S'oossay ootseeddawe ubbay med'inaw de'iyaawaa gidiyaawaa taani eraad; I ootseeddawaa bollan gujjanaw woy aappe haa guutsanaw danddayettenna. S'oossay hewaa ootseeddawe, Asay barew yayyiide bonchchanaassa." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Hai haniidde de'iyaabay woy sintsappe hananaw de'iyaabay ubbay kase aad'd'eeda wodiyaan haneeddawaa; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay kase haneeddawe zaari zaariidekka hananaadan ootsee." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 K'ay taani, saluwaa gufantsan geeshsha pirddaa sa'aan iitatetsay, s'illotetsaa saankka nagaray de'iyaawaa be'aaddi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Ta wozanaan, «S'oossay s'illuwaanne iitaa laa""uwaakka pirddaw shiishshana; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay allaalle ubbawunne oosuwaa ubbaw wodiyaa keeri wotseedda» yaagaade k'oppaaddi." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 K'ay taani ta wozanaan, «Asay do'atuwaappe keekennawe unttuntta bessanaw, S'oossay unttuntta paac'c'ee» yaagaad." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Ayaw gooppe, asaa gidina, do'atuwaa gidinakka, unttunttu kaac'ay ittuwaa; ittuu hayk'k'iyaawaadan, yenkkuukka hayk'k'ee. K'ay laa""uukka itti c'arkkuwaa shemppiino; hewaa diraw, asatuukka do'atuwaappe keekkikkino; hewekka mela." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Unttunttu laauukka itti sa'aa biino; laauukka biittaappe med'etteedda diraw, biittaw simmiino." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Yaatina, asaa shemppuu saluwaa pude kesiyaawaanne do'atuwaa shemppuu biittaa c'iimmaw duge wod'd'iyaawaa shaakkiide eranaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Hewaa diraw, Asay bare ootseedda oosuwaan nashetiyaawaappe keekiyaawe harabay aw bayinnawaa be'aad. Ayaw gooppe, aw de'iyaa lo""o kaac'ay hewaa s'alala. Asi hayk'k'i kichchooppe aappe guyyiyaan haniyaawaa bessanaw, Aa hayk'k'uwaappe guyye ahanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Taani k'aykka, saluwaa gufantsan Asay asaa ayaa keeshshaa naak'k'inttonne s'eellaad. Naak'etteeddawanttu barentta mintsetsiyaawaa d'ayiide yeekkiino. Naak'k'iyaawanttoo wolk'k'aama maatay de'iyaawaappe attina, naak'ettiyaawantta maaddiyaawe ooninne baawa." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Hewaa diraw, taani, «Ha""i pas'a de'iyaawanttuppe kase hayk'k'i kichcheeddawanttu keeka» yaagaad." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Gido shin, ha laa""uwaappekka aad'd'iide k'ay, mule yelettibeennawanttu kaac'ay lo""a; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu saluwaa gufantsan oosettiyaa naak'uwaa muliyaa be'ibeykkino." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Asay bare amotteeddabaa demmanaw loytsi daaburiide ootsee; shin he daaburay bare laggiyaa bollan k'anaatiyaa k'ofaappe denddeeddawaana gidiyaawaa taani akeekaad. Hewekka k'ay mela; c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala. 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Bare kushiyaa s'aas'iide, utti aggiyaa azallay, koshaan hayk'k'ee." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Daaburaaninne c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala jaaman daaburiide demmiyaa laau kushiyaappe, woppan demmiyaa itti kushiyaa daree." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 K'ay taani, saluwaa gufantsan mela gideddawaa itti harabaakka be'aaddi." 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Hewekka itti barekka de'iyaa bitaniyaabaa; aw attuma na'ay woy ishi baawa. Shin I daaburiyaa daaburaw zaway baawa; k'ay barew de'iyaawan alenna. I barekka barena oochchiidde, «I ta hawaa oossi daaburaytaa? Taana ta huup'iyaa ayaw nashshechchaa diggaytaa?» yaagiide oochcheedda. Hewekka k'ay hadabaanne tugga de'uwaa." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Ittuwaa gidiyaawaappe laaa gidiyaawe loa; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu oosuu ittuwaawaappe aad'd'iide, lo""o ayifiyaa immanaw danddayee." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 K'ay, laa""uwaappe ittuu kunddooppe ittuu dentsee; shin barekka de'iyaa uray kunddooppenne Aa dentsiyaawe bayinna diraw, aw aayye ana!" 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Meego wodiyaan laauu ittippe gisooppe hoee; shin barekka gisiyaa uraa hak'appe hoanaw danddayii? 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Itti Asay barekka teanaw danddayenna metuwaa laau asatuu ittippe ek'ettiide, te""anaw danddayiino. Heezzu kutsaan dook'etteedda wodoruukka elle duus's'enna." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Loo zoriyaa akkena c'ima kaatiyaappe hiyyeesaa gidooppenne, aad'd'eeda eranchcha yalagay keeka." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Ayaw gooppe, I he hiyyeesaa gidiyaa sa'aappe denddiide, woy k'asho golliyaappe kesiide, bare biittan kaate gidiyaa sa'aa gakkanaw danddayee." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Saluwaa gufantsan de'iyaanne hamettiyaa asaa ubbay kaatiyaa kawutetsaa araataa laattiyaa yalaga kaalliyaawaa be'aad. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Itti kaatii mooddiyaa Asay paydu bayinna c'ora gidanaw danddayee. Shin kawutaappe I kichchiyaa wode, I ootseeddabaw ooninne Aa galatenna. Hewaa diraw, ha ubbaykka mela; c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaabaa mala." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 S'oossaa golliyaa geliyaa wode, ne gediyaa akeekaade tangga. Sisanaw mataa shiik'iyaawe, eeyyatuu yarshshuwaa shiishshiyaawaappe aad'd'ee; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu iita oosuwaa ootsiidde de'iyaawaa erikkino." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Ne doonaan haasayanaw, S'oossaa sintsankka biddanaw elleelloppa. K'ay ittibaa S'oossaw immana gaade ne wozanaan elleellaade geppa kichchoppa; ayaw gooppe, S'oossay saluwaan, neeni k'ay hawaan sa'aan de'aassa; hewaa diraw, ne haasayiyaa k'aalay guutsa gido." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Hirggay dariyaa wode, k'amman akumuukka daree; hewaadankka, biddetsaa daruu eeyyatetsaa k'aalaa kessee." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 S'oossaw neeni geppeeddawaa polanaw gamoppa; ayaw gooppe, gam""iyaa eeyyatuwaan S'oossay nashettena. Hewaa diraw, neeni geppeeddawaa ubbaa pola." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Ittibaa S'oossaw geppiide, polennan aggiyaawaappe koyiro geppennaan aggiyaawe lo""a." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Neena ne doonay nagaran yeggennaadan, ne doonaa zawaappe aad'd'eeda yeda ootsoppa; k'ay S'oossaw ootsiyaawoo, «Kasekka hawaa taani akeekenan geppaad» gooppa. Ayaw gooppe, hewaa S'oossay loytsi hank'k'etsiyaa diraw, neeni daaburaade demmeeddawaa, ne kushiyaa oosuwaa ubbaa I bare hank'k'uwaan k'uc'c'iide d'ayissanaw danddayee." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Daro akumuwaa akumettooppenne woy k'ay darobaa haasayooppenne he ubbaykka mela; hewaa diraw, neeni hewaa agga agaade S'oossaw yayya." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Itti kawutetsay bare biittan de'iyaa hiyyeesatuwaa naak'k'ishiininne pirddaa geellayishin neeni be'ooppe, darina malalettoppa. Itti itti kaappoo aappe bollaanna suntsettiide, Aa s'eelliyaa hara kaappuu de'ee. K'ay unttunttu laa""uwaappekka bollaanna suntsettiide, unttuntta s'eelliyaa hara kaappatuukka de'iino." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Haray attina, kaatiyaa gidooppenne, goshshaappe beettiyaa ayifetuu d'ayooppe, woppan de'anaw danddayenna." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Biraa dosiyaa uraw biri gidi erenna; durettanaw siik'iyaa uraykka miishshaa kalli erenna. Shin ha ubbaykka mela. 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Duretetsay dariyaa wode, miyaabaykka hewaa keeshshaa daree. Yaatina, bare mas'uwaa c'oo ayifiyaan s'eelliide, «Taani dure» gaanaappe attina, harabaa aw ayaa maaddii!" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Oosuwaa ootsiyaa Asay guutsa min, daro min, saro gem""ishshuwaa gem""ishiide ak'ee; shin durii bare duretetsaw ubbaa wode un""ettiide k'oppiyaa diraw, gem""ishshuwaa d'ayiide de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Saluwaa gufantsan loytsi kayyoyiyaawaa harabaakka taani be'aad; iita wodiyaan barena maaddo giide, Asay barew de'eeddawaappe guyye wotsiide dagayee." 
Ecclesiastes5:14 K'ay he duretetsay itti iitabay gakketina d'ayi kichchee. I na'aa yeleeddawaa gidooppekka, na'aa laatissiyaawaana d'ayiide, mela attee." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Asi ubbay koyiro kallo yeletteeddawaadan, mela kushiyaanna simmiide baana. Ay keeshshaa I daaburiide ootsooppenne, bare daabureeddabaappe akkiide biyaabay ayaynne baawa." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Asi kallo yelettiide, kallo guyye simmiyaawekka k'ay loytsi kayyottiyaa iitabaa. Aa daaburay ubbay c'arkkuwaa uc'c'iyaawaadan mela gidowaappe sintsan, I hewan ayaa maadettii?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 I bare laytsaa ubbaa d'uma de'uwaan, kayyuwaan, yilotiyaawaan, harggiyaaninne hank'k'uwaan wurssee." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Hewe hewaa gidooppenne, taani akeekeedda itti lo""obay de'ee; hewekka saluwaa gufantsan S'oossay Asay de'anaadan immeedda k'antsa laytsaa giddon, Asay daaburaappe miyaawe, ushiyaawenne nashettiyaawe lo""anne bessiyaawaa. Ayaw gooppe, Aa kaac'ay hewaa." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 S'oossay asaw duretetsaanne mas'uwaa immiyaawe, bare daaburaa gatiyaa demmiide, miiddinne ushiide nashettanaassa. Hewekka k'ay S'oossaappe aw imetteedda imotaa." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 S'oossay Aa wozanaan ubbaa wode nashshechchaa kuntsi wotsiyaa diraw, I bare de'uwaa laytsaabaa daro k'oppenna." 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Saluwaa gufantsan asaa bolla gakkiyaa loytsi iitabaa taani be'aad. 
Ecclesiastes6:2 S'oossay asaw mas'uwaa, duretetsaanne bonchchuwaa ubbaa immee; aw koshshiyaabaappe ayaanne pac'issenna. Shin, aw imetteedda mas'uunne duretetsaa ubbaan keetsaw nashettana mala, kumentsaa sheniyaa aw immenna. Hewaa s'alalaakka gidenna; I daaburiide demmeeddawaan hara daaburibeennawe nashshettanaadan ootsee. Hewekka hadanne loytsi kayyottiyaa iitabaa." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Itti Asay s'eetu naanatuwaa gakkanaw yeliide, adussa laytsaa de'iide ec'anaw danddayee; shin I barew imetteeddawaan nashettiyaa kaac'ay aw d'ayooppe, k'ay wurssetsan bonchcho mooguwaakka moogettennan attooppe, aappe bare daay uluwaan hayk'k'iide yeletteedda boshay keeka gay." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Ayaw gooppe, he boshay c'oo yeletteedda; simmiide k'ay, Aa ooninne hassayenna d'umaw bee; Aa suntsaykka he d'uman kamettiide attee." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 I aawaa poo'uwaa be'ibeenna; de'uwaabaykka ayentto eribeenna. Hinkko bitaniyaawaappe aad'd'iide shemppiyaawe Aa. 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Hewaa diraw, nashechchay bayinnan de'ishiina, laa""u sha""u laytsaa de'iyaa asaappe he boshaa kaac'ay lo""a. Ayaw gooppe, wurssetsan laa""uukka itti sa'aa biino." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Asi daaburiide ootsiyaa ubbay barew miyaawaa demmanaassa; shin Aa uluu awudenne gidanawaa gi erenna. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Yaatina, c'inc'c'a Asay eeyyaappe ayaan keekii? Hiyyeesaykka loytsi c'inc'c'iide, haratuu sintsan waan simerettanentto eriyaawe aw ayaa maaddii?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Ayifiyaan be'iyaawe amottiyaawaappe keeka. K'ay hewekka c'arkkuwaa oyk'k'anaw yederssiyaawaa mala mela. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Haniyaabay ubbaykka kasetiide kuushetti utteedda. Itti itti Asay waananaw de'intto, adussa wodiyaappe kase baggan eretti utteedda; k'ay ay asaynne bareppe minniyaawaanna gaaddatanaw danddayenna." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Haasayay c'orattiyaa wode, hadabay c'orattee; hewe yaatina, asaa ayaa maaddii?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Hada gidiide, kuwaadan c'oo aad'd'iyaa guutsa laytsaa bare Asay wootiide aatsanaw koshshintto eriyaawe oonee? K'aykka Asay hayk'k'iide bi kichchina, saluwaa gufantsan hananaw de'iyaawaa asaw odanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Gatii alo gideedda loo shittuwaappe loo suntsay aad'd'ee; yelettiyaa gallassaappekka hayk'k'iyaa gallassay loa. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Gibiraa golliyaa biyaawaappe, yeekko golliyaa biyaawe lo""a; ayaw gooppe, asaa ubbaa wurssetsay hayk'k'o; pas'a de'iyaa asaykka hewaa bare wozanaan wotsanaw koshshee." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Miichchaappe kayyuu keeka; ayaw gooppe, kayyuu som""uwaa kares'issooppekka wozanaa poo'issee." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Ubbaa gede nashechchiyaawaa s'alalaa k'oppiyaa uray de'ooppe, he uray booza; shin c'inc'c'a Asay hayk'k'uwaabaakka k'oppee." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Eeyyatuu sabbiide yes's'iyaa yetsaa sisiyaawaappe, aad'd'eeda eranchcha Asay seeriyaa seeraa sisiyaawe lo""a." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Eeyyaa miichchay, suuppa aguntsaa taman yeggina ees's'iidde d'uu'iyaawaa mala. Hewekka k'ay mela." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Sugetsaa oosuu aad'd'eeda eranchchaa booza kessee; magans's'aa asaappe akkiyaawekka wozanaa bayzzee. 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Ay yewoo gidooppenne, doometsaappe wurssetsay keeka; k'ay otoranchcha uraappekka danddayanchcha uray keeka." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Hank'k'uu azallatuu haluwaa kesanaw go'ettiyaa miishshaa gidiyaa diraw, elle hank'k'ettoppa." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 «Hai wodiyaappe kase aad'd'eeda wodii ayaw keeka gideedee?» gaade oochchoppa; ayaw gooppe, hewaa mala ooshay aad'd'eeda eranchcha giyaa Asay oochchiyaa ooshaa gidenna." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Ha sa'aan Asay ubbay aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidanaw koshshee; ayaw gooppe, aad'd'eeda eratetsaa demmiyaawe mas'uwaa laattiyaawaappe guus's'enna." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Miishshay asaa iitaappe kammiide ashshiyaawaadan, aad'd'eeda eratetsaykka ashshee. Shin, aad'd'eeda eratetsay miishshaappe dariyaawe, I asaw de'uwaa immanaw danddayiyaawaana." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ane S'oossay ootseeddawaa akeeka! S'oossay geellayeeddabaa ooni suurissanaw danddayii? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 New ubbabay giigeedda wodiyaan nashetta; k'ay metuu gakkiyaa wodiyaankka akeeka; ayaw gooppe, nashshechchaa gidina, meto gidina, S'oossay yeddiyaa wodiyaan yee. Shin hak'awe kasetiide yaanentto, neeni erakka." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ha mela gideedda laytsan tawaan darobaa taani be'aad. Hewekka, geellay bare geellatetsaa ootsiidde, adussa laytsaa de'iyaa wode, s'illotetsaa ootsiyaa s'illuu k'antsa laytsan hayk'k'ee." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Hewaa diraw, neeni elle d'ayennaadan, loytsi daro s'illuwaa woy loytsi daro aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidoppa." 
Ecclesiastes7:17 K'ay wodii bayinnan neeni hayk'k'ennaadan, ubbaa balaa iitanne gidoppa; ubbaa mojojja eeyyanne gidoppa." 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Ha ubbankka S'oossaw yayyiyaa uray, meto ubbaappe s'oonuwaan kesanaw danddayiyaa diraw, neeni daro iita woy daro s'illuwaanne gidennaan giddo asaa gida." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay aad'd'eeda eranchchatoo immiyaa wolk'k'ay tammu katamatuwaa mooddiyaa asatoo wolk'k'aappe daree. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 S'illobaa s'alala ootsiidde, nagaraa ootsenna Asay ha sa'aa bollan baawa." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Asay haasayiyaa k'aalaa muliyaa hayzzaadde polana gooppa; neeni muliyaa hayzzana gooppe, ne k'oomay neena shek'k'ishshin, neeni sisana." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 K'ay neenikka ne huup'iyaan haratuwaa shek'k'eeddawaa ne wozanay eree. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Hawaa ubbaa taani aad'd'eeda eratetsan pilggaade s'eellaaddi; yaataade, «Taanikka aad'd'eedda eranchcha gidana» yaagaaddi. Shin taani geeddawaadan hanibeenna." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay ubbaa gedekka haakuwaan de'iyaawaanne c'iimmabaa; yaatina, Aa k'oriide demmanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Taani eranaw, pilgga s'eellanawunne aad'd'eeda eratetsaanne yewuwaa ubbaa wurssetsaa eranaw, k'ay nagaray eeyyatetsaa gidiyaawaanne eeyyatetsaykka gooshshaa gidiyaawaa eranaw, ta wozanaan yuushsha yuushshaadde k'oppaad." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Taani hayk'k'uwaappe aad'd'iide c'ammiyaa hara ittibaa pilgga s'eellaade demmaad; hewekka, Izi wozanay p'ire woy iggir birataa gidina, izi kushii sanssalataa mala gideedda itti mac'c'a mishiratibaa. S'oossaa nashechchiyaa uray iippe kessi akkana; shin nagaranchchaa Aa bare p'iriyaa waas'aade oyk'k'ana." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Eranchchay hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani kaala kaalaade, pilgga s'eellaade, haraa demmeeddawe hawaa." 
Ecclesiastes7:28 Hewekka, taani hachchi gakkanaw koyaadde demmabeennawaa. Sha""u attuma asaa giddoppe bonchchuu bessiyaa itti asaa s'alalaa demmaad; shin mac'c'a asaa giddoppe ittinnonne demmanaw danddayabeykke." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Taani k'oraade demmeedda harabay, S'oossay asaa suure k'ofay de'iyaawantta ootsiide med'd'eedda; shin Asay daro hiillaa ogiyaa koyiide beedda» yaageedda." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha asaa mala Asay oonee? Yewotuwaa ubbaa biletsaa eriyaawe oonee? Aad'd'eeda eratetsay pashikkissiide, d'umeedda som""uwaa poo'issee." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Kaatiyaw azazetta; ayaw gooppe, azazettanaw neeni kase S'oossaa sintsan c'aak'k'a uttaadda." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ubbaa wode iita oosuwaa ootsoppa; ayaw gooppe, kaatii bare koyeeddawaa ootsanaw danddayiyaa diraw, neeni Aa sintsappe elle d'ayana." 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Ubbabaa ootsanaw kaatiyaw maatay de'ee; yaatina, «Ayaw hawaa ootsaaddii?» yaagiide Aa oochchanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Aa azazuwaa poliyaa uray murettena; aad'd'eeda eranchcha Asay likke gidiyaa wodiyaanne ootsiyaa ogiyaa eree. 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Itti asaa bollan dees'o metuu gakkinttonne, yewuwaa ubbaw aw Aa wodiinne Aa ogii ogii de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Sintsappe hanana timbbitiyaa eriyaawe baawa; hewaa diraw, «Hawe hanana» giide odanaw danddayiyaawe oonee?" 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Shemppuu shaakkettiide biyaa gallassi oyk'k'iide, te""anaw danddayiyaa Asay baawa; woy hayk'k'uu bare gallassan yeennaadan digganaw danddayiyaa asaykka baawa. Hewe ooninne kessi akkanaw danddayenna olaa. Hewaa diraw, hayk'k'uwaa sintsan iitatetsi iitaa ootsiyaa uraa ashshi akkena." 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Saluwaa gufantsan haniyaawaa ubbaa taani akeekaade k'oppiyaa wode, itti Asay barew mooddiyaa maataa hara asaa k'ohanaw go'ettiyaawaa be'aad." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 K'ay iita asatuu bonchchuwaan moogettishina be'aad. Hewaappe aad'd'iyaawekka k'ay, mooguwaappe simmiyaa wode, unttunttu he iitatetsaa ootseedda katamaa Asay shiik'iide, unttuntta sabbishshina sisaad. Hewe ubbaykka mela." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Aassi halchchiide iitabaa ootsiyaa gaasuu, iitabaa ootseedda asatuwaa ellekka muriyaabay baynna diraassa." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nagaranchchay s'eetu gede iitabaa ootsishina, Aa laytsay aduk'k'ooppekka, S'oossaw yayyiyaawanttoo sa'ay lo""anawaa taani eray." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Iitatuu S'oossaa yayyenna diraw, sarotetsay unttunttoo baawa; S'oossaw unttunttu yayyenna diraw, unttunttu barekka kuwaadan k'aammana." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Ha sa'aan oosettiyaa itti hadabay de'ee; hewekka, geeshsha asatuu nagaranchchatoo yiyaa muruwaa akkina, nagaranchchatuu k'ay, geeshshatoo yiyaa lo""obaa akkiino. Ha ubbaykka mela." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Hewaa diraw, Asay bare de'uwaan nashetooppe lo""a gaade k'ofaa immay; ayaw gooppe, Asay miyaawaappe, ushiyaawaappenne barena nashechchiyaawaappe aad'd'eeda lo""obay aw saluwaappe garssa baggana haray baawa. S'oossay aw immeedda laytsan I daaburiide demmeeddawaan hewaadan ootsooppe, nashetanaw danddayee." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Taani aad'd'eeda eratetsay ayentto eranawunne Asay ha sa'aa bollan daaburiyaa daaburaa akeekanaw halchchaad; wurssetsan Asay gemishuwaa d'ayiide ootsiyaa duus's'enna oosuu de'iyaawaa be'aad. 
Ecclesiastes8:17 Hewaappe guyyiyaan, S'oossay ootseeddawaa ubbaa be'aad. K'ay saluwaappe garssa baggan oosetteedda oosuwaa Asay pilggiide eranaw danddayennawaa eraad. Asi ay keeshshaa daaburiide pilggi s'eellooppenne, Aa biletsaa eranaw danddayenna. K'ay aad'd'eeda eranchcha asay, «Taani hawaa eray» gooppenne, I eranaw danddayenna." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Ha ubbaa yewotuwaabaa adussa wodiyaa taani k'oppeeddawaappe guyyiyaan, aad'd'eeda eranchchaanne s'illuwaa gideedda asatuunne unttunttu oosotuu S'oossaa kushiyan de'iino gaade k'achchaad; shin siik'uu naagiyaa, is'uu naagiyaa ooninne barena naagiyaawaa kasetiide erenna." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Dummatetsay bayinnan de'ishiina, ubbaa gakkiyaa kaac'ay ittuwaa; s'illuwaa gidina makkalanchcha gidina, lo""a gidina iita gidina, geeshsha gidina tuna gidina, yarshshuwaa yarshshiyaawaa gidina yarshshenawaa gidina, unttunttu ubbaa kaac'ay ittuwaa. Lo""o asaw nagaranchchaawaappe keekkiyaa kaac'i baawa; c'aak'uwaa c'aak'k'anaw yayyiyaawekka c'aak'k'anaw s'aliyaawaappe dummatenna." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Asaa ubbaa kaac'ay ittuwaa gidiyaawe, ha sa'aan de'iyaa hara iitatetsaakka mala daro iita. Asi de'uwaan de'eedda laytsan ubbaan Aa wozanay iitatetsaaninne gooshshan kumiide de'ee; wurssetsan hayk'k'i aggee." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Hayk'k'eedda gaammuwaappe pas'a de'iyaa kanay keeka; ayaw gooppe, pas'a de'iyaawanttunna de'iyaa asaw hidootay de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Pas'a de'iyaa asatuu itti gede hayk'k'anaw de'iyaawaa eriino; shin hayk'k'eeddawanttu ayaanne erikkino. Unttunttu mulekka dogetti kichcheeddawanttu gidiyaa diraw, ayinne maaddikkino." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Unttunttu siik'uu, is'uunne k'anaatii ubbay unttunttunna ittippe d'ayikichcheedda. Hewaa diraw, hawaappe hini baggan saluwaa gufantsan oosettiyaa yewuwaa ubbaan unttunttoo med'inawukka kaac'i baawa." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Baade, ne k'umaa nashshechchan ma; ne woyniyaa eessaakka ne wozanay pashikkishina usha. Ayaw gooppe, S'oossay hewaa new kaseppekka immi wotseedda." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ubbaa wode ne mayuu bootsa gido; ne huup'iyankka zayitiyaa oketa. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Saluwaappe garssa baggana S'oossay new immeedda ha mela de'uwaan, ne mela de'otuwaa ubbaan neeni siik'iyaa ne machchattinna nashetaadde de'a; ayaw gooppe, neeni saluwaappe garssa baggana daaburaade ootseeddawaa ubbaappe neena gakkiyaa saamay hewaa." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ne kushii ootsanaw demmeeddawaa ubbaa ne kumentsaa wolk'k'an ootsa; ayaw gooppe, neeni baanasan duufuwaan oosuu, woy halchchuu, woy eray, woy aad'd'eeda eratetsi baawa." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Taani saluwaappe garssaana harabaakka be'aad; hewekka, elleelliyaa wotsanchchatuu ubbaa wode s'oonikkino; woy mino olanchchatuukka ubbaa wode olan s'oonikkino; woy aad'd'eeda eranchchatuu ubbaa wode k'umaa demmikkino; woy c'inc'c'atuu ubbaa wode duretikkino; woy tamaareedda asatuu ubbaa wode sabettikkino. Shin ubbaykka kaac'aynne wodii ootsowaadan hanee." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Hewaa bollakka k'ay, sintsappe yaanaw de'iyaa meto wodii awude gakkanentto, eranaw danddayiyaa Asay baawa; kafuu paalliidde p'iriyaan geliyaawaadan, woy molii maaggan oyk'k'ettiyaawaadan, Asay ubbay k'oppennaan gakkiyaa iita wodiyaan oyk'ettee." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Saluwaa gufantsuwan taani be'eeddabay harabaykka de'ee; hewekka aad'd'eeda eratetsay wolk'k'aama leemiso gidiyaawaa. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Itti biittan itti guutsa Asay de'iyaa k'eeri katamatta de'aw; he katamatto itti wolk'k'aama kaatii olanaw denddee. Izo dooddeedda. 
Ecclesiastes9:15 K'ay, itti hiyyeesaa shin c'inc'c'a gideedda bitanii, he katamatin de'ee; I bare aad'd'eeda eratetsan he katamaa ashsheeda. Shin, he hiyyeesaa bitaniyaa zaaretsiide hassayeeddabay baawa." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Taani, «Aad'd'eeda eratetsay wolk'k'aappe daree» yaagaad. Gido shin, aad'd'eeda eranchcha gidooppenne, hiyyeesaa Asay kad'ettee; I haasayiyaawaakka hayzziyaawe baawa." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Hewaa gidooppekka, deriyaa mooddiyaawe azallatuwaa shiik'uwaan waassiyaa waasuwaa sisiyaawaappe, leelan odettiyaa aad'd'eeda eranchchaa k'aalaa sisiyaawe lo""a." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Aad'd'eeda eratetsay olaa miishshaappe loa; shin itti nagaranchcha Asay daro loobaa bayzzee. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Hayk'k'eedda uduns's'etuu sawiyaa zayitiyaa shittuwaa s'ink'k'etsanaw danddayiino; hewaadankka, guutsa eeyyatetsay aad'd'eeda eratetsaanne wolk'k'aama bonchchuwaa bayzzee." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Aad'd'eeda eranchcha asaa wozanay Aa ushechchaw kaaletsee; shin booza asaa wozanay haddirssaw kaaletsee. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Eeyya Asay ogiyaan hamettiyaa wodekka, aw akeeki baawa; hewaappe denddeeddawaan I booza gidiyaawaa Asay ubbay eree." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ne kaappuu ne bollan hank'k'ettooppenne, ne suntsetteedda sa'aappe kichcha kichchoppa; ayaw gooppe, c'o""u giide danddayiyaawe wolk'k'aama bayzzuwaakka atto giissee." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Saluwaa gufantsan taani be'eedda hara iitabay de'ee; hewekka deriyaa mooddiyaawanttu ootsiyaa naak'uwaa. 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Eeyyatuu daro d'ok'k'a suntsatetsaa oyk'k'iide de'iyaa wode, duretuu hirkki zik'k'a sa'aan utteeddino." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Taani, ayiletuu mooddiyaawanttudan paraa toggiide biishshiinanne k'ay mooddiyaawanttu ayiletuwaadan gediyaan hamettishin be'aad." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Ollaa bookkiyaa uray he ollaan I kunddana; k'ay gimbbiyaa dirssaa koliyaa uraa shooshshay dukkana. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Shuchchaa Aa sa'aappe aatsi yeggiyaa uray he shuchchaan deshettee; k'ay mitsaa k'oo'iyaa uraykka he mitsan deshettee. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Dulddumeedda kalttaa poshennan c'oo k'oo'ooppe, daro wolk'k'aa wurssee; shin aad'd'eeda eran ootsiyaawe oosuwaa darssee." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Shooshshay dukki diggina, shooshshaa jollissanaw ayanttiyaa ayanttuu he uraw aynne maaddenna." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Aad'd'eeda eranchchaa haasayay aw bonchchuwaa imissee; shin eeyyay bare doonaappe keseedda k'aalan I barew metuwaan gelee. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Eeyyay bare haasayaa booza k'aalan doommiide, iitatetsaaninne gooshshan polee." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Eeyyay darobaa haasayee. Gidooppenne, sintsappe hananaw de'iyaawaa ooninne erenna. Asi hayk'k'i kichchina, hananaw de'iyaawaa aw odanaw danddayiyaawe baawa." 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Eeyya Asay bare oosuwaan daaburee; I bare golle biyaa ogiyaa erenna. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 K'eeri na'aa gideedda kawuunne wontta guuraanna gibiraa giigissiide, barenttoo miyaa kaappatuu de'iyaa biittay new aayye ana!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Bonchchetteedda kawuunne matsuwaassa gidennaan wolk'k'aanne minotetsaa demmanaw maaran miyaanne ushiyaa kaappatuu de'iyaa biittata galatetteeddaano. 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Bitanii azalla gidooppe, Aa kaaray woddee; Aa kushii oosuwaa billowaa gidooppe, Aa Gollii aatsee." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 K'umaa miyaawaaninne woyniyaa eessaa ushiyaawan nashechchay beettee; shin miishshay ubbabaa shammee. 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Sisiyaawe baawa gaade ne wozanaa k'ofaan gidooppenne, kaatiyaa boroppa; woy ne gisiyaa kifiliyaan duriyaa boroppa; ayaw gooppe, ne geeddawaa saluwaa kafuu woy, k'efiyaana med'etatuu biide, unttunttoo odana." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ne ukitsaa haatsaa bollan olaa; daro gallassatuwaappe guyyiyaan, neeni zaaretsaade Aa demmana." 
Ecclesiastes11:2 New de'iyaa mas'uwaa laappun woy, ubbaa hosppun sa'aan shaakkaade wotsa; ayaw gooppe, sintsappe ha sa'aa bolla ayi iitabay yaanentto, neeni erakka." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Shaarii haatsaan kumeeddabaa gidooppe, biittaa bollan iraa tigee. Mitsay huup'issa kunddina gedissa kunddina, he bare kunddeedda sa'aan de'ee." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 C'arkkuwaa hanotaa naagiyaa ooninne katsaa zerenna; k'ay shaarii denddanaw naagiyaa ooninne bare katsaa c'akkenna. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 C'arkkuu hak'anna bintto, Aa ogiyaa erakka; k'ay na'ay aatti uluwaan waan med'ettinttokka erakka. Hewaadankka, ubbabaa med'd'iyaa S'oossay bare oosuwaa wooti ootsintto, eranaw danddayakka." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Wontta guuran gidinakka omarssan, ne zeretsaa zeriyaawaa aggoppa; ayaw gooppe, wonttawe lo""anee omarssawe lo""anee neeni erakka." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Poo'uu nashechchiyaawaa. Awa ayifiyaa be'iyaawekka loobaa. 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Asi loytsi adussa laytsaa ha sa'aan de'ooppe, he ubbaa laytsankka nashetto. Shin d'uma wodetuwaa k'oppa. Ayaw gooppe, he wodetuu aduk'k'ana. Yaanaw ubbabaykka mela." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Neenoo yalagaw, yalagatetsay loytsi lo""obaa gidiyaa diraw, ne yalagatetsaa laytsan nashetta; ne wozanaykka nashetto. Ne ayifii s'eelleeddabaanne ne wozanay amotteeddabaa ubbaa pola. Shin, he neeni ootseeddawaa ubbaa diraw, neena S'oossay pirddanaw de'iyaawaa dogoppa." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Hewaa diraw, simmi ne wozanaappe hirggaa, ne bollaappekka seelaa digga. Ayaw gooppe, na'atetsaynne yalagatetsay mela." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ne yalagatetsaa laytsan neena Med'd'eeddawaa k'oppa. Metiyaa gallassatuu yeennan de'ishiina, neeni, «Taana hawe nashechchena» giyaa wodetuu gakkennan de'ishina," 
Ecclesiastes12:2 awaynne poo'uu, aginayinne s'oolinttii d'umennan de'ishiina, iray bukki aad'd'inakka shaarii haa simmennaan de'ishiina, neena Med'd'eeddawaa k'oppa." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Ayaw gooppe, hewe golliyaa naagiyaawanttu kokkoriyaa wode, mino Asay k'uunniyaa wode, gaac'c'iyaawanttu payduwaan guus's'eedda gaasuwaan gaachchaa aggiyaa wode, k'ay maskkootiyaanna s'eelliyaawanttu galjjiyaa wode gidanawaa." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 He wode wogga ogiyaakko simmeedda penggetuu gorddettiyaa wode, gaac'c'iyaa wos'atuwaa kooshshay zik'k'i giyaa wode, kafuwaa waasuu asaa gem""ishuwaappe beegotsiyaa wode, shin, yetsanchcha mac'c'a naanatuwaa yetsaa kooshshay leppiyaa wode gidanawaa." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 He wodii Asay d'ok'k'a sa'atuwaa kesanawunne aakko ogetuwaanna hemettanaw yayyiyaa wode, ne huup'ii puulummiyaa wode, neeni neena danddayaade hemettiyaawe new is's'iyaa wode, amoyiyaabay aggiyaa wode gidanawaa. He wodii Asay bare med'inaa golliyaa biyaa wode, yeekkiyaawanttukka aakko ogiyaanna yeekkiidde yuuyyiyaa wode gidanawaa." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Biraa k'ac'inay duus's'ennan, work'k'aa keriikka me""ennan, haatsaa otuukka pulttuwaa lank'k'iyaan me""ennan, haatsaa pude goochchiyaa wodoruukka duus's'ennan de'ishiina," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 biittay kase bare aketeedda biittaakko simmennaan, shemppuukka barena immeedda S'oossaakko simmiide beenna de'ishiina, neena Med'd'eeddawaa k'oppa." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Eranchchay odiidde, «Hada! Hada! Ubbabaykka mela!» yaageedda." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Eranchchaw aad'd'eeda eratetsay de'iyaa diraw, eratetsaa deriyaa asaa tamaarisseedda. I daro leemisatwaa pilggi k'oriide, ittuwaa ittuwaa Aa maaran maaran dummayiide ootseedda." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Eranchchay likke gideedda k'aalaa demmanaw koyeedda; hewaa diraw, I s'aafeeddawe suurenne tuma." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Eranchchatuwaa k'aalay hentsanchchay wudiyaa laaggiyaa s'eeraa leeo S'amaa mala. K'ay ittippe shiishsheedda leemisotuukka gomppaa gakkiide geliyaa misimaaretuwaa mala. 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Ta na'aw, ha ubbaappe bollaanna neeni naagettanaw koshshiyaabay de'ee. Mas'aafaa s'aafiide wurssanaw danddayettenna. K'ay darobaa pilggi s'eelliide aggenaan is's'iyaawekka asatetsaa daaburssee." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Hekko ubbabay odetteedda; hewaa diraw, ubbabaw kuushshay hawaa: S'oossaw yayya; Aa azazuwaa naaga. Ayaw gooppe, hewe asaw waanna oosuwaa." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 S'oossay oosuwaa ubbaa bollan, k'ay geemmeedda yewuwaa ubbaa bollan, lo""a gidina, iita gidinakka pirddanaw de'ee." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Mazamuriyaa ubbaappe aad'd'iyaa Solomona mazamurii hawaa. 
SongOfSongs1:2 «Ne siik'uu woyniyaa eessaappe aad'd'i nashechchiyaa diraw, ne mettershshan zaara zaaraadekka taana yera." 
SongOfSongs1:3 Ne okettiyaa shittuu wooti sawii! Ne suntsay s'eesettiyaa wodekka ayaa nashechchii! Geelayotuu neena siik'iyaawe hewaassa. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Taana neenana akkaade ba. Haaya, ane laa""uu ittippe wos's'oytte! Ta kaatiyaw, taana ne siiris'aa gelissa» yaagaaddu. Aban nuuni ay keeshshaa nashetteeddo! Nuuni Aa siik'uwaa woyniyaa eessaappekka aatsiide nashetto. Tumukka mac'c'a Asay ubbay neena siik'anaw bessee yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Hinttenoo, Yerusaalame mac'c'a asatoo, sisite, taani karetsa; gidooppenne, malanchcha. Ta karetsatetsay K'eedaare dunkkaaniyaa mala; shin ta malay Solomona kaatiyaa golliyaa gaariddotuwaa mala." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Ta malaa kares'isseeddawe s'uuggiyaa aawaa; taani karetsa gideedda diraw, taana kad'oppa. Ta ishatuu, ta aatti naanatuu taananna walak'ettiide, taana woyniyaa turaa naaganchcha ootseeddino; yaatina, taani taana naagabeykke." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Ta siik'ow, ane taw oda; ne dorssaa wudiyaa neeni heemmiyaawe hak'anee? Gallassi awaappe ne unttuntta shemppisiyaawe hak'anee? Neena demmanaw ne laggetuwaa wudiyaa kaalaade, ayaw yuushshanchcha mac'c'a asaa gidoo? yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Hanne, mac'c'a asaa ubbaappe aad'd'a lo""iyaa malanchchatee! Sa'aa erana d'ayooppe, dorssay beedda sa'aa kaalaade ba; ne deeshsha maratuwaakka hentsanchchatuwaa dunkkaaniyaa matan heemma." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ta siik'k'atee! Gibs'e kaatiyaa paraa gaariyaa goochchiyaa paratuwaa giddon de'iyaa maggaayatiidan loaasa. 
SongOfSongs1:10 Abeet, ne haytsaan goolakkattiyaa alleek'k'uwaana shiik'iide, ne gac'uu ayaa lo""ii! Ne ziizziikka ink'k'uwaan alleek'k'etteedawaa." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Nuuni new biran alleek'k'etteedda, work'k'aa alleek'k'uwaa oosissana yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Kaatii maaddan utti de'ishshin, ta shittuwaa sawuu golliyaa giddo ubbaan toshukku geedda." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Ta siik'uu ta d'antsatuwaappe gidduwaan shemppiyaa wode, Aa peenuu k'arc'c'iitiyaana de'iyaa kawaraadan sawee." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Ta siik'uu Enggaade geetettiyaa woyniyaa sa'aan doleedda, bazzuwaa c'iishshaa mala yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs1:15 Ta siik'k'atee, neeni waata lo""ay! Neeni waata lo""ay! Ne ayifetuu harap'p'iyaa ayfiyaadan lo""iino yaageedda." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Ta siik'ow, neeni ayaa lo""ay! Ayaa nashechchay; nu arssayikka aac'eedda maataadan nashechchiyaawaa." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Nu golliyaa zaaruu zigaa; kaaraykka s'iidan dadetteeddawaa yaagaaddu. 
SongOfSongs2:1 Taani, «Saaroona giyaa sa'aan doliyaa c'iishshaanne, wombban doliyaa lo""o c'iishshaa mala» yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Ee ta siik'k'atta mac'c'a asaa giddon s'eelliyaa wode, aguntsaa giddon beettiyaa lo""o c'iishshaa malataw yaageedda." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Ta siik'uu hara wodallatuwaa giddon s'eelliyaa wode, woran de'iyaa appiliyaa giyaa mitsaa malatee; taana loytsi nashechchina, Aa kuwaa giddon uttaad; Aa ayifii miina, taana loytsi mal""ee." 
SongOfSongs2:4 I taana k'umaa miyaa aakko wuyggiyaa gelisseedda; bare siik'uwaa banddiraadan ta bolla d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u ootseedda. 
SongOfSongs2:5 Taani Aa siik'uwaan okettaade harggeedda diraw, zabiibiyaa ayifiyaa taana miziide ministe; appiliyaa taana miziide, ta wolk'k'aa kuntsite." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Bare haddirssa kushiyaa taana borkkotisseedda; bare ushechcha kushiyan taana k'oommeedda. 
SongOfSongs2:7 Hinttenoo Yerusaalame yalaga mac'c'a asaw, siik'uu barew dosiide denddana gakkanaw, Aa hintte beegotsena mala, taani hinttena gen""etuwaaninne bazzuwaa dogetuwaan c'allay." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Sisite, hewe ta siik'uwaa kooshshaa! Be'ite deriyaana piriidde, zoozetuwaa bollaanna s'onggettiidde gakkeedda!" 
SongOfSongs2:9 Ta siik'uu wushaa mala; woy geniyaa maraa malatee. Be'ite, I nu golliyaa dirssaa matan ek'k'eedda; maskkootiyaanna golle s'eellee; gaaridduwaa garssaanakka luus's'ay s'eellee." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Ta siik'uu taana hawaadan yaagee; Ta siik'k'atee, dendda! Ta malanchchatee, haaya! Ittippe ane boytte." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Be'a, balgguu aad'd'eeda; iraykka ek'k'eedda." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Biittan c'iishshay c'iisheedda; yetsaa yes's'iyaa aginayikka gakkeedda; harap'p'iyaa yetsay nu biittan sisettee. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Balasii ayifiyaa doommeedda; woynnii c'iisheedda; Aa c'iishshaa sawuu biittan toshukku gee. Hewaa diraw, ta siik'k'atee, dendda; ta malanchchatee, haaya; ane ittippe boytte yaagee yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Neeni aafuwaa doonaa zaallaa za'an k'osetteedda harap'p'atti mala; ane itti gede taana ne somuwaa bessa; ne kooshshaakka sisa. Ayaw gooppe, ne kooshshay taana k'aretsee; ne som""uukka daro lo""ee yaageedda." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Nu woynnii c'iisheedda; hewaa diraw, nu woyniyaa gidduwaa bayzziyaa worakanatuwaa, he k'eeri worakanatuwaa p'iriyaa wotsiide oyk'k'ite yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Ta siik'uu tawaa; taanikka aano; c'iishshaa giddon I bare wudiyaa heemmee. 
SongOfSongs2:17 K'amma d'umay k'aarettanaw, wontta c'arkkuu c'arkkanaw, ta siik'ow, gen""iyaadan woy yalaga doggiyaadan, aafotiya deriyaana wos's'aade haa simma yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs3:1 K'amma kumentsaa ta hiis'an gisaade, ta siik'uwaa demmanaw amottaad; minisaade koyaad; shin demmanaw danddayabeykke." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Katamaa giddon de'iyaa aakonne s'untsa ogetuwaa ubbaan yuuyyaad; ta siik'uwaa demmanaw koyaad; minisaade koyaad; shin demmanaw danddayabeykke. 
SongOfSongs3:3 Katamaa yuuyyi naagiyaawanttu taana demmeeddino; taanikka, Ta siik'uwaa be'eeditee? yaagaade unttuntta oochchaad." 
SongOfSongs3:4 Unttunttuppe yaa aad'anne ta siik'uwaa demma aggaad. I taappe kessi akkenaadan, minisaade oyk'k'aad; ta daayi golle akka afaad; ta yeletteedda kifiliyaa gelissaad." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Hinttenoo Yerusaalame yalaga mac'c'a asaw, siik'uu barew dosiide denddana gakkanaw, Aa hintte beegotsena mala, taani hinttena gen""etuwaaninne bazzuwaa dogetuwaan c'allay yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Hawe bazzuwaana yiyaawe, c'uwaa tuussaa malatiyaawe, peenuukka zal""anchchaa is'aanaadaaninne kawaraadan, sawiyaawe I oonee?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Hewaa be'ite, Solomona paraa gaarii yee; he paraa gaarii Israa'eeliyaappe dooretteedda wolk'k'aamatuu, usuppun tammu tooranchchatuu ajabeedino." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Unttunttu ubbaykka mashshaa oyk'k'etsaa meezeteeddawanttanne, olankka paac'etteeddawantta. K'amman gakkana metuwaa ek'ettanaw, unttunttu ittuu ittuu mashshaa gis's'iide giigeeddawantta." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Kaatiyaa Solomon paraa gaariyaa giddon, barew uttiyaa kawutetsaa araataa giigisseedda. I araataa Liibaanoosa asaappe aheedda mitsaappe oosisseedda." 
SongOfSongs3:10 Araataa tuussatuu biran sheeshetteeddino; gedii work'k'aan alleek'k'etteedda; uttiyaasay Yerusaalame wodoratuu ochchaa teeraa malatiyaa k'ac'inan, siik'uwaan daddeedda afilaan kameteedda yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Hinttenoo, S'iyoone wodoratoo, Kaatiyaa Solomona be'anaw haayite! I loytsi nashetteedda, Aa bullachchaa gallassi Aa aata Aa huup'iyaan, wotseedda kallachchaa wotsiide utteedda yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Ta siik'k'atee, neeni ayaa malanchchatii! Neeni woota lo""ay! Ne ayifetuu ne som""uwaa kammiyaa sharbbe gidduwaana be'iyaa wode, harap'p'iyaadan lo""iino. Ne binnaanay Gala'aade Deriyaappe wod'd'iyaa deeshshaa wudiyaa mala." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Ne achchay meedettiide, haatsaan meec'etteedda ubbaykka manttiyaa yeliyaa, unttunttu giddon maynii bayinna dorssaa wudiyaa mala." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Ne mettershshatuu zo'o k'ac'inaa mala; ne haasayiyaa wode daro nashechchiino. Ne laau gac'otuwaa sharbbiyaa gidduwaana s'eelliyaa wode, itti roomaaniyaa laa""u kessi p'alk'k'eeddawaa malatiino." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Ne k'ood'ii olaa miishshaa kak'k'anaw gimbbeedda, Daawita adussa gimbbiyaa malatee; he gimbbii sha""u mino olanchchatuwaa gonddallii kak'ettina, alleek'k'etti utteedda." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Ne d'antsatuu manttiyaa yeletteedda, wora c'iishshaa giddon miyaa gen""iyaa maratuwaa malatiino." 
SongOfSongs4:6 K'ammay wonttanaw, kuway kichchanaw, karbbiyaa deriyaanne is'aanaa zooziyaa baade shemppashshana." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Ta siik'k'atee, ne asatetsay ubbaykka malanchcha; neenan wotsiyaawe ayaynne baawa." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Ta mushurattee, Liibaanoosa Deriyaappe wod'd'a. Gaammuunne maahii geessuu Amaana Deriyaappe, Saniira Deriyaappenne Hermmoone kiikiyaappe wod'd'a." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Ta siik'uwaa michchato gidiyaa ta siik'attee! Ne ayifiyaa s'eeluunne ne k'ood'iyaa alleek'k'uu, ta wozanaa nashshechchan gooshsheedda." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Ta siik'uwaa michchato gidiyaa ta mushurate! Ne siik'uu taana ayaa nashechchii! Ne siik'uu woyniyaa eessaappe aad'd'i nashechchee; ne shittuu ubbabaappekka aad'd'iide sawee. 
SongOfSongs4:11 Ta mushurattee, ne mettershshaanna eessaa ililuu s'okee. Ne doonaappe eessaynne maatsay pulttee; ne mayuu Liibaanoosa s'iidday sawiyaawaadan sawee." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Ta siik'uwaa michchato gidiyaa ta mushurati yuushshuu, direttiide naagettiyaa ataakilttiyaa sa'aa mala. Yuushshuu gimbbetteedda pulttuwaa, maatafay attametteedda goggiyaa haatsaa mala." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Ne ataakilttetuwaa giddon: roomaanii, dooretteedda ataakilttiyaa ayifetuu, heenayinne narddoosiyaa giyaawanttu de'iino." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Hewaadankka k'ay narddoosii, laadii, sawuwaa maataynne k'arafay, hewaadankka is'aanaadan sawiyaabatuu de'iino; hewaadankka k'ay karbbii, godare uutsaa c'iishshaynne dumma dumma k'imaamiyaa ataakilttetuu mokkiino." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Neeni ataakilttiyaa sa'aa aliyaa pulttuwaa mala; de'uwaa haatsay beettiyaa ollaa mala; Liibaanoosa Deriyaappe goggiyaa shaafaa mala yaageedda. 
SongOfSongs4:16 Huup'issa bagga c'arkkoo, dendda! Gedissa bagga c'arkkoo, haaya! Ta ataakilttiyaa bolla c'arkka! Aa sawuu hewan toshukku go. Ta siik'uu bare ataakilttiyaa giddo yo. Daro mal""iyaa teeratuwaa mo yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Ta siik'o michchatto gidiyaa ta mishiratte, be'a; taani ta ataakilttiyaa giddo gelaad. Ta karbbiyaanne ta shittuwaa c'iishshaa k'oray. Eessaa ukitsaa yolttayaade may. Ta woyniyaa eessaanne ta maatsaa ushay yaageedda. Hinttenoo, Aa laggetoo, siik'uwaa alana gakkanaw ushite yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Taani k'amma gemishaad; shin ta wozanay beegotti utteedda. Ta akumuwaan ta siik'uu hawaadan yaagiidde, penggiyaa k'os's'iina sisaad; Ta mushurattee, ta siik'k'atee, neenan wotsiyaawe bayinna ta harap'p'atte, taw kariyaa dooyaa; ta huup'ii ketterssaan ka""eedda. Ta binnaanaykka k'amma puusiyaan narkkakkeedda yaagee." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Taani, Ta mayuwaa k'aara diggaad; zaara mayyooyye? Ta gediyaa meec'etta kichchaad; zaaraadde urk'k'ayooyye? yaagaad." 
SongOfSongs5:4 Ta siik'uu ifitsaa s'oo'iyaanna bare kushiyaa golle yeddeedda; ta wozanay Aa diraw poddi poddee. 
SongOfSongs5:5 Yaatina, ta siik'oo kariyaa dooyanaw denddaad. Kariyaa dooyiyaa kulbbuwaa taani oyk'k'iyaa wode, ta kushiyaappe karbbii, ta birad'd'iyaappe shittuu s'okee." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Ta siik'oo kariyaa dooyaad; shin dooyiyaa wode I baawa bi kichcheedda. Aa kooshshaa sisanaw loytsi amottaad. Mintsaade Aa koyaad; shin demmanaw danddayabeykke. S'eegaad; shin taw koyibeenna. 
SongOfSongs5:7 Yuuyyiide katamaa naagiyaawanttu taana demmiide, wad'd'eeddinonne madutseeddino; katamaa dirssaa naagiyaawanttu ta k'umayuwaa k'aari akkeeddino." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Hinttenoo Yerusaalame geelayotoo, ta siik'uwaa demmooppe, taani Aa siik'uwaappe denddeeddawaan harggiyaawaa, hadaraa, aw odite yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Neenoo, mac'c'a asaa ubbaappe aad'd'eeda malanchchatee! Ne siik'uu tumu haratuwaappe waan dummatii? Neeni hawaa keeshshaa nuuna c'alliyaawe, I haratuwaappe dummatiyaawe ayaanee? yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs5:10 Ta siik'uu daro loiyaawaanne mina; tammu shau attuma asaa giddon Aa mali baawa. 
SongOfSongs5:11 Aa huup'ii work'k'aa luliyaa malatee; Aa binnaanaykka loanne k'uuruwaa mala karetsa. 
SongOfSongs5:12 Aa ayifii shaafaa lank'k'iyaan ek'k'eeddanne, maatsan meec'etteeddawaa malatiyaa harap'p'etuwaa malatee." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Aa gac'otuukka sawuwaa maataynne, k'imaamii toketteedda atakilttiyaadan lo""iino; Aa mettershshatuu karbbiyaa shittuu s'okiyaa wora c'iishshaadan lo""iino." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Aa kushetuu ink'k'uwaan alleek'k'etteedda work'k'aa s'amaadan loiino; Aa asatetsay samppeeriyaa giyaa ink'k'uwaan alleek'k'etteedda, danggarssaa achchaa mala." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Aa gedetuu work'k'aa baasuwaan toketteedda, ibinabaradiyaa tuussaa malatiino; Aa malay zigan alleek'k'etteedda Liibaanoosa asaa mala." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Aa doonay eessaadan malee. I ubbaannakka loiyaawaa. Hinttenoo Yerusaalame wodoratoo, ta siik'uunne ta laggii hawaa malatee yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Mac'c'a asaa ubbaappe malanchchatee! Ne laggii hak'a beedee? Nuunikka neenana ittippe koyanaw, I beedda sa'aa nuw oda yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Ta siik'uu dorssaa wudiyaa heemmanawunne, lo""iyaa c'iishshaa shiishshanaw, shittuwaa sawuwaa maatay de'iyaa ataakilttiyaa giddo wod'd'eedda." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Taani ta siik'uwaanno; ta siik'uukka tawaa. I c'iishshaa giddon wudiyaa heemmee yaagaaddu. 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ta siik'k'atee! Neeni Tirs's'a katamay loiyaawaadan loaasa; Yerusaalamedan daro loaasa; banddiraa oyk'k'iide, salppiyaan biyaa olanchchay yashshiyaawaadan yashshaasa." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Hayyanaa ne ayifiyaa taappe wora zaaraarikkii, ayaw gooppe, unttunttu taana waayissiino. Ne binnaanay Gala'aade Deriyaappe wod'd'iyaa deeshshaa wudiyaa malatee." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Ne achchay meec'ettiide kesiyaa, ubbaykka manttiyaa yeliyaa, unttunttu giddon maynii bayinna dorssaa wudiyaa mala." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Ne laau gac'otuwaa sharbbiyaa gidduwaana s'eelliyaa wode, laa""u kesseedda roomaaniyaa teeraa malatiino." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Usuppun tammu mac'c'a kaatetuunne usuppun tammu baakkotuu, k'ay payduu bayinna wodorotuu taw de'iino." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Shin ta harap'p'atta, ta tooshii bayinnaana, Aa taw dumma. Aa bare aatissikka mes's'i ittinno; izo yeleedda aatakka ayaappenne aatsaade izo siik'aw. Wodorotuukka izo s'eelliide, Hanna anjjetteedaano yaagiino. Mac'c'a kaatetuukka baakkotuukka izo sabbiino." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Hanna wontta s'alk'k'iyaadan doliyaana, aginaadan poo'iyaanna, awaadan c'addiyaana, banddiraa oyk'k'iide salppiyaan biyaa olanchchaadan, yashshiyaanna iza oonee? yaagiino." 
SongOfSongs6:11 Taani wombban toketteedda mitsatuu lic'uwaa be'anaw, woyniyaa turay aac'eedenttonne k'ay roomaaniikka c'iisheeddenttonne s'eellanaw, duge ataakilttiyaa sa'aa wod'd'ay." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Taani akeekenan de'ishiina, ta amuu taana afiide, ta kaatiyaa matan, paraa gaariyan taana utisseedda yaageedda." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Neenoo Shulaame biittaappe yeeddawunne, haaya; haa simma! Neena nu loytsiide s'eelana; haa simma! yaageeddino. Daro asaa sintsan yes's'iyaa asaadan, taakko ayaw s'eelliitee? yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs7:1 Kaatiyaa naattidan loiyaanee! Ne gedetuu neeni nas'alaa c'aammaa wotsi de'ishshin be'iyaa wode, ayaa lo""iino! Ne sheechchii eranchcha wogaac'ii k'os's'iide, loytsi alleek'k'isseeda ink'k'uwaa malatee." 
SongOfSongs7:2 Ne gulay woyniyaa eessay kumeedda birilliyaa malatee; ne s'eessaa yuushshuu c'iishshan k'ashetteedda zarggaa mirk'k'iyaa malatee. 
SongOfSongs7:3 Ne d'antsatuu manttiyaa yeletteedda, gen""ati maratuwaa malatiino." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Ne k'ood'ii danggarssaa zaaliyaan alleek'k'etteedda adussa gimbbiyaa mala. Ne ayifii wolk'k'aama Haseboona katamaa penggiyaa matan de'iyaa, zeeruwaa haatsaa malatee. Ne siid'ii Damask'k'o s'eelissiide gimbbeedda Liibaanoosa gimbbiyaa malatee." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Ne huup'ii K'armmeloosa asaa malatee; ne olassa binnaanay k'ac'inaa s'aatsaa malatee; kaatiyaakka ne huup'iyaa datsay nashechcheedda. 
SongOfSongs7:6 Ta siik'k'atee, ne ayaa lo""ay! Ne ayaa malanchchatii! Ne siik'uu taana ayaa nashechchii!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 Ne geesay zambbaa geesaa malatee. Ne d'antsay zambbaa ayifiyaa wurc'c'uwaa malatee. 
SongOfSongs7:8 Taani, Ha zambbaa gi""ana; Aa maratuwaa oyk'k'ana yaagaad. Ne d'antsay woyniyaa teeraa wurc'c'uwaa mala; k'ay ne siid'iyaanna kesiyaa peenuu appiliyaa ayifiyaadan sawee." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Ne yeruu mettershshatuwaappenne achchaappe gidduwaana, walalattiidde geliyaa woyniyaa mala. Ubbaappe aad'd'iide mal""iyaa woyniyaa eessaa mala yaageedda." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Taani ta alo siik'uwaanno; ikka taana amottee. 
SongOfSongs7:11 Ta siik'ow, haaya; laa""uu katamaappe kesiide biide, gas'ariyan ak'oytte; k'ammaa laa""uu hewan aatsana." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Wontta guuran ane woyniyaa turaa giddo boytte; woyniyaa turay c'iisheeddentto, c'iishshiide ayifiyaa dors's'os's'eedenttonne, k'ay roomaaniikka ayifeeddentto ane be'oytte. Taani ta siik'uwaa neena hewan bessana." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Inkkoyiyaa ayifiyaa sawuunne hara nashechchiyaa ataakilttiyaa ayifii, nu karen besseedda; ta siik'oo! Ha ayifetuwaappe teereeddawanttanne ooratsa mas'eeddawantta, new ashsha wotsaad." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Ne taw allaga gidennaan ta daayi d'antsaa d'ammeedda ta ishaa gidaarikkiishsha! Yaatintto taani neena ogiyaan demmaade shiishsha akka yerina, taana ooninne borennashin." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Taana tamaarisseedda ta daay golle taani neena kaaletsaade, ta daayi k'ol""o gelissa aginaa, hewan taana ne siik'uwaabaa tamaarisseeddawaa gidaarikkii; roomaaniyaa gum""eedda mal""iyaawaa, lo""iyaa woyniyaa eessaa taani neena hewan ushshaarikkitaa." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Taana hewan ne haddirssa k'eesiyaa borkkotissaade, ne ushechcha kushiyan taana k'oommeeddawaa gidaarikkii." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Hinttenoo Yerusaalame wodoratoo, Siik'uu bare wodiyaan denddanaw, k'aasetsi dentsetsennaadan, ta hinttew hadaraa gay yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Bare siik'uwaa hashiyaan zemppaade, bazzuwaappe yiyaana hanna oonee? yaageeddino. Beni ne aata neena bannikka yeleedda, appiliyaa lank'k'iyaan ne gisa de'ishshin, neena ta k'aaseretsaade dentsaad." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Med'inaa siik'uwaan taana ne wozanaa bolla attama; ne k'esiyankka maatafaadan, ta s'alalaa oyk'k'a. Ayaw gooppe, siik'uu hayk'k'uwaa mala mina; mishuukka duufuwaa mala mek'etsaa iita; Aa lac'uukka S'oossaa tamaa lac'uwaa mala." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Haatsaa daruu siik'uwaa tamaa toyissanaw danddayenna; di'uukka meec'c'iide afanaw danddayenna. Asay siik'uwaa shammanaw barew de'iyaa ak'uwaa ubbaa immooppekka, siik'uu shaluwaan shamettenna diraw, asay hewaa kad'ee yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Nuw tiraan d'antsay uttibeenna michchata de'aw; asinay izo oochchooppe, nuuni iw ootsanawe ayee?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Iza gimbbiyaa dirssaa gidintto, nuuni I bolla wochchiyaa adussa, biraa gimbbiyaa gimbbana; Aa dirssaa pengge gidintto, zigaa sank'k'aan izo doodissana yaageeddino." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Hekko taani dirssaa gimbbiyaa; ta d'antsaykka gimbbiyaa bolla gimbbetteedda wochchiyaa saa; hewaa diraw, taani ta siik'uwaanna de'iyaa wode, I taanan nashettee." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Solomonew Ba'aali-Hamoonan woynnii toketteedda shoyk'ay de'ee; he woyniyaa gidduwaa ootsiyaawanttoo keraa immeedda. Keraa akkeedawanttu teeran go'etteeddawaa diraw, huup'iyaan huup'iyaan sha""u biraa aw ahiino." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Shin taw ta buzo woynnii toketteedda shoyk'ay de'ee; Solomona, neeni sha""u biraa akka; ataakilttiyaa ootsiyaawanttu laa""u s'eetu biraa akkino yaagaaddu." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Neenoo, ataakilttiyaa giddon de'iyaa ta siik'k'atee, ne kooshshaa laggetuwaa sissanaw koyiino; ne kooshshaa taana sisa yaageedda." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Ta siik'ow, taakko ellekka haaya! Sawiyaa maatay mokkiyaa deretuwaa bollaanna, guppiyaa gen""iyaa woy doggiyaa maratuwaa malataade yaagaaddu." 
Isaiah1:1 Ooziyaane, Iyo'aataami, Akaazinne Hizk'k'iyaasi Yihudaa kaatetuwaa gideedda wode, Amoos'a na'ay Isiyaasi Yihudaabaanne Yerusaalamebaa be'eedda sas'ay hawaa." 
Isaiah1:2 Salotuwaan de'iyaawanttoo, sisite; sa'aan de'iyaawanttoo, sisite; ayaw gooppe, Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaageedda; «Taani naanatuwaa dichcha gatsaad; shin unttunttu taw makkaleeddino." 
Isaiah1:3 Booray bare godaa eree; hariikka barena mooddeeddawaa zadaluwaa eree; shin Israa'eelatuu erikkino; ta asatuu akeekikkino. 
Isaiah1:4 «Nagaraa ootsiyaa kawutetsaw, hintte naak'uwaan dees'etteedda asaw, iitaa ootsiyaa zariyaw, hintte mayzatuwaa tunatetsaa kaaliyaa naatoo, hinttenttoo aayye ana! Med'inaa Godaa hintte aggeeddita; Israa'eeliyaa Geeshsha sheneyeeddita; aw zokkiyaa zaareeddita." 
Isaiah1:5 Hintte ayaw makkalaa bolla makkalaa gujji gujji biitee? Ayaw k'aykka murettanaw koyiitee? Hintte kumentsaa huup'ii saketteedda; hintte kumentsaa wozanaykka daabureedda. 
Isaiah1:6 Gediyaa birad'd'iyaappe huup'iyaa binnaanaa gakkanaw pas'atetsay baawa; madutsay, gaafunne giiyiyaabay de'ee; unttunttunne giiyibeykkino, woy meec'etti k'ashettibeykkino, woy zayitiyaan okettiide shuggibeykkino." 
Isaiah1:7 «Hintte gaddii dirk'k'aletiide bayana; hintte katamatuukka taman s'uugetteeddino; hintte goshshaa hintte s'eellishin, allagatuu akkiino; imatsaa asatuu, mela ashana." 
Isaiah1:8 Yerusaalame katamay woyniyaa turaa naagiyaa daasiyaadan, leekiyaa naagiyaa golliyaadan morkkiyaan diretteedda katamaadan haniide atteeda." 
Isaiah1:9 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday nuw amareeda zaratuwaa ashshenentto, nuuni Sodooma katamaadaaninne Gamoora katamaadan haneeddoshin» yaageedda." 
Isaiah1:10 Hinttenoo, Sodooma mooddiyaawantto ubbatoo, Med'inaa Godaa k'aalaa sisite! Hinttenoo, Gamoora asaa ubbatoo, nu S'oossaa higgiyaa sisite!" 
Isaiah1:11 Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Hintte yarshshuwaa daruu taw ayaa goii? Hanno gakkanaw hintte taw shiishsheedda s'uugetteedda orgge dorssatuwaanne d'iikkeedda mehiyaa mod'd'uwaa yarshshuwaa taani kallaad; korumaa booratuwaa, dorssaa maratuunne deeshshatuwaa suutsan taani nashettikke." 
Isaiah1:12 Hintte taw goyinnanaw yiyaa wode, ta Geeshsha Golliyaa dabaabaa hinttena yed'd'ite geeddawe oonee?" 
Isaiah1:13 Simmi hada yarshshuwaa ahiyaawaa aggite! Hintte c'uwissiyaa is'aanay taana sheneyee; aginaa s'eeruwaa hintte bonchchiyaa gallassaa, hintte Sambbataanne hintte keereedda yaa'atuwaa, ha shiik'atuwaa ubbaa iitatetsaana ittippe walaketteeddawantta taani danddaykke." 
Isaiah1:14 Aginaa s'eeruwaa hintte bonchchiyaa gallassaanne keeretteedda hintte baalaa gallassatuwaa taani is's'aad; unttunttu taw tookuwaa gideeddino; taani unttuntta tookkaadde daaburaad. 
Isaiah1:15 «Hintte kushiyaa mic'c'iide, hintte woossiyaa wode, taani ta ayfiyaa hintteppe gentsana; hintte daro woosaa woossinttokka, taani sisikke; ayaw gooppe, hintte kushii suutsan munak'etteedda." 
Isaiah1:16 Meec'ettite; geeyite; hintte iita oosuwaa ta sintsaappe diggite. Iitaa ootsiyaawaa aggite; 
Isaiah1:17 loobaa ootsanaw tamaarite. S'illo pirddaa koyite; unetteeddawanttu morggiyaa oyk'k'ite. Aawuu bayinnawanttoo pirddite; asinay hayk'k'eedda mac'c'a asatoo mootettite» yaagee. 
Isaiah1:18 K'aykka Med'inaa Goday, «Haayite; ane zorettoytte. Hintte nagaray baaraadan zo""inttokka, shachchaadan boos's'ana; suutsaadan zo""inttokka, puuttuwaadan boos's'ana." 
Isaiah1:19 Hintte eeno giide, taw azazettooppe, gadiyaappe mokkiyaa murutaa maana." 
Isaiah1:20 Shin hintte is's'aaddi giide makkalooppe, mashshaan meetettana» yaagee. Med'inaa Goday bare doonaappe hawaa haasayeedda." 
Isaiah1:21 Ammanetteeda wolk'k'aama katamata waanaade sharmus'a gidaadee! Iza kase suure pirdday kumeeddaano; s'illotetsay kase I giddon de'eedda; shin hai asaa wod'iyaawanttu izi giddon de'iino. 
Isaiah1:22 Ne biray shi'i kichcheedda; ne loo woyniyaa eessaykka haatsaana yeeletteedda. 
Isaiah1:23 Hintte daannatuu makkalanchchatuwaanne kayisotuwaa lagetuwaa gideeddino; unttunttu ubbatuukka mattaayiyaa dosiinonne miishshaa yederssiino; aawuu bayinnawanttoo pirddikkino; asinay hayk'k'eedda mac'c'a asatuwaa mootuu unttunttukko shiik'enna. 
Isaiah1:24 Hewaa diraw, Goday, Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday, Israa'eeliyaa Wolk'k'aamay, hawaadan yaagee; «Ha""i taani taana is'iyaawanttuppe shemppana; taani ta morkkatuwaa bolla ta haluwaa kessana." 
Isaiah1:25 Taani ta kushiyaa ne bolla wotsana; ne shi'owaa k'uls's'us's'issaade geeshshana; neenana walaketteeddabaa ubbaa geeshshaade yedissana. 
Isaiah1:26 Taani beniwanttu mala daannatuwaa, koyirowanttu mala zoriyaawantta new zaarana. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, neeni S'illotetsaa Katamaa, Ammanetteeda Katamaa geetettana» yaagee." 
Isaiah1:27 S'iyoonee suure pirddan, barenttu nagaraa paas'iyaawanttukka s'illotetsan wozettana." 
Isaiah1:28 Shin makkalanchchatuunne nagaranchchatuu laauukka meana; Med'inaa Godaa aggiyaawanttu d'ayana. 
Isaiah1:29 Wotsanaw doseedda wolaa diraw, hintte yeellatana; hintte dooreedda kaashshaa gishshawukka hintte kawushshana." 
Isaiah1:30 Bonc'c'ii k'ok'k'ofettiyaa wolaadan, woy dubbi bayinna shoyk'aadan, hintte hanana." 
Isaiah1:31 Minuu dalaa gidanawaa; Aa oosuukka s'iifa gidanawaa; unttunttu ittippe s'uugettanawantta; he tamaa toyissiyaawe d'ayana. 
Isaiah2:1 Yihudaa biittaabaanne Yerusaalame katamaabaa Amoos'a na'ay Isiyaasi be'eeddawe hawaa. 
Isaiah2:2 Wurssetsa gallassatuwaan Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Gollii kees'etteedda derii deretuwaa ubbaappe d'ok'k'iide beettana; zoozetuwaa ubbatuwaappekka bollaanna d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana. Kawutetsatuwaan de'iyaa Asay ubbay aakko zattana. 
Isaiah2:3 Daro Asay yiide, «Haayite! Med'inaa Godaa deriyaa, Yaak'ooba Med'inaa Godaa Geeshsha Golliyaa ane pude kesoytte. I koyiyaawaadan nuuni baana mala, I nuuna bare ogiyaa tamaarissana» yaagana. Ayaw gooppe, higgii S'iyooneppe, S'oossaa k'aalaykka Yerusaalameppe kesana." 
Isaiah2:4 Kawutetsatuwaappenne kawutetsatuwaappe gidduwaan I pirddananne daro asatuwaa palumiyaa shaakkana. Unttunttu barenttu mashshaa maraashaa, barenttu tooraakka baac'aa kessanaw k'os's'ana. Kawutetsay kawutetsaa bolla mashshaa dentsenna. Hewaappe guyyiyaan unttunttu mulekka olaa timirttiyaa tamaarikkino." 
Isaiah2:5 Hinttenoo, Yaak'ooba zaretoo, haayite! Ane Med'inaa Godaa poo'uwaan hamettoytte." 
Isaiah2:6 S'oossaw, ne asaa, Yaak'ooba zaratuwaa aggaada. Unttunttu away doliyaa bagga gadiyaa asatuwaa biittaan kumeeddino; Piliss's'eema asatuwaadan kaayiino. Unttunttu allaga asatuwaana ittippe zuppetiino." 
Isaiah2:7 Unttunttu gaddii biraynne work'k'ay kumeeddawaa; unttunttu shaloo zaway baawa. Unttunttu gaddii paray kumeeddawaa; unttunttu paraa gaaretoo zaway baawa. 
Isaiah2:8 Unttunttu gaddii eek'atuwaan kumeeddawaa; unttunttu barenttu kushii ootseedda oosoo hokkiide goyinniino. 
Isaiah2:9 Hewaa diraw, Asay ubbay tooshettananne kawushshana. Unttunttoo atto gooppa." 
Isaiah2:10 Med'inaa Godaa dagamaappenne Aa anggaa bonchchuwaappe attanaw zaallaakko biite; biittaa giddon k'osettite! 
Isaiah2:11 Asaa otoruu giiyana; Aa kilahuukka siilana; he gallassi Med'inaa Godaa s'alalay d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana. 
Isaiah2:12 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday itti gallassaa keereedda. He gallassi otorettiyaawantta, ayyiyaawanttanne d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u geeddawaantta kawushshana;" 
Isaiah2:13 adussanne d'ok'k'a gidiyaa Liibaanoosa zigatuwaanne Baasaane wolaa ubbaa d'ayissana; 
Isaiah2:14 d'ok'k'a deretuwaakka zoozatuwaakka dembbayana; 
Isaiah2:15 katamaa naagiyaa adussa miis'atuwaa ubbaanne katamaa yuushshuwaan de'iyaa mino gimbbetuwaa zik'k'issana; 
Isaiah2:16 S'oossay gitanne loiyaa markkabatuwaakka haatsaan mitissana. 
Isaiah2:17 Asaa otoruu zik'k'i gaana; Aa ayyuukka d'ayana. He gallassi Med'inaa Godaa s'alalay d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana; 
Isaiah2:18 eek'aa ubbaykka ubbaanna d'ayana. 
Isaiah2:19 Med'inaa Goday ha gadiyaa k'aatsanaw denddiyaa wode, Aa dagamaappenne Aa anggaa bonchchuwaappe attanaw Asay shuchchaa gonggoloonne biittaa ollaw bak'atana." 
Isaiah2:20 He gallassi Asay goyinnanaw med'd'eedda barenttu biraa misiletuwaanne barenttu work'k'aa misiletuwaa oc'c'otoonne hara kafotoo olana. 
Isaiah2:21 Med'inaa Goday ha gadiyaa k'aatsanaw denddiyaa wode, Aa dagamaappenne Aa anggaa bonchchuwaappe attanaw unttunttu gonggolo giddonne shuchchaa kooppo giddo bak'atana." 
Isaiah2:22 Simmi hayk'k'iyaa asan ammanettiyaawaa aggite! Asay ay maaddanee? 
Isaiah3:1 Be'ite, Goday, Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday minjjaanne maaduwaa laa""uwaakka Yerusaalameppenne Yihudaappe diggana hanee. Katsaa minjjaanne haatsaa minjjaa ubbaa;" 
Isaiah3:2 minotuwaanne olanchchatuwaa, daannatuwaanne timbbitiyaa odiyaawantta, kaayiyaawanttanne c'imatuwaa," 
Isaiah3:3 olaa gadaawatuwaanne gadiyaa ayissiyaawantta, zoriyaawantta, hiillatiyaawanttanne c'inc'c'a bitanchchatuwaa ubbaa diggana hanee." 
Isaiah3:4 Taani yalaga attuma naanatuwaa unttunttu kaappuwaa kessana; guutsaa naanay unttuntta mooddana. 
Isaiah3:5 Asay asaa bolla, shooruu shooruwaa bolla denddiide, ittuu ittuwaa sugana. Yalagay c'imaa bolla, kad'etteeddawe bonchchetteeddawaa bolla denddana." 
Isaiah3:6 Itti Asay bare aawuwaa golliyaan bare ishatuwaappe ittuwaa oyk'k'iide, «New mayuu de'ee; neeni nuw suntsaa gida; ha koletteedda sa'aa aawotetsaa akka» yaagana." 
Isaiah3:7 I he gallassi bare k'aalaa d'ok'k'issiide, «Taanan d'alii baawa; ta son k'umi woy mayuu baawa; hintte bolla taana suntsoppite» yaagana." 
Isaiah3:8 Yerusaalame ganddigaaree; Yihuday kunddee; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu oduwaaninne barenttu oosuwaan Med'inaa Godaa bolla denddiide, Aa bonchchuwaa toochchiino." 
Isaiah3:9 Unttunttu somuwaa malay unttunttu bolla markkattee; unttunttu barenttu nagaraa Sodooma asaadan awaayiino; barenttu nagaraa k'ossikkino. Unttunttoo aayye ana! Ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu bolla iitabaa aheeddino." 
Isaiah3:10 S'illotoo, «Hinttew lo""a gidanawaa» gaade oda; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu oosuwaa ayfiyaa maana." 
Isaiah3:11 Iitatoo aayye ana! Unttunttoo iitana; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu barenttu kushiyaa oosuwaa gatiyaa akkana." 
Isaiah3:12 Yalagatuu ta asaa unetsiino; mac'c'a asatuukka unttuntta mooddiino. Ta asaw, hinttena kaaletsiyaawanttu hinttena wora kaaletsiino; hintte biyaa ogiyaakka baletsiino." 
Isaiah3:13 Med'inaa Goday daannaadan, chilootan uttee; asaa pirddanaw denddee." 
Isaiah3:14 Asaa c'imatuwaanne kaaletsiyaawantta pirddanaw shiishiide, Med'inaa Goday, Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday hawaadan yaagee; «Ta woyniyaa turaa tokkeeddasaa bayzzeeddawanttu hinttena; hiyyeesatuwaappe bonk'k'eeddabay hintte golliyaan de'ee." 
Isaiah3:15 Ta asaa ayaw kinchcheretsiitee? Hiyyeesatuwaa somuwaa ayaw gaac'c'iitee?» yaagee Goday, Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday." 
Isaiah3:16 Med'inaa Goday K'aykka, «S'iyoone mac'c'a asatuu otoretteeddino; barenttu ziizziyaa essi akkiide, barenttu ayifiyaan sim""ettiidde, barenttu hametsaa makisiidde, barenttu gediyaa albbuwaa giirissiidde hamettiino." 
Isaiah3:17 Hewaa diraw, taani Goday S'iyoone mac'c'a asatuwaa huup'iyaa c'ittuwaan goo'issana. Taani Med'inaa Goday unttunttu huup'iyaa bo""ayana» yaagee." 
Isaiah3:18 He gallassi Goday S'iyoone mac'c'a asatuwaa alleek'k'otuwaa, hewanttunne unttunttu gediyaa albbuwaa, shaashiyaa, k'ood'iyaa aleek'k'uwaa," 
Isaiah3:19 haytsaa gutichchaa, kushiyaa sagaayuwaa, som""uwaa kammiyaa kutaa," 
Isaiah3:20 huup'iyaan wotsiyaa alleek'k'uwaa, k'esiyaan k'achchiyaa sanssalataa, s'eessan danc'c'iyaa danc'c'uwaa, shittuwaa s'aaramusiyaa, kitaafaa," 
Isaiah3:21 siid'iyaa migiduwaa, birad'd'iyaanne" 
Isaiah3:22 minjja mayuwaa, adussa mayuwaa, jaanuwaa, borssaa," 
Isaiah3:23 heregaa, liinuwaa giyaa k'ac'inaappe dadetteedda, giddona mayiyaa mayuwaa, binnaanan wotsiyaa alleek'k'uwaanne sharbbiyaa ubbaa bonk'k'a akkana." 
Isaiah3:24 Shittuwaa diraw s'ink'k'uwaa gidanawaa; danc'c'uwaa diraw wodoruwaa, goofariyaa diraw bo""aa, adussa mayuwaa diraw waaruwaa, puulaa diraw bak'k'iyaa s'alalaa gidanawaa." 
Isaiah3:25 Ne asatuu mashshaan, ne olanchchatuu olan hayk'k'ana." 
Isaiah3:26 S'iyoone penggetuwaan de'iyaa Asay yeekkananne zilaalana; mela atteedda, gadiyaan uttana." 
Isaiah4:1 He gallassi laappun mac'c'a asatuu itti attumawaa oyk'k'iide, «Nuuni nu k'umaa maana; nu mayuwaa mayyana; ne suntsan s'eesetana mala ootsaadde nu kawushshaa nuuppe k'aaraarikkii» yaagiide woosana." 
Isaiah4:2 He gallassi Med'inaa Godaa mitsaa tashii loananne bonchchettana; Israa'eeliyaa asaappe atteedawanttoo he gadiyaa katsay c'eek'k'onne bonchchuwaa gidanawaa. 
Isaiah4:3 S'iyoonen attiyaawanttu, Yerusaalamen gam""iyaawanttu, Yerusaalamen pas'a de'iyaawanttunna s'aafettiyaawanttu, «Unttunttu geeshshatuwaa» geetettana." 
Isaiah4:4 Goday S'iyoone mac'c'a asatuwaa k'itaa meec'c'ana; pirddaa Ayaanaaninne s'uuggiyaa Ayaanan suutsaa gussiyaa bayzzuwaa Yerusaalameppe I geeshshana. 
Isaiah4:5 Med'inaa Goday S'iyoone Deriyaa ubbaa bollanne yan shiik'iyaawanttu bolla gallassi shaariyaanne c'uwaa, k'amma ees's'iyaa tamaa poo'uwaa med'd'ana; bonchchuu ubbaa bolla kammiyaawaa gidanawaa." 
Isaiah4:6 I gallassaa aawaa suuluwaappe ashshiyaa kuwaanne gotiyaappenne iraappe bak'ati attiyaasaa gidanawaa. 
Isaiah5:1 Taani ta siik'iyaawoo Aa woyniyaa turaa tokkiyaa sa'aawaa siik'uwaa yetsaa yes's'ana. Taani siik'iyaawoo tu'eteedda zooziyaan woyniyaa turaa tokkiyaa sa'ay de'ee. 
Isaiah5:2 Biittaa bookkiide, shuchchaa k'ori kessiide, Ubbaappe lo""iyaa woyniyaa turaa tokkeedda. Naagiyaa shakkuwaa Aa giddon shakkeedda; woyniyaa eessaa gum""iyaasaa wooc'iide giigisseedda. Hewaappe guyyiyaan, lo""o ayfiyaa ayifee, yaagiide naageedda; Shin c'aaliyaa ayfiyaa ayifeedda." 
Isaiah5:3 Yaatina, ta siik'uu hawaadan yaageedda; «Hinttenoo, Yerusaalamen de'iyaawanttoo, Hinttenoo, Yihudaa asatoo, taappenne ta woyniyaa turaa tokkiyaa sa'aappe gidduwaan, de'iyaa yewuwaa ane ha""i pirddite." 
Isaiah5:4 Taani ta woyniyaa turaa sa'aw ootseeddawaappe haraa ayaa ootsanawe atteedee? Loo ayfiyaa ayifee yaagaade naagishin, ayaw c'aaliyaa ayfiyaa ayfeedee?" 
Isaiah5:5 Hai taani ta woyniyaa turaa sa'aa, ootsiyaawaa hinttenttoo oday. Taani dirssaa shoddana; he turaykka d'ayanaadan ootsana. Taani gimbbiyaa kolana; he sa'aykka yed'ettana." 
Isaiah5:6 Taani he sa'aa bayeedda biittaa ootsana. He turay s'unk'k'ettennanne bulettenna; yaatina, kinddichchuunne aguntsay yan mokkana. Iray aan bukkennaadan, taani shaaretuwaa azazana» yaageedda." 
Isaiah5:7 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday, woyniyaa turaa sa'ay Israa'eeliyaa asaa. Yihudaa Asay I nashettiyaa darkkuwaa. Unttunttu suure pirddiino giide naageedda; shin suutsaa gusseeddino. S'illotetsaa ootsiino giide naageedda; shin waaso gideedda." 
Isaiah5:8 Sa'ay d'ayina, hintte s'alalay gadiyaa bolla de'ana gakkanaw, golliyaa golliyaa bolla gujjiyaawanttoo, gadiyaa gadiyaanna gatsiyaawanttoo, hinttenttoo aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:9 Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday taana hawaadan yaageedda; «He wolk'k'aama golletuu onana; he loo golletuwaan de'anaw Asay d'ayana. 
Isaiah5:10 Tammu waatsaa booratuwaan tokkeedda woyniyaa ayifiyaappe itti oto gidiyaa gumetteedda woyniyaa eessaa s'alalay kesana; tammu k'una katsaa zerina, itti k'un""a katsaa s'alalaa ayifana» yaageedda." 
Isaiah5:11 Matsoyiyaa ushshaa koyanaw wontta guuraanna denddiyawanttoonne woyniyaa eessan s'uugettana gakkanaw, sa'aa k'amissiyawanttoo aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:12 Unttunttu shoobiyaan maasink'k'uu, diitsay, darbbii, his'is'iinne woyniyaa eessay de'ee; shin unttunttu Med'inaa Godaa oosuwaa gate giikkino; I bare kushiyan ootseeddawaa bonchchikkino." 
Isaiah5:13 Yaatina, ta Asay akeekaa d'ayeedda diraw, omoodettiide baana; unttunttu gadiyaa ayissiyaawanttukka koshan hayk'k'ana; unttunttu aakko asaykka koppisaa melana." 
Isaiah5:14 Duufuu bare gomppaa aassee; bare doonaakka zaway bayinnawaa hanggee; Yerusaalamen de'iyaa wolk'k'aama asaanne yenkko daro asaa, wac'iyaawanttanne nashetiyaawantta mittana." 
Isaiah5:15 Asay ubbay tooshettananne kawushana; otorettiyaawanttu ubbaykka kawushana. 
Isaiah5:16 Shin Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Goday, suure pirddan d'ok'k'u d'ok'k'u gaana; geeshsha S'oossay geeshsha gidiyaawaa bare s'illotetsan bessana." 
Isaiah5:17 He wode dorssatuu barenttu k'ooruwaan heemettiyaawaadan heemettana; dorssaa maratuu koletteedda duretuwaa golliyaa sa'aa maana. 
Isaiah5:18 C'imuwaa wodoruwaan nagaraa, gaariyaa wodoruwaan iitatetsaa goochchiyaawanttoo aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:19 «Ane S'oossay elleello! Nuuni be'ana mala, bare oosuwaa elleelliso! Gatso! Ee, nuuni erana mala, Israa'eeliyaa Geeshshay k'oppeedda k'ofay poletto» yaagiyaawanttoo aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:20 Iitaa loa louwaa iita yaagiyaawanttoo, d'umaa poo'o poo'uwaa d'uma ootsiyaawanttoonne c'ammiyaawa mal""iyaawaa mal""iyaawaa c'ammiyaawa ootsiyaawanttoo aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:21 Barena, «Taani aad'd'eeda eranchcha! Taani c'inc'c'a gidikkitaa!» yaagi k'oppiyaawantto aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:22 Woynniyaa eessaa ushiyaawan eretteeddawanttoonne matsoyiyaa ushshaa walakkanaw goobiyaawanttoo aayye ana! 
Isaiah5:23 Mattaayiyaa akkiide, bayzzeeddawantta s'illissiyaawanttoonne s'illo asatoo suure pirddaa diggiyaawanttoo aayye ana!" 
Isaiah5:24 Tamaa lac'uu dalaa oyk'k'iyaawaadaaninne mela maatay ees's'i d'ayiyaawaadan, hewaadan unttunttu s'ap'uu wook'k'ana; unttunttu c'iishshaykka baanaadan laaletti d'ayana; ayaw gooppe, unttunttu Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaa higgiyaa is's'eeddino; Israa'eeliyaa Geeshsha k'aalaakka kad'eeddino." 
Isaiah5:25 Hewaa diraw, Med'inaa Godaa hank'k'uu Aa asaa bolla ees's'i kesee; I bare kushiyaa unttunttu bolla dentsiide, unttuntta shoc'eedda. Deretuu k'aas's'iino; hayk'k'eedda asaa anhay ogiyaan buura mala gidee; yaaninakka Aa hank'k'uu simmenna; Aa kushii ha""ikka denddeeddasaan de'ee." 
Isaiah5:26 S'oossay haakuwaan de'iyaa kawutetsatoo malaataa d'ok'k'an essee; sa'aa gas'an de'iyaa morkketuukka suyk'k'ee. Unttunttukka ellekka jaamiide, puttu giino." 
Isaiah5:27 Unttunttu giddon daaburiyaabaynne wobbiyaabay baawa; unttunttuppe ittuunne gemishenna woy gisenna. S'eessan danc'c'iyaa Sak'k'iikka bilettenna; unttunttu c'aammaa dafuukka duus's'enna. 
Isaiah5:28 Unttunttu tooray saataanna de'ee; unttunttu wonddaafiikka waas'etteedda. Unttunttu paratuwaa s'uguntsay zaallaa shuchchaa mala; unttunttu paraa gaaretuwaa yinggiretsay gotiyaa mala. 
Isaiah5:29 Unttunttu guduukka gaammoo mala; wodalla gaammotuwaadan gudiino; unttunttu daariidde, barew miyaawaa oyk'k'iino; tookki akkiide biino; unttunttuppe wotsi akkanawe ooninne baawa." 
Isaiah5:30 He gallassi unttunttu wolk'k'aama abbaa guntsaadan, Israa'eeliyaa bolla guummana; itti Asay he gadiyaa s'eellooppe, d'umaanne waayiyaa be'ana; poo'uukka shaariyaan mitettana." 
Isaiah6:1 Kaatii Ooziyaane hayk'k'eedda laytsi Goday bollaninne d'ok'k'a araatan utteeddawaa be'aad; Aa mayuu Geeshsha Golliyaa kumeedda. 
Isaiah6:2 Suraafeela geetettiyaa kiitanchchatuu aappe bollaanna de'iino; itti itti suraafeeliyaw usuppun k'efetuu de'iino; laau k'efetuwaan bare somuwaa kammee; laau k'efetuwaan bare gediyaa kammee; laau k'efetuwaan paallee. 
Isaiah6:3 Ittuu ittuwaanna, «Geeshshay, geeshshay, geeshshay Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaa! Sa'aa ubbay Aa bonchchuwaan kumeedda» yaagiide s'eesetteeddino." 
Isaiah6:4 Unttunttu s'eessaa kooshshaan Geeshsha Golliyaa baasuu k'aas's'eedda; k'ay Geeshsha Gollii c'uwaan kumeedda. 
Isaiah6:5 Yaatina, taani, «Taw aayye ana! Taani bayaad; ayaw gooppe, taani doonay tuneedda asaa; k'ay doonay tuneedda asatuwaa giddon de'ay; taani Kaatiyaa, Ubbaappe Wolk'k'aama Med'inaa Godaa ta ayifiyaan be'aad» yaagaad." 
Isaiah6:6 Suraafeelatuwaappe ittuu yarshshiyaa sa'aappe k'ap'eedda tamaa bonk'k'uwaa akkiide paalliidde, taakko yeedda." 
Isaiah6:7 Tamaa bonk'k'uwaan ta doonaa bochchiide, «Be'a; ha tamaa bonk'k'uu ne doonaa bochcheedda; Ne bayzzuu neeppe kichcheedda; ne nagaraykka atto geetetteedda» yaageedda." 
Isaiah6:8 Hewaappe guyyiyaan Goday, «Oona kiittoo? Nuw oonee baanawe?» yaagishin sisaad. Hewekka, «Hekko, taana kiitta» yaagaad." 
Isaiah6:9 Goday hawaadan yaageedda; «Ba; ha asaw, ‹Hintte sissaa sisiita; shin hinttenttoo gelenna; s'eeluwaakka s'eelliita; shin be'ikkita› yaagaade oda." 
Isaiah6:10 Ha asaa wozanaa donc'c'illissa; unttunttu haytsaakka tullissa; unttunttu ayfiyaakka k'ook'issa; hewe d'ayooppe, unttunttu barenttu ayifiyaan be'ana; barenttu haytsaan sisana; barenttu wozanaankka akeekana; yaatiide unttunttu taakko simmananne pas'ana» yaageedda." 
Isaiah6:11 Yaatina, taani, «Abeet Godaw! Hawe ayide gakkanaasee?» yaagaad. I zaaretsiide, «Katamatuu de'iyaa asaa d'ayiide, kolettana gakkanaasa, golletuukka onana gakkanawunne biittaykka ubbaanna mela gidana gakkanaasa." 
Isaiah6:12 Taani Med'inaa Goday asaa haassana; biittaakka mela kessana. 
Isaiah6:13 Tammu asaappe itti Asay gadiyaa bolla attooppe, ikka d'ayana; k'ans's'i diggina atteeda wolaa durumaa mala gidanawaa; he durumay geeshsha zeretsaa gidanawaa» yaageedda."
